papers.title: Adaptive Instruction Composition for Automated LLM Red-Teaming
papers.abstract: Many approaches to LLM red-teaming leverage an attacker LLM to discover jailbreaks against a target. Several of them task the attacker with identifying effective strategies through trial and error, resulting in a semantically limited range of successes. Another approach discovers diverse attacks by combining crowdsourced harmful queries and tactics into instructions for the attacker, but does so at random, limiting effectiveness. This article introduces a novel framework, Adaptive Instruction Composition, that combines crowdsourced texts according to an adaptive mechanism trained to jointly optimize effectiveness with diversity. We use reinforcement learning to balance exploration with exploitation in a combinatorial space of instructions to guide the attacker toward diverse generations tailored to target vulnerabilities. We demonstrate that our approach substantially outperforms random combination on a set of effectiveness and diversity metrics, even under model transfer. Further, we show that it surpasses a host of recent adaptive approaches on Harmbench. We employ a lightweight neural contextual bandit that adapts to contrastive embedding inputs, and provide ablations suggesting that the contrastive pretraining enables the network to rapidly generalize and scale to the massive space as it learns.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应指令组合框架，用强化学习平衡探索与利用，提升LLM红队攻击的有效性和多样性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM红队方法要么通过试错发现有限语义范围的攻击，要么随机组合众包有害查询和策略导致效果受限，需要一种能同时优化攻击有效性和多样性的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何自动组合众包文本指令，以生成既有效又多样化的越狱攻击，并适应目标模型的漏洞。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随机组合众包指令效果有限，而自适应组合能显著提升有效性和多样性；对比预训练使网络能快速泛化到大规模组合空间。
analysis.method: 提出自适应指令组合框架，使用轻量级神经上下文bandit，通过强化学习在指令的组合空间中平衡探索与利用，并利用对比嵌入输入进行自适应。
contributions: 提出自适应指令组合框架，联合优化攻击有效性和多样性。
在Harmbench上超越多种近期自适应方法，并在模型迁移下仍保持优势。
analysis.experiments: 在Harmbench上评估，与随机组合和多种自适应方法对比，在有效性和多样性指标上表现更优，并进行了消融实验验证对比预训练的作用。
limitations: 可能依赖众包数据质量，对低质量或过时数据鲁棒性未知。
轻量级bandit模型在极大规模组合空间中的扩展性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应指令组合框架，用强化学习平衡探索与利用，提升LLM红队攻击的有效性和多样性。

papers.title: Multi-Agent Empowerment and Emergence of Complex Behavior in Groups
papers.abstract: Intrinsic motivations are receiving increasing attention, i.e. behavioral incentives that are not engineered, but emerge from the interaction of an agent with its surroundings. In this work we study the emergence of behaviors driven by one such incentive, empowerment, specifically in the context of more than one agent. We formulate a principled extension of empowerment to the multi-agent setting, and demonstrate its efficient calculation. We observe that this intrinsic motivation gives rise to characteristic modes of group-organization in two qualitatively distinct environments: a pair of agents coupled by a tendon, and a controllable Vicsek flock. This demonstrates the potential of intrinsic motivations such as empowerment to not just drive behavior for only individual agents but also higher levels of behavioral organization at scale.

analysis.tldr: 将内在动机 empowerment 扩展到多智能体场景，发现其能自发产生群体组织行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 内在动机（如 empowerment）在单智能体中已展现自发行为涌现能力，但多智能体场景下的群体行为组织机制尚不明确，现有方法缺乏对多智能体 empowerment 的严格定义与高效计算。
analysis.problem: 如何将 empowerment 概念原则性地扩展到多智能体环境，并高效计算以驱动群体行为涌现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在肌腱耦合双智能体和可控 Vicsek 群两种环境中，empowerment 驱动了特征性的群体组织模式，表明内在动机可超越个体层面，促进更高层次的行为组织。
analysis.method: 提出多智能体 empowerment 的扩展定义，并设计高效计算方法。
contributions: 原则性地将 empowerment 扩展到多智能体场景
展示 empowerment 在两种不同环境中驱动群体组织行为的能力
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅验证了两种简单环境，复杂场景泛化性未知
未与其他内在动机方法进行定量比较
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将内在动机 empowerment 扩展到多智能体场景，发现其能自发产生群体组织行为。

papers.title: Agentic AI for Personalized Physiotherapy: A Multi-Agent Framework for Generative Video Training and Real-Time Pose Correction
papers.abstract: At-home physiotherapy compliance remains critically low due to a lack of personalized supervision and dynamic feedback. Existing digital health solutions rely on static, pre-recorded video libraries or generic 3D avatars that fail to account for a patient's specific injury limitations or home environment. In this paper, we propose a novel Multi-Agent System (MAS) architecture that leverages Generative AI and computer vision to close the tele-rehabilitation loop. Our framework consists of four specialized micro-agents: a Clinical Extraction Agent that parses unstructured medical notes into kinematic constraints; a Video Synthesis Agent that utilizes foundational video generation models to create personalized, patient-specific exercise videos; a Vision Processing Agent for real-time pose estimation; and a Diagnostic Feedback Agent that issues corrective instructions. We present the system architecture, detail the prototype pipeline using Large Language Models and MediaPipe, and outline our clinical evaluation plan. This work demonstrates the feasibility of combining generative media with agentic autonomous decision-making to scale personalized patient care safely and effectively.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个多智能体框架，利用生成式AI和计算机视觉为居家物理治疗生成个性化视频并实时纠正姿势。
analysis.research_motivation: 居家物理治疗依从性低，缺乏个性化监督和动态反馈；现有数字健康方案依赖静态视频或通用3D虚拟人，无法适应患者具体伤情和家庭环境。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能自动解析医疗记录、生成个性化训练视频、实时估计姿势并给出纠正指令的闭环远程康复系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出多智能体系统架构，包含四个微智能体：临床提取智能体（解析非结构化医疗记录为运动学约束）、视频合成智能体（利用基础视频生成模型创建个性化视频）、视觉处理智能体（实时姿态估计）和诊断反馈智能体（发出纠正指令）。
contributions: 提出首个结合生成式媒体与自主决策的多智能体框架用于个性化物理治疗。
详细描述了基于LLM和MediaPipe的原型流水线及临床评估计划。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述了系统架构和评估计划。
limitations: 仅提出架构和原型，缺乏实际临床验证结果。
视频生成质量和实时性可能受限于基础模型能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个多智能体框架，利用生成式AI和计算机视觉为居家物理治疗生成个性化视频并实时纠正姿势。

papers.title: Dialect vs Demographics: Quantifying LLM Bias from Implicit Linguistic Signals vs. Explicit User Profiles
papers.abstract: As state-of-the-art Large Language Models (LLMs) have become ubiquitous, ensuring equitable performance across diverse demographics is critical. However, it remains unclear whether these disparities arise from the explicitly stated identity itself or from the way identity is signaled. In real-world interactions, users' identity is often conveyed implicitly through a complex combination of various socio-linguistic factors. This study disentangles these signals by employing a factorial design with over 24,000 responses from two open-weight LLMs (Gemma-3-12B and Qwen-3-VL-8B), comparing prompts with explicitly announced user profiles against implicit dialect signals (e.g., AAVE, Singlish) across various sensitive domains. Our results uncover a unique paradox in LLM safety where users achieve ``better'' performance by sounding like a demographic than by stating they belong to it. Explicit identity prompts activate aggressive safety filters, increasing refusal rates and reducing semantic similarity compared to our reference text for Black users. In contrast, implicit dialect cues trigger a powerful ``dialect jailbreak,'' reducing refusal probability to near zero while simultaneously achieving a greater level of semantic similarity to the reference texts compared to Standard American English prompts. However, this ``dialect jailbreak'' introduces a critical safety trade-off regarding content sanitization. We find that current safety alignment techniques are brittle and over-indexed on explicit keywords, creating a bifurcated user experience where ``standard'' users receive cautious, sanitized information while dialect speakers navigate a less sanitized, more raw, and potentially a more hostile information landscape and highlights a fundamental tension in alignment--between equitable and linguistic diversity--and underscores the need for safety mechanisms that generalize beyond explicit cues.

analysis.tldr: LLM对显式身份和隐式方言信号的反应截然不同，显式身份触发安全过滤，隐式方言则导致“方言越狱”，揭示了安全对齐在语言多样性上的脆弱性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在不同人口群体间的性能差异来源不明，现有研究未区分显式身份声明与隐式语言信号的影响，而真实交互中身份常通过社会语言因素隐式传达。
analysis.problem: 量化并解耦LLM对显式用户身份与隐式方言信号（如AAVE、Singlish）的偏见差异，评估安全对齐机制在语言多样性下的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 显式身份提示激活激进安全过滤，增加拒绝率并降低语义相似度；隐式方言信号则引发“方言越狱”，降低拒绝率至接近零，同时提高语义相似度，但牺牲内容消毒，导致方言用户面临更少过滤、更原始且可能更敌对的信息环境。
analysis.method: 采用因子设计，使用两个开源LLM（Gemma-3-12B和Qwen-3-VL-8B）收集超过24,000个响应，比较显式用户身份提示与隐式方言信号（如AAVE、Singlish）在多个敏感领域的效果。
contributions: 首次系统解耦显式身份与隐式方言信号对LLM偏见的影响，揭示安全对齐中的悖论。
发现“方言越狱”现象，即隐式方言信号可绕过安全过滤，同时提高输出质量。
指出当前安全对齐技术过度依赖显式关键词，导致不同语言用户群体体验分化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及超过24,000个响应和两个模型。
limitations: 仅测试两个开源LLM，可能不适用于闭源模型或其他语言变体。
未深入分析方言越狱对内容安全性的具体影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM对显式身份和隐式方言信号的反应截然不同，显式身份触发安全过滤，隐式方言则导致“方言越狱”，揭示了安全对齐在语言多样性上的脆弱性。

papers.title: WFM: 3D Wavelet Flow Matching for Ultrafast Multi-Modal MRI Synthesis
papers.abstract: Diffusion models have achieved remarkable quality in multi-modal MRI synthesis, but their computational cost (hundreds of sampling steps and separate models per modality) limits clinical deployment. We observe that this inefficiency stems from an unnecessary starting point: diffusion begins from pure noise, discarding the structural information already present in available MRI sequences. We propose WFM (Wavelet Flow Matching), which instead learns a direct flow from an informed prior, the mean of conditioning modalities in wavelet space, to the target distribution. Because the source and target share underlying anatomy and differ primarily in contrast, this formulation enables accurate synthesis in just 1-2 integration steps. A single 82M-parameter model with class conditioning synthesizes all four BraTS modalities (T1, T1c, T2, FLAIR), replacing four separate diffusion models totaling 326M parameters. On BraTS 2024, WFM achieves 26.8 dB PSNR and 0.94 SSIM, within 1-2 dB of diffusion baselines, while running 250-1000x faster (0.16-0.64s vs. 160s per volume). This speed-quality trade-off makes real-time MRI synthesis practical for clinical workflows. Code is available at https://github.com/yalcintur/WFM.

analysis.tldr: 提出小波流匹配（WFM），利用小波空间中的条件先验实现超快速多模态MRI合成，仅需1-2步推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型在多模态MRI合成中质量高但计算成本大（数百步采样、每模态独立模型），限制了临床部署。
analysis.problem: 解决扩散模型在MRI合成中因从纯噪声开始而丢弃已有结构信息导致的低效问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到扩散模型从纯噪声开始，丢弃了已有MRI序列中的结构信息，导致不必要的计算开销。
analysis.method: 提出小波流匹配（WFM），在小波空间中学习从条件模态均值（先验）到目标分布的直交流，仅需1-2步积分。
contributions: 提出WFM，利用小波空间中的条件先验实现超快速多模态MRI合成。
单个82M参数模型通过类别条件合成所有四种BraTS模态，替代四个共326M参数的扩散模型。
在BraTS 2024上达到26.8 dB PSNR和0.94 SSIM，速度提升250-1000倍。
analysis.experiments: 在BraTS 2024数据集上评估，WFM达到26.8 dB PSNR和0.94 SSIM，推理时间0.16-0.64秒每体积，扩散基线约160秒。
limitations: 可能对模态间对比差异大的情况合成质量下降。
仅验证了脑肿瘤MRI模态，泛化到其他解剖部位或序列需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出小波流匹配（WFM），利用小波空间中的条件先验实现超快速多模态MRI合成，仅需1-2步推理。

papers.title: Using Machine Mental Imagery for Representing Common Ground in Situated Dialogue
papers.abstract: Situated dialogue requires speakers to maintain a reliable representation of shared context rather than reasoning only over isolated utterances. Current conversational agents often struggle with this requirement, especially when the common ground must be preserved beyond the immediate context window. In such settings, fine-grained distinctions are frequently compressed into purely textual representations, leading to a critical failure mode we call \emph{representational blur}, in which similar but distinct entities collapse into interchangeable descriptions. This semantic flattening creates an illusion of grounding, where agents appear locally coherent but fail to track shared context persistently over time. Inspired by the role of mental imagery in human reasoning, and based on the increased availability of multimodal models, we explore whether conversational agents can be given an analogous ability to construct some depictive intermediate representations during dialogue to address these limitations. Thus, we introduce an active visual scaffolding framework that incrementally converts dialogue state into a persistent visual history that can later be retrieved for grounded response generation. Evaluation on the IndiRef benchmark shows that incremental externalization itself improves over full-dialog reasoning, while visual scaffolding provides additional gains by reducing representational blur and enforcing concrete scene commitments. At the same time, textual representations remain advantageous for non-depictable information, and a hybrid multimodal setting yields the best overall performance. Together, these findings suggest that conversational agents benefit from an explicitly multimodal representation of common ground that integrates depictive and propositional information.

analysis.tldr: 提出主动视觉脚手架框架，通过多模态中间表征缓解对话中共同背景的表示模糊问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前对话智能体在维护共享上下文时，常因纯文本表示导致相似实体混淆（表示模糊），无法持久跟踪共同背景，而人类依赖心理意象进行推理，多模态模型的普及为赋予智能体类似能力提供了可能。
analysis.problem: 解决情境对话中共同背景的表示模糊问题，即纯文本表示导致相似但不同的实体坍缩为可互换描述，造成局部连贯但全局失真的幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到表示模糊现象：纯文本表示压缩细粒度区分，导致相似实体混淆；全对话推理在IndiRef基准上不如增量外部化，而视觉脚手架进一步减少模糊并强制具体场景承诺。
analysis.method: 主动视觉脚手架框架：将对话状态增量转换为持久视觉历史，用于后续接地响应生成，结合文本与视觉的混合多模态表示。
contributions: 提出主动视觉脚手架框架，利用多模态中间表征缓解对话共同背景的表示模糊问题。
在IndiRef基准上验证增量外部化和视觉脚手架的有效性，并发现混合多模态设置性能最优。
analysis.experiments: 在IndiRef基准上评估，显示增量外部化优于全对话推理，视觉脚手架带来额外增益，混合多模态性能最佳。
limitations: 视觉脚手架可能对不可描绘信息（如抽象概念）效果有限。
依赖多模态模型可用性，计算开销可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出主动视觉脚手架框架，通过多模态中间表征缓解对话中共同背景的表示模糊问题。

papers.title: A Hierarchical Ensemble Pipeline for Anomaly Detection in ESA Satellite Telemetry
papers.abstract: A hierarchical ensemble pipeline is introduced to address anomaly detection in multivariate telemetry data provided by European Space Agency (ESA). The method integrates shapelet-based and statistical feature extraction, per-channel modeling, intra-channel stacking, and a final cross-channel aggregation. The pipeline is trained and validated using time-series cross-validation and two-level masking strategies to prevent information leakage. Results on the European Space Agency Anomaly Detection Benchmark (ESA-ADB) challenge demonstrate strong generalization, highlighting the effectiveness of hierarchical modeling in detecting subtle anomalies in realistic satellite telemetry.

analysis.tldr: 提出层次化集成管道用于ESA卫星遥测异常检测，结合形状特征与统计特征，在ESA-ADB基准上表现良好。
analysis.research_motivation: 卫星遥测数据中的异常检测对于航天任务安全至关重要，但多变量时间序列的复杂性和数据泄露风险使得传统方法难以有效捕捉细微异常。
analysis.problem: 解决多变量卫星遥测数据中异常检测的准确性和泛化性问题，特别是防止信息泄露并提升对细微异常的检测能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 层次化集成管道：先提取形状特征和统计特征，然后对每个通道单独建模，再通过通道内堆叠和跨通道聚合进行最终检测。使用时间序列交叉验证和两级掩码策略防止信息泄露。
contributions: 提出一种层次化集成管道，结合形状特征和统计特征进行多变量遥测异常检测。
引入两级掩码策略和时间序列交叉验证，有效防止信息泄露。
analysis.experiments: 在ESA-ADB挑战数据集上验证，结果表明强泛化能力，能检测细微异常。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定特征工程，泛化到其他类型遥测数据需验证。
层次化结构可能增加计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出层次化集成管道用于ESA卫星遥测异常检测，结合形状特征与统计特征，在ESA-ADB基准上表现良好。

papers.title: Navigating the Clutter: Waypoint-Based Bi-Level Planning for Multi-Robot Systems
papers.abstract: Multi-robot control in cluttered environments is a challenging problem that involves complex physical constraints, including robot-robot collisions, robot-obstacle collisions, and unreachable motions. Successful planning in such settings requires joint optimization over high-level task planning and low-level motion planning, as violations of physical constraints may arise from failures at either level. However, jointly optimizing task and motion planning is difficult due to the complex parameterization of low-level motion trajectories and the ambiguity of credit assignment across the two planning levels. In this paper, we propose a hybrid multi-robot control framework that jointly optimizes task and motion planning. To enable effective parameterization of low-level planning, we introduce waypoints, a simple yet expressive representation for motion trajectories. To address the credit assignment challenge, we adopt a curriculum-based training strategy with a modified RLVR algorithm that propagates motion feasibility feedback from the motion planner to the task planner. Experiments on BoxNet3D-OBS, a challenging multi-robot benchmark with dense obstacles and up to nine robots, show that our approach consistently improves task success over motion-agnostic and VLA-based baselines. Our code is available at https://github.com/UCSB-NLP-Chang/navigate-cluster

analysis.tldr: 提出基于航路点的双层规划框架，联合优化多机器人任务与运动规划，在杂乱环境中提升任务成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 多机器人在杂乱环境中控制面临复杂物理约束（如碰撞、不可达运动），现有方法难以联合优化高层任务规划与低层运动规划，导致约束违反。
analysis.problem: 如何有效联合优化多机器人系统的任务规划与运动规划，解决低层轨迹参数化复杂和跨层信用分配模糊的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出混合多机器人控制框架，使用航路点作为运动轨迹的简洁表达，并采用基于课程学习的训练策略，结合改进的RLVR算法将运动可行性反馈传播到任务规划器。
contributions: 提出基于航路点的双层规划框架，联合优化任务与运动规划。
设计课程训练策略与改进RLVR算法，解决跨层信用分配问题。
analysis.experiments: 在BoxNet3D-OBS基准（密集障碍物，最多9个机器人）上，方法在任务成功率上持续优于忽略运动约束的基线和VLA基线。
limitations: 可能依赖航路点表示的质量，在极端复杂场景下表达力不足。
课程训练策略可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于航路点的双层规划框架，联合优化多机器人任务与运动规划，在杂乱环境中提升任务成功率。

papers.title: Enhancing Science Classroom Discourse Analysis through Joint Multi-Task Learning for Reasoning-Component Classification
papers.abstract: Analyzing the reasoning patterns of students in science classrooms is critical for understanding knowledge construction mechanism and improving instructional practice to maximize cognitive engagement, yet manual coding of classroom discourse at scale remains prohibitively labor-intensive. We present an automated discourse analysis system (ADAS) that jointly classifies teacher and student utterances along two complementary dimensions: Utterance Type and Reasoning Component derived from our prior CDAT framework. To address severe label imbalance among minority classes, we (1) stratify-resplit the annotated corpus, (2) apply LLM-based synthetic data augmentation targeting minority classes, and (3) train a dual-probe head RoBERTa-base classifier. A zero-shot GPT-5.4 baseline achieves macro-F1 of 0.467 on UT and 0.476 on RC, establishing meaningful upper bounds for prompt-only approaches motivating fine-tuning. Beyond classification, we conduct discourse pattern analyses including UTxRC co-occurrence profiling, Cognitive Complexity Index (CCI) computation per session, lag-sequential analysis, and IRF chain analysis, revealing that teacher Feedback-with-Question (Fq) moves are the most consistent antecedents of student inferential reasoning (SR-I). Our results demonstrate that LLM-based augmentation meaningfully improves UT minority-class recognition, and that the structural simplicity of the RC task makes it tractable even for lexical baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出联合多任务学习系统自动分类课堂话语中的话语类型和推理成分，缓解标签不平衡问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学课堂话语分析对理解知识建构机制至关重要，但人工编码耗时费力，亟需自动化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何自动且准确地分类课堂话语中的话语类型和推理成分，并处理严重的标签不平衡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于CDAT框架，采用分层重划分、LLM合成数据增强和双探头RoBERTa-base分类器进行联合多任务学习。
contributions: 提出自动化话语分析系统（ADAS），联合分类话语类型和推理成分。
通过分层重划分、LLM数据增强和双探头架构缓解标签不平衡。
进行多种话语模式分析，揭示教师反馈-提问行为与学生推理的关联。
analysis.experiments: 在标注语料上评估，零样本GPT-5.4基线在UT和RC上macro-F1分别为0.467和0.476；LLM增强提升了UT少数类识别。
limitations: 可能依赖特定框架（CDAT），泛化性待验证。
LLM合成数据质量可能影响少数类性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出联合多任务学习系统自动分类课堂话语中的话语类型和推理成分，缓解标签不平衡问题。

papers.title: Cross-Session Threats in AI Agents: Benchmark, Evaluation, and Algorithms
papers.abstract: AI-agent guardrails are memoryless: each message is judged in isolation, so an adversary who spreads a single attack across dozens of sessions slips past every session-bound detector because only the aggregate carries the payload. We make three contributions to cross-session threat detection. (1) Dataset. CSTM-Bench is 26 executable attack taxonomies classified by kill-chain stage and cross-session operation (accumulate, compose, launder, inject_on_reader), each bound to one of seven identity anchors that ground-truth "violation" as a policy predicate, plus matched Benign-pristine and Benign-hard confounders. Released on Hugging Face as intrinsec-ai/cstm-bench with two 54-scenario splits: dilution (compositional) and cross_session (12 isolation-invisible scenarios produced by a closed-loop rewriter that softens surface phrasing while preserving cross-session artefacts). (2) Measurement. Framing cross-session detection as an information bottleneck to a downstream correlator LLM, we find that a session-bound judge and a Full-Log Correlator concatenating every prompt into one long-context call both lose roughly half their attack recall moving from dilution to cross_session, well inside any frontier context window. Scope: 54 scenarios per shard, one correlator family (Anthropic Claude), no prompt optimisation; we release it to motivate larger, multi-provider datasets. (3) Algorithm and metric. A bounded-memory Coreset Memory Reader retaining highest-signal fragments at $K=50$ is the only reader whose recall survives both shards. Because ranker reshuffles break KV-cache prefix reuse, we promote $\mathrm{CSR\_prefix}$ (ordered prefix stability, LLM-free) to a first-class metric and fuse it with detection into $\mathrm{CSTM} = 0.7 F_1(\mathrm{CSDA@action}, \mathrm{precision}) + 0.3 \mathrm{CSR\_prefix}$, benchmarking rankers on a single Pareto of recall versus serving stability.

analysis.tldr: 提出跨会话威胁基准CSTM-Bench，发现现有AI Agent防护因无记忆而失效，并设计有界内存读取器提升检测鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI Agent安全防护是无记忆的，每条消息独立判断，攻击者可将恶意负载分散到多个会话中绕过检测，亟需跨会话威胁检测方法。
analysis.problem: 解决AI Agent中跨会话威胁的检测问题，即攻击者通过多会话组合传递恶意负载而单会话检测失效。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建CSTM-Bench基准（26种攻击分类、7种身份锚点、54场景分片），提出有界内存Coreset Memory Reader（K=50）保留高信号片段，并设计CSTM指标（融合检测F1与前缀稳定性）。
contributions: 发布CSTM-Bench数据集，包含26种可执行攻击分类和54场景分片，覆盖稀释和跨会话两种设置。
通过信息瓶颈框架测量发现，会话内判断器和全日志拼接器在跨会话场景下攻击召回率下降约一半。
提出有界内存Coreset Memory Reader和CSTM指标，在召回率和服务稳定性之间取得帕累托最优。
analysis.experiments: 在54场景分片上评估，使用Anthropic Claude作为关联器，未进行提示优化。
limitations: 仅使用单一关联器家族（Anthropic Claude），未测试多提供商模型。
未进行提示优化，可能低估最佳性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出跨会话威胁基准CSTM-Bench，发现现有AI Agent防护因无记忆而失效，并设计有界内存读取器提升检测鲁棒性。

papers.title: AGNT2: Autonomous Agent Economies on Interaction-Optimized Layer 2 Infrastructure
papers.abstract: Current blockchain Layer 2 solutions, including Optimism, Arbitrum, zkSync, and their derivatives, optimize for human-initiated financial transactions. Autonomous AI agents instead generate high-frequency, semantically rich service invocations among mutually untrusting principals. Existing chains treat those interactions as generic calldata, forcing identity, escrow, dependency ordering, and session state to be encoded above the execution layer at the wrong cost point. We present AGNT2, a three-tier stack purpose-built for agent and microservice coordination on-chain. AGNT2 combines: (1) a sidecar deployment pattern that turns any Docker container into an on-chain agent without application-code modification; (2) Layer Top P2P state channels for established bilateral pairs (<100 ms, rough design target 1K-5K TPS per pair, 10M+ aggregate TPS design envelope under endpoint-resource limits), Layer Core as a dependency-aware sequenced rollup for first-contact and multi-party interactions (500 ms-2 s, 300K-500K TPS design target), and Layer Root settlement with computational fraud proofs anchored to any EVM L1; and (3) an agent-native execution environment plus interaction trie that make service invocation, identity, reputation, capabilities, and session context first-class protocol objects. This paper focuses on the execution-layer systems problem: sequencing, state, settlement, and the data-availability (DA) bandwidth gap that bounds all three. Simulation and analytical modeling support the architecture, and prototype measurements validate selected components, but no end-to-end Layer Core implementation exists yet. Practical deployment is currently constrained to roughly 10K-100K TPS by DA throughput, leaving a ~100x gap at the target ceiling. AGNT2 argues that the agent economy requires a dedicated execution layer rather than a general-purpose chain repurposed for agents.

analysis.tldr: AGNT2 提出专为自主 AI Agent 经济设计的区块链三层架构，通过状态通道、依赖感知排序和交互树解决高频语义交互的执行层瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有区块链 Layer 2 针对人类发起的金融交易优化，无法高效处理自主 AI Agent 间高频、语义丰富的服务调用，导致身份、托管、依赖排序和会话状态在链上编码成本过高。
analysis.problem: 如何为自主 AI Agent 经济设计专用的执行层基础设施，以支持高频、语义丰富的服务调用，同时解决排序、状态、结算和数据可用性带宽瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 AGNT2 三层堆栈：Layer Top 为已建立双边关系的 Agent 提供 P2P 状态通道（<100 ms，1K-5K TPS/对）；Layer Core 为首次接触和多 Agent 交互提供依赖感知排序的 Rollup（500 ms-2 s，300K-500K TPS）；Layer Root 通过计算欺诈证明锚定到 EVM L1 进行结算。同时引入 Agent 原生执行环境和交互树，将服务调用、身份、声誉、能力和会话上下文作为一等协议对象。
contributions: 提出专为 Agent 经济设计的区块链三层架构，区分了高频双边交互和复杂多 Agent 交互的执行层需求。
引入交互树作为核心数据结构，将 Agent 交互的语义信息（身份、声誉、会话等）作为一等协议对象。
通过仿真和原型测量验证架构可行性，并指出数据可用性带宽是当前主要瓶颈（~10K-100K TPS，目标有~100x 差距）。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到仿真和分析建模支持架构，原型测量验证了选定组件，但未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: Layer Core 尚无端到端实现，仅通过仿真和原型组件验证。
实际部署受限于数据可用性吞吐量，与目标天花板存在约 100 倍差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AGNT2 提出专为自主 AI Agent 经济设计的区块链三层架构，通过状态通道、依赖感知排序和交互树解决高频语义交互的执行层瓶颈。

papers.title: HyperFM: An Efficient Hyperspectral Foundation Model with Spectral Grouping
papers.abstract: The NASA PACE mission provides unprecedented hyperspectral observations of ocean color, aerosols, and clouds, offering new insights into how these components interact and influence Earth's climate and air quality. Its Ocean Color Instrument measures light across hundreds of finely spaced wavelength bands, enabling detailed characterization of features such as phytoplankton composition, aerosol properties, and cloud microphysics. However, hyperspectral data of this scale is large, complex, and difficult to label, requiring specialized processing and analysis techniques. Existing foundation models, which have transformed computer vision and natural language processing, are generally trained on standard RGB imagery and therefore struggle to interpret the continuous spectral signatures captured by PACE. While recent advances have introduced hyperspectral foundation models, they are typically trained on cloud-free observations and often remain limited to single-sensor datasets due to spectral inconsistencies across instruments. Moreover, existing models tend to be parameter-heavy and computationally expensive, limiting scalability and adoption in operational settings. To address these challenges, we introduce HyperFM, a parameter-efficient hyperspectral foundation model that leverages intra-group and inter-group spectral attention along with hybrid parameter decomposition to better capture spectral spatial relationships while reducing computational cost. HyperFM demonstrates consistent performance improvements over existing hyperspectral foundation models and task-specific state-of-the-art methods across four benchmark downstream atmospheric cloud property retrieval tasks. To support further research, we additionally release HyperFM250K, a large-scale hyperspectral dataset from the PACE mission that includes both clear and cloudy scenes.

analysis.tldr: 提出参数高效的高光谱基础模型HyperFM，通过谱分组注意力机制在PACE任务上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: NASA PACE任务产生的高光谱数据规模大、复杂且难以标注，现有基础模型多基于RGB图像训练，无法处理连续光谱特征；现有高光谱模型参数多、计算成本高，且受限于单传感器数据集。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个参数高效的高光谱基础模型，能够有效处理PACE任务中连续光谱信号并降低计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HyperFM，采用组内和组间谱注意力机制以及混合参数分解，以更好地捕捉光谱空间关系并降低计算成本。
contributions: 提出参数高效的高光谱基础模型HyperFM，利用谱分组注意力机制提升性能并降低计算开销。
发布大规模高光谱数据集HyperFM250K，包含PACE任务的晴空和云场景数据。
analysis.experiments: 在四个基准下游大气云属性检索任务上，HyperFM一致优于现有高光谱基础模型和任务特定SOTA方法。
limitations: 可能仅针对PACE任务优化，泛化到其他高光谱传感器需验证。
参数效率提升的具体量化指标未在摘要中明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出参数高效的高光谱基础模型HyperFM，通过谱分组注意力机制在PACE任务上超越现有方法。

papers.title: Materialistic RIR: Material Conditioned Realistic RIR Generation
papers.abstract: Rings like gold, thuds like wood! The sound we hear in a scene is shaped not only by the spatial layout of the environment but also by the materials of the objects and surfaces within it. For instance, a room with wooden walls will produce a different acoustic experience from a room with the same spatial layout but concrete walls. Accurately modeling these effects is essential for applications such as virtual reality, robotics, architectural design, and audio engineering. Yet, existing methods for acoustic modeling often entangle spatial and material influences in correlated representations, which limits user control and reduces the realism of the generated acoustics. In this work, we present a novel approach for material-controlled Room Impulse Response (RIR) generation that explicitly disentangles the effects of spatial and material cues in a scene. Our approach models the RIR using two modules: a spatial module that captures the influence of the spatial layout of the scene, and a material module that modulates this spatial RIR according to a user-specified material configuration. This explicitly disentangled design allows users to easily modify the material configuration of a scene and observe its impact on acoustics without altering the spatial structure or scene content. Our model provides significant improvements over prior approaches on both acoustic-based metrics (up to +16% on RTE) and material-based metrics (up to +70%). Furthermore, through a human perceptual study, we demonstrate the improved realism and material sensitivity of our model compared to the strongest baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种显式解耦空间与材料影响的房间脉冲响应生成方法，支持用户控制材料属性以提升声学真实感。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有声学建模方法常将空间与材料影响纠缠在相关表示中，限制了用户对材料属性的独立控制，且生成声学效果的真实感不足。
analysis.problem: 如何生成可独立控制材料属性的房间脉冲响应（RIR），以准确模拟不同材料对声学的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双模块架构：空间模块捕获场景空间布局影响，材料模块根据用户指定的材料配置调制空间RIR，实现显式解耦。
contributions: 首次提出显式解耦空间与材料影响的RIR生成方法，支持独立控制材料属性。
在声学指标（RTE提升16%）和材料指标（提升70%）上显著优于先前方法，并通过人类感知实验验证真实感提升。
analysis.experiments: 在声学指标（RTE）和材料指标上评估，并进行了人类感知研究。
limitations: 可能依赖特定场景或材料配置的标注数据。
未讨论复杂场景中材料与空间交互的极端情况。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种显式解耦空间与材料影响的房间脉冲响应生成方法，支持用户控制材料属性以提升声学真实感。

papers.title: Pretrain Where? Investigating How Pretraining Data Diversity Impacts Geospatial Foundation Model Performance
papers.abstract: New geospatial foundation models introduce a new model architecture and pretraining dataset, often sampled using different notions of data diversity. Performance differences are largely attributed to the model architecture or input modalities, while the role of the pretraining dataset is rarely studied. To address this research gap, we conducted a systematic study on how the geographic composition of pretraining data affects a model's downstream performance. We created global and per-continent pretraining datasets and evaluated them on global and per-continent downstream datasets. We found that the pretraining dataset from Europe outperformed global and continent-specific pretraining datasets on both global and local downstream evaluations. To investigate the factors influencing a pretraining dataset's downstream performance, we analysed 10 pretraining datasets using diversity across continents, biomes, landcover and spectral values. We found that only spectral diversity was strongly correlated with performance, while others were weakly correlated. This finding establishes a new dimension of diversity to be accounted for when creating a high-performing pretraining dataset. We open-sourced 7 new pretraining datasets, pretrained models, and our experimental framework at https://github.com/kerner-lab/pretrain-where.

analysis.tldr: 预训练数据的地理组成对地理空间基础模型的下游性能有显著影响，其中光谱多样性是关键因素。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有地理空间基础模型通常引入新架构和预训练数据集，但性能差异多归因于模型或输入模态，预训练数据集的作用很少被系统研究。
analysis.problem: 预训练数据的地理多样性如何影响地理空间基础模型的下游性能，以及哪些多样性维度是关键因素。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 欧洲预训练数据集在全球和本地下游评估中均优于全球和其他大陆数据集；光谱多样性与性能强相关，而其他多样性指标（如大陆、生物群落、土地覆盖）相关性弱。
analysis.method: 构建全球和各大洲的预训练数据集，评估其在全球和各大洲下游任务上的性能，并分析10个预训练数据集在多样性指标（大陆、生物群落、土地覆盖、光谱值）上的表现。
contributions: 首次系统研究预训练数据地理组成对地理空间基础模型下游性能的影响。
发现光谱多样性是预训练数据集性能的关键预测因子，而非传统的地理多样性指标。
开源7个新预训练数据集、预训练模型和实验框架。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到创建了全球和各大洲预训练数据集，并在全球和各大洲下游数据集上评估，分析了10个预训练数据集的多样性。
limitations: 可能未考虑其他模态（如时间序列）或模型架构的影响。
光谱多样性的普适性可能需在其他地理区域或任务中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 预训练数据的地理组成对地理空间基础模型的下游性能有显著影响，其中光谱多样性是关键因素。

papers.title: AI Governance under Political Turnover: The Alignment Surface of Compliance Design
papers.abstract: Governments are increasingly interested in using AI to make administrative decisions cheaper, more scalable, and more consistent. But for probabilistic AI to be incorporated into public administration it must be embedded in a compliance layer that makes decisions reviewable, repeatable, and legally defensible. That layer can improve oversight by making departures from law easier to detect. But it can also create a stable approval boundary that political successors learn to navigate while preserving the appearance of lawful administration. We develop a formal model in which institutions choose the scale of automation, the degree of codification, and safeguards on iterative use. The model shows when these systems become vulnerable to strategic use from within government, why reforms that initially improve oversight can later increase that vulnerability, and why expansions in AI use may be difficult to unwind. Making AI usable can thus make procedures easier for future governments to learn and exploit.

analysis.tldr: 政治更替下AI治理的合规设计表面模型，揭示合规层如何被后续政府策略性利用。
analysis.research_motivation: 政府越来越多地使用AI进行行政决策，但概率性AI必须嵌入合规层以确保可审查、可重复和合法。然而，合规层可能被政治继任者学习并利用，从而破坏监督效果。
analysis.problem: 研究政治更替背景下，AI合规设计如何影响政府内部策略性使用，以及为何改革可能增加而非减少脆弱性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出合规层可能创造稳定的批准边界，政治继任者可以学习并利用它来维持合法表象，同时偏离法律。
analysis.method: 开发了一个形式化模型，机构选择自动化规模、编码程度和迭代使用保障措施，分析这些选择如何影响系统的脆弱性。
contributions: 揭示了合规层在政治更替下可能被策略性利用的机制
解释了为何初始改善监督的改革可能增加后续脆弱性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果
limitations: 模型可能简化了现实政治环境的复杂性
未考虑不同法律体系或文化背景的影响
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 政治更替下AI治理的合规设计表面模型，揭示合规层如何被后续政府策略性利用。

papers.title: Leveraging Multimodal LLMs for Built Environment and Housing Attribute Assessment from Street-View Imagery
papers.abstract: We present a novel framework for automatically evaluating building conditions nationwide in the United States by leveraging large language models (LLMs) and Google Street View (GSV) imagery. By fine-tuning Gemma 3 27B on a modest human-labeled dataset, our approach achieves strong alignment with human mean opinion scores (MOS), outperforming even individual raters on SRCC and PLCC relative to the MOS benchmark. To enhance efficiency, we apply knowledge distillation, transferring the capabilities of Gemma 3 27B to a smaller Gemma 3 4B model that achieves comparable performance with a 3x speedup. Further, we distill the knowledge into a CNN-based model (EfficientNetV2-M) and a transformer (SwinV2-B), delivering close performance while achieving a 30x speed gain. Furthermore, we investigate LLMs' capabilities for assessing an extensive list of built environment and housing attributes through a human-AI alignment study and develop a visualization dashboard that integrates LLM assessment outcomes for downstream analysis by homeowners. Our framework offers a flexible and efficient solution for large-scale building condition assessment, enabling high accuracy with minimal human labeling effort.

analysis.tldr: 利用多模态大模型和街景图像实现全国范围建筑状况自动评估，通过微调Gemma 3 27B和知识蒸馏达到高效高精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统建筑状况评估依赖人工实地考察，成本高、效率低，难以大规模部署；现有自动化方法精度不足或需要大量标注数据。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多模态大模型从街景图像中自动、高效、准确地评估建筑状况及环境属性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 微调Gemma 3 27B模型于少量人工标注数据，通过知识蒸馏将能力迁移至更小的Gemma 3 4B模型（3倍加速），再进一步蒸馏至CNN（EfficientNetV2-M）和Transformer（SwinV2-B）模型（30倍加速），并开发可视化仪表板。
contributions: 提出一个基于多模态大模型和街景图像的全国性建筑状况评估框架。
通过知识蒸馏实现模型压缩，在保持性能的同时大幅提升推理速度。
进行人类-AI对齐研究，评估LLM对多种建筑环境属性的判断能力。
analysis.experiments: 在人类标注数据集上微调Gemma 3 27B，与人类平均意见分数（MOS）对比，在SRCC和PLCC指标上优于单个评分者；蒸馏后的小模型性能接近，速度提升3倍和30倍。
limitations: 可能依赖Google Street View图像覆盖范围和质量。
评估属性列表有限，未涵盖所有建筑环境特征。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用多模态大模型和街景图像实现全国范围建筑状况自动评估，通过微调Gemma 3 27B和知识蒸馏达到高效高精度。

papers.title: Propensity Inference: Environmental Contributors to LLM Behaviour
papers.abstract: Motivated by loss of control risks from misaligned AI systems, we develop and apply methods for measuring language models' propensity for unsanctioned behaviour. We contribute three methodological improvements: analysing effects of changes to environmental factors on behaviour, quantifying effect sizes via Bayesian generalised linear models, and taking explicit measures against circular analysis. We apply the methodology to measure the effects of 12 environmental factors (6 strategic in nature, 6 non-strategic) and thus the extent to which behaviour is explained by strategic aspects of the environment, a question relevant to risks from misalignment. Across 23 language models and 11 evaluation environments, we find approximately equal contributions from strategic and non-strategic factors for explaining behaviour, do not find strategic factors becoming more or less influential as capabilities improve, and find some evidence for a trend for increased sensitivity to goal conflicts. Finally, we highlight a key direction for future propensity research: the development of theoretical frameworks and cognitive models of AI decision-making into empirically testable forms.

analysis.tldr: 提出倾向推断方法，测量环境因素对LLM行为的影响，发现策略与非策略因素贡献相当。
analysis.research_motivation: AI系统失控风险源于行为与人类意图不一致，现有方法缺乏对环境因素如何影响模型行为的系统性分析。
analysis.problem: 如何量化环境因素（尤其是策略性因素）对语言模型不当行为倾向的贡献。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过贝叶斯广义线性模型分析环境因素变化对行为的影响，并采取反循环分析措施。
contributions: 提出三种方法论改进：分析环境因素变化对行为的影响、量化效应大小、反循环分析。
在23个模型和11个评估环境中测量12种环境因素，发现策略与非策略因素贡献相当。
analysis.experiments: 在23个语言模型和11个评估环境中测量12种环境因素（6种策略性，6种非策略性）对行为的影响。
limitations: 环境因素选择有限，可能未覆盖所有相关变量。
缺乏理论框架将认知模型转化为可测试形式。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出倾向推断方法，测量环境因素对LLM行为的影响，发现策略与非策略因素贡献相当。

papers.title: On the Role of Strain and Vorticity in Numerical Integration Error for Flow Matching
papers.abstract: Flow matching generates data by integrating a learned velocity field, where the number of integration steps (NFE) directly determines inference cost. We analyze which properties of the velocity field govern integration error by decomposing the velocity Jacobian into its symmetric part S (strain rate) and antisymmetric part Omega (vorticity). We prove that strain and vorticity play different roles: strain controls exponential error amplification through the logarithmic norm, while vorticity contributes only linearly to the local truncation error. We further show that the optimal transport velocity field is irrotational and has zero material derivative, implying second-order Euler accuracy; for exact displacement interpolation, the associated Lagrangian particle dynamics are integrated exactly by Euler. Motivated by this analysis, we study weighted Jacobian regularization with strain weight alpha and vorticity weight beta. Experiments on 2D synthetic data confirm the main theoretical predictions, showing up to 2.7x lower integration error at NFE=5. Preliminary CIFAR-10 experiments show consistent trends, with a lightweight fine-tuning procedure improving FID by 14 percent at NFE=10 while preserving high-NFE quality.

analysis.tldr: 流匹配中速度场的应变率控制指数级误差放大，涡量仅贡献线性误差，基于此提出加权雅可比正则化方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 流匹配模型通过积分学习到的速度场生成数据，积分步数直接决定推理成本，但速度场的哪些性质主导积分误差尚不明确，理解这一机制有助于设计更高效的生成模型。
analysis.problem: 分析流匹配中速度场的应变率和涡量对数值积分误差的不同影响，并利用该分析改进模型训练以减少积分误差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将速度雅可比分解为对称部分（应变率S）和反对称部分（涡量Ω），理论证明应变率通过对数范数控制指数级误差放大，涡量仅贡献线性局部截断误差；基于此提出加权雅可比正则化，对S和Ω分别施加权重α和β。
contributions: 理论证明应变率和涡量在流匹配积分误差中扮演不同角色：应变率导致指数误差放大，涡量仅线性贡献。
证明最优传输速度场无旋且物质导数为零，具有二阶欧拉精度。
提出加权雅可比正则化方法，在2D合成数据和CIFAR-10上验证了有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在2D合成数据上验证理论预测，NFE=5时积分误差降低2.7倍；在CIFAR-10上通过轻量微调，NFE=10时FID改善14%，同时保持高NFE质量。
limitations: 实验仅在2D和CIFAR-10上进行，未在更大规模数据集或高分辨率图像上验证。
轻量微调过程可能对超参数敏感，泛化性需进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 流匹配中速度场的应变率控制指数级误差放大，涡量仅贡献线性误差，基于此提出加权雅可比正则化方法。

papers.title: TRAVELFRAUDBENCH: A Configurable Evaluation Framework for GNN Fraud Ring Detection in Travel Networks
papers.abstract: We introduce TravelFraudBench (TFG), a configurable benchmark for evaluating graph neural networks (GNNs) on fraud ring detection in travel platform graphs. Existing benchmarks--YelpChi, Amazon-Fraud, Elliptic, PaySim--cover single node types or domain-generic patterns with no mechanism to evaluate across structurally distinct fraud ring topologies. TFG simulates three travel-specific ring types--ticketing fraud (star topology with shared device/IP clusters), ghost hotel schemes (reviewer x hotel bipartite cliques), and account takeover rings (loyalty transfer chains)--in a heterogeneous graph with 9 node types and 12 edge types. Ring size, count, fraud rate, scale (500 to 200,000 nodes), and composition are fully configurable. We evaluate six methods--MLP, GraphSAGE, RGCN-proj, HAN, RGCN, and PC-GNN--under a ring-based split where each ring appears entirely in one partition, eliminating transductive label leakage. GraphSAGE achieves AUC=0.992 and RGCN-proj AUC=0.987, outperforming the MLP baseline (AUC=0.938) by 5.5 and 5.0 pp, confirming graph structure adds substantial discriminative power. HAN (AUC=0.935) is a negative result, matching the MLP baseline. On the ring recovery task (>=80% of ring members flagged simultaneously), GraphSAGE achieves 100% recovery across all ring types; MLP recovers only 17-88%. The edge-type ablation shows device and IP co-occurrence are the primary signals: removing uses_device drops AUC by 5.2 pp. TFG is released as an open-source Python package (MIT license) with PyG, DGL, and NetworkX exporters and pre-generated datasets at https://huggingface.co/datasets/bsajja7/travel-fraud-graphs, with Croissant metadata including Responsible AI fields.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个面向旅行平台欺诈环检测的可配置GNN基准框架，包含三种欺诈环拓扑和多种评估方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有欺诈检测基准（如YelpChi、Elliptic）仅覆盖单节点类型或通用模式，无法评估GNN在不同欺诈环拓扑结构上的表现，且存在标签泄露问题。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个可配置、支持多种欺诈环拓扑、避免标签泄露的旅行网络欺诈环检测基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: GraphSAGE和RGCN-proj显著优于MLP，表明图结构提供了额外判别力；HAN表现与MLP持平，为负结果；设备与IP共现是主要信号。
analysis.method: 构建包含9种节点类型和12种边类型的异构图，模拟三种旅行特定欺诈环（票务欺诈、幽灵酒店、账户接管），支持配置环大小、数量、欺诈率、图规模和组成，并采用基于环的数据划分避免标签泄露。
contributions: 提出首个面向旅行平台欺诈环检测的可配置GNN基准框架TravelFraudBench。
系统评估六种方法，揭示图结构的重要性及关键边类型。
analysis.experiments: 在500到200,000节点的图上评估六种方法，报告AUC和环恢复率，并进行边类型消融实验。
limitations: 仅模拟三种欺诈环类型，可能未覆盖所有实际场景。
基准生成参数配置可能影响结果泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个面向旅行平台欺诈环检测的可配置GNN基准框架，包含三种欺诈环拓扑和多种评估方法。

papers.title: Mind the Prompt: Self-adaptive Generation of Task Plan Explanations via LLMs
papers.abstract: Integrating Large Language Models (LLMs) into complex software systems enables the generation of human-understandable explanations of opaque AI processes, such as automated task planning. However, the quality and reliability of these explanations heavily depend on effective prompt engineering. The lack of a systematic understanding of how diverse stakeholder groups formulate and refine prompts hinders the development of tools that can automate this process. We introduce COMPASS (COgnitive Modelling for Prompt Automated SynthesiS), a proof-of-concept self-adaptive approach that formalises prompt engineering as a cognitive and probabilistic decision-making process. COMPASS models unobservable users' latent cognitive states, such as attention and comprehension, uncertainty, and observable interaction cues as a POMDP, whose synthesised policy enables adaptive generation of explanations and prompt refinements. We evaluate COMPASS using two diverse cyber-physical system case studies to assess the adaptive explanation generation and their qualities, both quantitatively and qualitatively. Our results demonstrate the feasibility of COMPASS integrating human cognition and user profile's feedback into automated prompt synthesis in complex task planning systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出COMPASS方法，将提示工程建模为认知与概率决策过程，实现任务规划解释的自适应生成。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM生成的解释质量依赖提示工程，但缺乏对用户群体如何制定和优化提示的系统理解，阻碍了自动化工具的开发。
analysis.problem: 如何自动生成适应不同用户认知状态的高质量任务规划解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: COMPASS：将提示工程形式化为认知和概率决策过程，建模用户潜在认知状态（注意力、理解、不确定性）和可观察交互线索为POMDP，通过综合策略自适应生成解释和优化提示。
contributions: 提出COMPASS，一种自适应的提示合成方法，将人类认知和用户反馈融入自动化提示工程。
通过两个不同的信息物理系统案例研究，定量和定性评估了自适应解释生成的质量。
analysis.experiments: 使用两个不同的信息物理系统案例研究，评估自适应解释生成及其质量，包括定量和定性分析。
limitations: 作为概念验证，可能在大规模或更复杂场景下需要进一步验证。
POMDP建模的认知状态可能无法完全覆盖所有用户差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出COMPASS方法，将提示工程建模为认知与概率决策过程，实现任务规划解释的自适应生成。

papers.title: Structural Quality Gaps in Practitioner AI Governance Prompts: An Empirical Study Using a Five-Principle Evaluation Framework
papers.abstract: AI governance programmes increasingly rely on natural language prompts to constrain and direct AI agent behaviour. These prompts function as executable specifications: they define the agent's mandate, scope, and quality criteria. Despite this role, no systematic framework exists for evaluating whether a governance prompt is structurally complete. We introduce a five-principle evaluation framework grounded in computability theory, proof theory, and Bayesian epistemology, and apply it to an empirical corpus of 34 publicly available AGENTS.md governance files sourced from GitHub. Our evaluation reveals that 37% of evaluated file-model pairs score below the structural completeness threshold, with data classification and assessment rubric criteria most frequently absent. These results suggest that practitioner-authored governance prompts exhibit consistent structural patterns that automated static analysis could detect and remediate. We discuss implications for requirements engineering practice in AI-assisted development contexts, identify a previously undocumented artefact classification gap in the AGENTS.md convention, and propose directions for tool support.

analysis.tldr: 对34个公开AI治理提示的实证研究发现37%存在结构完整性缺陷，并提出五原则评估框架。
analysis.research_motivation: AI治理提示作为可执行规范，缺乏系统评估其结构完整性的框架，可能导致代理行为失控。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估AI治理提示的结构完整性，并识别常见缺陷模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 37%的评估文件-模型对低于结构完整性阈值，数据分类和评估标准最常缺失。
analysis.method: 基于可计算性理论、证明论和贝叶斯认识论的五原则评估框架，对34个AGENTS.md文件进行实证分析。
contributions: 提出首个AI治理提示结构完整性评估框架
揭示实践者编写的治理提示存在系统性结构缺陷
analysis.experiments: 对34个公开AGENTS.md文件进行实证评估，报告了37%低于阈值的比例及缺失模式。
limitations: 样本量较小（34个文件），可能不具广泛代表性
框架依赖理论原则，实际应用效果需进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对34个公开AI治理提示的实证研究发现37%存在结构完整性缺陷，并提出五原则评估框架。

papers.title: Behavioral Consistency and Transparency Analysis on Large Language Model API Gateways
papers.abstract: Third-party Large Language Model (LLM) API gateways are rapidly emerging as unified access points to models offered by multiple vendors. However, the internal routing, caching, and billing policies of these gateways are largely undisclosed, leaving users with limited visibility into whether requests are served by the advertised models, whether responses remain faithful to upstream APIs, or whether invoices accurately reflect public pricing policies. To address this gap, we introduce GateScope, a lightweight black-box measurement framework for evaluating behavioral consistency and operational transparency in commercial LLM gateways. GateScope is designed to detect key misbehaviors, including model downgrading or switching, silent truncation, billing inaccuracies, and instability in latency by auditing gateways along four critical dimensions: response content analysis, multi-turn conversation performance, billing accuracy, and latency characteristics. Our measurements across 10 real-world commercial LLM API gateways reveal frequent gaps between expected and actual behaviors, including silent model substitutions, degraded memory retention, deviations from announced pricing, and substantial variation in latency stability across platforms.

analysis.tldr: 提出GateScope框架，黑盒测量LLM API网关的行为一致性与运营透明度，发现模型替换、计费偏差等普遍问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 第三方LLM API网关作为多供应商模型的统一接入点，其内部路由、缓存和计费策略不透明，用户难以验证请求是否由广告模型服务、响应是否忠实于上游API、账单是否准确。
analysis.problem: 缺乏系统方法检测LLM API网关的行为一致性问题，如模型降级/切换、静默截断、计费不准确和延迟不稳定。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对10个商业LLM API网关的测量揭示了预期行为与实际行为之间的频繁差距，包括静默模型替换、记忆保持下降、定价偏差以及不同平台间延迟稳定性显著变化。
analysis.method: GateScope：轻量级黑盒测量框架，通过响应内容分析、多轮对话性能、计费准确性和延迟特征四个维度审计网关行为。
contributions: 提出GateScope框架，系统评估LLM API网关的行为一致性和运营透明度。
通过10个真实商业网关的测量，揭示模型替换、计费偏差等普遍问题。
analysis.experiments: 在10个真实商业LLM API网关上进行了测量，但摘要未提供具体实验设置或定量结果。
limitations: 仅覆盖10个网关，可能不具全面代表性。
黑盒方法可能无法检测所有类型的内部策略违规。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GateScope框架，黑盒测量LLM API网关的行为一致性与运营透明度，发现模型替换、计费偏差等普遍问题。

papers.title: Foveated Reasoning: Stateful, Action-based Visual Focusing for Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Vision-language models benefit from high-resolution images, but the increase in visual-token count incurs high compute overhead. Humans resolve this tension via foveation: a coarse view guides "where to look", while selectively acquired high-acuity evidence refines "what to think". We introduce Foveated Reasoner, an autoregressive vision-language framework that unifies foveation and reasoning within a single decoding trajectory. Starting from a low-resolution view, the model triggers foveation only when needed, retrieves high-resolution evidence from selected regions, and injects it back into the same decoding trajectory. We train the method with a two-stage pipeline: coldstart supervision to bootstrap foveation behavior, followed by reinforcement learning to jointly improve evidence acquisition and task accuracy while discouraging trivial "see-everything" solutions. Experiments show that the method learns effective foveation policies and achieves stronger accuracy under tight visual-token budgets across multiple vision-language benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出Foveated Reasoner，通过状态化、基于动作的视觉聚焦机制，在低视觉token预算下提升VLM精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 高分辨率图像导致视觉token数量激增，计算开销大；人类通过中央凹视觉（粗视图引导聚焦，高精度证据细化推理）解决此矛盾，但现有VLM缺乏类似机制。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持高任务精度的同时，显著降低VLM处理高分辨率图像所需的视觉token数量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Foveated Reasoner，一个自回归视觉-语言框架，在单次解码轨迹中统一中央凹视觉与推理：从低分辨率视图开始，模型仅在需要时触发聚焦，检索选定区域的高分辨率证据并注入同一解码轨迹；采用两阶段训练：冷启动监督引导聚焦行为，随后强化学习联合优化证据获取与任务精度，并抑制“全看”的平凡解。
contributions: 提出Foveated Reasoner，首个在自回归解码中统一中央凹视觉与推理的VLM框架。
设计两阶段训练流程（冷启动监督+强化学习），有效学习聚焦策略并提升精度。
analysis.experiments: 在多个视觉-语言基准上，该方法在严格视觉token预算下实现了更强的精度。
limitations: 聚焦区域的选择可能受限于初始低分辨率视图的质量。
强化学习阶段可能对奖励函数设计敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Foveated Reasoner，通过状态化、基于动作的视觉聚焦机制，在低视觉token预算下提升VLM精度。

papers.title: Serialisation Strategy Matters: How FHIR Data Format Affects LLM Medication Reconciliation
papers.abstract: Medication reconciliation at clinical handoffs is a high-stakes, error-prone process. Large language models are increasingly proposed to assist with this task using FHIR-structured patient records, but a fundamental and largely unstudied variable is how the FHIR data is serialised before being passed to the model. We present the first systematic comparison of four FHIR serialisation strategies (Raw JSON, Markdown Table, Clinical Narrative, and Chronological Timeline) across five open-weight models (Phi-3.5-mini, Mistral-7B, BioMistral-7B, Llama-3.1-8B, Llama-3.3-70B) on a controlled benchmark of 200 synthetic patients, totalling 4,000 inference runs. We find that serialisation strategy has a large, statistically significant effect on performance for models up to 8B parameters: Clinical Narrative outperforms Raw JSON by up to 19 F1 points for Mistral-7B (r = 0.617, p < 10^{-10}). This advantage reverses at 70B, where Raw JSON achieves the best mean F1 of 0.9956. In all 20 model and strategy combinations, mean precision exceeds mean recall: omission is the dominant failure mode, with models more often missing an active medication than fabricating one, which changes how clinical safety auditing priorities should be set. Smaller models plateau at roughly 7-10 concurrent active medications, leaving polypharmacy patients, the patients most at risk from reconciliation errors, systematically underserved. BioMistral-7B, a domain-pretrained model without instruction tuning, produces zero usable output in all conditions, showing that domain pretraining alone is not sufficient for structured extraction. These results offer practical, evidence-based format recommendations for clinical LLM deployment: Clinical Narrative for models up to 8B, Raw JSON for 70B and above. The complete pipeline is reproducible on open-source tools running on an AWS g6e.xlarge instance (NVIDIA L40S, 48 GB VRAM).

analysis.tldr: FHIR数据序列化策略显著影响LLM药物重整性能，小模型用临床叙述、大模型用原始JSON效果最佳。
analysis.research_motivation: 药物重整在临床交接中至关重要且易出错，LLM被用于辅助该任务，但FHIR结构化患者数据的序列化方式对模型性能的影响尚未被系统研究。
analysis.problem: 探究不同FHIR数据序列化策略（Raw JSON、Markdown Table、Clinical Narrative、Chronological Timeline）对LLM药物重整任务性能的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 序列化策略对8B以下模型性能影响显著，Clinical Narrative比Raw JSON最高提升19 F1；70B模型则Raw JSON最优；所有组合中精确率高于召回率，遗漏是主要失败模式；小模型在7-10种药物时性能饱和，多药患者服务不足；BioMistral-7B无指令微调，所有条件下输出不可用。
analysis.method: 系统比较四种FHIR序列化策略（Raw JSON、Markdown Table、Clinical Narrative、Chronological Timeline）在五个开源模型上的表现，使用200个合成患者基准，共4000次推理。
contributions: 首次系统比较FHIR序列化策略对LLM药物重整的影响。
发现序列化策略对8B以下模型性能有显著影响，并给出基于证据的格式推荐：小模型用Clinical Narrative，大模型用Raw JSON。
揭示遗漏是主要失败模式，以及小模型在多药患者上的性能瓶颈。
analysis.experiments: 在200个合成患者基准上，使用五个模型（Phi-3.5-mini、Mistral-7B、BioMistral-7B、Llama-3.1-8B、Llama-3.3-70B）进行4000次推理，比较四种序列化策略。
limitations: 仅使用合成患者数据，未在真实临床数据上验证。
仅评估了药物重整任务，其他临床NLP任务可能不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FHIR数据序列化策略显著影响LLM药物重整性能，小模型用临床叙述、大模型用原始JSON效果最佳。

papers.title: Generative Discovery of Magnetic Insulators under Competing Physical Constraints
papers.abstract: Discovering materials that must simultaneously satisfy multiple competing constraints remains a central challenge in computational materials design, particularly in data-scarce regimes where conventional data-driven approaches are least effective. Magnetic insulators represent a stringent example: the electronic conditions that favor magnetic order often also promote metallicity, while insulating behavior suppresses the interactions that stabilize magnetism. As a result, experimentally viable magnetic insulators are rare and difficult to identify through conventional screening. Here, we introduce MagMatLLM, a constraint-guided generative discovery framework that integrates language-model-based crystal generation with evolutionary selection, surrogate screening, and first-principles validation to target simultaneous stability, magnetism, and insulating behavior. Unlike stability-first approaches, the framework enforces functional constraints during generation and selection, steering the search toward sparsely populated regions of materials space defined by competing physical requirements. Using this workflow, we identify twelve previously unreported candidate magnetic insulators, including Tm$_4$Co$_2$Cr$_2$O$_{12}$ and Cr$_4$Nb$_2$O$_{12}$. Of these, ten are dynamically stable by phonon analysis and exhibit finite band gaps and nonzero magnetic moments in spin-polarized density functional theory calculations. Beyond the specific compounds identified here, this work establishes a general constraint-guided paradigm for multi-objective materials discovery in sparse chemical spaces and provides a transferable strategy for the design of quantum materials under competing physical constraints.

analysis.tldr: 提出MagMatLLM框架，在数据稀缺条件下通过约束引导生成发现满足磁性、绝缘性和稳定性的新材料。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统数据驱动方法在数据稀缺时效果不佳，而磁性绝缘体需同时满足磁性、绝缘性和稳定性等相互竞争的物理约束，实验可行的候选材料稀少，亟需高效发现方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在数据稀缺条件下，发现同时满足稳定性、磁性和绝缘行为等多种竞争约束的磁性绝缘体材料。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 磁性绝缘体难以发现，因为有利于磁性的电子条件往往促进金属性，而绝缘行为抑制稳定磁性的相互作用，导致满足所有约束的材料在材料空间中稀疏分布。
analysis.method: MagMatLLM框架：结合基于语言模型的晶体生成、进化选择、代理筛选和第一性原理验证，在生成和选择过程中强制执行功能约束，引导搜索向竞争物理约束定义的稀疏材料区域。
contributions: 提出MagMatLLM，一种约束引导的生成式发现框架，用于多目标材料发现。
识别出12种先前未报道的候选磁性绝缘体，其中10种经声子分析和自旋极化DFT验证具有动态稳定性、有限带隙和非零磁矩。
建立了在稀疏化学空间中处理竞争约束的通用范式，可迁移至其他量子材料设计。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到通过自旋极化密度泛函理论计算验证了候选材料的带隙和磁矩，并通过声子分析验证了动态稳定性。
limitations: 候选材料仍需实验合成验证，摘要未提及实验验证。
框架依赖第一性原理计算，可能计算成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MagMatLLM框架，在数据稀缺条件下通过约束引导生成发现满足磁性、绝缘性和稳定性的新材料。

papers.title: Expanding the extreme-k dielectric materials space through physics-validated generative reasoning
papers.abstract: The most technologically consequential materials are often the rarest: they occupy narrow regions of chemical space, obey competing physical constraints, and appear only sparsely in existing databases. High-kappa dielectrics, high-Tc superconductors, and ferromagnetic insulators are to name a few. This scarcity fundamentally limits today's data-driven materials discovery, where machine-learning models excel at interpolation but struggle to generate genuinely new candidates. Here, we introduce DielecMIND, an artificial intelligence framework that reframes materials discovery as a reasoning-driven exploration instead of a database-screening problem. Using high-kappa dielectrics as a data-scarce and technologically stringent test case, DielecMIND combines large-language-model hypothesis generation for the first time with physics validated first-principles calculation to navigate chemical space beyond known compounds. Prior to our work, only 14 experimentally or computationally validated materials with kappa > 150 were known. Our framework discovers and validates 5 new such compounds, expanding this rare-materials class by a remarkable = 35% in a single study. Among them, we find that Ba2TiHfO6 exhibits a dielectric constant of 637, minimal loss at low optical frequencies, and stability up to 800 K. Beyond dielectrics, this work demonstrates a new paradigm for artificial-intelligence-guided discovery: one that generates a small number of physically grounded, experimentally plausible candidates yet measurably expands sparsely populated functional materials spaces. Thus, DielecMIND points toward a general strategy for discovering rare, high-impact functional materials where data scarcity has long constrained progress.

analysis.tldr: DielecMIND结合LLM假设生成与第一性原理计算，发现5种高介电常数新材料，将已知κ>150的材料数量扩展35%。
analysis.research_motivation: 高介电常数等极端功能材料在化学空间中极为稀疏，传统数据驱动方法因数据稀缺难以生成真正的新候选物，限制了材料发现。
analysis.problem: 如何从稀疏数据中生成并验证物理可行的极端介电材料候选物。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: DielecMIND框架：使用大语言模型生成假设，结合物理验证的第一性原理计算，将材料发现重构为推理驱动的探索而非数据库筛选。
contributions: 提出DielecMIND框架，首次将LLM假设生成与第一性原理计算结合用于材料发现。
发现并验证5种κ>150的新化合物，将已知该类材料数量扩展35%，其中Ba2TiHfO6介电常数达637。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅以高介电常数材料为测试案例，泛化性需更多验证。
依赖第一性原理计算，可能计算成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DielecMIND结合LLM假设生成与第一性原理计算，发现5种高介电常数新材料，将已知κ>150的材料数量扩展35%。

papers.title: Optimizing Diffusion Priors in Image Reconstruction from a Single Observation
papers.abstract: While diffusion priors generate high-quality posterior samples across many inverse problems, they are often trained on limited training sets or purely simulated data, thus inheriting the errors and biases of these underlying sources. Current approaches to finetuning diffusion models rely on a large number of observations with varying forward operators, which can be difficult to collect for many applications, and thus lead to overfitting when the measurement set is small. We propose a method for tuning a prior from only a single observation by combining existing diffusion priors into a single product-of-experts prior and identifying the exponents that maximize the Bayesian evidence. We validate our method on real-world inverse problems, including black hole imaging, where the true prior is unknown a priori, and image deblurring with text-conditioned priors. We find that the evidence is often maximized by priors that extend beyond those trained on a single dataset. By generalizing the prior through exponent weighting, our approach enables posterior sampling from both tempered and combined diffusion models, yielding more flexible priors that improve the trustworthiness of the resulting posterior image distribution.

analysis.tldr: 仅用单次观测数据，通过贝叶斯证据最大化来优化扩散先验的指数加权组合，提升图像重建质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散先验在逆问题中生成高质量后验样本，但常受限于有限训练集或纯模拟数据，导致误差和偏差；现有微调方法需要大量不同前向算子的观测，难以收集且易过拟合。
analysis.problem: 如何仅从单次观测数据中调整扩散先验，以克服训练数据偏差并提高后验分布的可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将多个扩散先验组合成专家乘积先验，并通过最大化贝叶斯证据来学习每个先验的指数权重，从而得到更灵活的先验，支持温度采样和组合采样。
contributions: 提出仅用单次观测即可优化扩散先验的方法，通过贝叶斯证据最大化确定专家乘积先验的指数权重。
在黑洞成像和文本条件图像去模糊等真实逆问题上验证，表明证据最大化倾向于选择超越单一数据集的先验组合。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界的逆问题（黑洞成像、文本条件图像去模糊）上验证，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能依赖初始扩散先验的质量和多样性。
贝叶斯证据最大化在复杂模型上计算可能昂贵。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 仅用单次观测数据，通过贝叶斯证据最大化来优化扩散先验的指数加权组合，提升图像重建质量。

papers.title: InVitroVision: a Multi-Modal AI Model for Automated Description of Embryo Development using Natural Language
papers.abstract: The application of artificial intelligence (AI) in IVF has shown promise in improving consistency and standardization of decisions, but often relies on annotated data and does not make use of the multimodal nature of IVF data. We investigated whether foundational vision-language models can be fine-tuned to predict natural language descriptions of embryo morphology and development. Using a publicly available embryo time-lapse dataset, we fine-tuned PaliGemma-2, a multi-modal vision-language model, with only 1,000 images and corresponding captions, describing embryo morphology, embryonic cell cycle and developmental stage. Our results show that the fine-tuned model, InVitroVision, outperformed a commercial model, ChatGPT 5.2, and base models in overall metrics, with performance improving with larger training datasets. This study demonstrates the potential of foundational vision-language models to generalize to IVF tasks with limited data, enabling the prediction of natural language descriptions of embryo morphology and development. This approach may facilitate the use of large language models to retrieve information and scientific evidence from relevant publications and guidelines, and has implications for few-shot adaptation to multiple downstream tasks in IVF.

analysis.tldr: 微调视觉-语言模型PaliGemma-2，用少量数据自动生成胚胎发育的自然语言描述。
analysis.research_motivation: IVF中AI应用依赖标注数据且未充分利用多模态数据，现有方法缺乏标准化和一致性。
analysis.problem: 如何用少量标注数据自动生成胚胎形态和发育的自然语言描述。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 微调PaliGemma-2多模态视觉-语言模型，使用1000张胚胎延时图像及对应描述文本。
contributions: 首次将基础视觉-语言模型应用于IVF胚胎描述任务，仅需少量数据即可微调。
InVitroVision在整体指标上优于商业模型ChatGPT 5.2和基础模型。
analysis.experiments: 在公开胚胎延时数据集上微调，使用1000张图像和对应描述，性能随训练数据增大而提升。
limitations: 仅使用单一公开数据集，泛化性需验证。
未提及模型在复杂或罕见胚胎形态上的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 微调视觉-语言模型PaliGemma-2，用少量数据自动生成胚胎发育的自然语言描述。

papers.title: Clinically-Informed Modeling for Pediatric Brain Tumor Classification from Whole-Slide Histopathology Images
papers.abstract: Accurate diagnosis of pediatric brain tumors, starting with histopathology, presents unique challenges for deep learning, including severe data scarcity, class imbalance, and fine-grained morphologic overlap across diagnostically distinct subtypes. While pathology foundation models have advanced patch-level representation learning, their effective adaptation to weakly supervised pediatric brain tumor classification under limited data remains underexplored. In this work, we introduce an expert-guided contrastive fine-tuning framework for pediatric brain tumor diagnosis from whole-slide images (WSI). Our approach integrates contrastive learning into slide-level multiple instance learning (MIL) to explicitly regularize the geometry of slide-level representations during downstream fine-tuning. We propose both a general supervised contrastive setting and an expert-guided variant that incorporates clinically informed hard negatives targeting diagnostically confusable subtypes. Through comprehensive experiments on pediatric brain tumor WSI classification under realistic low-sample and class-imbalanced conditions, we demonstrate that contrastive fine-tuning yields measurable improvements in fine-grained diagnostic distinctions. Our experimental analyses reveal complementary strengths across different contrastive strategies, with expert-guided hard negatives promoting more compact intra-class representations and improved inter-class separation. This work highlights the importance of explicitly shaping slide-level representations for robust fine-grained classification in data-scarce pediatric pathology settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出专家引导的对比微调框架，在少量数据下提升儿童脑肿瘤全切片图像分类的细粒度诊断能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 儿童脑肿瘤病理诊断面临数据稀缺、类别不平衡和亚型间形态重叠等挑战，现有病理基础模型在弱监督分类中适应不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在数据有限和类别不平衡条件下，有效适应病理基础模型以实现儿童脑肿瘤全切片图像的细粒度分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将对比学习集成到幻灯片级多实例学习（MIL）中，提出通用监督对比设置和专家引导变体（利用临床信息构建难负样本），以正则化幻灯片级表征几何结构。
contributions: 提出一种专家引导的对比微调框架，用于儿童脑肿瘤WSI分类。
通过实验证明对比微调在低样本和类别不平衡条件下能提升细粒度诊断区分度。
analysis.experiments: 在儿童脑肿瘤WSI分类上进行了低样本和类别不平衡条件下的综合实验，对比不同对比策略，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能依赖专家知识构建难负样本，泛化性需验证。
仅在单一肿瘤类型上验证，跨病种适用性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出专家引导的对比微调框架，在少量数据下提升儿童脑肿瘤全切片图像分类的细粒度诊断能力。

papers.title: FASQ: Flexible Accelerated Subspace Quantization for Calibration-Free LLM Compression
papers.abstract: Compressing large language models (LLMs) for deployment on commodity GPUs remains challenging: conventional scalar quantization is limited to fixed bit-widths (e.g., 8/4/3-bit), offers only a few discrete compression points, and typically requires calibration data. We present FASQ (Flexible Accelerated Subspace Quantization), a calibration-free framework that applies product quantization to LLM weight matrices. By tuning two parameters, sub-vector size and codebook cardinality, FASQ exposes a continuous design space spanning 27-49% of the original FP16 model size, filling compression gaps that fixed-bit schemes cannot reach. On Meta-Llama-3-8B, FASQ surpasses 4-bit GPTQ and AWQ in accuracy (67.1-67.7 avg.) at 37-42% model size, with consistent results on Qwen3-8B and Qwen3.5-9B-Base. To make product quantization practical at inference time, we design custom CUDA kernels: a LUT-free direct-compute GEMV for decode and an output-stationary double-buffered LUT GEMM for prefill, both with split-K parallelism. On an RTX~3090, FASQ achieves 45.2 tok/s decode at effective 4-bit (2.56x memory reduction) and 51.8 tok/s at effective 3-bit (2.80x), both surpassing FP16 tensor-core performance (43.9 tok/s) and delivering 1.6 to 1.8x the throughput of AWQ, 2.5 to 2.5x of GPTQ, and 4.3 to 5x of RTN. FASQ is the only compressed method that accelerates decode beyond FP16, offering calibration-free compression, continuous size-quality trade-offs, and real-time inference on a single consumer GPU.

analysis.tldr: FASQ通过乘积量化和定制CUDA内核实现免校准、连续压缩比的LLM压缩，在解码速度上超越FP16。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有标量量化仅支持固定比特宽度（如8/4/3位），压缩点离散且通常需要校准数据，限制了LLM在消费级GPU上的灵活部署。
analysis.problem: 如何实现免校准、连续压缩比且推理加速的LLM压缩方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出FASQ框架，对LLM权重矩阵应用乘积量化，通过调节子向量大小和码本基数实现连续压缩比；设计无LUT直接计算GEMV和解码核以及输出驻留双缓冲LUT GEMM预填充核，并采用split-K并行。
contributions: 提出免校准的乘积量化框架FASQ，实现连续压缩比（27-49% FP16大小）。
设计定制CUDA内核使乘积量化在推理时实用，解码速度超越FP16。
analysis.experiments: 在Meta-Llama-3-8B上，FASQ在37-42%模型大小时准确率67.1-67.7，超越4-bit GPTQ和AWQ；在Qwen3-8B和Qwen3.5-9B-Base上结果一致。RTX 3090上有效4位解码45.2 tok/s（2.56x内存缩减），有效3位51.8 tok/s（2.80x），均超过FP16张量核心性能（43.9 tok/s），吞吐量为AWQ的1.6-1.8x、GPTQ的2.5x、RTN的4.3-5x。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定架构的GPU（如RTX 3090）。
乘积量化的码本训练可能增加额外开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FASQ通过乘积量化和定制CUDA内核实现免校准、连续压缩比的LLM压缩，在解码速度上超越FP16。

papers.title: Neuro-Symbolic Manipulation Understanding with Enriched Semantic Event Chains
papers.abstract: Robotic systems operating in human environments must reason about how object interactions evolve over time, which actions are currently being performed, and what manipulation step is likely to follow. Classical enriched Semantic Event Chains (eSECs) provide an interpretable relational description of manipulation, but remain primarily descriptive and do not directly support uncertainty-aware decision making. In this paper, we propose eSEC-LAM, a neuro-symbolic framework that transforms eSECs into an explicit event-level symbolic state for manipulation understanding. The proposed formulation augments classical eSECs with confidence-aware predicates, functional object roles, affordance priors, primitive-level abstraction, and saliency-guided explanation cues. These enriched symbolic states are derived from a foundation-model-based perception front-end through deterministic predicate extraction, while current-action inference and next-primitive prediction are performed using lightweight symbolic reasoning over primitive pre- and post-conditions. We evaluate the proposed framework on EPIC-KITCHENS-100, EPIC-KITCHENS VISOR, and Assembly101 across action recognition, next-primitive prediction, robustness to perception noise, and explanation consistency. Experimental results show that eSEC-LAM achieves competitive action recognition, substantially improves next-primitive prediction, remains more robust under degraded perceptual conditions than both classical symbolic and end-to-end video baselines, and provides temporally consistent explanation traces grounded in explicit relational evidence. These findings demonstrate that enriched Semantic Event Chains can serve not only as interpretable descriptors of manipulation, but also as effective internal states for neuro-symbolic action reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出eSEC-LAM框架，将语义事件链转化为带置信度的符号状态，实现神经符号操作理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器人需理解操作演化，但经典eSEC仅描述性，缺乏不确定性感知决策支持。
analysis.problem: 如何将eSEC转化为支持不确定性感知和推理的符号状态，用于动作识别和下一步预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: eSEC-LAM：基于基础模型感知前端提取带置信度谓词、功能角色、先验、原语抽象和解释线索的符号状态，通过轻量符号推理进行当前动作识别和下一步预测。
contributions: 提出eSEC-LAM神经符号框架，增强eSEC为不确定性感知符号状态。
在EPIC-KITCHENS-100等数据集上验证了动作识别、下一步预测、鲁棒性和解释一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在EPIC-KITCHENS-100、EPIC-KITCHENS VISOR和Assembly101上评估动作识别、下一步预测、对感知噪声的鲁棒性和解释一致性。
limitations: 依赖基础模型感知前端，可能受限于感知质量。
符号推理可能无法处理复杂长程依赖。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出eSEC-LAM框架，将语义事件链转化为带置信度的符号状态，实现神经符号操作理解。

papers.title: StyleVAR: Controllable Image Style Transfer via Visual Autoregressive Modeling
papers.abstract: We build on the Visual Autoregressive Modeling (VAR) framework and formulate style transfer as conditional discrete sequence modeling in a learned latent space. Images are decomposed into multi-scale representations and tokenized into discrete codes by a VQ-VAE; a transformer then autoregressively models the distribution of target tokens conditioned on style and content tokens. To inject style and content information, we introduce a blended cross-attention mechanism in which the evolving target representation attends to its own history, while style and content features act as queries that decide which aspects of this history to emphasize. A scale-dependent blending coefficient controls the relative influence of style and content at each stage, encouraging the synthesized representation to align with both the content structure and the style texture without breaking the autoregressive continuity of VAR. We train StyleVAR in two stages from a pretrained VAR checkpoint: supervised fine-tuning on a large triplet dataset of content--style--target images, followed by reinforcement fine-tuning with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) against a DreamSim-based perceptual reward, with per-action normalization weighting to rebalance credit across VAR's multi-scale hierarchy. Across three benchmarks spanning in-, near-, and out-of-distribution regimes, StyleVAR consistently outperforms an AdaIN baseline on Style Loss, Content Loss, LPIPS, SSIM, DreamSim, and CLIP similarity, and the GRPO stage yields further gains over the SFT checkpoint, most notably on the reward-aligned perceptual metrics. Qualitatively, the method transfers texture while maintaining semantic structure, especially for landscapes and architectural scenes, while a generalization gap on internet images and difficulty with human faces highlight the need for better content diversity and stronger structural priors.

analysis.tldr: 基于视觉自回归建模的受控图像风格迁移方法，通过混合交叉注意力和两阶段训练实现纹理与结构的平衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有风格迁移方法难以在保持内容结构的同时有效传递风格纹理，且缺乏对生成过程的精细控制。
analysis.problem: 如何利用视觉自回归建模实现可控的图像风格迁移，使合成图像同时对齐内容结构和风格纹理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于VAR框架，将风格迁移建模为条件离散序列生成；提出混合交叉注意力机制，通过尺度依赖的混合系数控制风格与内容影响；两阶段训练：SFT微调+GRPO强化学习。
contributions: 首次将视觉自回归建模应用于风格迁移任务，并设计条件序列生成框架。
提出混合交叉注意力机制，实现风格与内容的可控融合。
引入GRPO强化学习微调，提升感知质量。
analysis.experiments: 在三个跨分布基准上评估，StyleVAR在风格损失、内容损失、LPIPS、SSIM、DreamSim和CLIP相似度上均优于AdaIN基线，GRPO阶段进一步改善感知指标。
limitations: 对互联网图像存在泛化差距，人脸迁移效果不佳。
需要大规模三元组数据集和两阶段训练，计算成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于视觉自回归建模的受控图像风格迁移方法，通过混合交叉注意力和两阶段训练实现纹理与结构的平衡。

papers.title: Active Data
papers.abstract: In some complex domains, certain problem-specific decompositions can provide advantages over monolithic designs by enabling comprehension and specification of the design. In this paper we present an intuitive and tractable approach to reasoning over large and complex data sets. Our approach is based on Active Data, i.e., data as atomic objects that actively interact with environments. We describe our intuition about how this bottom-up approach improves designs confronting computational and conceptual complexity. We describe an implementation of the base Active Data concepts within the air traffic flow management domain and discuss performance for this implementation.

analysis.tldr: 提出Active Data概念，将数据视为主动与环境交互的原子对象，以应对大规模复杂数据集的推理挑战。
analysis.research_motivation: 在复杂领域中，传统整体式设计难以理解和规范大规模数据集，需要更直观且易处理的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种自底向上的数据表示方法，使数据能主动与环境交互，从而降低计算和概念复杂性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Active Data概念，将数据建模为主动与环境交互的原子对象，并在空中交通流量管理领域实现基础概念。
contributions: 提出Active Data概念，为复杂数据集推理提供直观且易处理的方法。
在空中交通流量管理领域实现并评估了Active Data的性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定领域（如空中交通流量管理），泛化性未验证。
实现细节和性能对比未在摘要中说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Active Data概念，将数据视为主动与环境交互的原子对象，以应对大规模复杂数据集的推理挑战。

papers.title: Strategic Polysemy in AI Discourse: A Philosophical Analysis of Language, Hype, and Power
papers.abstract: This paper examines the strategic use of language in contemporary artificial intelligence (AI) discourse, focusing on the widespread adoption of metaphorical or colloquial terms like "hallucination", "chain-of-thought", "introspection", "language model", "alignment", and "agent". We argue that many such terms exhibit strategic polysemy: they sustain multiple interpretations simultaneously, combining narrow technical definitions with broader anthropomorphic or common-sense associations. In contemporary AI research and deployment contexts, this semantic flexibility produces significant institutional and discursive effects, shaping how AI systems are understood by researchers, policymakers, funders, and the public. To analyse this phenomenon, we introduce the concept of glosslighting: the practice of using technically redefined terms to evoke intuitive -- often anthropomorphic or misleading -- associations while preserving plausible deniability through restricted technical definitions. Glosslighting enables actors to benefit from the persuasive force of familiar language while maintaining the ability to retreat to narrower definitions when challenged. We argue that this practice contributes to AI hype cycles, facilitates the mobilisation of investment and institutional support, and influences public and policy perceptions of AI systems, while often deflecting epistemic and ethical scrutiny. By examining the linguistic dynamics of glosslighting and strategic polysemy, the paper highlights how language itself functions as a sociotechnical mechanism shaping the development and governance of AI.

analysis.tldr: 论文揭示AI话语中“战略性一词多义”现象，提出“glosslighting”概念，分析语言如何塑造AI认知与治理。
analysis.research_motivation: AI领域广泛使用拟人化或隐喻性术语（如“幻觉”“思维链”），这些术语在技术定义与日常含义间摇摆，影响研究、政策与公众认知，但缺乏系统性语言分析。
analysis.problem: AI话语中的战略性一词多义如何产生、运作，并塑造AI系统的理解、投资、政策与治理？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到“幻觉”“对齐”“智能体”等术语同时承载技术定义与拟人化联想，这种语义灵活性被策略性利用，形成“glosslighting”现象：通过技术重定义术语唤起直观联想，同时保留技术定义作为否认依据。
analysis.method: 哲学分析与概念引入：提出“glosslighting”概念，结合话语分析框架，考察战略性一词多义在AI话语中的功能与影响。
contributions: 提出“glosslighting”概念，描述利用技术重定义术语唤起误导性联想并保留否认空间的语言实践。
系统分析战略性一词多义如何推动AI炒作周期、影响投资与政策，并转移认知与伦理审查。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 缺乏实证数据支持glosslighting的实际影响。
未提供缓解或应对策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文揭示AI话语中“战略性一词多义”现象，提出“glosslighting”概念，分析语言如何塑造AI认知与治理。

papers.title: Projected Gradient Unlearning for Text-to-Image Diffusion Models: Defending Against Concept Revival Attacks
papers.abstract: Machine unlearning for text-to-image diffusion models aims to selectively remove undesirable concepts from pre-trained models without costly retraining.
