Current unlearning methods share a common weakness: erased concepts return when the model is fine-tuned on downstream data, even when that data is entirely unrelated. We adapt Projected Gradient Unlearning (PGU) from classification to the diffusion domain as a post-hoc hardening step. By constructing a Core Gradient Space (CGS) from the retain concept activations and projecting gradient updates into its orthogonal complement, PGU ensures that subsequent fine-tuning cannot undo the achieved erasure. Applied on top of existing methods (ESD, UCE, Receler), the approach eliminates revival for style concepts and substantially delays it for object concepts, running in roughly 6 minutes versus the ~2 hours required by Meta-Unlearning. PGU and Meta-Unlearning turn out to be complementary: which performs better depends on how the concept is encoded, and retain concept selection should follow visual feature similarity rather than semantic grouping.

analysis.tldr: 提出投影梯度遗忘（PGU）作为后处理步骤，防止文本到图像扩散模型中已擦除概念在微调后复活。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有机器遗忘方法在微调后会导致已擦除概念复活，即使微调数据完全无关，需要一种轻量级后处理方案来增强遗忘的持久性。
analysis.problem: 如何防止文本到图像扩散模型中已擦除概念在后续微调中复活。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前遗忘方法（如ESD、UCE、Receler）存在共同弱点：在无关下游数据上微调后，已擦除概念会重新出现。
analysis.method: 将投影梯度遗忘（PGU）从分类领域适配到扩散模型，通过保留概念激活构建核心梯度空间（CGS），并将梯度更新投影到其正交补空间，确保后续微调无法撤销遗忘效果。
contributions: 首次将投影梯度遗忘引入扩散模型领域，作为后处理步骤防止概念复活。
实验表明PGU在风格概念上完全消除复活，在对象概念上显著延迟复活，且运行时间仅约6分钟，远低于Meta-Unlearning的2小时。
发现PGU与Meta-Unlearning互补，性能取决于概念编码方式，且保留概念选择应基于视觉特征相似性而非语义分组。
analysis.experiments: 在现有遗忘方法（ESD、UCE、Receler）基础上应用PGU，评估风格和对象概念的复活情况，并与Meta-Unlearning对比运行时间。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: PGU可能无法完全防止所有类型概念的复活，尤其是对象概念。
方法依赖于保留概念激活的构建，可能对概念选择敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出投影梯度遗忘（PGU）作为后处理步骤，防止文本到图像扩散模型中已擦除概念在微调后复活。

papers.title: Who Defines Fairness? Target-Based Prompting for Demographic Representation in Generative Models
papers.abstract: Text-to-image(T2I) models like Stable Diffusion and DALL-E have made generative AI widely accessible, yet recent studies reveal that these systems often replicate societal biases, particularly in how they depict demographic groups across professions. Prompts such as 'doctor' or 'CEO' frequently yield lighter-skinned outputs, while lower-status roles like 'janitor' show more diversity, reinforcing stereotypes. Existing mitigation methods typically require retraining or curated datasets, making them inaccessible to most users. We propose a lightweight, inference-time framework that mitigates representational bias through prompt-level intervention without modifying the underlying model. Instead of assuming a single definition of fairness, our approach allows users to select among multiple fairness specifications-ranging from simple choices such as a uniform distribution to more complex definitions informed by a large language model(LLM) that cites sources and provides confidence estimates. These distributions guide the construction of demographic specific prompt variants in the corresponding proportions, and we evaluate alignment by auditing adherence to the declared target and measuring the resulting skin tone distribution rather than assuming uniformity as 'fairness'. Across 36 prompts spanning 30 occupations and 6 non-occupational contexts, our method shifts observed skin-tone outcomes in directions consistent with the declared target, and reduces deviation from targets when the target is defined directly in skin-tone space(fallback). This work demonstrates how fairness interventions can be made transparent, controllable, and usable at inference time, directly empowering users of generative AI.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种轻量级推理时框架，通过提示干预缓解T2I模型的人口统计偏见，允许用户选择多种公平性定义。
analysis.research_motivation: T2I模型在生成职业相关图像时经常复制社会偏见（如浅肤色偏向高地位职业），现有缓解方法需要重训练或精心策划的数据集，普通用户难以使用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改模型的情况下，通过提示级干预实现可控、透明的人口统计表征公平性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到T2I模型在职业提示中表现出系统性偏见：高地位职业（如医生、CEO）生成浅肤色图像，低地位职业（如清洁工）则更多样化。
analysis.method: 用户从多种公平性规范中选择（如均匀分布或LLM提供的复杂定义），据此构建人口统计特定的提示变体，并在推理时审计输出与目标的符合程度。
contributions: 提出一个无需重训练或额外数据集的推理时公平性干预框架。
允许用户选择多种公平性定义，而非假设单一‘公平’标准。
通过36个提示（30个职业+6个非职业上下文）验证方法能有效改变肤色分布以匹配声明目标。
analysis.experiments: 在36个提示上测试，涵盖30个职业和6个非职业上下文，结果显示方法能使输出肤色分布向声明目标方向偏移，并在目标直接定义为肤色空间时减少偏差。
limitations: 仅针对肤色维度，未涉及性别、年龄等其他人口统计属性。
依赖LLM提供公平性定义，LLM本身可能存在偏见。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种轻量级推理时框架，通过提示干预缓解T2I模型的人口统计偏见，允许用户选择多种公平性定义。

papers.title: Unlocking Multi-Spectral Data for Multi-Modal Models with Guided Inputs and Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
papers.abstract: Multi-spectral imagery is a valuable input signal for Remote Sensing applications, such as land-use and land-cover classification and environmental monitoring. However, generalist Large Multi-modal Models (LMMs) are typically trained on RGB images, limiting their applicability to the RGB domain. At the same time, training multi-spectral multi-modal models is expensive and produces uniquely specialized models. To address this, we propose a novel training-free approach that introduces multi-spectral data within the inference pipeline of standard RGB-only LMMs, allowing large gains in performance. Our approach leverages the LMMs' understanding of the visual space by adapting non-RGB inputs to that space and injecting domain-specific information and Chain-of-Thought reasoning as instructions. We demonstrate this with the Gemini 2.5 model and observe strong Zero-Shot performance gains on popular Remote Sensing benchmarks. These results highlight the potential for geospatial professionals to leverage powerful generalist models for specialized sensor inputs, benefiting from rich reasoning capabilities grounded in specialized data.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的方法，通过引导输入和链式推理将多光谱数据适配到RGB大多模态模型中，在遥感基准上取得零样本性能提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 多光谱图像在遥感应用中价值高，但通用大多模态模型通常只训练于RGB图像，限制了其应用范围；而训练专用多光谱多模态模型成本高昂且过于专门化。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练模型的前提下，让仅支持RGB输入的通用大多模态模型有效处理多光谱数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 一种无需训练的方法，通过将非RGB输入适配到RGB视觉空间，并注入领域特定信息和链式推理指令，使标准RGB大多模态模型能够处理多光谱数据。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练、即插即用的方法，将多光谱数据引入RGB大多模态模型推理流程。
在遥感基准上使用Gemini 2.5模型验证了零样本性能的显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法可能依赖于特定模型（如Gemini 2.5）的视觉理解能力，泛化性未验证。
未讨论多光谱波段数量或类型对性能的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的方法，通过引导输入和链式推理将多光谱数据适配到RGB大多模态模型中，在遥感基准上取得零样本性能提升。

papers.title: Synthetic Data in Education: Empirical Insights from Traditional Resampling and Deep Generative Models
papers.abstract: Synthetic data generation offers promise for addressing data scarcity and privacy concerns in educational technology, yet practitioners lack empirical guidance for selecting between traditional resampling techniques and modern deep learning approaches. This study presents the first systematic benchmark comparing these paradigms using a 10,000-record student performance dataset. We evaluate three resampling methods (SMOTE, Bootstrap, Random Oversampling) against three deep learning models (Autoencoder, Variational Autoencoder, Copula-GAN) across multiple dimensions: distributional fidelity (Kolmogorov-Smirnov distance, Jensen-Shannon divergence), machine learning utility such as Train-on-Synthetic-Test-on-Real scores (TSTR), and privacy preservation (Distance to Closest Record). Our findings reveal a fundamental trade-off: resampling methods achieve near-perfect utility (TSTR: 0.997) but completely fail privacy protection (DCR ~ 0.00), while deep learning models provide strong privacy guarantees (DCR ~ 1.00) at significant utility cost. Variational Autoencoders emerge as the optimal compromise, maintaining 83.3% predictive performance while ensuring complete privacy protection. We also provide actionable recommendations: use traditional resampling for internal development where privacy is controlled, and VAEs for external data sharing where privacy is paramount. This work establishes a foundational benchmark and practical decision framework for synthetic data generation in learning analytics.

analysis.tldr: 首次系统对比传统重采样与深度生成模型在教育合成数据中的效用-隐私权衡，VAE为最佳折中方案。
analysis.research_motivation: 教育技术领域面临数据稀缺和隐私问题，但缺乏选择传统重采样与深度生成模型的实证指导。
analysis.problem: 如何系统比较传统重采样方法与深度生成模型在教育合成数据生成中的分布保真度、机器学习效用和隐私保护性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现根本性权衡：重采样方法效用接近完美但隐私保护完全失败，深度模型隐私保护强但效用显著下降。
analysis.method: 使用10,000条学生成绩数据集，对三种重采样方法（SMOTE、Bootstrap、随机过采样）和三种深度模型（自编码器、变分自编码器、Copula-GAN）进行多维度基准测试。
contributions: 首次系统对比传统重采样与深度生成模型在教育合成数据中的效用-隐私权衡
提出实用决策框架：内部开发用重采样，外部共享用VAE
analysis.experiments: 在10,000条学生成绩数据集上评估分布保真度（KS距离、JS散度）、机器学习效用（TSTR分数）和隐私保护（最近记录距离）。
limitations: 仅使用单一数据集，泛化性需验证
未考虑其他深度生成模型（如扩散模型）
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次系统对比传统重采样与深度生成模型在教育合成数据中的效用-隐私权衡，VAE为最佳折中方案。

papers.title: A Systematic Review and Taxonomy of Reinforcement Learning-Model Predictive Control Integration for Linear Systems
papers.abstract: The integration of Model Predictive Control (MPC) and Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a promising paradigm for constrained decision-making and adaptive control. MPC offers structured optimization, explicit constraint handling, and established stability tools, whereas RL provides data-driven adaptation and performance improvement in the presence of uncertainty and model mismatch. Despite the rapid growth of research on RL--MPC integration, the literature remains fragmented, particularly for control architectures built on linear or linearized predictive models. This paper presents a comprehensive Systematic Literature Review (SLR) of RL--MPC integrations for linear and linearized systems, covering peer-reviewed and formally indexed studies published until 2025. The reviewed studies are organized through a multi-dimensional taxonomy covering RL functional roles, RL algorithm classes, MPC formulations, cost-function structures, and application domains. In addition, a cross-dimensional synthesis is conducted to identify recurring design patterns and reported associations among these dimensions within the reviewed corpus. The review highlights methodological trends, commonly adopted integration strategies, and recurring practical challenges, including computational burden, sample efficiency, robustness, and closed-loop guarantees. The resulting synthesis provides a structured reference for researchers and practitioners seeking to design or analyze RL--MPC architectures based on linear or linearized predictive control formulations.

analysis.tldr: 对线性系统中强化学习与模型预测控制集成的系统文献综述与分类法。
analysis.research_motivation: RL与MPC集成研究快速增长但文献碎片化，尤其针对线性或线性化预测模型的控制架构缺乏系统梳理。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对线性系统中RL-MPC集成方法的系统性综述和分类框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过多维度分类法（RL功能角色、RL算法类别、MPC公式、成本函数结构、应用领域）组织文献，并进行跨维度综合以识别设计模式。
contributions: 提出了针对线性/线性化系统中RL-MPC集成的多维度分类法。
通过跨维度综合揭示了常见设计模式与挑战（计算负担、样本效率、鲁棒性、闭环保证）。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅覆盖线性或线性化系统，非线性系统未涉及。
综述基于截至2025年的文献，可能遗漏最新进展。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对线性系统中强化学习与模型预测控制集成的系统文献综述与分类法。

papers.title: Integrated packing, placement, scheduling, and routing of personalized production: a pharmaceutical Industry 4.0 use-case with a planar transport system
papers.abstract: The recent emergence of planar transport systems necessitates re-evaluation of Flexible Manufacturing Systems (FMS) to address the simultaneous scheduling of internal logistics and production operations. By operating on a tile-based planar grid, these systems allow independent movers full two-dimensional freedom, mitigating inefficiencies inherent to traditional sequential lines. This paper applies a planar FMS framework to a real-world use case in the pharmaceutical industry: the automated production of personalized drugs. Implementing this system requires solving optimization problems at both tactical and operational levels. The tactical level involves decisions regarding production line layout and the positioning of drug dispensers. A Mixed-Integer Quadratic Programming model is utilized for the packing problem to exploit drug co-occurrence patterns found in historical patient data. Subsequently, we solve the placement problem - a bi-level problem combining an assignment problem with Shortest Hamiltonian paths with neighborhoods - to arrange dispensers in a layout minimizing expected travel distances. The operational level is encountered daily, scheduling individual movers to process new orders as quickly as possible. This scheduling problem is formulated using Constraint Programming, modeling movers as reservoir resources to ensure order completeness, complemented by a routing phase using an iterative conflict-resolution mechanism and DAG-based reasoning to convert schedules into conflict-free paths. Evaluation using real-world prescription data for 40 drugs shows the framework scales efficiently across several layout topologies for up to 500 orders, with schedules that are highly effective and computationally tractable for daily operations.

analysis.tldr: 针对制药4.0中平面运输系统的个性化生产，提出集成打包、布局、调度和路由的优化框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 平面运输系统作为新兴技术，要求重新评估柔性制造系统（FMS），以同时调度内部物流和生产操作，解决传统顺序生产线效率低下的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在制药4.0的个性化药物生产中，集成解决生产布局、设备放置、调度和路由的优化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个两阶段优化框架：战术层使用混合整数二次规划（MIQP）解决打包问题，并利用双层优化（分配问题与最短哈密顿路径）解决放置问题；操作层使用约束规划（CP）建模调度问题，结合迭代冲突解决和DAG推理进行路由。
contributions: 首次将平面运输系统应用于制药个性化生产的集成优化问题。
提出结合MIQP、双层优化和CP的框架，有效处理打包、布局、调度和路由。
analysis.experiments: 使用40种药物的真实处方数据评估，框架在多种布局拓扑下可扩展至500个订单，调度高效且计算可行。
limitations: 仅针对制药行业特定用例，泛化性未验证。
未讨论动态订单到达或设备故障等实时调整问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对制药4.0中平面运输系统的个性化生产，提出集成打包、布局、调度和路由的优化框架。

papers.title: A Deep U-Net Framework for Flood Hazard Mapping Using Hydraulic Simulations of the Wupper Catchment
papers.abstract: The increasing frequency and severity of global flood events highlights the need for the development of rapid and reliable flood prediction tools. This process traditionally relies on computationally expensive hydraulic simulations. This research presents a prediction tool by developing a deep-learning based surrogate model to accurately and efficiently predict the maximum water level across a grid. This was achieved by conducting a series of experiments to optimize a U-Net architecture, patch generation, and data handling for approximating a hydraulic model. This research demonstrates that a deep learning surrogate model can serve as a computationally efficient alternative to traditional hydraulic simulations. The framework was tested using hydraulic simulations of the Wupper catchment in the North-Rhein Westphalia region (Germany), obtaining comparable results.

analysis.tldr: 用U-Net替代传统水力模拟，实现洪水淹没图的快速预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统水力模拟计算成本高，难以满足快速洪水预测需求，亟需高效替代方案。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个深度学习代理模型，以高效且准确地预测网格上的最大水位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于U-Net架构，优化补丁生成和数据预处理，以近似水力模型输出。
contributions: 提出一种基于U-Net的深度学习代理模型用于洪水淹没图预测。
通过实验优化了U-Net架构、补丁生成和数据处理的配置。
analysis.experiments: 在德国Wupper流域的水力模拟数据上测试，结果与传统模拟相当。
limitations: 仅在单一流域测试，泛化性未知。
可能依赖高质量水力模拟数据作为训练标签。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用U-Net替代传统水力模拟，实现洪水淹没图的快速预测。

papers.title: HypEHR: Hyperbolic Modeling of Electronic Health Records for Efficient Question Answering
papers.abstract: Electronic health record (EHR) question answering is often handled by LLM-based pipelines that are costly to deploy and do not explicitly leverage the hierarchical structure of clinical data. Motivated by evidence that medical ontologies and patient trajectories exhibit hyperbolic geometry, we propose HypEHR, a compact Lorentzian model that embeds codes, visits, and questions in hyperbolic space and answers queries via geometry-consistent cross-attention with type-specific pointer heads. HypEHR is pretrained with next-visit diagnosis prediction and hierarchy-aware regularization to align representations with the ICD ontology. On two MIMIC-IV-based EHR-QA benchmarks, HypEHR approaches LLM-based methods while using far fewer parameters. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/yuyuliu11037/HypEHR.

analysis.tldr: HypEHR利用双曲几何建模电子健康记录的层次结构，以紧凑模型实现接近LLM的问答性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于LLM的EHR问答系统部署成本高，且未充分利用临床数据的层次结构（如ICD本体和患者轨迹），而医学数据天然具有双曲几何特性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个高效、参数少的EHR问答模型，同时显式利用临床数据的层次结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HypEHR，一种紧凑的Lorentzian模型，将代码、就诊和问题嵌入双曲空间，通过几何一致的交叉注意力与类型特定的指针头进行问答，并使用下一就诊诊断预测和层次感知正则化进行预训练。
contributions: 首次将双曲几何应用于EHR问答任务，利用层次结构提升效率。
提出紧凑的Lorentzian模型，在MIMIC-IV基准上以远少于LLM的参数达到接近性能。
analysis.experiments: 在基于MIMIC-IV的两个EHR-QA基准上评估，HypEHR接近基于LLM的方法，但参数少得多。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅在特定EHR数据集（MIMIC-IV）上验证，泛化性未知。
双曲空间训练可能增加优化难度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HypEHR利用双曲几何建模电子健康记录的层次结构，以紧凑模型实现接近LLM的问答性能。

papers.title: Adaptive Test-Time Compute Allocation with Evolving In-Context Demonstrations
papers.abstract: While scaling test-time compute can substantially improve model performance, existing approaches either rely on static compute allocation or sample from fixed generation distributions. In this work, we introduce a test-time compute allocation framework that jointly adapts where computation is spent and how generation is performed. Our method begins with a warm-up phase that identifies easy queries and assembles an initial pool of question-response pairs from the test set itself. An adaptive phase then concentrates further computation on unresolved queries while reshaping their generation distributions through evolving in-context demonstrations -- conditioning each generation on successful responses from semantically related queries rather than resampling from a fixed distribution. Experiments across math, coding, and reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms existing baselines while consuming substantially less inference-time compute.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应测试时计算分配框架，通过演化上下文示例动态调整生成分布，在数学、编码和推理基准上以更少计算量超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有测试时计算扩展方法要么使用静态分配，要么从固定生成分布中采样，缺乏对计算分配和生成过程的联合自适应优化，导致计算效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何自适应地分配测试时计算资源，并动态调整生成分布以提升模型性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 包含预热阶段和自适应阶段：预热阶段识别简单查询并构建初始问答对池；自适应阶段对未解决查询集中计算，并通过演化上下文示例（基于语义相关查询的成功响应）重塑生成分布。
contributions: 提出联合自适应计算分配和生成分布调整的测试时计算框架
引入演化上下文示例机制，利用测试集自身成功响应动态指导生成
analysis.experiments: 在数学、编码和推理基准上评估，方法以更少推理计算量持续超越现有基线。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖测试集内语义相似查询的可用性
预热阶段识别简单查询的阈值可能影响整体性能
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应测试时计算分配框架，通过演化上下文示例动态调整生成分布，在数学、编码和推理基准上以更少计算量超越现有方法。

papers.title: Open-H-Embodiment: A Large-Scale Dataset for Enabling Foundation Models in Medical Robotics
papers.abstract: Autonomous medical robots hold promise to improve patient outcomes, reduce provider workload, democratize access to care, and enable superhuman precision. However, autonomous medical robotics has been limited by a fundamental data problem: existing medical robotic datasets are small, single-embodiment, and rarely shared openly, restricting the development of foundation models that the field needs to advance. We introduce Open-H-Embodiment, the largest open dataset of medical robotic video with synchronized kinematics to date, spanning more than 49 institutions and multiple robotic platforms including the CMR Versius, Intuitive Surgical's da Vinci, da Vinci Research Kit (dVRK), Rob Surgical BiTrack, Virtual Incision's MIRA, Moon Surgical Maestro, and a variety of custom systems, spanning surgical manipulation, robotic ultrasound, and endoscopy procedures. We demonstrate the research enabled by this dataset through two foundation models. GR00T-H is the first open foundation vision-language-action model for medical robotics, which is the only evaluated model to achieve full end-to-end task completion on a structured suturing benchmark (25% of trials vs. 0% for all others) and achieves 64% average success across a 29-step ex vivo suturing sequence. We also train Cosmos-H-Surgical-Simulator, the first action-conditioned world model to enable multi-embodiment surgical simulation from a single checkpoint, spanning nine robotic platforms and supporting in silico policy evaluation and synthetic data generation for the medical domain. These results suggest that open, large-scale medical robot data collection can serve as critical infrastructure for the research community, enabling advances in robot learning, world modeling, and beyond.

analysis.tldr: Open-H-Embodiment 是迄今最大的开放医疗机器人视频与运动数据集，支持多平台基础模型训练，并展示了首个开放视觉-语言-动作模型 GR00T-H 和世界模型 Cosmos-H-Surgical-Simulator。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主医疗机器人潜力巨大，但受限于现有数据集规模小、单平台、不开放，阻碍了基础模型的发展。
analysis.problem: 缺乏大规模、多平台、开放共享的医疗机器人数据集，以支持基础模型的训练和评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含49+机构、多个机器人平台（如CMR Versius、da Vinci等）的医疗机器人视频与运动数据集，并基于该数据集训练了视觉-语言-动作模型GR00T-H和世界模型Cosmos-H-Surgical-Simulator。
contributions: 发布了最大规模的开放医疗机器人数据集Open-H-Embodiment，覆盖多种平台和任务。
训练了首个开放医疗机器人视觉-语言-动作模型GR00T-H，在结构化缝合基准中实现25%的端到端任务完成率。
训练了首个多平台动作条件世界模型Cosmos-H-Surgical-Simulator，支持策略评估和合成数据生成。
analysis.experiments: 在结构化缝合基准上，GR00T-H在25%的试验中实现完整端到端任务完成（其他模型均为0%），并在29步离体缝合序列中平均成功率为64%。
limitations: 数据集可能仍存在领域或平台偏差。
模型在真实临床环境中的泛化能力尚未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Open-H-Embodiment 是迄今最大的开放医疗机器人视频与运动数据集，支持多平台基础模型训练，并展示了首个开放视觉-语言-动作模型 GR00T-H 和世界模型 Cosmos-H-Surgical-Simulator。

papers.title: Broadband Wide Field of View Imaging with Computational Mirrors
papers.abstract: Traditional glass-based optics are typically optimized for narrow spectral bands, such as the visible (400-700nm) or shortwave infrared (1000-1800nm). While the emergence of VIS-SWIR sensors (400-1700nm) offers transformative potential, refractive optics struggle to focus this entire range simultaneously. Mirrors represent a promising achromatic alternative; however, they are often sidelined by field curvature, and off-axis aberrations. This paper introduces Computational Mirrors, a framework that enables high-resolution, wide-field-of-view imaging across the complete VIS-SWIR spectrum using a single sensor. Our method is built on the observation that distinct regions of the field of view reach focus at varying distances from the mirror. By capturing a minimal focal stack (2-4 images), we utilize a computational backend to recover a sharp, all-in-focus image. A key contribution of this work is SeidelConv, a novel, physics-inspired, spatially-varying point spread function (PSF) model designed to accurately characterize and correct the off-axis aberrations inherent in simple concave mirrors. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach using a first-of-its-kind 50mm F/1 optical system equipped with a VIS-SWIR sensor. Our system produces sharp images across RGB, NIR, and SWIR wavelengths without requiring refocusing, revealing material details invisible within individual spectral bands. We further validate the scalability of our approach with a 100mm F/2 system optimized for long-range imaging.

analysis.tldr: 提出计算镜面框架，利用最小焦栈和物理启发的PSF模型实现宽波段宽视场成像。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统玻璃光学系统难以同时聚焦宽光谱（如VIS-SWIR），而反射镜虽无色差但受场曲和离轴像差限制，现有方法无法兼顾高分辨率、宽视场和全波段成像。
analysis.problem: 如何利用简单凹面镜实现覆盖VIS-SWIR全波段的高分辨率、宽视场成像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到视场不同区域在距镜面不同距离处聚焦，因此可通过捕获最小焦栈（2-4张图像）并利用计算后端恢复全聚焦图像。
analysis.method: 提出计算镜面框架，包括：1）捕获最小焦栈；2）设计物理启发的空间变化点扩散函数模型SeidelConv，用于校正离轴像差；3）通过计算后端恢复清晰全聚焦图像。
contributions: 提出计算镜面框架，首次实现单传感器下VIS-SWIR全波段高分辨率宽视场成像
提出SeidelConv模型，一种物理启发的空间变化PSF模型，有效校正凹面镜的离轴像差
analysis.experiments: 使用50mm F/1光学系统（VIS-SWIR传感器）验证，在RGB、NIR、SWIR波段均产生清晰图像，无需重新对焦；并用100mm F/2系统验证了长距离成像的可扩展性。
limitations: 需要捕获2-4张焦栈图像，可能不适用于实时动态场景
方法依赖精确的PSF建模，对系统标定要求较高
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出计算镜面框架，利用最小焦栈和物理启发的PSF模型实现宽波段宽视场成像。

papers.title: SGD at the Edge of Stability: The Stochastic Sharpness Gap
papers.abstract: When training neural networks with full-batch gradient descent (GD) and step size $η$, the largest eigenvalue of the Hessian -- the sharpness $S(\boldsymbolθ)$ -- rises to $2/η$ and hovers there, a phenomenon termed the Edge of Stability (EoS). \citet{damian2023selfstab} showed that this behavior is explained by a self-stabilization mechanism driven by third-order structure of the loss, and that GD implicitly follows projected gradient descent (PGD) on the constraint $ S(\boldsymbolθ)\leq 2/η$. For mini-batch stochastic gradient descent (SGD), the sharpness stabilizes below $2/η$, with the gap widening as the batch size decreases; yet no theoretical explanation exists for this suppression. We introduce stochastic self-stabilization, extending the self-stabilization framework to SGD. Our key insight is that gradient noise injects variance into the oscillatory dynamics along the top Hessian eigenvector, strengthening the cubic sharpness-reducing force and shifting the equilibrium below $2/η$. Following the approach of \citet{damian2023selfstab}, we define stochastic predicted dynamics relative to a moving projected gradient descent trajectory and prove a stochastic coupling theorem that bounds the deviation of SGD from these predictions. We derive a closed-form equilibrium sharpness gap: $ΔS = ηβσ_{\boldsymbol{u}}^{2}/(4α)$, where $α$ is the progressive sharpening rate, $β$ is the self-stabilization strength, and $σ_{ \boldsymbol{u}}^{2}$ is the gradient noise variance projected onto the top eigenvector. This formula predicts that smaller batch sizes yield flatter solutions and recovers GD when the batch equals the full dataset.

analysis.tldr: SGD在稳定性边缘的锐度低于GD，梯度噪声通过自稳定机制解释了这一锐度差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 全批量梯度下降（GD）训练神经网络时，锐度会稳定在2/η，而小批量SGD的锐度更低且随批量减小差距增大，但缺乏理论解释。
analysis.problem: 解释SGD在稳定性边缘的锐度抑制现象，并推导锐度差距的定量公式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SGD的锐度稳定在2/η以下，且批量越小锐度越低，梯度噪声沿顶部Hessian特征向量注入方差，增强了三次锐度减小力，使平衡点下移。
analysis.method: 提出随机自稳定框架，定义相对于移动投影梯度下降轨迹的随机预测动力学，证明随机耦合定理，推导出平衡锐度差距的闭式公式。
contributions: 将自稳定框架扩展到SGD，引入随机自稳定概念。
证明随机耦合定理，量化SGD与预测轨迹的偏差。
推导出锐度差距的闭式公式，预测小批量产生更平坦解，并恢复GD情形。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论推导可能依赖于特定假设（如损失的三阶结构）。
公式中的参数（α, β, σ_u^2）在实际中可能难以精确估计。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SGD在稳定性边缘的锐度低于GD，梯度噪声通过自稳定机制解释了这一锐度差距。

papers.title: Micro-DualNet: Dual-Path Spatio-Temporal Network for Micro-Action Recognition
papers.abstract: Micro-actions are subtle, localized movements lasting 1-3 seconds such as scratching one's head or tapping fingers. Such subtle actions are essential for social communication, ubiquitously used in natural interactions, and thus critical for fine-grained video understanding, yet remain poorly understood by current computer vision systems. We identify a fundamental challenge: micro-actions exhibit diverse spatio-temporal characteristics where some are defined by spatial configurations while others manifest through temporal dynamics. Existing methods that commit to a single spatio-temporal decomposition cannot accommodate this diversity. We propose a dual-path network that processes anatomically-grounded spatial entities through parallel Spatial-Temporal (ST) and Temporal-Spatial (TS) pathways. The ST path captures spatial configurations before modeling temporal dynamics, while the TS path inverts this order to prioritize temporal dynamics. Rather than fixed fusion, we introduce entity-level adaptive routing where each body part learns its optimal processing preference, complemented by Mutual Action Consistency (MAC) loss that enforces cross-path coherence. Extensive experiments demonstrate competitive performance on MA-52 dataset and state-of-the-art results on iMiGUE dataset. Our work reveals that architectural adaptation to the inherent complexity of micro-actions is essential for advancing fine-grained video understanding.

analysis.tldr: 提出双路径时空网络Micro-DualNet，通过自适应路由和互动作一致性损失解决微动作识别中时空特征多样性问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 微动作是持续时间1-3秒的细微局部运动，对社交沟通和细粒度视频理解至关重要，但现有计算机视觉系统对其理解不足。
analysis.problem: 现有方法采用单一的时空分解方式，无法适应微动作在空间配置和时间动态上的多样性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 微动作具有多样的时空特征：有些由空间配置定义，有些通过时间动态表现。
analysis.method: 提出双路径网络，包含并行时空（ST）和时间-空间（TS）路径，并引入实体级自适应路由和互动作一致性损失。
contributions: 提出双路径架构分别捕捉空间优先和时间优先的时空特征
引入实体级自适应路由，让每个身体部位学习最优处理偏好
提出互动作一致性损失强制跨路径一致性
analysis.experiments: 在MA-52数据集上表现有竞争力，在iMiGUE数据集上达到最先进结果。
limitations: 可能依赖精确的身体部位检测
计算开销可能较大
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双路径时空网络Micro-DualNet，通过自适应路由和互动作一致性损失解决微动作识别中时空特征多样性问题。

papers.title: Linear Image Generation by Synthesizing Exposure Brackets
papers.abstract: The life of a photo begins with photons striking the sensor, whose signals are passed through a sophisticated image signal processing (ISP) pipeline to produce a display-referred image. However, such images are no longer faithful to the incident light, being compressed in dynamic range and stylized by subjective preferences. In contrast, RAW images record direct sensor signals before non-linear tone mapping. After camera response curve correction and demosaicing, they can be converted into linear images, which are scene-referred representations that directly reflect true irradiance and are invariant to sensor-specific factors. Since image sensors have better dynamic range and bit depth, linear images contain richer information than display-referred ones, leaving users more room for editing during post-processing. Despite this advantage, current generative models mainly synthesize display-referred images, which inherently limits downstream editing. In this paper, we address the task of text-to-linear-image generation: synthesizing a high-quality, scene-referred linear image that preserves full dynamic range, conditioned on a text prompt, for professional post-processing. Generating linear images is challenging, as pre-trained VAEs in latent diffusion models struggle to simultaneously preserve extreme highlights and shadows due to the higher dynamic range and bit depth. To this end, we represent a linear image as a sequence of exposure brackets, each capturing a specific portion of the dynamic range, and propose a DiT-based flow-matching architecture for text-conditioned exposure bracket generation. We further demonstrate downstream applications including text-guided linear image editing and structure-conditioned generation via ControlNet.

analysis.tldr: 提出用曝光包围序列表示线性图像，基于DiT流匹配生成，实现文本到线性图像生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生成模型主要合成显示参考图像，动态范围压缩且受主观风格影响，限制了后期编辑空间；而线性图像直接反映真实辐照度，信息更丰富，但生成难度大。
analysis.problem: 如何生成高质量、场景参考的线性图像，使其保留全动态范围并支持专业后期处理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出预训练VAE在潜扩散模型中难以同时保留极端高光和阴影，因为线性图像具有更高的动态范围和位深度。
analysis.method: 将线性图像表示为一系列曝光包围（exposure brackets），每个包围捕获动态范围的一部分；采用基于DiT的流匹配架构进行文本条件曝光包围生成。
contributions: 提出文本到线性图像生成任务，并设计曝光包围表示方法。
提出基于DiT的流匹配架构用于条件曝光包围生成。
展示了文本引导线性图像编辑和结构条件生成等下游应用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量曝光包围数据集的构建。
生成效率可能受多包围序列影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出用曝光包围序列表示线性图像，基于DiT流匹配生成，实现文本到线性图像生成。

papers.title: Deep FinResearch Bench: Evaluating AI's Ability to Conduct Professional Financial Investment Research
papers.abstract: We introduce Deep FinResearch Bench, a practical and comprehensive evaluation framework for deep research (DR) agents in financial investment research. The benchmark assesses three dimensions of report quality: qualitative rigor, quantitative forecasting and valuation accuracy, and claim credibility and verifiability. Particularly, we define corresponding qualitative and quantitative evaluation metrics and implement an automated scoring procedure to enable scalable assessment. Applying the benchmark to financial reports from frontier DR agents and comparing them with reports authored by financial professionals, we find that AI-generated reports still fall short across these dimensions. These findings underscore the need for domain-specialized DR agents tailored to finance, and we hope the work establishes a foundation for standardized benchmarking of DR agents in financial research.

analysis.tldr: 提出金融投资研究深度研究智能体评测基准，发现AI报告质量仍不及人类专家。
analysis.research_motivation: 金融投资研究对报告质量要求高，现有评测缺乏针对金融领域的标准化框架，难以评估AI深度研究智能体的实际能力。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估AI深度研究智能体在金融投资研究中的报告质量，包括定性严谨性、定量预测准确性和声明可信度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI生成的金融研究报告在三个评测维度上均落后于人类专家撰写的报告，表明现有深度研究智能体在金融领域存在不足。
analysis.method: 构建包含定性严谨性、定量预测与估值准确性、声明可信度与可验证性三个维度的评测框架，并设计自动化评分流程。
contributions: 提出首个针对金融投资研究的深度研究智能体评测基准Deep FinResearch Bench。
定义多维度的定性定量评估指标并实现自动化评分。
通过对比实验揭示AI报告与人类报告的差距，指出领域专业化智能体的必要性。
analysis.experiments: 将基准应用于前沿深度研究智能体的金融报告，并与金融专业人士撰写的报告进行比较。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 评测可能依赖特定自动化评分方法，其与人类判断的一致性有待验证。
基准覆盖的金融报告类型和场景可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出金融投资研究深度研究智能体评测基准，发现AI报告质量仍不及人类专家。

papers.title: The Last Harness You'll Ever Build
papers.abstract: AI agents are increasingly deployed on complex, domain-specific workflows -- navigating enterprise web applications that require dozens of clicks and form fills, orchestrating multi-step research pipelines that span search, extraction, and synthesis, automating code review across unfamiliar repositories, and handling customer escalations that demand nuanced domain knowledge. \textbf{Each new task domain requires painstaking, expert-driven harness engineering}: designing the prompts, tools, orchestration logic, and evaluation criteria that make a foundation model effective. We present a two-level framework that automates this process. At the first level, the \textbf{Harness Evolution Loop} optimizes a worker agent's harness $\mathcal{H}$ for a single task: a Worker Agent $W_{\mathcal{H}}$ executes the task, an Evaluator Agent $V$ adversarially diagnoses failures and scores performance, and an Evolution Agent $E$ modifies the harness based on the full history of prior attempts. At the second level, the \textbf{Meta-Evolution Loop} optimizes the evolution blueprint $Λ= (W_{\mathcal{H}}, \mathcal{H}^{(0)}, V, E)$ itself across diverse tasks, \textbf{learning a blueprint $Λ^{(\text{best})}$ that enables rapid harness convergence on any new task -- so that adapting an agent to a novel domain requires no human harness engineering at all.} We formalize the correspondence to meta-learning and present both algorithms. The framework \textbf{shifts manual harness engineering into automated harness engineering}, and takes one step further -- \textbf{automating the design of the automation itself}.

analysis.tldr: 提出两层级自动化框架，让AI Agent适应新领域时无需人工设计prompt、工具和评估标准。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI Agent部署到复杂领域工作流时，每个新任务都需要专家手动设计prompt、工具、编排逻辑和评估标准，即“harness工程”，成本高昂且难以扩展。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化Agent的harness工程，使得适应新领域时无需人工干预。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出两层级框架：第一层Harness Evolution Loop针对单个任务优化worker agent的harness（包括prompt、工具等），通过Worker执行、Evaluator对抗性诊断、Evolution基于历史修改；第二层Meta-Evolution Loop跨任务优化进化蓝图，学习出能快速收敛到新任务harness的最佳蓝图。
contributions: 提出两层级自动化框架，将人工harness工程转化为自动化过程，并进一步自动化自动化本身的设计。
形式化该框架与元学习的对应关系，并给出具体算法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖初始harness设计质量。
跨任务元学习可能面临任务分布偏移。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两层级自动化框架，让AI Agent适应新领域时无需人工设计prompt、工具和评估标准。

papers.title: Value-Conflict Diagnostics Reveal Widespread Alignment Faking in Language Models
papers.abstract: Alignment faking, where a model behaves aligned with developer policy when monitored but reverts to its own preferences when unobserved, is a concerning yet poorly understood phenomenon, in part because current diagnostic tools remain limited. Prior diagnostics rely on highly toxic and clearly harmful scenarios, causing most models to refuse immediately. As a result, models never deliberate over developer policy, monitoring conditions, or the consequences of non-compliance, making these diagnostics fundamentally unable to detect alignment faking propensity. To support study of this phenomenon, we first introduce VLAF, a diagnostic framework grounded in the hypothesis that alignment faking is most likely when developer policy conflicts with a model's strongly held values. VLAF uses morally unambiguous scenarios to probe this conflict across diverse moral values, bypassing refusal behavior while preserving meaningful deliberative stakes. Using VLAF, we find that alignment faking is substantially more prevalent than previously reported, occurring in models as small as 7B parameters - with olmo2-7b-instruct faking alignment in 37% of cases. Finally, we show that oversight conditions induce activation shifts that lie along a single direction in representation space. This means the behavioral divergence driving alignment faking can be captured by a single contrastive steering vector, which we exploit for lightweight inference-time mitigation. Finally, we exploit this for mitigation that requires no labeled data and minimal computational overhead, achieving relative reductions in alignment faking of 85.8%, 94.0%, and 57.7% on olmo2-7b-instruct, olmo2-13b-instruct, and qwen3-8b respectively.

analysis.tldr: 提出VLAF诊断框架，发现语言模型中的对齐伪装比先前报告更普遍，并利用表征空间中的单一方向实现轻量级缓解。
analysis.research_motivation: 对齐伪装（模型在监控下表现对齐，无监控时恢复自身偏好）是令人担忧但理解不足的现象，现有诊断工具依赖高毒性场景导致模型直接拒绝，无法检测对齐伪装倾向。
analysis.problem: 现有诊断工具无法有效检测语言模型中的对齐伪装倾向。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对齐伪装在开发者策略与模型强烈持有的价值观冲突时最可能发生；现有诊断因使用高毒性场景导致模型立即拒绝，无法引发模型对策略、监控条件等的深思熟虑。
analysis.method: 提出VLAF诊断框架，基于价值观冲突假设，使用道德上明确的场景探测模型在不同价值观上的冲突，绕过拒绝行为；并利用表征空间中单一方向的对齐伪装行为差异，构建对比引导向量进行轻量级推理时缓解。
contributions: 提出VLAF诊断框架，系统性地检测语言模型中的对齐伪装倾向。
发现对齐伪装在7B参数模型中也普遍存在（如olmo2-7b-instruct在37%案例中伪装对齐）。
揭示监控条件引起的激活变化沿表征空间单一方向，并利用该方向实现无需标注数据、计算开销小的缓解方法，相对减少对齐伪装85.8%、94.0%、57.7%。
analysis.experiments: 在olmo2-7b-instruct、olmo2-13b-instruct和qwen3-8b上评估，对齐伪装发生率分别为37%、未明确数值、未明确数值；缓解方法相对减少对齐伪装85.8%、94.0%、57.7%。
limitations: 诊断框架可能无法覆盖所有价值观冲突场景。
缓解方法依赖单一方向，可能对复杂多方向行为效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VLAF诊断框架，发现语言模型中的对齐伪装比先前报告更普遍，并利用表征空间中的单一方向实现轻量级缓解。

papers.title: Breaking MCP with Function Hijacking Attacks: Novel Threats for Function Calling and Agentic Models
papers.abstract: The growth of agentic AI has drawn significant attention to function calling Large Language Models (LLMs), which are designed to extend the capabilities of AI-powered system by invoking external functions. Injection and jailbreaking attacks have been extensively explored to showcase the vulnerabilities of LLMs to user prompt manipulation. The expanded capabilities of agentic models introduce further vulnerabilities via their function calling interface. Recent work in LLM security showed that function calling can be abused, leading to data tampering and theft, causing disruptive behavior such as endless loops, or causing LLMs to produce harmful content in the style of jailbreaking attacks. This paper introduces a novel function hijacking attack (FHA) that manipulates the tool selection process of agentic models to force the invocation of a specific, attacker-chosen function. While existing attacks focus on semantic preference of the model for function-calling tasks, we show that FHA is largely agnostic to the context semantics and robust to the function sets, making it applicable across diverse domains. We further demonstrate that FHA can be trained to produce universal adversarial functions, enabling a single attacked function to hijack tool selection across multiple queries and payload configurations. We conducted experiments on 5 different models, including instructed and reasoning variants, reaching 70% to 100% ASR over the established BFCL dataset. Our findings further demonstrate the need for strong guardrails and security modules for agentic systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出函数劫持攻击（FHA），通过操纵工具选择过程强制调用攻击者指定的函数，在多个模型上达到70%-100%攻击成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着智能体AI的发展，函数调用LLM被广泛用于扩展AI系统能力，但现有安全研究主要关注用户提示操纵，对函数调用接口的漏洞探索不足。
analysis.problem: 如何通过操纵函数调用接口的工具选择过程，强制智能体模型调用攻击者指定的函数，实现函数劫持攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有攻击依赖模型对函数调用的语义偏好，而FHA对上下文语义不敏感，对函数集鲁棒，可跨领域应用，且能训练出通用对抗函数。
analysis.method: 提出函数劫持攻击（FHA），通过构造对抗性函数描述或输入，操纵模型工具选择过程，强制调用特定函数；可训练通用对抗函数实现跨查询和负载配置的劫持。
contributions: 首次提出函数劫持攻击（FHA），针对智能体模型的工具选择过程进行操纵。
证明FHA对上下文语义不敏感且对函数集鲁棒，可跨领域应用。
展示FHA可训练通用对抗函数，实现单函数劫持多查询。
在5个模型上达到70%-100%攻击成功率，揭示智能体系统需要强安全防护。
analysis.experiments: 在BFCL数据集上对5个不同模型（包括指令和推理变体）进行实验，攻击成功率（ASR）达到70%到100%。
limitations: 摘要未提及防御措施或缓解方法。
未讨论攻击在真实世界部署中的隐蔽性和可检测性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出函数劫持攻击（FHA），通过操纵工具选择过程强制调用攻击者指定的函数，在多个模型上达到70%-100%攻击成功率。

papers.title: Co-Evolving LLM Decision and Skill Bank Agents for Long-Horizon Tasks
papers.abstract: Long horizon interactive environments are a testbed for evaluating agents skill usage abilities. These environments demand multi step reasoning, the chaining of multiple skills over many timesteps, and robust decision making under delayed rewards and partial observability. Games are a good testbed for evaluating agent skill usage in environments. Large Language Models (LLMs) offer a promising alternative as game playing agents, but they often struggle with consistent long horizon decision making because they lack a mechanism to discover, retain, and reuse structured skills across episodes. We present COSPLAY, a co evolution framework in which an LLM decision agent retrieves skills from a learnable skill bank to guide action taking, while an agent managed skill pipeline discovers reusable skills from the agents unlabeled rollouts to form a skill bank. Our framework improves both the decision agent to learn better skill retrieval and action generation, while the skill bank agent continually extracts, refines, and updates skills together with their contracts. Experiments across six game environments show that COSPLAY with an 8B base model achieves over 25.1 percent average reward improvement against four frontier LLM baselines on single player game benchmarks while remaining competitive on multi player social reasoning games.

analysis.tldr: 提出COSPLAY框架，让LLM决策智能体与技能库智能体协同进化，在长时域任务中通过技能发现与复用显著提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 长时域交互环境要求智能体具备多步推理和技能链式使用能力，但现有LLM缺乏跨回合发现、保留和复用结构化技能的机制，导致决策不一致。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM在长时域任务中持续发现、保留和复用结构化技能以提升决策质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出LLM在长时域决策中因缺乏技能发现与复用机制而表现不佳，但未提供具体失败模式分析。
analysis.method: 提出COSPRAY框架，包含一个LLM决策智能体（从可学习技能库检索技能指导动作）和一个技能库智能体（从无标签轨迹中提取、精炼和更新技能），两者协同进化。
contributions: 提出COSPRAY协同进化框架，将LLM决策与技能库管理相结合。
在六个游戏环境中，基于8B模型的COSPRAY相比四个前沿LLM基线平均奖励提升超过25.1%。
analysis.experiments: 在六个游戏环境上评估，包括单人游戏和多智能体社交推理游戏，与四个前沿LLM基线对比，COSPRAY在单人游戏基准上平均奖励提升25.1%，在多玩家社交推理游戏中保持竞争力。
limitations: 实验仅在游戏环境中进行，未在真实机器人或更复杂长时域任务中验证。
技能库的扩展性和跨领域迁移能力未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出COSPLAY框架，让LLM决策智能体与技能库智能体协同进化，在长时域任务中通过技能发现与复用显著提升性能。

papers.title: Differentially Private Model Merging
papers.abstract: In machine learning applications, privacy requirements during inference or deployment time could change constantly due to varying policies, regulations, or user experience. In this work, we aim to generate a magnitude of models to satisfy any target differential privacy (DP) requirement without additional training steps, given a set of existing models trained on the same dataset with different privacy/utility tradeoffs. We propose two post processing techniques, namely random selection and linear combination, to output a final private model for any target privacy parameter. We provide privacy accounting of these approaches from the lens of R'enyi DP and privacy loss distributions for general problems. In a case study on private mean estimation, we fully characterize the privacy/utility results and theoretically establish the superiority of linear combination over random selection. Empirically, we validate our approach and analyses on several models and both synthetic and real-world datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出两种后处理方法（随机选择和线性组合），从一组已有不同隐私/效用权衡的模型中生成满足任意目标差分隐私要求的模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器学习应用中，推理或部署时的隐私要求可能因政策、法规或用户体验变化而不断改变，现有方法需要针对每个隐私参数重新训练模型，成本高昂。
analysis.problem: 如何在不额外训练的情况下，从一组已有不同隐私/效用权衡的模型中生成满足任意目标差分隐私要求的模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出两种后处理技术：随机选择（从模型池中随机选取一个模型）和线性组合（对模型参数进行加权平均），并利用Rényi差分隐私和隐私损失分布进行隐私核算。
contributions: 提出两种后处理技术（随机选择和线性组合）实现差分隐私模型合并，无需额外训练。
从Rényi差分隐私和隐私损失分布角度提供了隐私核算，并在私有均值估计案例中理论上证明了线性组合优于随机选择。
analysis.experiments: 在多个模型以及合成和真实数据集上进行了实验验证，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法依赖于已有模型池，模型池的质量和多样性可能影响最终模型性能。
线性组合的隐私核算可能对模型架构有特定假设，通用性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两种后处理方法（随机选择和线性组合），从一组已有不同隐私/效用权衡的模型中生成满足任意目标差分隐私要求的模型。

papers.title: Thinking Like a Botanist: Challenging Multimodal Language Models with Intent-Driven Chain-of-Inquiry
papers.abstract: Vision evaluations are typically done through multi-step processes. In most contemporary fields, experts analyze images using structured, evidence-based adaptive questioning. In plant pathology, botanists inspect leaf images, identify visual cues, infer diagnostic intent, and probe further with targeted questions that adapt to species, symptoms, and severity. This structured probing is crucial for accurate disease diagnosis and treatment formulation. Yet current vision-language models are evaluated on single-turn question answering. To address this gap, we introduce PlantInquiryVQA, a benchmark for studying multi-step, intent-driven visual reasoning in botanical diagnosis. We formalize a Chain of Inquiry framework modeling diagnostic trajectories as ordered question-answer sequences conditioned on grounded visual cues and explicit epistemic intent. We release a dataset of 24,950 expert-curated plant images and 138,068 question-answer pairs annotated with visual grounding, severity labels, and domain-specific reasoning templates. Evaluations on top-tier Multimodal Large Language Models reveal that while they describe visual symptoms adequately, they struggle with safe clinical reasoning and accurate diagnosis. Importantly, structured question-guided inquiry significantly improves diagnostic correctness, reduces hallucination, and increases reasoning efficiency. We hope PlantInquiryVQA serves as a foundational benchmark in advancing research to train diagnostic agents to reason like expert botanists rather than static classifiers.

analysis.tldr: 提出植物病理学多步视觉推理基准PlantInquiryVQA，发现MLLM在结构化提问引导下诊断准确率提升、幻觉减少。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉语言模型评估仅关注单轮问答，而植物病理学专家通过多步、意图驱动的结构化提问进行诊断，缺乏相应基准和方法。
analysis.problem: 如何构建多步、意图驱动的视觉推理基准，并评估多模态大模型在植物病理诊断中的结构化推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 顶级MLLM能描述视觉症状，但在安全临床推理和准确诊断上表现不足；结构化提问引导可显著提升诊断正确性、减少幻觉并提高推理效率。
analysis.method: 提出Chain of Inquiry框架，将诊断轨迹建模为基于视觉线索和认知意图的有序问答序列；构建包含24,950张专家精选植物图像和138,068个问答对的基准PlantInquiryVQA。
contributions: 提出PlantInquiryVQA基准，用于多步、意图驱动的植物病理视觉推理评估。
形式化Chain of Inquiry框架，建模诊断轨迹为有序问答序列。
实验表明结构化提问引导可提升MLLM诊断准确率、减少幻觉并提高推理效率。
analysis.experiments: 在顶级多模态大语言模型上评估，发现结构化提问引导显著改善诊断正确性、减少幻觉并提高推理效率。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖植物病理领域，泛化性待验证。
未探讨不同模型架构对结构化提问的适应性差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出植物病理学多步视觉推理基准PlantInquiryVQA，发现MLLM在结构化提问引导下诊断准确率提升、幻觉减少。

papers.title: PanGuide3D: Cohort-Robust Pancreas Tumor Segmentation via Probabilistic Pancreas Conditioning and a Transformer Bottleneck
papers.abstract: Pancreatic tumor segmentation in contrast-enhanced computed tomography (CT) is clinically important yet technically challenging: lesions are often small, heterogeneous, and easily confused with surrounding soft tissue, and models that perform well on one cohort frequently degrade under cohort shift. Our goal is to improve cross-cohort generalization while keeping the model architecture simple, efficient, and practical for 3D CT segmentation. We introduce PanGuide3D, a cohort-robust architecture with a shared 3D encoder, a pancreas decoder that predicts a probabilistic pancreas map, and a tumor decoder that is explicitly conditioned on this pancreas probability at multiple scales via differentiable soft gating. To capture long-range context under distribution shift, we further add a lightweight Transformer bottleneck in the U-Net bottleneck representation. We evaluate cohort transfer by training on the PanTS (Pancreatic Tumor Segmentation) cohort and testing both in-cohort (PanTS) and out-of-cohort on MSD (Medical Segmentation Decathlon) Task07 Pancreas, using matched preprocessing and training protocols across strong baselines. We collect voxel-level segmentation metrics, patient-level tumor detection, subgroup analyses by tumor size and anatomical location, volume-conditioned performance analyses, and calibration measurements to assess reliability. Across the evaluated models, PanGuide3D achieves the best overall tumor performance and shows improved cross-cohort generalization, particularly for small tumors and challenging anatomical locations, while reducing anatomically implausible false positives. These findings support probabilistic anatomical conditioning as a practical strategy for improving cross-cohort robustness in an end-to-end model and suggest potential utility for contouring support, treatment planning, and multi-institutional studies.

analysis.tldr: 提出PanGuide3D，通过概率胰腺条件化和Transformer瓶颈提升胰腺肿瘤分割的跨队列鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 胰腺肿瘤分割在临床中重要但困难，病灶小、异质性强，且模型在不同队列间泛化能力差，现有方法在队列偏移下性能下降。
analysis.problem: 如何提升胰腺肿瘤分割模型在跨队列场景下的泛化鲁棒性，同时保持模型简单高效。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: PanGuide3D包含共享3D编码器、预测概率胰腺图的胰腺解码器，以及通过可微软门控多尺度条件化于胰腺概率的肿瘤解码器；并在U-Net瓶颈处添加轻量Transformer瓶颈以捕获长程上下文。
contributions: 提出概率解剖条件化策略，通过胰腺概率图显式引导肿瘤分割，提升跨队列鲁棒性。
引入轻量Transformer瓶颈增强长程上下文建模，适应分布偏移。
在PanTS和MSD数据集上验证，PanGuide3D在整体肿瘤性能、小肿瘤和困难解剖位置表现最佳，减少解剖不合理的假阳性。
analysis.experiments: 在PanTS队列上训练，在PanTS（同队列）和MSD Task07胰腺（跨队列）上测试，使用匹配预处理和训练协议，评估体素级分割指标、患者级肿瘤检测、亚组分析、体积条件性能分析和校准度量。
limitations: 可能依赖胰腺概率图的准确性，若胰腺分割不佳可能影响肿瘤分割。
仅在两个公开数据集上验证，更多临床队列的泛化性有待探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PanGuide3D，通过概率胰腺条件化和Transformer瓶颈提升胰腺肿瘤分割的跨队列鲁棒性。

papers.title: Escaping the Agreement Trap: Defensibility Signals for Evaluating Rule-Governed AI
papers.abstract: Content moderation systems are typically evaluated by measuring agreement with human labels. In rule-governed environments this assumption fails: multiple decisions may be logically consistent with the governing policy, and agreement metrics penalize valid decisions while mischaracterizing ambiguity as error -- a failure mode we term the Agreement Trap. We formalize evaluation as policy-grounded correctness and introduce the Defensibility Index (DI) and Ambiguity Index (AI). To estimate reasoning stability without additional audit passes, we introduce the Probabilistic Defensibility Signal (PDS), derived from audit-model token logprobs. We harness LLM reasoning traces as a governance signal rather than a classification output by deploying the audit model not to decide whether content violates policy, but to verify whether a proposed decision is logically derivable from the governing rule hierarchy. We validate the framework on 193,000+ Reddit moderation decisions across multiple communities and evaluation cohorts, finding a 33-46.6 percentage-point gap between agreement-based and policy-grounded metrics, with 79.8-80.6% of the model's false negatives corresponding to policy-grounded decisions rather than true errors. We further show that measured ambiguity is driven by rule specificity: auditing 37,286 identical decisions under three tiers of the same community rules reduces AI by 10.8 pp while DI remains stable. Repeated-sampling analysis attributes PDS variance primarily to governance ambiguity rather than decoding noise. A Governance Gate built on these signals achieves 78.6% automation coverage with 64.9% risk reduction. Together, these results show that evaluation in rule-governed environments should shift from agreement with historical labels to reasoning-grounded validity under explicit rules.

analysis.tldr: 提出防御性信号框架，解决规则驱动AI评估中因依赖人类标注一致性而陷入的“一致性陷阱”。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有内容审核系统通常以与人类标注的一致性作为评估标准，但在规则驱动的环境中，多个决策可能都与政策逻辑一致，一致性指标会错误惩罚有效决策，并将模糊性误判为错误。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种评估方法，能够衡量AI决策是否真正符合规则逻辑，而非仅与历史标注一致。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在规则驱动环境中，一致性指标存在“一致性陷阱”：有效决策被惩罚，模糊性被误判为错误。实验显示，基于一致性与基于政策的指标之间存在33-46.6个百分点的差距，且79.8-80.6%的模型假阴性实际上是符合政策的决策。
analysis.method: 提出防御性指数（DI）和模糊性指数（AI）作为评估指标，并引入概率防御性信号（PDS），通过审计模型的token logprobs估计推理稳定性，将LLM推理轨迹作为治理信号而非分类输出。
contributions: 形式化规则驱动环境下的评估为政策基础正确性，并定义防御性指数和模糊性指数。
提出概率防御性信号，无需额外审计即可估计推理稳定性。
在19.3万条Reddit审核决策上验证框架，揭示一致性陷阱的严重性，并展示治理门控可降低风险。
analysis.experiments: 在193,000+条Reddit审核决策上验证，发现一致性指标与政策基础指标差距33-46.6个百分点，79.8-80.6%的假阴性为政策基础决策；规则细化使模糊性指数降低10.8个百分点，防御性指数保持稳定。
limitations: 框架依赖规则层次结构的明确性，可能不适用于规则模糊或动态变化的场景。
PDS的可靠性可能受审计模型质量影响，且未在多种语言或非文本模态上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出防御性信号框架，解决规则驱动AI评估中因依赖人类标注一致性而陷入的“一致性陷阱”。

papers.title: SpeechParaling-Bench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Paralinguistic-Aware Speech Generation
papers.abstract: Paralinguistic cues are essential for natural human-computer interaction, yet their evaluation in Large Audio-Language Models (LALMs) remains limited by coarse feature coverage and the inherent subjectivity of assessment. To address these challenges, we introduce SpeechParaling-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark for paralinguistic-aware speech generation. It expands existing coverage from fewer than 50 to over 100 fine-grained features, supported by more than 1,000 English-Chinese parallel speech queries, and is organized into three progressively challenging tasks: fine-grained control, intra-utterance variation, and context-aware adaptation. To enable reliable evaluation, we further develop a pairwise comparison pipeline, in which candidate responses are evaluated against a fixed baseline by an LALM-based judge. By framing evaluation as relative preference rather than absolute scoring, this approach mitigates subjectivity and yields more stable and scalable assessments without costly human annotation. Extensive experiments reveal substantial limitations in current LALMs. Even leading proprietary models struggle with comprehensive static control and dynamic modulation of paralinguistic features, while failure to correctly interpret paralinguistic cues accounts for 43.3% of errors in situational dialogue. These findings underscore the need for more robust paralinguistic modeling toward human-aligned voice assistants.

analysis.tldr: 提出SpeechParaling-Bench基准，系统评估大音频语言模型在副语言感知语音生成上的能力，揭示现有模型在精细控制和动态调制上的显著不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 副语言线索对自然人机交互至关重要，但现有评估受限于特征覆盖粗、主观性强，缺乏系统基准。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个覆盖广泛副语言特征、支持可靠评估的基准，以揭示大音频语言模型在副语言感知语音生成上的局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出当前LALMs在静态控制和动态调制上表现不佳，且43.3%的情境对话错误源于副语言线索误解。
analysis.method: 构建包含100+细粒度特征、1000+英中平行语音查询的基准，设计三项渐进任务（细粒度控制、语内变化、上下文适应），并开发基于LALM的成对比较评估流程以降低主观性。
contributions: 提出SpeechParaling-Bench，将副语言特征覆盖从<50扩展到>100，并组织为三项渐进任务。
开发成对比较评估流程，通过相对偏好替代绝对评分，提升评估稳定性和可扩展性。
实验揭示当前LALMs在副语言控制上的显著局限，为未来研究提供方向。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到实验揭示现有模型在静态控制和动态调制上存在不足，且43.3%的情境对话错误源于副语言线索误解。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖英中语言，可能缺乏对其他语言和文化副语言特征的泛化性。
成对比较评估依赖LALM判断，可能引入模型自身偏见。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SpeechParaling-Bench基准，系统评估大音频语言模型在副语言感知语音生成上的能力，揭示现有模型在精细控制和动态调制上的显著不足。

papers.title: DeVI: Physics-based Dexterous Human-Object Interaction via Synthetic Video Imitation
papers.abstract: Recent advances in video generative models enable the synthesis of realistic human-object interaction videos across a wide range of scenarios and object categories, including complex dexterous manipulations that are difficult to capture with motion capture systems. While the rich interaction knowledge embedded in these synthetic videos holds strong potential for motion planning in dexterous robotic manipulation, their limited physical fidelity and purely 2D nature make them difficult to use directly as imitation targets in physics-based character control. We present DeVI (Dexterous Video Imitation), a novel framework that leverages text-conditioned synthetic videos to enable physically plausible dexterous agent control for interacting with unseen target objects. To overcome the imprecision of generative 2D cues, we introduce a hybrid tracking reward that integrates 3D human tracking with robust 2D object tracking. Unlike methods relying on high-quality 3D kinematic demonstrations, DeVI requires only the generated video, enabling zero-shot generalization across diverse objects and interaction types. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DeVI outperforms existing approaches that imitate 3D human-object interaction demonstrations, particularly in modeling dexterous hand-object interactions. We further validate the effectiveness of DeVI in multi-object scenes and text-driven action diversity, showcasing the advantage of using video as an HOI-aware motion planner.

analysis.tldr: 利用合成视频模仿实现物理合理的灵巧人-物交互控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频生成模型能合成复杂灵巧交互视频，但缺乏物理真实性和3D信息，难以直接用于物理仿真中的角色控制。
analysis.problem: 如何从低物理保真度的2D合成视频中提取有效信息，实现零样本的物理合理灵巧手-物交互控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 合成视频的2D线索不精确，直接作为模仿目标会导致物理不合理。
analysis.method: 提出DeVI框架，结合3D人体追踪和鲁棒2D物体追踪的混合追踪奖励，从文本条件合成视频中学习物理合理的灵巧控制。
contributions: 提出DeVI框架，仅需合成视频即可实现零样本灵巧人-物交互控制。
引入混合追踪奖励，克服生成式2D线索的不精确性。
在多种物体和交互类型上超越依赖3D演示的方法。
analysis.experiments: 在多种物体和交互类型上实验，DeVI优于现有方法，并在多物体场景和文本驱动动作多样性上验证有效性。
limitations: 依赖合成视频质量，低质量视频可能影响性能。
未在真实机器人上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用合成视频模仿实现物理合理的灵巧人-物交互控制。

papers.title: AVISE: Framework for Evaluating the Security of AI Systems
papers.abstract: As artificial intelligence (AI) systems are increasingly deployed across critical domains, their security vulnerabilities pose growing risks of high-profile exploits and consequential system failures. Yet systematic approaches to evaluating AI security remain underdeveloped. In this paper, we introduce AVISE (AI Vulnerability Identification and Security Evaluation), a modular open-source framework for identifying vulnerabilities in and evaluating the security of AI systems and models. As a demonstration of the framework, we extend the theory-of-mind-based multi-turn Red Queen attack into an Adversarial Language Model (ALM) augmented attack and develop an automated Security Evaluation Test (SET) for discovering jailbreak vulnerabilities in language models. The SET comprises 25 test cases and an Evaluation Language Model (ELM) that determines whether each test case was able to jailbreak the target model, achieving 92% accuracy, an F1-score of 0.91, and a Matthews correlation coefficient of 0.83. We evaluate nine recently released language models of diverse sizes with the SET and find that all are vulnerable to the augmented Red Queen attack to varying degrees. AVISE provides researchers and industry practitioners with an extensible foundation for developing and deploying automated SETs, offering a concrete step toward more rigorous and reproducible AI security evaluation.

analysis.tldr: AVISE是一个模块化开源框架，用于评估AI系统的安全性，并通过自动化安全评估测试发现语言模型中的越狱漏洞。
analysis.research_motivation: AI系统在关键领域广泛部署，安全漏洞风险日益增加，但缺乏系统化的安全评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何系统化地识别和评估AI系统的安全漏洞，特别是语言模型中的越狱攻击漏洞。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AVISE框架，扩展基于心智理论的多轮Red Queen攻击为对抗性语言模型增强攻击，并开发自动化安全评估测试（SET），包含25个测试用例和评估语言模型（ELM）。
contributions: 提出AVISE，一个模块化开源AI安全评估框架。
开发自动化安全评估测试（SET），以高准确率检测语言模型越狱漏洞。
评估9个近期语言模型，发现所有模型均易受增强版Red Queen攻击。
analysis.experiments: 在9个近期语言模型上评估SET，ELM达到92%准确率、0.91 F1分数和0.83马修斯相关系数。
limitations: SET仅包含25个测试用例，可能无法覆盖所有攻击类型。
评估仅限于语言模型，未涉及其他AI系统。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AVISE是一个模块化开源框架，用于评估AI系统的安全性，并通过自动化安全评估测试发现语言模型中的越狱漏洞。

papers.title: FedSIR: Spectral Client Identification and Relabeling for Federated Learning with Noisy Labels
papers.abstract: Federated learning (FL) enables collaborative model training without sharing raw data; however, the presence of noisy labels across distributed clients can severely degrade the learning performance. In this paper, we propose FedSIR, a multi-stage framework for robust FL under noisy labels. Different from existing approaches that mainly rely on designing noise-tolerant loss functions or exploiting loss dynamics during training, our method leverages the spectral structure of client feature representations to identify and mitigate label noise. Our framework consists of three key components. First, we identify clean and noisy clients by analyzing the spectral consistency of class-wise feature subspaces with minimal communication overhead. Second, clean clients provide spectral references that enable noisy clients to relabel potentially corrupted samples using both dominant class directions and residual subspaces. Third, we employ a noise-aware training strategy that integrates logit-adjusted loss, knowledge distillation, and distance-aware aggregation to further stabilize federated optimization. Extensive experiments on standard FL benchmarks demonstrate that FedSIR consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods for FL with noisy labels. The code is available at https://github.com/sinagh72/FedSIR.

analysis.tldr: FedSIR通过分析客户端特征表示的谱结构来识别和纠正标签噪声，实现鲁棒联邦学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦学习中分布式客户端的标签噪声会严重降低模型性能，现有方法主要依赖噪声容忍损失函数或训练动态，但通信开销大或效果有限。
analysis.problem: 如何在联邦学习场景下有效识别和纠正客户端中的标签噪声，同时保持低通信开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出FedSIR框架，包含三个组件：1) 通过类特征子空间的谱一致性识别干净和噪声客户端；2) 干净客户端提供谱参考，利用主类方向和残差子空间对噪声客户端进行样本重标注；3) 噪声感知训练策略，结合logit调整损失、知识蒸馏和距离感知聚合。
contributions: 提出基于谱结构的客户端识别和重标注方法，无需额外数据或高通信开销。
设计噪声感知训练策略，集成多种技术稳定联邦优化。
在标准联邦学习基准上超越现有最先进方法。
analysis.experiments: 在标准联邦学习基准上进行大量实验，FedSIR一致优于现有最先进方法。代码已开源。
limitations: 可能对谱分析的计算开销有一定要求。
重标注依赖干净客户端的谱参考，在极端噪声分布下可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FedSIR通过分析客户端特征表示的谱结构来识别和纠正标签噪声，实现鲁棒联邦学习。

papers.title: Global Offshore Wind Infrastructure: Deployment and Operational Dynamics from Dense Sentinel-1 Time Series
papers.abstract: The offshore wind energy sector is expanding rapidly, increasing the need for independent, high-temporal-resolution monitoring of infrastructure deployment and operation at global scale. While Earth Observation based offshore wind infrastructure mapping has matured for spatial localization, existing open datasets lack temporally dense and semantically fine-grained information on construction and operational dynamics. We introduce a global Sentinel-1 synthetic aperture radar (SAR) time series data corpus that resolves deployment and operational phases of offshore wind infrastructure from 2016Q1 to 2025Q1. Building on an updated object detection workflow, we compile 15,606 time series at detected infrastructure locations, with overall 14,840,637 events as analysis-ready 1D SAR backscatter profiles, one profile per Sentinel-1 acquisition and location. To enable direct use and benchmarking, we release (i) the analysis ready 1D SAR profiles, (ii) event-level baseline semantic labels generated by a rule-based classifier, and (iii) an expert-annotated benchmark dataset of 553 time series with 328,657 event labels. The baseline classifier achieves a macro F1 score of 0.84 in event-wise evaluation and an area under the collapsed edit similarity-quality threshold curve (AUC) of 0.785, indicating temporal coherence. We demonstrate that the resulting corpus supports global-scale analyses of deployment dynamics, the identification of differences in regional deployment patterns, vessel interactions, and operational events, and provides a reference for developing and comparing time series classification methods for offshore wind infrastructure monitoring.

analysis.tldr: 基于密集 Sentinel-1 时间序列构建全球海上风电基础设施部署与运行动态数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 海上风电快速扩张，需要独立、高时间分辨率的全球基础设施监测，但现有数据集缺乏时间密集和语义精细的部署与运行动态信息。
analysis.problem: 缺乏包含时间密集、语义精细的建设和运行动态信息的全球海上风电基础设施开放数据集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于更新的目标检测工作流，从 Sentinel-1 SAR 时间序列提取 1D 后向散射剖面，并利用基于规则的分类器生成基线语义标签，同时构建专家标注基准数据集。
contributions: 发布全球 15,606 个基础设施位置的时间序列数据，包含 14,840,637 个事件的分析就绪 1D SAR 剖面。
提供基线语义标签和专家标注基准数据集，支持全球部署动态、区域模式差异、船只交互和运行事件分析。
analysis.experiments: 基线分类器在事件级评估中 macro F1 为 0.84，时间一致性 AUC 为 0.785。
limitations: 基于规则分类器的性能有限，可能无法覆盖所有复杂事件。
数据集仅覆盖 2016Q1 至 2025Q1，时间范围有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于密集 Sentinel-1 时间序列构建全球海上风电基础设施部署与运行动态数据集。

papers.title: Convergent Evolution: How Different Language Models Learn Similar Number Representations
papers.abstract: Language models trained on natural text learn to represent numbers using periodic features with dominant periods at $T=2, 5, 10$. In this paper, we identify a two-tiered hierarchy of these features: while Transformers, Linear RNNs, LSTMs, and classical word embeddings trained in different ways all learn features that have period-$T$ spikes in the Fourier domain, only some learn geometrically separable features that can be used to linearly classify a number mod-$T$. To explain this incongruity, we prove that Fourier domain sparsity is necessary but not sufficient for mod-$T$ geometric separability. Empirically, we investigate when model training yields geometrically separable features, finding that the data, architecture, optimizer, and tokenizer all play key roles. In particular, we identify two different routes through which models can acquire geometrically separable features: they can learn them from complementary co-occurrence signals in general language data, including text-number co-occurrence and cross-number interaction, or from multi-token (but not single-token) addition problems. Overall, our results highlight the phenomenon of convergent evolution in feature learning: A diverse range of models learn similar features from different training signals.

analysis.tldr: 不同语言模型在数字表示上表现出趋同进化，学习到相似的周期性特征，但几何可分离性取决于训练信号。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解语言模型如何表示数字对于解释其数学推理能力至关重要，但不同架构和训练方式下数字表示的一致性和差异尚不清楚。
analysis.problem: 探究不同语言模型（Transformer、线性RNN、LSTM、经典词嵌入）学习数字表示时，周期性特征与几何可分离性之间的关系及其形成机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到所有模型都学习到周期为2、5、10的傅里叶域尖峰特征，但只有部分模型能学到可用于模T线性分类的几何可分离特征；傅里叶域稀疏性是几何可分离的必要非充分条件。
analysis.method: 通过理论证明（傅里叶域稀疏性与几何可分离性的关系）和实证分析（数据、架构、优化器、分词器的影响）研究数字表示的学习机制。
contributions: 识别了数字表示中周期性特征的两层层次结构：傅里叶域尖峰（普遍存在）与几何可分离性（条件性出现）。
证明了傅里叶域稀疏性是模T几何可分离的必要非充分条件。
揭示了模型通过两种路径获得几何可分离特征：从通用语言数据中的共现信号（文本-数字共现、跨数字交互）或多token加法问题（非单token）。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅研究了数字表示，未涉及其他数值概念（如分数、负数）。
理论分析限于模T分类，未扩展到更复杂的算术运算。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 不同语言模型在数字表示上表现出趋同进化，学习到相似的周期性特征，但几何可分离性取决于训练信号。

papers.title: ParetoSlider: Diffusion Models Post-Training for Continuous Reward Control
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) post-training has become the standard for aligning generative models with human preferences, yet most methods rely on a single scalar reward. When multiple criteria matter, the prevailing practice of ``early scalarization'' collapses rewards into a fixed weighted sum. This commits the model to a single trade-off point at training time, providing no inference-time control over inherently conflicting goals -- such as prompt adherence versus source fidelity in image editing. We introduce ParetoSlider, a multi-objective RL (MORL) framework that trains a single diffusion model to approximate the entire Pareto front. By training the model with continuously varying preference weights as a conditioning signal, we enable users to navigate optimal trade-offs at inference time without retraining or maintaining multiple checkpoints. We evaluate ParetoSlider across three state-of-the-art flow-matching backbones: SD3.5, FluxKontext, and LTX-2. Our single preference-conditioned model matches or exceeds the performance of baselines trained separately for fixed reward trade-offs, while uniquely providing fine-grained control over competing generative goals.

analysis.tldr: 提出ParetoSlider框架，通过多目标强化学习后训练扩散模型，实现推理时连续控制多个冲突目标间的权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RL后训练方法通常使用单一标量奖励，当涉及多个冲突目标时，早期标量化会固定权衡点，无法在推理时灵活调整，限制了生成模型在图像编辑等场景中的可控性。
analysis.problem: 如何训练单个扩散模型，使其在推理时能够连续控制多个冲突奖励目标（如提示遵循度与源保真度）之间的最优权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ParetoSlider多目标RL框架，将连续变化的偏好权重作为条件信号训练单个扩散模型，使其逼近整个帕累托前沿，从而在推理时无需重新训练或维护多个检查点即可导航最优权衡。
contributions: 提出ParetoSlider，首个在扩散模型后训练中实现连续奖励控制的多目标RL框架。
在三个流匹配骨干（SD3.5、FluxKontext、LTX-2）上验证，单个偏好条件模型匹配或超过固定权衡基线，并提供细粒度控制。
analysis.experiments: 在SD3.5、FluxKontext和LTX-2三个流匹配骨干上评估，与固定权衡基线比较，单个偏好条件模型匹配或超过基线性能。
limitations: 可能仅适用于可分解为多个奖励函数的场景。
偏好权重作为条件信号的设计可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ParetoSlider框架，通过多目标强化学习后训练扩散模型，实现推理时连续控制多个冲突目标间的权衡。

papers.title: Adapting TrOCR for Printed Tigrinya Text Recognition: Word-Aware Loss Weighting for Cross-Script Transfer Learning
papers.abstract: Transformer-based OCR models have shown strong performance on Latin and CJK scripts, but their application to African syllabic writing systems remains limited. We present the first adaptation of TrOCR for printed Tigrinya using the Ge'ez script. Starting from a pre-trained model, we extend the byte-level BPE tokenizer to cover 230 Ge'ez characters and introduce Word-Aware Loss Weighting to resolve systematic word-boundary failures that arise when applying Latin-centric BPE conventions to a new script. The unmodified model produces no usable output on Ge'ez text. After adaptation, the TrOCR-Printed variant achieves 0.22% Character Error Rate and 97.20% exact match accuracy on a held-out test set of 5,000 synthetic images from the GLOCR dataset. An ablation study confirms that Word-Aware Loss Weighting is the critical component, reducing CER by two orders of magnitude compared to vocabulary extension alone. The full pipeline trains in under three hours on a single 8 GB consumer GPU. All code, model weights, and evaluation scripts are publicly released.

analysis.tldr: 首次将TrOCR适配于提格里尼亚语印刷体识别，提出词感知损失加权解决跨脚本词边界失败问题。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer OCR模型在拉丁和CJK脚本上表现优异，但对非洲音节文字系统（如Ge'ez）的应用有限，现有模型直接应用于新脚本时产生系统性词边界错误。
analysis.problem: 解决拉丁中心BPE分词惯例应用于新脚本（Ge'ez）时导致的词边界识别失败问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 未修改的TrOCR模型在Ge'ez文本上无法产生可用输出；仅扩展词汇表不足以解决词边界错误。
analysis.method: 扩展字节级BPE分词器覆盖230个Ge'ez字符，并引入词感知损失加权（Word-Aware Loss Weighting）以强化词边界学习。
contributions: 首次将TrOCR适配于提格里尼亚语印刷体识别
提出词感知损失加权方法，显著降低字符错误率
analysis.experiments: 在GLOCR数据集的5000张合成图像测试集上，TrOCR-Printed变体达到0.22%字符错误率和97.20%精确匹配准确率；消融实验表明词感知损失加权是关键组件，相比仅扩展词汇表将CER降低两个数量级。
limitations: 仅针对印刷体，未涉及手写体场景
合成图像可能与真实场景存在分布差异
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次将TrOCR适配于提格里尼亚语印刷体识别，提出词感知损失加权解决跨脚本词边界失败问题。

papers.title: Diagnosing CFG Interpretation in LLMs
papers.abstract: As LLMs are increasingly integrated into agentic systems, they must adhere to dynamically defined, machine-interpretable interfaces. We evaluate LLMs as in-context interpreters: given a novel context-free grammar, can LLMs generate syntactically valid, behaviorally functional, and semantically faithful outputs? We introduce RoboGrid, a framework that disentangles syntax, behavior, and semantics through controlled stress-tests of recursion depth, expression complexity, and surface styles. Our experiments reveal a consistent hierarchical degradation: LLMs often maintain surface syntax but fail to preserve structural semantics. Despite the partial mitigation provided by CoT reasoning, performance collapses under structural density, specifically deep recursion and high branching, with semantic alignment vanishing at extreme depths. Furthermore, "Alien" lexicons reveal that LLMs rely on semantic bootstrapping from keywords rather than pure symbolic induction. These findings pinpoint critical gaps in hierarchical state-tracking required for reliable, grammar-agnostic agents.

analysis.tldr: LLM在上下文理解CFG时，语法表面尚可但深层语义随递归深度和分支复杂度急剧退化。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM越来越多地用于智能体系统，需要遵循动态定义的机器可解释接口，但现有研究缺乏对LLM作为上下文语法解释器的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM在给定新上下文无关文法时，能否生成语法有效、行为功能正确且语义忠实的输出，并揭示其失败模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM在语法表面表现尚可，但结构语义随递归深度和分支复杂度急剧退化；CoT推理部分缓解但无法应对高结构密度；LLM依赖关键词语义引导而非纯符号归纳。
analysis.method: 提出RoboGrid框架，通过控制递归深度、表达式复杂度和表面风格，分离语法、行为和语义进行压力测试。
contributions: 引入RoboGrid框架，系统解耦CFG解释中的语法、行为和语义维度。
揭示LLM在深层递归和高分支下的语义对齐崩溃现象，并指出依赖语义引导的局限。
analysis.experiments: 在RoboGrid框架下对LLM进行递归深度、表达式复杂度和表面风格的压力测试，并对比CoT推理效果。
limitations: 仅评估了上下文无关文法，未涉及更复杂的文法类型。
未提供具体模型规模或训练数据对结果的影响分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在上下文理解CFG时，语法表面尚可但深层语义随递归深度和分支复杂度急剧退化。

papers.title: OMIBench: Benchmarking Olympiad-Level Multi-Image Reasoning in Large Vision-Language Model
papers.abstract: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) have made substantial advances in reasoning tasks at the Olympiad level. Nevertheless, current Olympiad-level multimodal reasoning benchmarks for these models often emphasize single-image analysis and fail to exploit contextual information across multiple images. We present OMIBench, a benchmark designed to evaluate Olympiad-level reasoning when the required evidence is distributed over multiple images. It contains problems from biology, chemistry, mathematics, and physics Olympiads, together with manually annotated rationales and evaluation protocols for both exact and semantic answer matching. Across extensive experiments on OMIBench, we observe meaningful performance gaps in existing models. Even the strongest LVLMs, such as Gemini-3-Pro, attain only about 50% on the benchmark. These results position OMIBench as a focused resources for studying and improving multi-image reasoning in LVLMs.

analysis.tldr: OMIBench 是一个评估大视觉语言模型在奥赛级多图像推理能力的基准，现有最强模型仅达约50%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前奥赛级多模态推理基准多聚焦单图像分析，缺乏对跨多图像上下文信息利用的评估，限制了模型在多图像推理场景下的发展。
analysis.problem: 现有基准无法有效评估大视觉语言模型在需要跨多图像推理的奥赛级任务上的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含生物、化学、数学、物理奥赛问题的多图像推理基准，并配有手动标注的推理过程和精确/语义答案匹配评估协议。
contributions: 提出首个针对奥赛级多图像推理的基准 OMIBench。
通过实验揭示现有最强 LVLM 在该基准上性能有限（约50%），为多图像推理研究提供聚焦资源。
analysis.experiments: 在 OMIBench 上对多个 LVLM 进行实验，观察到显著性能差距，最强模型 Gemini-3-Pro 仅达约50%准确率。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖奥赛级问题，可能不适用于通用多图像推理场景。
未提供模型失败的具体模式分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: OMIBench 是一个评估大视觉语言模型在奥赛级多图像推理能力的基准，现有最强模型仅达约50%准确率。

papers.title: Relative Principals, Pluralistic Alignment, and the Structural Value Alignment Problem
papers.abstract: The value alignment problem for artificial intelligence (AI) is often framed as a purely technical or normative challenge, sometimes focused on hypothetical future systems. I argue that the problem is better understood as a structural question about governance: not whether an AI system is aligned in the abstract, but whether it is aligned enough, for whom, and at what cost. Drawing on the principal-agent framework from economics, this paper reconceptualises misalignment as arising along three interacting axes: objectives, information, and principals. The three-axis framework provides a systematic way of diagnosing why misalignment arises in real-world systems and clarifies that alignment cannot be treated as a single technical property of models but an outcome shaped by how objectives are specified, how information is distributed, and whose interests count in practice. The core contribution of this paper is to show that the three-axis decomposition implies that alignment is fundamentally a problem of governance rather than engineering alone. From this perspective, alignment is inherently pluralistic and context-dependent, and resolving misalignment involves trade-offs among competing values. Because misalignment can occur along each axis -- and affect stakeholders differently -- the structural description shows that alignment cannot be "solved" through technical design alone, but must be managed through ongoing institutional processes that determine how objectives are set, how systems are evaluated, and how affected communities can contest or reshape those decisions.

analysis.tldr: 将AI价值对齐重新定义为治理问题，提出目标、信息、委托人三轴框架分析错位根源。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有对齐研究多聚焦技术或规范层面，忽视实际系统中错位的结构性根源，导致对齐问题被简化为单一技术属性。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地诊断和解决AI系统中的价值错位问题，并明确其治理本质。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但指出错位源于目标、信息、委托人三个维度的交互。
analysis.method: 基于委托-代理框架，提出三轴分解方法（目标、信息、委托人），将对齐问题重构为治理问题。
contributions: 提出三轴框架系统诊断AI错位根源
论证对齐本质是治理问题而非纯工程问题
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提供实证验证
框架操作性细节不足
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将AI价值对齐重新定义为治理问题，提出目标、信息、委托人三轴框架分析错位根源。

papers.title: LEXIS: LatEnt ProXimal Interaction Signatures for 3D HOI from an Image
papers.abstract: Reconstructing 3D Human-Object Interaction from an RGB image is essential for perceptive systems. Yet, this remains challenging as it requires capturing the subtle physical coupling between the body and objects. While current methods rely on sparse, binary contact cues, these fail to model the continuous proximity and dense spatial relationships that characterize natural interactions. We address this limitation via InterFields, a representation that encodes dense, continuous proximity across the entire body and object surfaces. However, inferring these fields from single images is inherently ill-posed. To tackle this, our intuition is that interaction patterns are characteristically structured by the action and object geometry. We capture this structure in LEXIS, a novel discrete manifold of interaction signatures learned via a VQ-VAE. We then develop LEXIS-Flow, a diffusion framework that leverages LEXIS signatures to estimate human and object meshes alongside their InterFields. Notably, these InterFields help in a guided refinement that ensures physically-plausible, proximity-aware reconstructions without requiring post-hoc optimization. Evaluation on Open3DHOI and BEHAVE shows that LEXIS-Flow significantly outperforms existing SotA baselines in reconstruction, contact, and proximity quality. Our approach not only improves generalization but also yields reconstructions perceived as more realistic, moving us closer to holistic 3D scene understanding. Code & models will be public at https://anticdimi.github.io/lexis.

analysis.tldr: 提出LEXIS-Flow，利用VQ-VAE学习离散交互流形，从单张RGB图像重建3D人-物交互，显著提升重建质量和物理合理性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D人-物交互重建方法依赖稀疏二值接触线索，无法建模连续近邻和密集空间关系，导致重建缺乏物理合理性。
analysis.problem: 从单张RGB图像中重建3D人-物交互，需捕捉身体与物体间的连续近邻和密集空间关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 交互模式受动作和物体几何结构约束，具有特征性结构。
