analysis.method: 提出InterFields表示编码连续近邻场，通过VQ-VAE学习离散交互流形LEXIS，再基于扩散框架LEXIS-Flow联合估计人体和物体网格及InterFields，并利用InterFields引导细化。
contributions: 提出InterFields，一种编码全身和物体表面密集连续近邻的表示。
提出LEXIS，一个通过VQ-VAE学习的离散交互流形。
提出LEXIS-Flow，一个利用LEXIS签名进行3D人-物交互重建的扩散框架，无需后处理优化。
analysis.experiments: 在Open3DHOI和BEHAVE数据集上评估，LEXIS-Flow在重建、接触和近邻质量上显著优于现有SOTA基线。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量训练数据，泛化到未见过的交互类型有限。
VQ-VAE的离散化可能丢失部分连续细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LEXIS-Flow，利用VQ-VAE学习离散交互流形，从单张RGB图像重建3D人-物交互，显著提升重建质量和物理合理性。

papers.title: LLaDA2.0-Uni: Unifying Multimodal Understanding and Generation with Diffusion Large Language Model
papers.abstract: We present LLaDA2.0-Uni, a unified discrete diffusion large language model (dLLM) that supports multimodal understanding and generation within a natively integrated framework. Its architecture combines a fully semantic discrete tokenizer, a MoE-based dLLM backbone, and a diffusion decoder. By discretizing continuous visual inputs via SigLIP-VQ, the model enables block-level masked diffusion for both text and vision inputs within the backbone, while the decoder reconstructs visual tokens into high-fidelity images. Inference efficiency is enhanced beyond parallel decoding through prefix-aware optimizations in the backbone and few-step distillation in the decoder. Supported by carefully curated large-scale data and a tailored multi-stage training pipeline, LLaDA2.0-Uni matches specialized VLMs in multimodal understanding while delivering strong performance in image generation and editing. Its native support for interleaved generation and reasoning establishes a promising and scalable paradigm for next-generation unified foundation models. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/inclusionAI/LLaDA2.0-Uni.

analysis.tldr: LLaDA2.0-Uni 是一个基于扩散 LLM 的统一多模态理解与生成框架，通过离散分词、MoE 骨干和扩散解码器实现文本与视觉的联合建模。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前多模态模型通常将理解与生成分离，缺乏原生统一的框架，导致架构复杂且难以扩展。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个原生支持多模态理解与生成的统一扩散大语言模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合语义离散分词器、MoE 扩散 LLM 骨干和扩散解码器，对视觉输入进行 SigLIP-VQ 离散化，在骨干中实现文本和视觉的块级掩码扩散，并通过前缀感知优化和少步蒸馏提升推理效率。
contributions: 提出 LLaDA2.0-Uni，一个原生统一的多模态理解与生成扩散 LLM 框架。
通过多阶段训练和精心策划的大规模数据，在理解任务上匹配专用 VLM，在图像生成和编辑上表现强劲。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模数据和计算资源。
扩散模型在生成速度上可能仍有提升空间。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLaDA2.0-Uni 是一个基于扩散 LLM 的统一多模态理解与生成框架，通过离散分词、MoE 骨干和扩散解码器实现文本与视觉的联合建模。

papers.title: Automatic Ontology Construction Using LLMs as an External Layer of Memory, Verification, and Planning for Hybrid Intelligent Systems
papers.abstract: This paper presents a hybrid architecture for intelligent systems in which large language models (LLMs) are extended with an external ontological memory layer. Instead of relying solely on parametric knowledge and vector-based retrieval (RAG), the proposed approach constructs and maintains a structured knowledge graph using RDF/OWL representations, enabling persistent, verifiable, and semantically grounded reasoning. The core contribution is an automated pipeline for ontology construction from heterogeneous data sources, including documents, APIs, and dialogue logs. The system performs entity recognition, relation extraction, normalization, and triple generation, followed by validation using SHACL and OWL constraints, and continuous graph updates. During inference, LLMs operate over a combined context that integrates vector-based retrieval with graph-based reasoning and external tool interaction. Experimental observations on planning tasks, including the Tower of Hanoi benchmark, indicate that ontology augmentation improves performance in multi-step reasoning scenarios compared to baseline LLM systems. In addition, the ontology layer enables formal validation of generated outputs, transforming the system into a generation-verification-correction pipeline. The proposed architecture addresses key limitations of current LLM-based systems, including lack of long-term memory, weak structural understanding, and limited reasoning capabilities. It provides a foundation for building agent-based systems, robotics applications, and enterprise AI solutions that require persistent knowledge, explainability, and reliable decision-making.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种混合架构，利用LLM自动构建本体作为外部记忆层，增强推理和验证能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM系统缺乏长期记忆、结构理解弱、推理能力有限，且依赖参数化知识和向量检索（RAG）难以实现持久、可验证的语义推理。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个混合智能系统，通过自动化的本体构建和结构化知识图谱，增强LLM的推理、验证和规划能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出混合架构，LLM扩展外部本体记忆层：自动从异构数据源（文档、API、对话日志）构建RDF/OWL知识图谱，包括实体识别、关系抽取、归一化、三元组生成，并通过SHACL和OWL约束验证，持续更新。推理时LLM结合向量检索、图推理和外部工具。
contributions: 提出一种自动本体构建管线，从异构数据源生成结构化知识图谱。
设计混合推理架构，集成向量检索、图推理和外部工具，提升多步推理性能。
analysis.experiments: 在Tower of Hanoi规划任务上，本体增强系统相比基线LLM在多步推理场景中性能提升。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 本体构建的自动化和质量可能受限于数据源和LLM的抽取能力。
实验仅涉及单一规划任务，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种混合架构，利用LLM自动构建本体作为外部记忆层，增强推理和验证能力。

papers.title: Can "AI" Be a Doctor? A Study of Empathy, Readability, and Alignment in Clinical LLMs
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in healthcare, yet their communicative alignment with clinical standards remains insufficiently quantified. We conduct a multidimensional evaluation of general-purpose and domain-specialized LLMs across structured medical explanations and real-world physician-patient interactions, analyzing semantic fidelity, readability, and affective resonance. Baseline models amplify affective polarity relative to physicians (Very Negative: 43.14-45.10% vs. 37.25%) and, in larger architectures such as GPT-5 and Claude, produce substantially higher linguistic complexity (FKGL up to 16.91-17.60 vs. 11.47-12.50 in physician-authored responses). Empathy-oriented prompting reduces extreme negativity and lowers grade-level complexity (up to -6.87 FKGL points for GPT-5) but does not significantly increase semantic fidelity. Collaborative rewriting yields the strongest overall alignment. Rephrase configurations achieve the highest semantic similarity to physician answers (up to mean = 0.93) while consistently improving readability and reducing affective extremity. Dual stakeholder evaluation shows that no model surpasses physicians on epistemic criteria, whereas patients consistently prefer rewritten variants for clarity and emotional tone. These findings suggest that LLMs function most effectively as collaborative communication enhancers rather than replacements for clinical expertise.

analysis.tldr: 临床LLM在共情、可读性和对齐方面存在不足，协作改写比独立生成更接近医生标准。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在医疗场景中应用日益广泛，但其沟通质量（共情、可读性、语义对齐）缺乏系统量化评估，现有方法可能放大情感极端性或增加语言复杂度，影响医患沟通效果。
analysis.problem: 评估通用与领域专用LLM在结构化医学解释和真实医患互动中的语义保真度、可读性和情感共鸣，并探索提升对齐的方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基线模型情感极性比医生更极端（Very Negative: 43.14-45.10% vs. 37.25%）；大模型（GPT-5, Claude）语言复杂度显著更高（FKGL 16.91-17.60 vs. 11.47-12.50）；共情提示可降低极端性和复杂度但未提升语义保真度；协作改写实现最强对齐。
analysis.method: 多维评估框架：分析语义相似度、可读性（FKGL）、情感极性；比较基线、共情提示、协作改写等配置；结合双利益相关者（医生和患者）评价。
contributions: 系统量化了临床LLM在共情、可读性和对齐方面的不足，揭示情感极性和语言复杂度的偏差。
提出协作改写策略，在语义保真度（相似度均值0.93）、可读性和情感适度性上优于独立生成。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 评估可能局限于特定医学领域和语言（英语），泛化性未知。
协作改写依赖外部医生输入，实际部署成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 临床LLM在共情、可读性和对齐方面存在不足，协作改写比独立生成更接近医生标准。

papers.title: Working Memory Constraints Scaffold Learning in Transformers under Data Scarcity
papers.abstract: We investigate the integration of human-like working memory constraints into the Transformer architecture and implement several cognitively inspired attention variants, including fixed-width windows based and temporal decay based attention mechanisms. Our modified GPT-2 models are trained from scratch on developmentally plausible datasets (10M and 100M words). Performance is evaluated on grammatical judgment tasks (BLiMP) and alignment with human reading time data. Our results indicate that these cognitively-inspired constraints, particularly fixed-width attention, can significantly improve grammatical accuracy especially when training data is scarce. These constrained models also tend to show a stronger alignment with human processing metrics. The findings suggest that such constraints may serve as a beneficial inductive bias, guiding models towards more robust linguistic representations, especially in data-limited settings.

analysis.tldr: 在数据稀缺时，类人工作记忆约束（如固定宽度注意力）能显著提升Transformer的语法准确性和与人类处理的对齐度。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类语言学习受工作记忆限制，而标准Transformer无此约束，可能导致数据效率低且与人类认知不一致。
analysis.problem: 如何在数据稀缺条件下，通过引入认知启发的注意力机制提升Transformer的语言学习效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要表明，固定宽度注意力等约束在数据稀缺时显著提升语法准确性，且增强与人类阅读时间数据的对齐。
analysis.method: 在GPT-2中实现固定宽度窗口和基于时间衰减的注意力变体，并在小规模语料（10M/100M词）上从头训练。
contributions: 提出将工作记忆约束集成到Transformer中的多种认知启发注意力变体。
实验证明固定宽度注意力在数据稀缺时显著提升语法判断准确性。
发现约束模型与人类处理指标的对齐更强。
analysis.experiments: 在BLiMP语法判断任务和人类阅读时间数据上评估，使用10M和100M词数据集。
limitations: 仅测试了GPT-2架构，可能不适用于更大模型。
未探索其他认知约束（如注意力衰减的精细形式）。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在数据稀缺时，类人工作记忆约束（如固定宽度注意力）能显著提升Transformer的语法准确性和与人类处理的对齐度。

papers.title: GeoRect4D: Geometry-Compatible Generative Rectification for Dynamic Sparse-View 3D Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Reconstructing dynamic 3D scenes from sparse multi-view videos is highly ill-posed, often leading to geometric collapse, trajectory drift, and floating artifacts. Recent attempts introduce generative priors to hallucinate missing content, yet naive integration frequently causes structural drift and temporal inconsistency due to the mismatch between stochastic 2D generation and deterministic 3D geometry. In this paper, we propose GeoRect4D, a novel unified framework for sparse-view dynamic reconstruction that couples explicit 3D consistency with generative refinement via a closed-loop optimization process. Specifically, GeoRect4D introduces a degradation-aware feedback mechanism that incorporates a robust anchor-based dynamic 3DGS substrate with a single-step diffusion rectifier to hallucinate high-fidelity details. This rectifier utilizes a structural locking mechanism and spatiotemporal coordinated attention, effectively preserving physical plausibility while restoring missing content. Furthermore, we present a progressive optimization strategy that employs stochastic geometric purification to eliminate floaters and generative distillation to infuse texture details into the explicit representation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GeoRect4D achieves state-of-the-art performance in reconstruction fidelity, perceptual quality, and spatiotemporal consistency across multiple datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出GeoRect4D框架，通过闭环优化将显式3D一致性与生成式精炼结合，实现动态稀疏视角3D重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 动态稀疏视角3D重建高度病态，现有方法常因随机2D生成与确定性3D几何不匹配导致结构漂移和时间不一致。
analysis.problem: 从稀疏多视角视频重建动态3D场景时，几何坍塌、轨迹漂移和浮动伪影问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，直接集成生成先验会导致结构漂移和时间不一致，原因是随机2D生成与确定性3D几何之间的不匹配。
analysis.method: 提出GeoRect4D，包含退化感知反馈机制、基于锚点的动态3DGS基底、单步扩散整流器（含结构锁定机制和时空协调注意力），以及渐进优化策略（随机几何净化+生成蒸馏）。
contributions: 提出耦合显式3D一致性与生成式精炼的闭环优化框架GeoRect4D。
设计退化感知反馈机制和单步扩散整流器，保持物理合理性同时修复缺失内容。
提出渐进优化策略，结合随机几何净化和生成蒸馏，消除浮动伪影并注入纹理细节。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上，GeoRect4D在重建保真度、感知质量和时空一致性方面达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定动态场景假设，泛化性需进一步验证。
单步扩散整流器可能限制细节恢复的上限。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GeoRect4D框架，通过闭环优化将显式3D一致性与生成式精炼结合，实现动态稀疏视角3D重建。

papers.title: SWE-chat: Coding Agent Interactions From Real Users in the Wild
papers.abstract: AI coding agents are being adopted at scale, yet we lack empirical evidence on how people actually use them and how much of their output is useful in practice. We present SWE-chat, the first large-scale dataset of real coding agent sessions collected from open-source developers in the wild. The dataset currently contains 6,000 sessions, comprising more than 63,000 user prompts and 355,000 agent tool calls. SWE-chat is a living dataset; our collection pipeline automatically and continually discovers and processes sessions from public repositories. Leveraging SWE-chat, we provide an initial empirical characterization of real-world coding agent usage and failure modes. We find that coding patterns are bimodal: in 41% of sessions, agents author virtually all committed code ("vibe coding"), while in 23%, humans write all code themselves. Despite rapidly improving capabilities, coding agents remain inefficient in natural settings. Just 44% of all agent-produced code survives into user commits, and agent-written code introduces more security vulnerabilities than code authored by humans. Furthermore, users push back against agent outputs -- through corrections, failure reports, and interruptions -- in 44% of all turns. By capturing complete interaction traces with human vs. agent code authorship attribution, SWE-chat provides an empirical foundation for moving beyond curated benchmarks towards an evidence-based understanding of how AI agents perform in real developer workflows.

analysis.tldr: 首个大规模真实世界编码Agent交互数据集SWE-chat，揭示Agent代码采纳率仅44%且引入更多安全漏洞。
analysis.research_motivation: AI编码Agent被广泛采用，但缺乏真实使用场景的实证数据，现有研究多依赖人工基准，无法反映实际工作流中的效果与失败模式。
analysis.problem: 缺少大规模、真实世界的编码Agent交互数据集，难以系统分析Agent的实际使用模式、效率及安全性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 编码模式呈双峰分布：41%会话中Agent主导代码编写（vibe coding），23%由人类独立完成；Agent产出代码仅44%被采纳，且引入更多安全漏洞；用户在44%的交互轮次中通过纠正、失败报告或中断进行干预。
analysis.method: 构建自动持续采集管道，从公开仓库中发现并处理编码Agent会话，形成包含6000个会话、6.3万用户提示和35.5万工具调用的数据集SWE-chat，并基于此进行实证分析。
contributions: 首个大规模真实世界编码Agent交互数据集SWE-chat，包含完整交互轨迹与代码归属标注。
揭示Agent在实际开发中的低采纳率、安全漏洞增加及用户频繁干预等关键失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但基于数据集进行了使用模式与失败模式的实证表征。
limitations: 数据集仅来自开源开发者，可能无法代表企业或封闭环境。
当前仅提供初步表征，更深层的因果分析或改进方法尚未涉及。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个大规模真实世界编码Agent交互数据集SWE-chat，揭示Agent代码采纳率仅44%且引入更多安全漏洞。

papers.title: DAIRE: A lightweight AI model for real-time detection of Controller Area Network attacks in the Internet of Vehicles
papers.abstract: The Internet of Vehicles (IoV) is advancing modern transportation by improving safety, efficiency, and intelligence. However, the reliance on the Controller Area Network (CAN) introduces critical security risks, as CAN-based communication is highly vulnerable to cyberattacks. Addressing this challenge, we propose DAIRE (Detecting Attacks in IoV in REal-time), a lightweight machine learning framework designed for real-time detection and classification of CAN attacks. DAIRE is built on a lightweight artificial neural network (ANN) where each layer contains Ni = i x c neurons, with Ni representing the number of neurons in the ith layer and c corresponding to the total number of attack classes. Other hyperparameters are determined empirically to ensure real-time operation. To support the detection and classification of various IoV attacks, such as Denial-of-Service, Fuzzy, and Spoofing, DAIRE employs the sparse categorical cross-entropy loss function and root mean square propagation for loss minimization. In contrast to more resource-intensive architectures, DAIRE leverages a lightweight ANN to reduce computational demands while still delivering strong performance. Experimental results on the CICIoV2024 and Car-Hacking datasets demonstrate DAIRE's effectiveness, achieving an average detection rate of 99.88%, a false positive rate of 0.02%, and an overall accuracy of 99.96%. Furthermore, DAIRE significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in inference speed, with a classification time of just 0.03 ms per sample. These results highlight DAIRE's effectiveness in detecting IoV cyberattacks and its practical suitability for real-time deployment in vehicular systems, underscoring its vital role in strengthening automotive cybersecurity.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级ANN模型DAIRE，实现车联网CAN攻击的实时检测，准确率99.96%，推理仅0.03ms。
analysis.research_motivation: 车联网依赖CAN总线通信，但CAN协议缺乏安全机制，易受网络攻击，现有检测方法计算资源消耗大，难以满足实时性要求。
analysis.problem: 如何在资源受限的车载环境下实现高精度、低延迟的CAN攻击实时检测与分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DAIRE框架，基于轻量级人工神经网络（ANN），每层神经元数Ni = i × c（c为攻击类别数），使用稀疏分类交叉熵损失和RMSProp优化器，超参数经验设定以保证实时性。
contributions: 提出DAIRE轻量级ANN模型，实现车联网CAN攻击的实时检测与分类。
在CICIoV2024和Car-Hacking数据集上达到99.96%准确率、0.02%假阳性率，推理时间仅0.03ms/样本，显著优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在CICIoV2024和Car-Hacking数据集上评估，平均检测率99.88%，假阳性率0.02%，准确率99.96%，分类时间0.03ms/样本。
limitations: 仅针对特定攻击类型（DoS、Fuzzy、Spoofing），可能无法覆盖所有CAN攻击。
轻量级ANN设计可能牺牲对复杂攻击模式的检测能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级ANN模型DAIRE，实现车联网CAN攻击的实时检测，准确率99.96%，推理仅0.03ms。

papers.title: Coverage, Not Averages: Semantic Stratification for Trustworthy Retrieval Evaluation
papers.abstract: Retrieval quality is the primary bottleneck for accuracy and robustness in retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). Current evaluation relies on heuristically constructed query sets, which introduce a hidden intrinsic bias. We formalize retrieval evaluation as a statistical estimation problem, showing that metric reliability is fundamentally limited by the evaluation-set construction. We further introduce \emph{semantic stratification}, which grounds evaluation in corpus structure by organizing documents into an interpretable global space of entity-based clusters and systematically generating queries for missing strata. This yields (1) formal semantic coverage guarantees across retrieval regimes and (2) interpretable visibility into retrieval failure modes. Experiments across multiple benchmarks and retrieval methods validate our framework. The results expose systematic coverage gaps, identify structural signals that explain variance in retrieval performance, and show that stratified evaluation yields more stable and transparent assessments while supporting more trustworthy decision-making than aggregate metrics.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义分层方法，通过基于实体的聚类和系统查询生成，确保检索评估的语义覆盖和可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前检索评估依赖启发式构建的查询集，存在隐藏的内在偏差，导致指标可靠性受限，影响RAG系统的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 如何构建更可靠、更透明的检索评估方法，以克服传统聚合指标（如平均分）的覆盖不足和偏差问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出传统评估存在系统性覆盖缺口，且聚合指标无法揭示检索失败模式；语义分层能暴露这些缺口并识别解释性能差异的结构信号。
analysis.method: 语义分层：将文档组织为基于实体的可解释全局聚类空间，并系统生成缺失分层的查询，从而提供形式化的语义覆盖保证和可解释的失败模式分析。
contributions: 形式化检索评估为统计估计问题，揭示评估集构建对指标可靠性的根本限制。
提出语义分层方法，提供语义覆盖保证和可解释的失败模式分析。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准和检索方法上验证了框架，暴露了系统性覆盖缺口，并表明分层评估比聚合指标更稳定、更透明。
limitations: 可能依赖实体聚类质量，对动态或开放域语料适应性待验证。
未讨论查询生成的计算成本或可扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义分层方法，通过基于实体的聚类和系统查询生成，确保检索评估的语义覆盖和可解释性。

papers.title: Exploring High-Order Self-Similarity for Video Understanding
papers.abstract: Space-time self-similarity (STSS), which captures visual correspondences across frames, provides an effective way to represent temporal dynamics for video understanding. In this work, we explore higher-order STSS and demonstrate how STSSs at different orders reveal distinct aspects of these dynamics. We then introduce the Multi-Order Self-Similarity (MOSS) module, a lightweight neural module designed to learn and integrate multi-order STSS features. It can be applied to diverse video tasks to enhance motion modeling capabilities while consuming only marginal computational cost and memory usage. Extensive experiments on video action recognition, motion-centric video VQA, and real-world robotic tasks consistently demonstrate substantial improvements, validating the broad applicability of MOSS as a general temporal modeling module. The source code and checkpoints will be publicly available.

analysis.tldr: 提出多阶自相似性模块MOSS，以轻量方式增强视频理解中的运动建模。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频理解中，时空自相似性（STSS）能有效表示时序动态，但现有方法仅利用单阶STSS，忽略了不同阶STSS揭示动态的不同方面。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地学习和融合多阶时空自相似性特征，以提升视频理解中的运动建模能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同阶的STSS能揭示视频动态的不同方面，高阶STSS可提供互补信息。
analysis.method: 提出多阶自相似性（MOSS）模块，该轻量级神经网络模块能够学习并集成多阶STSS特征，以极小的计算和内存开销增强运动建模。
contributions: 首次探索高阶时空自相似性在视频理解中的应用，并揭示不同阶STSS揭示动态的不同方面。
提出轻量级MOSS模块，可即插即用于多种视频任务，显著提升性能且计算开销极小。
analysis.experiments: 在视频动作识别、运动中心视频VQA和真实机器人任务上进行了广泛实验，均取得显著改进，验证了MOSS的通用性。
limitations: 摘要未提及对高阶STSS阶数的选择策略，可能需针对任务调整。
仅验证了动作识别、VQA和机器人任务，其他视频任务（如视频生成）效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多阶自相似性模块MOSS，以轻量方式增强视频理解中的运动建模。

papers.title: V-tableR1: Process-Supervised Multimodal Table Reasoning with Critic-Guided Policy Optimization
papers.abstract: We introduce V-tableR1, a process-supervised reinforcement learning framework that elicits rigorous, verifiable reasoning from multimodal large language models (MLLMs). Current MLLMs trained solely on final outcomes often treat visual reasoning as a black box, relying on superficial pattern matching rather than performing rigorous multi-step inference. While Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards could enforce transparent reasoning trajectories, extending it to visual domains remains severely hindered by the ambiguity of grounding abstract logic into continuous pixel space. We solve this by leveraging the deterministic grid structure of tables as an ideal visual testbed. V-tableR1 employs a specialized critic VLM to provide dense, step-level feedback on the explicit visual chain-of-thought generated by a policy VLM. To optimize this system, we propose Process-Guided Direct Alignment Policy Optimization (PGPO), a novel RL algorithm integrating process rewards, decoupled policy constraints, and length-aware dynamic sampling. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that V-tableR1 explicitly penalizes visual hallucinations and shortcut guessing. By fundamentally shifting multimodal inference from black-box pattern matching to verifiable logical derivation, V-tableR1 4B establishes state-of-the-art accuracy among open-source models on complex tabular benchmarks, outperforming models up to 18x its size and improving over its SFT baseline

analysis.tldr: V-tableR1 通过过程监督强化学习，让多模态大模型在表格推理中实现可验证的逐步推理，显著提升准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前多模态大模型依赖最终结果训练，导致视觉推理成为黑箱，依赖表面模式匹配而非严谨多步推理，缺乏透明性和可验证性。
analysis.problem: 如何将可验证奖励的强化学习扩展到视觉领域，以强制模型生成透明的推理轨迹，并解决将抽象逻辑映射到连续像素空间的模糊性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，仅基于最终结果训练的MLLM在视觉推理中表现为黑箱，容易产生视觉幻觉和捷径猜测。
analysis.method: 提出V-tableR1框架，利用表格的确定性网格结构作为理想测试床，使用专门的批评者VLM对策略VLM生成的显式视觉思维链提供密集的步骤级反馈，并设计PGPO算法整合过程奖励、解耦策略约束和长度感知动态采样。
contributions: 提出V-tableR1框架，将过程监督强化学习应用于多模态表格推理，实现可验证的逐步推理。
提出PGPO算法，结合过程奖励、解耦策略约束和长度感知动态采样，优化策略VLM。
analysis.experiments: 在复杂表格基准上，V-tableR1 4B在开源模型中达到最先进准确率，超越18倍大小的模型，并优于其SFT基线。
limitations: 方法依赖于表格的确定性网格结构，可能难以直接推广到其他视觉领域。
批评者VLM的步骤级反馈质量可能成为瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: V-tableR1 通过过程监督强化学习，让多模态大模型在表格推理中实现可验证的逐步推理，显著提升准确率。

papers.title: Where and What: Reasoning Dynamic and Implicit Preferences in Situated Conversational Recommendation
papers.abstract: Situated conversational recommendation (SCR), which utilizes visual scenes grounded in specific environments and natural language dialogue to deliver contextually appropriate recommendations, has emerged as a promising research direction due to its close alignment with real-world scenarios. Compared to traditional recommendations, SCR requires a deeper understanding of dynamic and implicit user preferences, as the surrounding scene often influences users' underlying interests, while both may evolve across conversations. This complexity significantly impacts the timing and relevance of recommendations. To address this, we propose situated preference reasoning (SiPeR), a novel framework that integrates two core mechanisms: (1) Scene transition estimation, which estimates whether the current scene satisfies user needs, and guides the user toward a more suitable scene when necessary; and (2) Bayesian inverse inference, which leverages the likelihood of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to predict user preferences about candidate items within the scene. Extensive experiments on two representative benchmarks demonstrate SiPeR's superiority in both recommendation accuracy and response generation quality. The code and data are available at https://github.com/DongdingLin/SiPeR.

analysis.tldr: 提出SiPeR框架，通过场景转换估计和贝叶斯逆推理，在情境对话推荐中推理动态隐式偏好。
analysis.research_motivation: 情境对话推荐（SCR）需要理解动态和隐式的用户偏好，但现有方法难以捕捉场景变化对偏好的影响，导致推荐时机和相关性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在情境对话推荐中有效推理动态和隐式的用户偏好，并确定合适的推荐时机。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 用户偏好受周围场景影响且随对话演变，场景转换影响推荐时机。
analysis.method: 提出SiPeR框架，包含场景转换估计（判断当前场景是否满足用户需求并引导至合适场景）和贝叶斯逆推理（利用MLLM似然预测用户对候选物品的偏好）。
contributions: 提出SiPeR框架，结合场景转换估计和贝叶斯逆推理，解决动态隐式偏好推理问题。
在两个代表性基准上验证了SiPeR在推荐准确性和回复生成质量上的优越性。
analysis.experiments: 在两个代表性基准上进行实验，结果显示SiPeR在推荐准确性和回复生成质量上优于对比方法。
limitations: 可能依赖MLLM的似然估计质量。
场景转换估计的泛化性可能受限于训练数据。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SiPeR框架，通过场景转换估计和贝叶斯逆推理，在情境对话推荐中推理动态隐式偏好。

papers.title: Amodal SAM: A Unified Amodal Segmentation Framework with Generalization
papers.abstract: Amodal segmentation is a challenging task that aims to predict the complete geometric shape of objects, including their occluded regions. Although existing methods primarily focus on amodal segmentation within the training domain, these approaches often lack the generalization capacity to extend effectively to novel object categories and unseen contexts. This paper introduces Amodal SAM, a unified framework that leverages SAM (Segment Anything Model) for both amodal image and amodal video segmentation. Amodal SAM preserves the powerful generalization ability of SAM while extending its inherent capabilities to the amodal segmentation task. The improvements lie in three aspects: (1) a lightweight Spatial Completion Adapter that enables occluded region reconstruction, (2) a Target-Aware Occlusion Synthesis (TAOS) pipeline that addresses the scarcity of amodal annotations by generating diverse synthetic training data, and (3) novel learning objectives that enforce regional consistency and topological regularization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Amodal SAM achieves state-of-the-art performance on standard benchmarks, while simultaneously exhibiting robust generalization to novel scenarios. We anticipate that this research will advance the field toward practical amodal segmentation systems capable of operating effectively in unconstrained real-world environments.

analysis.tldr: Amodal SAM 利用 SAM 的泛化能力，通过轻量适配器、合成数据生成和新型损失函数，实现统一的模态分割，在标准基准上达到 SOTA 并展现强泛化性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有模态分割方法主要关注训练域内的性能，缺乏对未见物体类别和新场景的泛化能力，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个既能保持 SAM 强大泛化能力、又能有效处理遮挡区域重建的通用模态分割框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Amodal SAM 框架，包含三个关键组件：轻量级空间完成适配器（Spatial Completion Adapter）用于遮挡区域重建；目标感知遮挡合成（TAOS）管道生成多样化合成训练数据以缓解标注稀缺；以及区域一致性和拓扑正则化的新型学习目标。
contributions: 提出 Amodal SAM，首个利用 SAM 实现统一图像和视频模态分割的框架，并保持其泛化能力。
设计轻量级空间完成适配器和目标感知遮挡合成管道，有效解决遮挡重建和数据稀缺问题。
引入区域一致性和拓扑正则化损失，提升分割质量。
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准上达到 SOTA，并展现出对新颖场景的鲁棒泛化能力。
limitations: 可能依赖 SAM 的预训练质量，对极端遮挡场景效果未知。
合成数据与真实数据分布可能存在差距，影响泛化上限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Amodal SAM 利用 SAM 的泛化能力，通过轻量适配器、合成数据生成和新型损失函数，实现统一的模态分割，在标准基准上达到 SOTA 并展现强泛化性。

papers.title: Lifecycle-Aware Federated Continual Learning in Mobile Autonomous Systems
papers.abstract: Federated continual learning (FCL) allows distributed autonomous fleets to adapt collaboratively to evolving terrain types across extended mission lifecycles. However, current approaches face several key challenges: 1) they use uniform protection strategies that do not account for the varying sensitivities to forgetting on different network layers; 2) they focus primarily on preventing forgetting during training, without addressing the long-term effects of cumulative drift; and 3) they often depend on idealized simulations that fail to capture the real-world heterogeneity present in distributed fleets. In this paper, we propose a lifecycle-aware dual-timescale FCL framework that incorporates training-time (pre-forgetting) prevention and (post-forgetting) recovery. Under this framework, we design a layer-selective rehearsal strategy that mitigates immediate forgetting during local training, and a rapid knowledge recovery strategy that restores degraded models after long-term cumulative drift. We present a theoretical analysis that characterizes heterogeneous forgetting dynamics and establishes the inevitability of long-term degradation. Our experimental results show that this framework achieves up to 8.3\% mIoU improvement over the strongest federated baseline and up to 31.7\% over conventional fine-tuning. We also deploy the FCL framework on a real-world rover testbed to assess system-level robustness under realistic constraints; the testing results further confirm the effectiveness of our FCL design.

analysis.tldr: 提出生命周期感知的双时间尺度联邦持续学习框架，通过层选择性重放和快速知识恢复策略应对移动自主系统中的灾难性遗忘和长期漂移。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦持续学习（FCL）使分布式自主车队能够在长期任务中协作适应变化的地形，但现有方法存在三大痛点：1）对所有网络层使用统一保护策略，忽略了不同层对遗忘的敏感性差异；2）主要关注训练时防止遗忘，未解决累积漂移的长期影响；3）依赖理想化仿真，无法捕捉真实分布式车队的异质性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个生命周期感知的联邦持续学习框架，同时缓解训练时的即时遗忘和长期累积漂移，并适应真实分布式系统的异质性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过理论分析刻画了异质性遗忘动力学，并建立了长期退化的必然性。
analysis.method: 提出生命周期感知的双时间尺度FCL框架，包含训练时（预遗忘）预防和（后遗忘）恢复两个阶段。具体设计了层选择性重放策略（缓解局部训练中的即时遗忘）和快速知识恢复策略（恢复长期累积漂移后的退化模型）。
contributions: 提出生命周期感知的双时间尺度FCL框架，同时处理训练时遗忘和长期漂移。
设计层选择性重放和快速知识恢复策略，在多个联邦持续学习场景中显著提升性能。
在真实世界漫游车测试平台上部署并验证了框架的系统级鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个联邦持续学习场景中，该方法相比最强联邦基线提升8.3% mIoU，相比传统微调提升31.7%；并在真实漫游车测试平台上验证了系统级鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能未考虑更复杂的网络架构或异构设备计算能力差异。
理论分析可能仅针对特定遗忘动力学假设。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出生命周期感知的双时间尺度联邦持续学习框架，通过层选择性重放和快速知识恢复策略应对移动自主系统中的灾难性遗忘和长期漂移。

papers.title: AAC: Admissible-by-Architecture Differentiable Landmark Compression for ALT
papers.abstract: We introduce \textbf{AAC} (Architecturally Admissible Compressor), a differentiable landmark-selection module for ALT (A*, Landmarks, and Triangle inequality) shortest-path heuristics whose outputs are admissible by construction: each forward pass is a row-stochastic mixture of triangle-inequality lower bounds, so the heuristic is admissible for \emph{every} parameter setting without requiring convergence, calibration, or projection. At deployment, the module reduces to classical ALT on a learned subset, composing end-to-end with neural encoders while preserving the classical toolchain. The construction is the first differentiable instance of the compress-while-preserving-admissibility tradition in classical heuristic search. Under a matched per-vertex memory protocol, we establish that ALT with farthest-point-sampling landmarks (FPS-ALT) has provably near-optimal coverage on metric graphs, leaving at most a few percentage points of headroom for \emph{any} selector. AAC operates near this ceiling: the gap is $0.9$--$3.9$ percentage points on 9 road networks and ${\leq}1.3$ percentage points on synthetic graphs, with zero admissibility violations across $1{,}500+$ queries and all logged runs. At matched memory, AAC is also $1.2$--$1.5{\times}$ faster than FPS-ALT at the median query on DIMACS road networks, amortizing its offline cost within $170$--$1{,}924$ queries. A controlled ablation isolates the binding constraint: training-objective drift under default initialization, not architectural capacity; identity-on-first-$m$ initialization closes the expansion-count gap entirely. We release the module, a reusable matched-memory benchmarking protocol with paired two-one-sided-test (TOST) equivalence and pre-registration, and a reference compressed-differential-heuristics baseline.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种可微的地标压缩模块AAC，在保持可采纳性的前提下学习ALT启发式函数的最优地标子集，性能接近理论最优。
analysis.research_motivation: ALT（A*、地标和三角不等式）是最短路径搜索中高效的启发式方法，但传统地标选择（如最远点采样）需要离线计算且无法端到端学习；现有可微方法难以保证可采纳性（admissibility），导致搜索最优性受损。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个可微的地标选择模块，使其输出的启发式函数对任意参数设置都保持可采纳性，同时能与神经网络编码器端到端联合训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AAC模块，其前向传播输出行随机混合的三角不等式下界，从而保证可采纳性；训练后简化为在学到的地标子集上运行经典ALT，与神经编码器端到端组合。
contributions: 提出首个可微且保证可采纳性的地标压缩模块AAC，无需收敛、校准或投影。
理论上证明最远点采样地标（FPS-ALT）在度量图上具有接近最优的覆盖，并实验验证AAC接近该上界。
在9个道路网络和合成图上，AAC的扩展数差距仅为0.9-3.9和≤1.3个百分点，且零可采纳性违规。
在DIMACS道路网络上，AAC中位查询速度比FPS-ALT快1.2-1.5倍，离线成本在170-1924次查询内摊销。
消融实验表明约束来自训练目标漂移而非架构容量，并提出identity-on-first-m初始化完全消除扩展数差距。
开源模块、可复现的匹配内存基准测试协议（含TOST等价检验和预注册）以及压缩差分启发式基线。
analysis.experiments: 在9个道路网络和合成图上进行实验，评估扩展数差距、可采纳性违规次数、查询速度及离线成本摊销。
limitations: 方法主要针对度量图（满足三角不等式），非度量图上的适用性未讨论。
训练目标漂移问题虽通过初始化缓解，但未完全消除对超参数的敏感性。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种可微的地标压缩模块AAC，在保持可采纳性的前提下学习ALT启发式函数的最优地标子集，性能接近理论最优。

papers.title: Anchor-and-Resume Concession Under Dynamic Pricing for LLM-Augmented Freight Negotiation
papers.abstract: Freight brokerages negotiate thousands of carrier rates daily under dynamic pricing conditions where models frequently revise targets mid-conversation. Classical time-dependent concession frameworks use a fixed shape parameter $β$ that cannot adapt to these updates. Deriving $β$ from the live spread enables adaptation but introduces a new problem: a pricing shift can cause the formula to retract a previous offer, violating monotonicity. LLM-powered brokers offer flexibility but require expensive reasoning models, produce non-deterministic pricing, and remain vulnerable to prompt injection. We propose a two-index anchor-and-resume framework that addresses both limitations. A spread-derived $β$ maps each load's margin structure to the correct concession posture, while the anchor-and-resume mechanism guarantees monotonically non-decreasing offers under arbitrary pricing shifts. All pricing decisions remain in a deterministic formula; the LLM, when used, serves only as a natural-language translation layer. Empirical evaluation across 115,125 negotiations shows that the adaptive $β$ tailors behavior by regime: in narrow spreads, it concedes quickly to prioritize deal closure and load coverage; in medium and wide spreads, it matches or exceeds the best fixed-$β$ baselines in broker savings. Against an unconstrained 20-billion-parameter LLM broker, it achieves similar agreement rates and savings. Against LLM-powered carriers as more realistic stochastic counterparties, it maintains comparable savings and higher agreement rates than against rule-based opponents. By decoupling the LLM from pricing logic, the framework scales horizontally to thousands of concurrent negotiations with negligible inference cost and transparent decision-making.

analysis.tldr: 提出锚点-恢复框架解决动态定价下货运谈判的让步单调性问题，用公式定价+LLM仅做翻译层。
analysis.research_motivation: 货运经纪商每天在动态定价条件下谈判数千次运价，模型频繁修改目标，经典让步框架因固定形状参数无法适应更新，而LLM代理虽灵活但昂贵、非确定且易受提示注入攻击。
analysis.problem: 如何在动态定价中实现单调非递减的让步策略，同时保持低成本和确定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两索引锚点-恢复框架：用价差推导自适应形状参数β，锚点-恢复机制保证任意定价偏移下出价单调非递减；LLM仅作为自然语言翻译层，定价由确定性公式控制。
contributions: 提出锚点-恢复框架，保证动态定价下让步的单调性。
用价差推导自适应β，根据利润结构调整让步姿态。
将LLM与定价逻辑解耦，实现可扩展、低成本、透明的谈判系统。
analysis.experiments: 在115,125次谈判中评估，自适应β在窄价差下快速让步以优先成交，中宽价差下匹配或超越最佳固定β基线；与200亿参数LLM代理相比达成相似协议率和节省；面对LLM驱动的对手时保持可比节省和更高协议率。
limitations: 可能仅适用于货运谈判场景，泛化性未验证。
LLM翻译层的质量可能影响谈判流畅性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出锚点-恢复框架解决动态定价下货运谈判的让步单调性问题，用公式定价+LLM仅做翻译层。

papers.title: Render-in-the-Loop: Vector Graphics Generation via Visual Self-Feedback
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown promising capabilities in generating Scalable Vector Graphics (SVG) via direct code synthesis. However, existing paradigms typically adopt an open-loop "blind drawing" approach, where models generate symbolic code sequences without perceiving intermediate visual outcomes. This methodology severely underutilizes the powerful visual priors embedded in MLLMs vision encoders, treating SVG generation as a disjointed textual sequence modeling task rather than an integrated visuo-spatial one. Consequently, models struggle to reason about partial canvas states and implicit occlusion relationships, which are visually explicit but textually ambiguous. To bridge this gap, we propose Render-in-the-Loop, a novel generation paradigm that reformulates SVG synthesis as a step-wise, visual-context-aware process. By rendering intermediate code states into a cumulative canvas, the model explicitly observes the evolving visual context at each step, leveraging on-the-fly feedback to guide subsequent generation. However, we demonstrate that applying this visual loop naively to off-the-shelf models is suboptimal due to their inability to leverage incremental visual-code mappings. To address this, we first utilize fine-grained path decomposition to construct dense multi-step visual trajectories, and then introduce a Visual Self-Feedback (VSF) training strategy to condition the next primitive generation on intermediate visual states. Furthermore, a Render-and-Verify (RaV) inference mechanism is proposed to effectively filter degenerate and redundant primitives. Our framework, instantiated on a multimodal foundation model, outperforms strong open-weight baselines on the standard MMSVGBench. This result highlights the remarkable data efficiency and generalization capability of our Render-in-the-Loop paradigm for both Text-to-SVG and Image-to-SVG tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Render-in-the-Loop 范式，通过视觉自反馈将 SVG 生成从盲绘转为逐步视觉感知过程，显著提升生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 MLLM 生成 SVG 采用开环盲绘方式，模型无法感知中间视觉结果，导致难以处理部分画布状态和隐式遮挡关系，严重浪费视觉编码器的先验知识。
analysis.problem: 如何让 MLLM 在 SVG 生成过程中利用中间渲染的视觉反馈来指导后续代码生成，避免盲绘的局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，直接将视觉循环应用于现成模型效果不佳，因为模型无法利用增量视觉-代码映射；此外，现有方法将 SVG 生成视为孤立的文本序列建模任务，而非集成的视觉空间任务。
analysis.method: 提出 Render-in-the-Loop 范式，包含：1) 细粒度路径分解构建密集多步视觉轨迹；2) Visual Self-Feedback (VSF) 训练策略，使下一步生成条件于中间视觉状态；3) Render-and-Verify (RaV) 推理机制过滤退化/冗余图元。
contributions: 提出 Render-in-the-Loop 生成范式，将 SVG 合成转化为逐步视觉上下文感知过程。
设计 Visual Self-Feedback 训练策略和 Render-and-Verify 推理机制，有效利用中间视觉反馈。
在 MMSVGBench 上超越强开放权重基线，展示数据效率和泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在标准 MMSVGBench 上评估，Text-to-SVG 和 Image-to-SVG 任务均取得优于强开放权重基线的结果。
limitations: 可能依赖多步渲染和验证，推理开销增加。
路径分解和视觉轨迹构建的细粒度可能限制复杂 SVG 的生成效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Render-in-the-Loop 范式，通过视觉自反馈将 SVG 生成从盲绘转为逐步视觉感知过程，显著提升生成质量。

papers.title: Interval POMDP Shielding for Imperfect-Perception Agents
papers.abstract: Autonomous systems that rely on learned perception can make unsafe decisions when sensor readings are misclassified. We study shielding for this setting: given a proposed action, a shield blocks actions that could violate safety. We consider the common case where system dynamics are known but perception uncertainty must be estimated from finite labeled data. From these data we build confidence intervals for the probabilities of perception outcomes and use them to model the system as a finite Interval Partially Observable Markov Decision Process with discrete states and actions. We then propose an algorithm to compute a conservative set of beliefs over the underlying state that is consistent with the observations seen so far. This enables us to construct a runtime shield that comes with a finite-horizon guarantee: with high probability over the training data, if the true perception uncertainty rates lie within the learned intervals, then every action admitted by the shield satisfies a stated lower bound on safety. Experiments on four case studies show that our shielding approach (and variants derived from it) improves the safety of the system over state-of-the-art baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于区间POMDP的屏蔽方法，利用有限标注数据构建感知不确定性置信区间，为不完美感知的自主系统提供安全保证。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主系统依赖学习感知，但传感器误分类可能导致不安全决策，现有屏蔽方法未充分利用有限标注数据估计感知不确定性。
analysis.problem: 如何在已知系统动力学但感知不确定性需从有限标注数据估计的情况下，构建运行时屏蔽以保证系统安全。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从有限标注数据构建感知结果概率的置信区间，建模为区间部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（Interval POMDP），并计算与观测一致的保守信念集，从而构造运行时屏蔽。
contributions: 提出基于区间POMDP的屏蔽框架，利用置信区间处理感知不确定性。
提供有限时域安全保证：以高概率保证屏蔽允许的动作满足安全下界。
analysis.experiments: 在四个案例研究上，所提屏蔽方法及其变体相比最先进基线提高了系统安全性。
limitations: 依赖系统动力学已知的假设。
安全保证仅适用于有限时域。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于区间POMDP的屏蔽方法，利用有限标注数据构建感知不确定性置信区间，为不完美感知的自主系统提供安全保证。

papers.title: Exploiting LLM-as-a-Judge Disposition on Free Text Legal QA via Prompt Optimization
papers.abstract: This work explores the role of prompt design and judge selection in LLM-as-a-Judge evaluations of free text legal question answering. We examine whether automatic task prompt optimization improves over human-centered design, whether optimization effectiveness varies by judge feedback style, and whether optimized prompts transfer across judges. We systematically address these questions on the LEXam benchmark by optimizing task prompts using the ProTeGi method with feedback from two judges (Qwen3-32B, DeepSeek-V3) across four task models, and then testing cross-judge transfer. Automatic optimization consistently outperforms the baseline, with lenient judge feedback yielding higher and more consistent gains than strict judge feedback. Prompts optimized with lenient feedback transfer better to strict judges than the reverse direction. Analysis reveals that lenient judges provide permissive feedback, yielding prompts with broader applicability, whereas strict judges produce restrictive feedback, leading to judge-specific overfitting. Our findings demonstrate algorithmically optimizing prompts on training data can outperform human-centered prompt design and that judges' dispositions during optimization shape prompt generalizability.

analysis.tldr: 通过自动提示优化利用LLM作为法官的倾向性，在自由文本法律问答中提升评估效果。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM作为法官在评估自由文本法律问答时，提示设计和法官选择对评估质量有显著影响，但自动优化是否优于人工设计、优化效果是否因法官反馈风格而异、优化后的提示能否跨法官迁移等问题尚未明确。
analysis.problem: 研究自动提示优化在LLM-as-a-Judge评估自由文本法律问答中的有效性，以及法官反馈风格对优化效果和提示泛化性的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 宽松的法官反馈产生更广泛适用的提示，严格的法官反馈导致提示过拟合于特定法官。
analysis.method: 使用ProTeGi方法在LEXam基准上自动优化任务提示，利用两个法官（Qwen3-32B, DeepSeek-V3）的反馈，并在四个任务模型上测试，然后评估跨法官迁移。
contributions: 证明自动提示优化在LLM-as-a-Judge评估中一致优于人工设计的基线。
揭示法官反馈风格（宽松vs严格）对优化效果和提示泛化性的影响。
analysis.experiments: 在LEXam基准上使用ProTeGi方法优化提示，涉及两个法官和四个任务模型，并进行了跨法官迁移测试。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅针对法律问答领域，泛化性需进一步验证。
未探讨其他优化方法或更多法官类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过自动提示优化利用LLM作为法官的倾向性，在自由文本法律问答中提升评估效果。

papers.title: Supplement Generation Training for Enhancing Agentic Task Performance
papers.abstract: Training large foundation models for agentic tasks is increasingly impractical due to the high computational costs, long iteration cycles, and rapid obsolescence as new models are continuously released. Instead of post-training massive models for every new task or domain, we propose Supplement Generation Training (SGT), a more efficient and sustainable strategy. SGT trains a smaller LLM to generate useful supplemental text that, when appended to the original input, helps the larger LLM solve the task more effectively. These lightweight models can dynamically adapt supplements to task requirements, improving performance without modifying the underlying large models. This approach decouples task-specific optimization from large foundation models and enables more flexible, cost-effective deployment of LLM-powered agents in real-world applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种轻量级补充生成训练方法，通过小模型为输入生成辅助文本，提升大模型在智能体任务中的表现，避免高昂的后训练成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型基础模型在智能体任务上的后训练成本高、周期长，且新模型不断发布导致旧训练快速过时，亟需更高效、可持续的策略。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改底层大模型的前提下，高效提升大模型在智能体任务上的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 训练一个小型语言模型为原始输入生成补充文本，将补充文本附加到输入后，帮助大模型更有效地解决任务。
contributions: 提出Supplement Generation Training (SGT)框架，通过轻量级模型生成补充文本提升大模型智能体任务性能。
实现任务特定优化与大模型的解耦，支持灵活、低成本的部署。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 补充文本的质量和有效性可能高度依赖小模型的训练数据和任务类型。
未讨论补充文本可能引入的噪声或对模型鲁棒性的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种轻量级补充生成训练方法，通过小模型为输入生成辅助文本，提升大模型在智能体任务中的表现，避免高昂的后训练成本。

papers.title: Tokenised Flow Matching for Hierarchical Simulation Based Inference
papers.abstract: The cost of simulator evaluations is a key practical bottleneck for Simulation Based Inference (SBI). In hierarchical settings with shared global parameters and exchangeable site-level parameters and observations, this structure can be exploited to improve simulation efficiency. Existing hierarchical SBI approaches factorise the posterior yet still simulate across multiple sites per training sample; We instead explore likelihood factorisation (LF) to train from single-site simulations. In LF sampling we learn a per-site neural surrogate of the simulator and then assemble synthetic multi-site observations to amortise inference for the full hierarchical posterior. Building on this, we propose Tokenised Flow Matching for Posterior Estimation (TFMPE), a tokenised flow matching approach that supports function-valued observations through likelihood factorisation. To enable systematic evaluation, we introduce a benchmark for hierarchical SBI. We validate TFMPE on this benchmark and on realistic infectious disease and computational fluid dynamics models, finding well-calibrated posteriors while reducing computational cost.

analysis.tldr: 提出Tokenised Flow Matching方法，通过似然分解和单站点模拟训练，大幅降低分层模拟推断的计算成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 模拟推断中模拟器评估成本高昂，现有分层方法虽分解后验但仍需多站点联合模拟，计算效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何利用分层结构中的似然分解，从单站点模拟训练中高效推断全局和局部参数的后验分布。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Tokenised Flow Matching for Posterior Estimation (TFMPE)，通过似然分解学习每个站点的神经代理模拟器，再组装合成多站点观测数据，实现分层后验的摊销推断。
contributions: 提出基于似然分解的分层SBI框架，支持单站点模拟训练。
引入Tokenised Flow Matching方法，可处理函数值观测数据。
构建分层SBI基准测试，并在传染病和流体动力学模型上验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在分层SBI基准测试、传染病模型和计算流体动力学模型上验证，后验校准良好且计算成本降低。
limitations: 可能依赖模拟器可分解为独立站点的假设。
函数值观测的表示能力可能受限于token化方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: probabilistic methods (Bayesian methods, variational inference, sampling, UQ, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Tokenised Flow Matching方法，通过似然分解和单站点模拟训练，大幅降低分层模拟推断的计算成本。

papers.title: COMPASS: COntinual Multilingual PEFT with Adaptive Semantic Sampling
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often exhibit performance disparities across languages, with naive multilingual fine-tuning frequently degrading performance due to negative cross-lingual interference. To address this, we introduce COMPASS (COntinual Multilingual PEFT with Adaptive Semantic Sampling), a novel data-centric framework for adapting LLMs to target languages. COMPASS leverages parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) by training lightweight, language-specific adapters on a judiciously selected subset of auxiliary multilingual data. The core of our method is a distribution-aware sampling strategy that uses multilingual embeddings and clustering to identify semantic gaps between existing training data and a target usage distribution. By prioritizing auxiliary data from under-represented semantic clusters, COMPASS maximizes positive cross-lingual transfer while minimizing interference. We extend this into a continual learning framework, COMPASS-ECDA, which monitors for data distribution shifts in production and dynamically updates adapters to prevent model staleness, balancing adaptation to new data with the preservation of existing knowledge. Across three different model architectures (Phi-4-Mini, Llama-3.1-8B, and Qwen2.5-7B) and multiple challenging multilingual benchmarks (Global-MMLU, MMLU-ProX), including unseen long-context tasks (OneRuler), we demonstrate that COMPASS consistently outperforms baseline methods guided by linguistic similarity, providing an effective, efficient, and sustainable solution for developing and maintaining high-performing multilingual models in dynamic environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种数据驱动的多语言持续微调框架COMPASS，通过自适应语义采样选择辅助数据训练语言特定适配器，减少跨语言干扰并提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在多语言场景下存在性能差异，朴素的多语言微调常因负跨语言干扰导致性能下降，亟需高效且可持续的多语言适配方法。
analysis.problem: 如何选择辅助多语言数据以最大化正跨语言迁移并最小化干扰，同时支持持续学习以适应数据分布变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到朴素多语言微调因负跨语言干扰导致性能下降，且现有基于语言相似性的数据选择方法效果有限。
analysis.method: COMPASS框架：使用参数高效微调（PEFT）训练语言特定适配器，通过多语言嵌入和聚类识别语义差距，优先选择来自欠表示语义簇的辅助数据；扩展为持续学习版本COMPASS-ECDA，监测分布偏移并动态更新适配器。
contributions: 提出数据驱动的多语言持续微调框架COMPASS，利用自适应语义采样选择辅助数据。
引入持续学习扩展COMPASS-ECDA，动态适配数据分布变化。
在多种模型和基准上验证了方法优于基于语言相似性的基线。
analysis.experiments: 在Phi-4-Mini、Llama-3.1-8B、Qwen2.5-7B三种模型上，使用Global-MMLU、MMLU-ProX和OneRuler（长上下文）基准进行评测，COMPASS一致优于基线方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的多语言嵌入和聚类效果。
持续学习场景下适配器更新策略的稳定性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种数据驱动的多语言持续微调框架COMPASS，通过自适应语义采样选择辅助数据训练语言特定适配器，减少跨语言干扰并提升性能。

papers.title: ONOTE: Benchmarking Omnimodal Notation Processing for Expert-level Music Intelligence
papers.abstract: Omnimodal Notation Processing (ONP) represents a unique frontier for omnimodal AI due to the rigorous, multi-dimensional alignment required across auditory, visual, and symbolic domains. Current research remains fragmented, focusing on isolated transcription tasks that fail to bridge the gap between superficial pattern recognition and the underlying musical logic. This landscape is further complicated by severe notation biases toward Western staff and the inherent unreliability of "LLM-as-a-judge" metrics, which often mask structural reasoning failures with systemic hallucinations. To establish a more rigorous standard, we introduce ONOTE, a multi-format benchmark that utilizes a deterministic pipeline--grounded in canonical pitch projection--to eliminate subjective scoring biases across diverse notation systems. Our evaluation of leading omnimodal models exposes a fundamental disconnect between perceptual accuracy and music-theoretic comprehension, providing a necessary framework for diagnosing reasoning vulnerabilities in complex, rule-constrained domains.

analysis.tldr: ONOTE基准揭示当前多模态模型在乐谱理解中感知准确与音乐理论推理之间的根本脱节。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究聚焦于孤立的转录任务，未能弥合表面模式识别与深层音乐逻辑之间的鸿沟，且存在西方五线谱偏见和LLM评判不可靠的问题。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个严格、无偏的基准来评估多模态模型在乐谱处理中的音乐理论理解能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前多模态模型在感知准确性与音乐理论理解之间存在根本性脱节，且LLM评判存在系统性幻觉。
analysis.method: 提出ONOTE基准，采用基于规范音高投影的确定性流水线，消除主观评分偏差，覆盖多种记谱系统。
contributions: 构建了首个多格式、无偏的乐谱处理基准ONOTE，涵盖多种记谱系统。
揭示了领先多模态模型在感知准确性与音乐理论理解之间的根本脱节。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有非西方记谱系统。
确定性流水线可能无法完全模拟人类音乐理解的灵活性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ONOTE基准揭示当前多模态模型在乐谱理解中感知准确与音乐理论推理之间的根本脱节。

papers.title: GeoRelight: Learning Joint Geometrical Relighting and Reconstruction with Flexible Multi-Modal Diffusion Transformers
papers.abstract: Relighting a person from a single photo is an attractive but ill-posed task, as a 2D image ambiguously entangles 3D geometry, intrinsic appearance, and illumination. Current methods either use sequential pipelines that suffer from error accumulation, or they do not explicitly leverage 3D geometry during relighting, which limits physical consistency. Since relighting and estimation of 3D geometry are mutually beneficial tasks, we propose a unified Multi-Modal Diffusion Transformer (DiT) that jointly solves for both: GeoRelight. We make this possible through two key technical contributions: isotropic NDC-Orthographic Depth (iNOD), a distortion-free 3D representation compatible with latent diffusion models; and a strategic mixed-data training method that combines synthetic and auto-labeled real data. By solving geometry and relighting jointly, GeoRelight achieves better performance than both sequential models and previous systems that ignored geometry.

analysis.tldr: 提出联合几何重建与重打光的统一多模态扩散Transformer，通过无畸变3D表示和混合数据训练提升单图人物重打光效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 单图人物重打光是病态问题，2D图像模糊了3D几何、外观和光照；现有顺序流水线存在误差累积，且未显式利用3D几何导致物理一致性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何联合估计3D几何和重打光，避免顺序流水线的误差累积并提升物理一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出重打光和3D几何估计是相互促进的任务，但现有方法未联合求解。
analysis.method: 提出统一的多模态扩散Transformer（DiT），联合求解几何重建与重打光；关键贡献包括各向同性NDC-正交深度（iNOD）表示和合成与自动标注真实数据的混合训练策略。
contributions: 提出GeoRelight，首个联合几何重建与重打光的统一多模态扩散Transformer。
设计iNOD表示，一种无畸变的3D表示，兼容潜在扩散模型。
提出混合数据训练方法，结合合成数据和自动标注的真实数据。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖合成数据质量，真实场景泛化性待验证。
iNOD表示的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出联合几何重建与重打光的统一多模态扩散Transformer，通过无畸变3D表示和混合数据训练提升单图人物重打光效果。

papers.title: Learning to Evolve: A Self-Improving Framework for Multi-Agent Systems via Textual Parameter Graph Optimization
papers.abstract: Designing and optimizing multi-agent systems (MAS) is a complex, labor-intensive process of "Agent Engineering." Existing automatic optimization methods, primarily focused on flat prompt tuning, lack the structural awareness to debug the intricate web of interactions in MAS. More critically, these optimizers are static; they do not learn from experience to improve their own optimization strategies. To address these gaps, we introduce Textual Parameter Graph Optimization (TPGO), a framework that enables a multi-agent system to learn to evolve. TPGO first models the MAS as a Textual Parameter Graph (TPG), where agents, tools, and workflows are modular, optimizable nodes. To guide evolution, we derive "textual gradients," structured natural language feedback from execution traces, to pinpoint failures and suggest granular modifications. The core of our framework is Group Relative Agent Optimization (GRAO), a novel meta-learning strategy that learns from historical optimization experiences. By analyzing past successes and failures, GRAO becomes progressively better at proposing effective updates, allowing the system to learn how to optimize itself. Extensive experiments on complex benchmarks like GAIA and MCP-Universe show that TPGO significantly enhances the performance of state-of-the-art agent frameworks, achieving higher success rates through automated, self-improving optimization.

analysis.tldr: 提出文本参数图优化框架，让多智能体系统通过元学习实现自我进化。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体系统设计依赖人工且复杂，现有自动优化方法缺乏结构感知且无法从经验中学习。
analysis.problem: 如何让多智能体系统自动、结构化地优化自身，并持续提升优化策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将MAS建模为文本参数图，通过文本梯度定位失败并建议修改，利用GRAO元学习策略从历史优化经验中学习。
contributions: 提出TPGO框架，将MAS表示为可优化节点的文本参数图。
引入GRAO元学习策略，使系统从历史经验中学习如何自我优化。
analysis.experiments: 在GAIA和MCP-Universe基准上，TPGO显著提升了最先进智能体框架的性能，实现了更高的成功率。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的执行轨迹反馈。
元学习策略的泛化性可能受限于任务分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出文本参数图优化框架，让多智能体系统通过元学习实现自我进化。

papers.title: Participatory provenance as representational auditing for AI-mediated public consultation
papers.abstract: Artificial intelligence is increasingly deployed to synthesize large-scale public input in policy consultations and participatory processes. Yet no formal framework exists for auditing whether these summaries faithfully represent the source population, an accountability gap that existing approaches to AI explainability, grounding and hallucination detection do not address because they focus on output quality rather than input fidelity. Here, participatory provenance is introduced: a measurement framework grounded in optimal transport theory, causal inference and semantic analysis that tracks how individual public submissions are transformed, filtered or lost through AI-mediated summarization. Applied to Canada's 2025-2026 national AI Strategy consultation ($n = 5{,}253$ respondents across two independent policy topics), the framework reveals that both official government summaries underperform a random-participant baseline ($-9.1\%$ and $-8.0\%$ coverage degradation), with $16.9\%$ and $15.3\%$ of participants effectively excluded. Exclusion concentrates in clusters expressing dissent, scepticism and critique of AI ($33$-$88\%$ exclusion rates). Brevity, semantic isolation and rhetorical register independently predict representational outcome. An accompanying open-source interactive tool, the Co-creation Provenance Lab, enables policymakers to audit and iteratively improve summaries, establishing genuine human-in-the-loop oversight at scale.

analysis.tldr: 提出参与式溯源框架，用于审计AI中介的公众咨询摘要是否忠实代表原始意见，发现官方摘要存在系统性排除异议声音的问题。
analysis.research_motivation: AI被用于合成大规模公众意见，但缺乏审计摘要是否忠实代表源人群的正式框架，现有可解释性、接地和幻觉检测方法关注输出质量而非输入保真度，无法解决这一问责缺口。
analysis.problem: 如何审计AI中介的公众咨询摘要是否忠实代表原始参与者意见，并识别被排除的群体。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 官方摘要覆盖度低于随机参与者基线（-9.1%和-8.0%），16.9%和15.3%的参与者被有效排除，排除集中在表达异议、怀疑和批评AI的群体（排除率33%-88%），简洁性、语义孤立性和修辞风格独立预测代表性结果。
analysis.method: 基于最优传输理论、因果推断和语义分析的参与式溯源框架，追踪个体意见在AI中介摘要中的转换、过滤或丢失过程。
contributions: 提出参与式溯源作为审计AI中介公众咨询摘要代表性的测量框架
通过加拿大国家AI战略咨询实证揭示官方摘要系统性排除异议声音
提供开源交互工具Co-creation Provenance Lab支持政策制定者审计和改进摘要
analysis.experiments: 在加拿大2025-2026年国家AI战略咨询中应用，涉及5253名受访者和两个独立政策主题，比较官方摘要与随机参与者基线。
limitations: 仅基于单一国家咨询案例，可能不适用于其他文化或政策背景
框架依赖语义分析和因果推断，对非文本输入（如音频、视频）的适用性未讨论
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出参与式溯源框架，用于审计AI中介的公众咨询摘要是否忠实代表原始意见，发现官方摘要存在系统性排除异议声音的问题。

papers.title: QuanForge: A Mutation Testing Framework for Quantum Neural Networks
papers.abstract: With the growing synergy between deep learning and quantum computing, Quantum Neural Networks (QNNs) have emerged as a promising paradigm by leveraging quantum parallelism and entanglement. However, testing QNNs remains underexplored due to their complex quantum dynamics and limited interpretability. Developing a mutation testing technique for QNNs is promising while requires addressing stochastic factors, including the inherent randomness of mutation operators and quantum measurements. To tackle these challenges, we propose QuanForge, a mutation testing framework specifically designed for QNNs. We first introduce statistical mutation killing to provide a more reliable criterion. QuanForge incorporates nine post-training mutation operators at both gate and parameter levels, capable of simulating various potential errors in quantum circuits. Finally, a mutant generation algorithm is formalized that systematically produces effective mutants, thereby enabling a robust and reliable mutation analysis. Through extensive experiments on benchmark datasets and QNN architectures, we show that QuanForge can effectively distinguish different test suites and localize vulnerable circuit regions, providing insights for data enhancement and structural assessment of QNNs. We also analyze the generation capabilities of different operators and evaluate performance under simulated noisy conditions to assess the practical feasibility of QuanForge for future quantum devices.

analysis.tldr: 提出针对量子神经网络的变异测试框架QuanForge，通过统计变异杀死和门/参数级变异算子实现可靠测试。
analysis.research_motivation: 量子神经网络测试因量子动力学复杂和可解释性差而未被充分探索，现有变异测试技术难以处理随机性因素。
analysis.problem: 如何为量子神经网络设计有效的变异测试方法，以评估测试套件质量并定位脆弱电路区域。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出QuanForge框架，包含统计变异杀死准则、九种后训练变异算子（门级和参数级）以及系统化变异生成算法。
contributions: 首次提出针对QNN的变异测试框架QuanForge
引入统计变异杀死准则以应对随机性
设计九种门级和参数级变异算子模拟潜在错误
形式化变异生成算法确保有效变异分析
analysis.experiments: 在基准数据集和QNN架构上实验，验证QuanForge能有效区分测试套件并定位脆弱区域，分析了不同算子的生成能力及噪声条件下的性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定QNN架构
噪声模拟与实际量子设备存在差距
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出针对量子神经网络的变异测试框架QuanForge，通过统计变异杀死和门/参数级变异算子实现可靠测试。

papers.title: LAF-Based Evaluation and UTTL-Based Learning Strategies with MIATTs
papers.abstract: In many real-world machine learning (ML) applications, the true target cannot be precisely defined due to ambiguity or subjectivity information. To address this challenge, under the assumption that the true target for a given ML task is not assumed to exist objectively in the real world, the EL-MIATTs (Evaluation and Learning with Multiple Inaccurate True Targets) framework has been proposed. Bridging theory and practice in implementing EL-MIATTs, in this paper, we develop two complementary mechanisms: LAF (Logical Assessment Formula)-based evaluation algorithms and UTTL (Undefinable True Target Learning)-based learning strategies with MIATTs, which together enable logically coherent and practically feasible modeling under uncertain supervision. We first analyze task-specific MIATTs, examining how their coverage and diversity determine their structural property and influence downstream evaluation and learning. Based on this understanding, we formulate LAF-grounded evaluation algorithms that operate either on original MIATTs or on ternary targets synthesized from them, balancing interpretability, soundness, and completeness. For model training, we introduce UTTL-grounded learning strategies using Dice and cross-entropy loss functions, comparing per-target and aggregated optimization schemes. We also discuss how the integration of LAF and UTTL bridges the gap between logical semantics and statistical optimization. Together, these components provide a coherent pathway for implementing EL-MIATTs, offering a principled foundation for developing ML systems in scenarios where the notion of "ground truth" is inherently uncertain. An application of this work's results is presented as part of the study available at https://www.qeios.com/read/EZWLSN.

analysis.tldr: 提出LAF评估算法和UTTL学习策略，在真实目标不确定时实现逻辑一致且可行的建模。
analysis.research_motivation: 许多真实ML应用中，真实目标因模糊性或主观性无法精确定义，传统监督学习依赖客观真实标签的假设不成立。
analysis.problem: 如何在真实目标不存在或不确定的情况下，进行逻辑一致且实践可行的模型评估与学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分析了任务特定MIATTs的覆盖率和多样性如何决定其结构性质，并影响下游评估和学习。
analysis.method: 提出基于逻辑评估公式（LAF）的评估算法和基于不可定义真实目标学习（UTTL）的学习策略，使用Dice和交叉熵损失函数，比较逐目标和聚合优化方案。
contributions: 提出LAF评估算法，可在原始MIATTs或合成的三元目标上运行，平衡可解释性、合理性和完备性。
引入UTTL学习策略，结合Dice和交叉熵损失，弥合逻辑语义与统计优化之间的差距。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖MIATTs的覆盖率和多样性假设，实际中难以保证。
未在多种任务上验证泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LAF评估算法和UTTL学习策略，在真实目标不确定时实现逻辑一致且可行的建模。

papers.title: SSL-R1: Self-Supervised Visual Reinforcement Post-Training for Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has demonstrated the great potential of enhancing the reasoning abilities in multimodal large language models (MLLMs). However, the reliance on language-centric priors and expensive manual annotations prevents MLLMs' intrinsic visual understanding and scalable reward designs. In this work, we introduce SSL-R1, a generic self-supervised RL framework that derives verifiable rewards directly from images. To this end, we revisit self-supervised learning (SSL) in visual domains and reformulate widely-used SSL tasks into a set of verifiable visual puzzles for RL post-training, requiring neither human nor external model supervision. Training MLLMs on these tasks substantially improves their performance on multimodal understanding and reasoning benchmarks, highlighting the potential of leveraging vision-centric self-supervised tasks for MLLM post-training. We think this work will provide useful experience in devising effective self-supervised verifiable rewards to enable RL at scale. Project page: https://github.com/Jiahao000/SSL-R1.

analysis.tldr: 提出自监督视觉强化学习框架SSL-R1，通过将视觉自监督任务转化为可验证奖励，无需人工标注即可提升多模态大模型的推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RLVR方法依赖语言先验和昂贵人工标注，限制了MLLM的视觉理解能力和奖励设计的可扩展性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计无需人工或外部模型监督的、基于视觉的可验证奖励，以增强MLLM的推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将视觉自监督任务（如对比学习、掩码重建等）重新定义为可验证的视觉谜题，作为RL后训练的奖励信号。
contributions: 提出SSL-R1，首个通用自监督RL框架，直接从图像中导出可验证奖励。
将多种视觉自监督任务转化为可验证奖励，无需人工或外部模型。
实验表明该方法显著提升MLLM在多模态理解和推理基准上的性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的视觉自监督任务。
未讨论在复杂多模态任务上的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自监督视觉强化学习框架SSL-R1，通过将视觉自监督任务转化为可验证奖励，无需人工标注即可提升多模态大模型的推理能力。

papers.title: R-CoV: Region-Aware Chain-of-Verification for Alleviating Object Hallucinations in LVLMs
papers.abstract: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) have demonstrated impressive performance in various multimodal understanding and reasoning tasks. However, they still struggle with object hallucinations, i.e., the claim of nonexistent objects in the visual input. To address this challenge, we propose Region-aware Chain-of-Verification (R-CoV), a visual chain-of-verification method to alleviate object hallucinations in LVLMs in a post-hoc manner. Motivated by how humans comprehend intricate visual information -- often focusing on specific image regions or details within a given sample -- we elicit such region-level processing from LVLMs themselves and use it as a chaining cue to detect and alleviate their own object hallucinations. Specifically, our R-CoV consists of six steps: initial response generation, entity extraction, coordinate generation, region description, verification execution, and final response generation. As a simple yet effective method, R-CoV can be seamlessly integrated into various LVLMs in a training-free manner and without relying on external detection models. Extensive experiments on several widely used hallucination benchmarks across multiple LVLMs demonstrate that R-CoV can significantly alleviate object hallucinations in LVLMs. Project page: https://github.com/Jiahao000/R-CoV.

analysis.tldr: 提出区域感知验证链（R-CoV），通过让LVLM自身进行区域级处理来缓解物体幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）在多种多模态任务中表现出色，但仍存在物体幻觉问题，即声称视觉输入中不存在的物体，这限制了其可靠性和实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖外部检测模型且无需训练的情况下，缓解LVLM中的物体幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人类理解复杂视觉信息时往往关注特定图像区域或细节，受此启发，LVLM自身可以模拟这种区域级处理，并将其作为链式线索来检测和缓解幻觉。
analysis.method: 提出R-CoV，包含六个步骤：初始响应生成、实体提取、坐标生成、区域描述、验证执行和最终响应生成，通过区域感知的链式验证来纠正幻觉。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练、无需外部检测模型的区域感知链式验证方法R-CoV，可无缝集成到多种LVLM中。
在多个幻觉基准和LVLM上实验证明R-CoV能显著缓解物体幻觉。
analysis.experiments: 在多个广泛使用的幻觉基准和多种LVLM上进行实验，结果表明R-CoV能显著缓解物体幻觉。
limitations: 可能仅针对物体幻觉，对其他类型幻觉（如属性、关系）效果未知。
六步流程可能增加推理时间，影响效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出区域感知验证链（R-CoV），通过让LVLM自身进行区域级处理来缓解物体幻觉。

papers.title: StormNet: Improving storm surge predictions with a GNN-based spatio-temporal offset forecasting model
papers.abstract: Storm surge forecasting remains a critical challenge in mitigating the impacts of tropical cyclones on coastal regions, particularly given recent trends of rapid intensification and increasing nearshore storm activity. Traditional high fidelity numerical models such as ADCIRC, while robust, are often hindered by inevitable uncertainties arising from various sources. To address these challenges, this study introduces StormNet, a spatio-temporal graph neural network (GNN) designed for bias correction of storm surge forecasts. StormNet integrates graph convolutional (GCN) and graph attention (GAT) mechanisms with long short-term memory (LSTM) components to capture complex spatial and temporal dependencies among water-level gauge stations. The model was trained using historical hurricane data from the U.S. Gulf Coast and evaluated on Hurricane Idalia (2023). Results demonstrate that StormNet can effectively reduce the root mean square error (RMSE) in water-level predictions by more than 70\% for 48-hour forecasts and above 50\% for 72-hour forecasts, as well as outperform a sequential LSTM baseline, particularly for longer prediction horizons. The model also exhibits low training time, enhancing its applicability in real-time operational forecasting systems. Overall, StormNet provides a computationally efficient and physically meaningful framework for improving storm surge prediction accuracy and reliability during extreme weather events.

analysis.tldr: StormNet 使用时空图神经网络对风暴潮预报进行偏差校正，在 48 小时预报中 RMSE 降低超 70%。
analysis.research_motivation: 风暴潮预报对沿海防灾至关重要，但传统高保真数值模型（如 ADCIRC）受多种不确定性影响，精度有限，且计算成本高，难以满足实时预报需求。
analysis.problem: 如何利用图神经网络对风暴潮预报进行偏差校正，以提升长时程预报的精度和计算效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: StormNet 结合图卷积（GCN）和图注意力（GAT）机制与长短期记忆（LSTM）网络，构建时空图神经网络，对水位观测站之间的复杂时空依赖进行建模，实现风暴潮预报的偏差校正。
contributions: 提出 StormNet，一种用于风暴潮预报偏差校正的时空图神经网络。
在 48 小时和 72 小时预报中分别降低 RMSE 超过 70% 和 50%，优于顺序 LSTM 基线。
analysis.experiments: 使用美国墨西哥湾沿岸的历史飓风数据训练，并在飓风 Idalia (2023) 上评估，对比了顺序 LSTM 基线，报告了 RMSE 降低百分比和训练时间。
limitations: 仅针对美国墨西哥湾沿岸数据，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论模型对极端快速增强飓风的适应性。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: StormNet 使用时空图神经网络对风暴潮预报进行偏差校正，在 48 小时预报中 RMSE 降低超 70%。

papers.title: A Field Guide to Decision Making
papers.abstract: High-consequence decision making demands peak performance from individuals in positions of responsibility. Such executive authority bears the obligation to act despite uncertainty, limited resources, time constraints, and accountability risks. Tools and strategies to motivate confidence and foster risk tolerance must confront informational noise and can provide qualified accountability. Machine intelligence augments human cognition and perception to improve situational awareness, decision framing, flexibility, and coherence through agentic stewardship of contextual metadata. We examine systemic and behavioral factors crucial to address in scenarios encumbered by complexity, uncertainty, and urgency.

analysis.tldr: 探讨高风险决策中人类与机器智能协同的系统性框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 高风险决策场景（如应急管理、军事指挥）中，决策者面临不确定性、资源限制、时间压力和问责风险，现有工具和策略难以有效应对信息噪声并提供可靠的问责机制。
analysis.problem: 如何通过机器智能增强人类认知与感知，提升高风险决策的情境意识、决策框架、灵活性和连贯性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象或失败模式。
analysis.method: 提出一个系统性框架，通过智能体对上下文元数据的代理管理，整合机器智能与人类决策，以改善决策质量。
contributions: 识别了高风险决策中关键的系统性和行为因素。
提出了机器智能增强人类决策的框架，强调情境意识、决策框架、灵活性和连贯性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架缺乏实证验证。
