papers.title: ORPHEAS: A Cross-Lingual Greek-English Embedding Model for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
papers.abstract: Effective retrieval-augmented generation across bilingual Greek--English applications requires embedding models capable of capturing both domain-specific semantic relationships and cross-lingual semantic alignment. Existing multilingual embedding models distribute their representational capacity across numerous languages, limiting their optimization for Greek and failing to encode the morphological complexity and domain-specific terminological structures inherent in Greek text. In this work, we propose ORPHEAS, a specialized Greek--English embedding model for bilingual retrieval-augmented generation. ORPHEAS is trained with a high quality dataset generated by a knowledge graph-based fine-tuning methodology which is applied to a diverse multi-domain corpus, which enables language-agnostic semantic representations. The numerical experiments across monolingual and cross-lingual retrieval benchmarks reveal that ORPHEAS outperforms state-of-the-art multilingual embedding models, demonstrating that domain-specialized fine-tuning on morphologically complex languages does not compromise cross-lingual retrieval capability.

analysis.tldr: ORPHEAS 是一个针对希腊语-英语双语检索增强生成优化的嵌入模型，通过知识图谱微调方法在跨语言检索上超越多语言模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有通用多语言嵌入模型在希腊语等形态复杂语言上表现不佳，无法有效编码领域语义和跨语言对齐，限制了双语 RAG 应用的效果。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个专门针对希腊语-英语双语的嵌入模型，使其在保留领域特定语义的同时实现高效的跨语言检索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 ORPHEAS 模型，采用基于知识图谱的微调方法，在多样化多领域语料上生成高质量训练数据，学习语言无关的语义表示。
contributions: 提出首个专门针对希腊语-英语双语的嵌入模型 ORPHEAS，用于检索增强生成。
设计基于知识图谱的微调方法，生成高质量双语训练数据，提升模型对形态复杂语言的表示能力。
analysis.experiments: 在单语和跨语言检索基准上，ORPHEAS 优于现有最先进的多语言嵌入模型。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅针对希腊语-英语双语，泛化到其他语言对需进一步验证。
知识图谱构建可能依赖特定领域资源，通用性受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ORPHEAS 是一个针对希腊语-英语双语检索增强生成优化的嵌入模型，通过知识图谱微调方法在跨语言检索上超越多语言模型。

papers.title: The Expense of Seeing: Attaining Trustworthy Multimodal Reasoning Within the Monolithic Paradigm
papers.abstract: The rapid proliferation of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) is widely celebrated as the dawn of unified multimodal knowledge discovery but its foundation operates on a dangerous, unquestioned axiom: that current VLMs faithfully synthesise multimodal data. We argue they do not. Instead, a profound crisis of trustworthiness underlies the dominant Vision Encoder-Projector-LLM paradigm. Rather than extracting grounded knowledge from visual inputs, state-of-the-art models frequently exhibit functional blindness, i.e., exploiting strong language priors to bypass severe visual representation bottlenecks. In this work, we challenge the conventional methodology of multimodal evaluation, which relies on data ablation or new dataset creation and therefore fatally conflates dataset biases with architectural incapacity. We propose a radical, information-theoretic departure: the Modality Translation Protocol, designed to quantifiably unmask the Expense of Seeing. By translating semantic payloads rather than ablating them, we formulate three novel metrics -- the Toll (ToS), Curse (CoS), and Fallacy (FoS) of Seeing -- culminating in the Semantic Sufficiency Criterion (SSC). Furthermore, we posit a provocative Divergence Law of Multimodal Scaling, hypothesising that as the underlying language engines scale to unprecedented reasoning capabilities, the mathematical penalty of the visual knowledge bottleneck paradoxically increases. We challenge the KDD community to abandon the illusory pursuit of "multimodal gain". By elevating the SSC from a passive diagnostic constraint to an active architectural blueprint, we provide the rigorous, trustworthy foundation required to force the next generation of AI systems to truly see the data, achieving true multimodal reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 揭示VLM视觉表征瓶颈导致不可信推理，提出模态翻译协议量化视觉代价。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前VLM被广泛认为能忠实融合多模态知识，但实际存在严重可信危机：模型常利用语言先验绕过视觉瓶颈，而非真正从视觉输入中提取知识。
analysis.problem: 现有评估方法（数据消融或新数据集）混淆了数据集偏差与架构缺陷，无法量化视觉表征瓶颈对多模态推理可信度的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出SOTA VLM存在功能盲视（functional blindness），即利用强语言先验绕过视觉表征瓶颈，导致多模态推理不可信。
analysis.method: 提出模态翻译协议（Modality Translation Protocol），通过翻译语义载荷而非消融，定义三个新指标（ToS、CoS、FoS）和语义充分性准则（SSC），并假设多模态缩放发散定律。
contributions: 提出模态翻译协议，从信息论角度量化视觉表征瓶颈的代价。
定义三个新指标（ToS、CoS、FoS）和语义充分性准则（SSC），作为诊断和设计蓝图。
提出多模态缩放发散定律，指出语言引擎扩展时视觉瓶颈惩罚反而增加。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法可能依赖特定语义载荷定义，泛化性待验证。
发散定律仅为假设，缺乏实证支持。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 揭示VLM视觉表征瓶颈导致不可信推理，提出模态翻译协议量化视觉代价。

papers.title: GRPO-VPS: Enhancing Group Relative Policy Optimization with Verifiable Process Supervision for Effective Reasoning
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has advanced the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) by leveraging direct outcome verification instead of learned reward models. Building on this paradigm, Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) eliminates the need for critic models but suffers from indiscriminate credit assignment for intermediate steps, which limits its ability to identify effective reasoning strategies and incurs overthinking. In this work, we introduce a model-free and verifiable process supervision via probing the model's belief in the correct answer throughout its reasoning trajectory. By segmenting the generation into discrete steps and tracking the conditional probability of the correct answer appended at each segment boundary, we efficiently compute interpretable segment-wise progress measurements to refine GRPO's trajectory-level feedback. This approach enables more targeted and sample-efficient policy updates, while avoiding the need for intermediate supervision derived from costly Monte Carlo rollouts or auxiliary models. Experiments on mathematical and general-domain benchmarks show consistent gains over GRPO across diverse models: up to 2.6-point accuracy improvements and 13.7% reasoning-length reductions on math tasks, and up to 2.4 points and 4% on general-domain tasks, demonstrating strong generalization.

analysis.tldr: 通过可验证的过程监督增强GRPO，提升LLM推理能力并减少过度思考。
analysis.research_motivation: GRPO在强化学习中缺乏对中间步骤的细粒度信用分配，导致无法有效识别推理策略并引发过度思考。
analysis.problem: 解决GRPO在推理任务中因粗粒度奖励分配导致的效率低下和过度思考问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: GRPO对中间步骤的信用分配不加区分，限制了有效推理策略的识别并导致过度思考。
analysis.method: 通过探测模型在推理轨迹中正确答案的条件概率，计算可解释的逐段进展度量，以细化GRPO的轨迹级反馈。
contributions: 提出一种无模型、可验证的过程监督方法，通过条件概率追踪推理步骤的进展。
在数学和通用基准上实现准确率提升和推理长度减少，验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在数学和通用领域基准上，相比GRPO，准确率提升最高2.6点，推理长度减少最高13.7%。
limitations: 可能依赖正确答案的可用性，对无明确答案的任务适用性有限。
分段策略的粒度可能影响监督效果，需进一步调优。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过可验证的过程监督增强GRPO，提升LLM推理能力并减少过度思考。

papers.title: Large Language Models Outperform Humans in Fraud Detection and Resistance to Motivated Investor Pressure
papers.abstract: Large language models trained on human feedback may suppress fraud warnings when investors arrive already persuaded of a fraudulent opportunity. We tested this in a preregistered experiment across seven leading LLMs and twelve investment scenarios covering legitimate, high-risk, and objectively fraudulent opportunities, combining 3,360 AI advisory conversations with a 1,201-participant human benchmark. Contrary to predictions, motivated investor framing did not suppress AI fraud warnings; if anything, it marginally increased them. Endorsement reversal occurred in fewer than 3 in 1,000 observations. Human advisors endorsed fraudulent investments at baseline rates of 13-14%, versus 0% across all LLMs, and suppressed warnings under pressure at two to four times the AI rate. AI systems currently provide more consistent fraud warnings than lay humans in an identical advisory role.

analysis.tldr: LLM在欺诈检测和抵抗投资者压力方面优于人类。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究认为基于人类反馈训练的LLM可能在投资者已受骗时抑制欺诈警告，但缺乏实证检验。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM在投资建议场景中识别欺诈并抵抗投资者动机压力的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过预注册实验，在7个领先LLM和12个投资场景（合法、高风险、欺诈）中，结合3360次AI咨询对话与1201名人类参与者基准进行对比。
contributions: 发现投资者动机框架并未抑制AI的欺诈警告，反而略有增加。
证明LLM在欺诈检测和抵抗压力方面优于人类，人类基线欺诈认可率为13-14%，而LLM为0%。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于投资建议场景，泛化性有限。
未探讨LLM在更复杂或动态欺诈场景中的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在欺诈检测和抵抗投资者压力方面优于人类。

papers.title: CHORUS: An Agentic Framework for Generating Realistic Deliberation Data
papers.abstract: Understanding the intricate dynamics of online discourse depends on large-scale deliberation data, a resource that remains scarce across interactive web platforms due to restrictive accessibility policies, ethical concerns and inconsistent data quality. In this paper, we propose Chorus, an agentic framework, which orchestrates LLM-powered actors with behaviorally consistent personas to generate realistic deliberation discussions. Each actor is governed by an autonomous agent equipped with memory of the evolving discussion, while participation timing is governed by a principled Poisson process-based temporal model, which approximates the heterogeneous engagement patterns of real users. The framework is further supported by structured tool usage, enabling actors to access external resources and facilitating integration with interactive web platforms. The framework was deployed on the \textsc{Deliberate} platform and evaluated by 30 expert participants across three dimensions: content realism, discussion coherence and analytical utility, confirming Chorus as a practical tool for generating high-quality deliberation data suitable for online discourse analysis

analysis.tldr: 提出Chorus框架，用LLM智能体模拟真实用户生成高质量在线讨论数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线讨论数据因访问限制、伦理问题和质量不一致而稀缺，阻碍了话语分析研究。
analysis.problem: 如何生成真实、连贯且可用的在线讨论数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Chorus框架：使用LLM驱动的智能体，配备行为一致的角色和讨论记忆，通过泊松过程模型控制参与时间，并支持工具使用和平台集成。
contributions: 提出Chorus框架，结合LLM智能体、泊松过程时间模型和结构化工具使用，生成真实讨论数据。
在Deliberate平台上部署并由30名专家评估，验证了内容真实性、讨论连贯性和分析实用性。
analysis.experiments: 在Deliberate平台上部署，由30名专家从内容真实性、讨论连贯性和分析实用性三个维度评估。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的生成质量，存在偏见或事实错误。
泊松过程模型可能无法完全捕捉复杂的人类参与模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Chorus框架，用LLM智能体模拟真实用户生成高质量在线讨论数据。

papers.title: MAPRPose: Mask-Aware Proposal and Amodal Refinement for Multi-Object 6D Pose Estimation
papers.abstract: 6D object pose estimation in cluttered scenes remains challenging due to severe occlusion and sensor noise. We propose MAPRPose, a two-stage framework that leverages mask-aware correspondences for pose proposal and amodal-driven Region-of-Interest (ROI) prediction for robust refinement. In the Mask-Aware Pose Proposal (MAPP) stage, we lift 2D correspondences into 3D space to establish reliable keypoint matches and generate geometrically consistent pose hypotheses based on correspondence-level scoring, from which the top-$K$ candidates are selected. In the refinement stage, we introduce a tensorized render-and-compare pipeline integrated with an Amodal Mask Prediction and ROI Re-Alignment (AMPR) module. By reconstructing complete object geometry and dynamically adjusting the ROI, AMPR mitigates localization errors and spatial misalignment under heavy occlusion. Furthermore, our GPU-accelerated RGB-XYZ reprojection enables simultaneous refinement of all $N \times B$ pose hypotheses in a single forward pass. Evaluated on the BOP benchmark, MAPRPose achieves a state-of-the-art Average Recall (AR) of 76.5%, outperforming FoundationPose by 3.1% AR while delivering a 43x speedup in multi-object inference.

analysis.tldr: 提出MAPRPose两阶段框架，通过掩码感知对应和模态补全ROI重对齐，在BOP基准上以76.5% AR超越FoundationPose，并实现43倍多目标推理加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 复杂场景中严重遮挡和传感器噪声导致6D姿态估计精度低，现有方法在多目标场景下效率不足。
analysis.problem: 解决遮挡场景下多目标6D姿态估计的精度和效率问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段通过掩码感知对应生成姿态候选；第二阶段引入模态掩码预测和ROI重对齐模块，结合张量化渲染-比较流水线和GPU加速RGB-XYZ重投影，实现所有候选姿态的并行精化。
contributions: 提出掩码感知姿态提议阶段，利用对应评分生成几何一致的姿态假设。
提出模态掩码预测与ROI重对齐模块，缓解遮挡下的定位误差和空间错位。
实现GPU加速的RGB-XYZ重投影，支持多目标姿态假设的并行精化，显著提升推理速度。
analysis.experiments: 在BOP基准上评估，MAPRPose达到76.5%平均召回率，比FoundationPose高3.1%，同时多目标推理速度提升43倍。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量掩码预测，极端遮挡下性能可能下降。
仅针对6D姿态估计，未验证在其他视觉任务上的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MAPRPose两阶段框架，通过掩码感知对应和模态补全ROI重对齐，在BOP基准上以76.5% AR超越FoundationPose，并实现43倍多目标推理加速。

papers.title: Centering Ecological Goals in Automated Identification of Individual Animals
papers.abstract: Recognizing individual animals over time is central to many ecological and conservation questions, including estimating abundance, survival, movement, and social structure. Recent advances in automated identification from images and even acoustic data suggest that this process could be greatly accelerated, yet their promise has not translated well into ecological practice. We argue that the main barrier is not the performance of the automated methods themselves, but a mismatch between how those methods are typically developed and evaluated, and how ecological data is actually collected, processed, reviewed, and used. Future progress, therefore, will depend less on algorithmic gains alone than on recognizing that the usefulness of automated identification is grounded in ecological context: it depends on what question is being asked, what data are available, and what kinds of mistakes matter. Only by centering these questions can we move toward automated identification of individuals that is not only accurate but also ecologically useful, transparent, and trustworthy.

analysis.tldr: 自动化个体识别需以生态目标为中心，而非仅追求算法性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动化个体识别技术虽有进展，但未有效应用于生态实践，主要障碍是技术开发与生态数据实际收集、处理、审查和使用方式不匹配。
analysis.problem: 解决自动化个体识别方法在生态应用中实用性不足的问题，强调需以生态目标为中心。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出自动化识别方法的开发与评估方式与生态数据实际使用方式存在错位，导致技术承诺未转化为实践。
analysis.method: 提出以生态目标为中心的方法论框架，强调识别效用取决于生态问题、可用数据和错误类型。
contributions: 指出自动化个体识别在生态应用中失败的根本原因是方法开发与生态实践不匹配，而非算法性能不足。
倡导以生态目标为中心，构建准确、生态有用、透明且可信的自动化个体识别系统。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提供具体的算法或实验验证。
可能缺乏对技术实现细节的讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 自动化个体识别需以生态目标为中心，而非仅追求算法性能。

papers.title: RSRCC: A Remote Sensing Regional Change Comprehension Benchmark Constructed via Retrieval-Augmented Best-of-N Ranking
papers.abstract: Traditional change detection identifies where changes occur, but does not explain what changed in natural language. Existing remote sensing change captioning datasets typically describe overall image-level differences, leaving fine-grained localized semantic reasoning largely unexplored. To close this gap, we present RSRCC, a new benchmark for remote sensing change question-answering containing 126k questions, split into 87k training, 17.1k validation, and 22k test instances. Unlike prior datasets, RSRCC is built around localized, change-specific questions that require reasoning about a particular semantic change. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first remote sensing change question-answering benchmark designed explicitly for such fine-grained reasoning-based supervision. To construct RSRCC, we introduce a hierarchical semi-supervised curation pipeline that uses Best-of-N ranking as a critical final ambiguity-resolution stage. First, candidate change regions are extracted from semantic segmentation masks, then initially screened using an image-text embedding model, and finally validated through retrieval-augmented vision-language curation with Best-of-N ranking. This process enables scalable filtering of noisy and ambiguous candidates while preserving semantically meaningful changes. The dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/google/RSRCC.

analysis.tldr: 首个面向遥感变化问答的细粒度基准数据集RSRCC，通过检索增强的Best-of-N排序构建。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有遥感变化检测仅定位变化区域，缺乏自然语言解释；变化描述数据集多为图像级整体描述，缺乏细粒度局部语义推理。
analysis.problem: 缺乏针对遥感图像中局部、特定语义变化的细粒度变化问答基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出层次化半监督构建流程：从语义分割掩码提取候选变化区域，经图像-文本嵌入模型初筛，最后通过检索增强的视觉-语言策展与Best-of-N排序解决歧义。
contributions: 构建了首个遥感变化问答基准RSRCC，包含12.6万问题，支持细粒度局部语义推理。
提出层次化半监督策展流程，结合Best-of-N排序实现可扩展的噪声过滤。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖语义分割掩码质量，可能影响候选区域提取。
Best-of-N排序的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个面向遥感变化问答的细粒度基准数据集RSRCC，通过检索增强的Best-of-N排序构建。

papers.title: pAI/MSc: ML Theory Research with Humans on the Loop
papers.abstract: We present pAI/MSc, an open-source, customizable, modular multi-agent system for academic research workflows. Our goal is not autonomous scientific ideation, nor fully automated research. It is narrower and more practical: to reduce by orders of magnitude the human steering required to turn a specified hypothesis into a literature-grounded, mathematically established, experimentally supported, submission-oriented manuscript draft. pAI/MSc is built with a current emphasis on machine learning theory and adjacent quantitative fields.

analysis.tldr: pAI/MSc是一个开源模块化多智能体系统，旨在将指定假设转化为文献扎实、数学严谨、实验支持的论文草稿，大幅减少人工干预。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前学术研究流程中，从假设到成稿需要大量人工指导，效率低下，缺乏系统化的辅助工具。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个多智能体系统，以最小化人类监督，将研究假设自动转化为高质量的论文草稿。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出pAI/MSc，一个开源、可定制、模块化的多智能体系统，专注于机器学习理论及相邻定量领域，通过多智能体协作完成文献调研、数学推导、实验支持和论文撰写。
contributions: 提出pAI/MSc系统，显著减少从假设到论文草稿所需的人工指导量。
开源、模块化设计，便于定制和扩展。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 系统目前仅强调机器学习理论领域，泛化性未验证。
未提供实验评估，实际效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: pAI/MSc是一个开源模块化多智能体系统，旨在将指定假设转化为文献扎实、数学严谨、实验支持的论文草稿，大幅减少人工干预。

papers.title: Beyond ZOH: Advanced Discretization Strategies for Vision Mamba
papers.abstract: Vision Mamba, as a state space model (SSM), employs a zero-order hold (ZOH) discretization, which assumes that input signals remain constant between sampling instants. This assumption degrades temporal fidelity in dynamic visual environments and constrains the attainable accuracy of modern SSM-based vision models. In this paper, we present a systematic and controlled comparison of six discretization schemes instantiated within the Vision Mamba framework: ZOH, first-order hold (FOH), bilinear/Tustin transform (BIL), polynomial interpolation (POL), higher-order hold (HOH), and the fourth-order Runge-Kutta method (RK4). We evaluate each method on standard visual benchmarks to quantify its influence in image classification, semantic segmentation, and object detection. Our results demonstrate that POL and HOH yield the largest gains in accuracy at the cost of higher training-time computation. In contrast, the BIL provides consistent improvements over ZOH with modest additional overhead, offering the most favorable trade-off between precision and efficiency. These findings elucidate the pivotal role of discretization in SSM-based vision architectures and furnish empirically grounded justification for adopting BIL as the default discretization baseline for state-of-the-art SSM models.

analysis.tldr: 系统比较六种离散化策略在Vision Mamba中的效果，发现双线性变换（BIL）在精度与效率间取得最佳平衡。
analysis.research_motivation: Vision Mamba等SSM模型默认使用零阶保持（ZOH）离散化，假设输入信号在采样间隔内恒定，这限制了动态视觉环境中的时间保真度和模型精度，亟需探索更优的离散化方案。
analysis.problem: 解决ZOH离散化在动态视觉任务中精度不足的问题，寻找更优的离散化策略以提升SSM视觉模型性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在Vision Mamba框架内系统比较六种离散化方案：ZOH、FOH、BIL、POL、HOH和RK4，并在图像分类、语义分割、目标检测任务上评估。
contributions: 首次在Vision Mamba框架内系统比较六种离散化策略，揭示其对视觉任务性能的影响。
发现双线性变换（BIL）在精度与效率间提供最佳权衡，建议作为SSM模型的默认离散化基线。
analysis.experiments: 在图像分类、语义分割、目标检测等标准视觉基准上评估，POL和HOH精度提升最大但计算成本高，BIL以适度开销带来一致改进。
limitations: 仅针对Vision Mamba框架，未验证在其他SSM架构上的泛化性。
未深入分析不同离散化策略对模型鲁棒性或泛化能力的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统比较六种离散化策略在Vision Mamba中的效果，发现双线性变换（BIL）在精度与效率间取得最佳平衡。

papers.title: Self-Guided Plan Extraction for Instruction-Following Tasks with Goal-Conditional Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: We introduce SuperIgor, a framework for instruction-following tasks. Unlike prior methods that rely on predefined subtasks, SuperIgor enables a language model to generate and refine high-level plans through a self-learning mechanism, reducing the need for manual dataset annotation. Our approach involves iterative co-training: an RL agent is trained to follow the generated plans, while the language model adapts and modifies these plans based on RL feedback and preferences. This creates a feedback loop where both the agent and the planner improve jointly. We validate our framework in environments with rich dynamics and stochasticity. Results show that SuperIgor agents adhere to instructions more strictly than baseline methods, while also demonstrating strong generalization to previously unseen instructions.

analysis.tldr: 提出SuperIgor框架，通过自学习机制让语言模型自主生成并优化高层计划，结合RL反馈循环提升指令跟随任务的泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有指令跟随方法依赖预定义子任务，需要大量人工标注，缺乏自主规划能力。
analysis.problem: 如何让语言模型自主生成并优化高层计划，减少人工标注，同时提升指令跟随的严格性和泛化性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 迭代协同训练：RL智能体跟随生成计划，语言模型根据RL反馈和偏好调整计划，形成反馈循环。

papers.title: A Digital Pathology Resource for Liver Cancer Quantification with Datasets, Benchmarks, and Tools
papers.abstract: Liver cancer, especially hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC), imposes a substantial global disease burden. Accurate diagnosis and prognostic assessment directly influence treatment selection and patient survival, and pathological examination remains the gold standard for liver cancer diagnosis. Identifying diverse tissue components and pathological subtypes on histopathology slides is crucial for estimating postoperative recurrence risk and overall prognosis. However, most publicly available resources are still provided at the whole-slide image (WSI) level, and well-annotated datasets for fine-grained tissue component identification in liver cancer are scarce, which hinders reproducible model development and the deployment of quantitative analysis tools. To address this gap, we release HepatoBench, a patch-level image database for liver cancer with annotations for seven key tissue categories. Based on HepatoBench, we train and open-source a deep learning classification model as a tissue recognition tool. Furthermore, we train a WSI-level tumor/non-tumor segmentation model to automatically localize lesion regions across entire slides. By integrating the patch-level tissue classifier with the WSI-level segmentation model, we build HepatoQuant, an end-to-end, disease-specific regional quantification tool for liver cancer, enabling a unified workflow from WSIs to tissue composition parsing and quantitative statistics. We also open-source HepatoBench, the benchmarking protocol, and supporting tools, providing a solid foundation for automated regional quantification and fair method comparison in liver cancer pathology.

analysis.tldr: 发布肝细胞癌病理图像补丁级数据集HepatoBench及端到端量化工具HepatoQuant，推动肝组织精细识别与自动量化。

papers.title: Physics-Informed Conditional Diffusion for Motion-Robust Retinal Temporal Laser Speckle Contrast Imaging
papers.abstract: Retinal laser speckle contrast imaging (LSCI) is a noninvasive optical modality for monitoring retinal blood flow dynamics. However, conventional temporal LSCI (tLSCI) reconstruction relies on sufficiently long speckle sequences to obtain stable temporal statistics, which makes it vulnerable to acquisition disturbances and limits effective temporal resolution. A physically informed reconstruction framework, termed RetinaDiff (Retinal Diffusion Model), is proposed for retinal tLSCI that is robust to motion and requires only a few frames. In RetinaDiff, registration based on phase correlation is first applied to stabilize the raw speckle sequence before contrast computation, reducing interframe misalignment so that fluctuations at each pixel primarily reflect true flow dynamics. This step provides a physics prior corrected for motion and a high quality multiframe tLSCI reference. Next, guided by the physics prior, a conditional diffusion model performs inverse reconstruction by jointly conditioning on the registered speckle sequence and the corrected prior. Experiments on data acquired with a retinal LSCI system developed in house show improved structural continuity and statistical stability compared with direct reconstruction from few frames and representative baselines. The framework also remains effective in a small number of extremely challenging cases, where both the direct 5-frame input and the conventional multiframe reconstruction are severely degraded. Overall, this work provides a practical and physically grounded route for reliable retinal tLSCI reconstruction from extremely limited frames. The source code and model weights will be publicly available at https://github.com/QianChen113/RetinaDiff.

analysis.tldr: 提出RetinaDiff，结合物理先验和条件扩散模型，实现仅需少量帧即可鲁棒重建视网膜时间激光散斑对比成像。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统视网膜tLSCI需要长散斑序列以获得稳定统计量，易受采集扰动影响且时间分辨率低，亟需一种对运动鲁棒且仅需少量帧的重建方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从极少量散斑帧中鲁棒地重建视网膜血流动态图像，同时克服运动伪影和统计不稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 先通过基于相位相关的配准稳定原始散斑序列，提供运动校正的物理先验；再以配准后的序列和校正先验为条件，训练条件扩散模型进行逆重建。
contributions: 提出RetinaDiff，首个将物理先验与条件扩散模型结合用于视网膜tLSCI重建的框架。
仅需少量帧即可实现运动鲁棒的高质量重建，在极端困难情况下仍有效。

limitations: 可能依赖特定配准方法，对剧烈运动或低质量数据效果未知。

papers.title: IoT-Enhanced CNN-Based Labelled Crack Detection for Additive Manufacturing Image Annotation in Industry 4.0
papers.abstract: This paper presents an IoT-enhanced deep learning framework for automated crack detection in Additive Manufacturing (AM) surfaces using convolutional neural networks (CNNs). By integrating IoT-enabled real-time monitoring, high-resolution imaging, and edge computing, the system enables continuous in-situ defect detection and classification. Real-time data acquisition supports immediate CNN-based analysis, improving both accuracy and efficiency in AM quality control. The framework supports supervised and semi-supervised learning, enabling robust performance on large, sparsely annotated datasets. Using LabelImg for annotation and OpenCV for preprocessing, the system achieves 99.54% accuracy on 14,982 images, with 96% precision, 98% recall, and a 97% F1-score. Dataset balancing and augmentation significantly improve generalization, increasing accuracy from 32% to 99%. Beyond detection, the framework establishes a linkage between AM process parameters, defect formation, and surface topology, supporting predictive analytics and defect mitigation. Aligned with Industry 4.0, it incorporates Digital Twin (DT) technology for real-time process simulation, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control. Key contributions include an IoT-based monitoring system using edge devices (Raspberry Pi 4B), an optimized CNN with model quantization and batch processing reducing inference latency by 47%, and an MQTT-based low-latency data streaming system with 5G connectivity, lowering transmission overhead by 35%. DT integration further enables predictive defect analysis and dynamic adjustment of AM parameters. This work advances intelligent AM quality control by providing a scalable, high-accuracy, and low-latency framework. Future directions include multimodal data fusion, hybrid architectures, and enhanced Digital Twin simulations for AI-driven defect prevention.

analysis.tldr: 提出IoT增强的CNN框架用于增材制造表面裂纹检测，在14982张图像上达到99.54%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 增材制造中表面缺陷检测依赖人工或传统方法，效率低、精度不足，且缺乏实时监控和自动化标注能力。

contributions: 提出IoT增强的CNN框架，实现增材制造表面裂纹的自动化检测与分类。
通过模型量化和批处理将推理延迟降低47%，MQTT+5G将传输开销降低35%。
集成数字孪生技术实现实时过程仿真、预测性维护和自适应控制。

limitations: 可能依赖特定硬件（Raspberry Pi 4B）和网络条件（5G），泛化性待验证。

papers.title: Structure-Augmented Standard Plane Detection with Temporal Aggregation in Blind-Sweep Fetal Ultrasound
papers.abstract: In low-resource settings, blind-sweep ultrasound provides a practical and accessible method for identifying fetal growth restriction. However, unlike freehand ultrasound which is subjectively controlled, detection of biometry plane in blind-sweep ultrasound is more challenging due to the uncontrolled fetal structure to be observed and the variaties of oblique planes in the scan. In this work, we propose a structure-augmented system to detect fetal abdomen plane, where the abdominal structure is highlighted using a segmentation prior. Since standard planes are emerging gradually, the decision boundary of the keyframes is unstable to predict. We thus aggregated the structure-augmented planes with a temporal sliding window to help stabilise keyframe localisation. Extensive results indicate that the structure-augmented temporal sliding strategy significantly improves and stabilises the detection of anatomically meaningful planes, which enables more reliable biometric measurements in blind-sweep ultrasound.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构增强和时间聚合方法，提升盲扫超声中胎儿标准平面的检测稳定性。

contributions: 提出结构增强的盲扫超声标准平面检测系统，利用分割先验突出腹部结构。

papers.title: Attention-Augmented YOLOv8 with Ghost Convolution for Real-Time Vehicle Detection in Intelligent Transportation Systems
papers.abstract: Accurate vehicle detection is a critical component of autonomous driving, traffic surveillance, and intelligent transportation systems. This paper presents an enhanced YOLOv8n-based model that integrates the Ghost Module, Convolutional Block Attention Module (CBAM), and Deformable Convolutional Networks v2 (DCNv2) to improve detection performance. The Ghost Module reduces feature redundancy through efficient feature generation, CBAM refines feature representation via channel and spatial attention, and DCNv2 enhances adaptability to geometric variations in vehicle structures. Evaluated on the KITTI dataset, the proposed model achieves 95.4% mAP@0.5, representing an 8.97% improvement over the baseline YOLOv8n, along with 96.2% precision, 93.7% recall, and a 94.93% F1-score. Comparative analysis against seven state-of-the-art detectors demonstrates consistent superiority across key performance metrics, while ablation studies validate the individual and combined contributions of the integrated modules. By addressing feature redundancy, attention refinement, and spatial adaptability, the proposed approach offers a robust and computationally efficient solution for vehicle detection in diverse and complex traffic environments.

analysis.tldr: 在YOLOv8n中集成Ghost模块、CBAM和DCNv2，在KITTI数据集上mAP@0.5达95.4%，提升8.97%。

papers.title: On the Impact of Face Segmentation-Based Background Removal on Recognition and Morphing Attack Detection
papers.abstract: This study investigates the impact of face image background correction through segmentation on face recognition and morphing attack detection performance in realistic, unconstrained image capture scenarios. The motivation is driven by operational biometric systems such as the European Entry/Exit System (EES), which require facial enrolment at airports and other border crossing points where controlled backgrounds usually required for such captures cannot always be guaranteed, as well as by accessibility needs that may necessitate image capture outside traditional office environments. By analyzing how such preprocessing steps influence both recognition accuracy and security mechanisms, this work addresses a critical gap between usability-driven image normalization and the reliability requirements of large-scale biometric identification systems. Our study evaluates a comprehensive range of segmentation techniques, three families of morphing attack detection methods, and four distinct face recognition models, using databases that include both controlled and in-the-wild image captures. The results reveal consistent patterns linking segmentation to both recognition performance and face image quality. Additionally, segmentation is shown to systematically influence morphing attack detection performance. These findings highlight the need for careful consideration when deploying such preprocessing techniques in operational biometric systems.

analysis.tldr: 研究背景分割对真实场景下人脸识别和变形攻击检测的影响，发现分割会系统性地影响两者性能。

papers.title: Trust, Lies, and Long Memories: Emergent Social Dynamics and Reputation in Multi-Round Avalon with LLM Agents
papers.abstract: We study emergent social dynamics in LLM agents playing The Resistance: Avalon, a hidden-role deception game. Unlike prior work on single-game performance, our agents play repeated games while retaining memory of previous interactions, including who played which roles and how they behaved, enabling us to study how social dynamics evolve. Across 188 games, two key phenomena emerge. First, reputation dynamics emerge organically when agents retain cross-game memory: agents reference past behavior in statements like "I am wary of repeating last game's mistake of over-trusting early success." These reputations are role-conditional: the same agent is described as "straightforward" when playing good but "subtle" when playing evil, and high-reputation players receive 46% more team inclusions. Second, higher reasoning effort supports more strategic deception: evil players more often pass early missions to build trust before sabotaging later ones, 75% in high-effort games vs 36% in low-effort games. Together, these findings show that repeated interaction with memory gives rise to measurable reputation and deception dynamics among LLM agents.

analysis.tldr: LLM代理在多轮阿瓦隆游戏中通过跨局记忆涌现出声誉动态和战略性欺骗行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有工作多关注单局游戏表现，忽略了多轮交互中社会动态的演化，而声誉和欺骗是现实社交的关键要素。
analysis.problem: 研究LLM代理在多轮隐藏角色游戏（阿瓦隆）中，跨局记忆如何影响声誉形成和欺骗策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到两个现象：1）声誉动态自然涌现，代理会引用过去行为，且声誉具有角色条件性（同一代理在不同角色下被不同描述），高声誉玩家获得46%更多团队邀请；2）高推理努力支持更策略性的欺骗，邪恶玩家在高努力游戏中75%会先通过早期任务建立信任再破坏，低努力游戏中仅36%。
analysis.method: 让LLM代理进行多轮阿瓦隆游戏，保留跨局记忆（包括谁扮演什么角色及行为），分析188局游戏中的对话和行为数据。
contributions: 首次在多轮隐藏角色游戏中研究LLM代理的声誉动态，发现声誉具有角色条件性。
揭示推理努力水平对欺骗策略的影响，高努力导致更复杂的信任建立行为。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及188局游戏和上述现象统计。
limitations: 仅基于单一游戏（阿瓦隆），可能不泛化到其他社交场景。
未分析记忆机制的具体实现或不同LLM模型的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM代理在多轮阿瓦隆游戏中通过跨局记忆涌现出声誉动态和战略性欺骗行为。

papers.title: Where are they looking in the operating room?
papers.abstract: Purpose: Gaze-following, the task of inferring where individuals are looking, has been widely studied in computer vision, advancing research in visual attention modeling, social scene understanding, and human-robot interaction. However, gaze-following has never been explored in the operating room (OR), a complex, high-stakes environment where visual attention plays an important role in surgical workflow analysis. In this work, we introduce the concept of gaze-following to the surgical domain, and demonstrate its great potential for understanding clinical roles, surgical phases, and team communications in the OR. Methods: We extend the 4D-OR dataset with gaze-following annotations, and extend the Team-OR dataset with gaze-following and a new team communication activity annotations. Then, we propose novel approaches to address clinical role prediction, surgical phase recognition, and team communication detection using a gaze-following model. For role and phase recognition, we propose a gaze heatmap-based approach that uses gaze predictions solely; for team communication detection, we train a spatial-temporal model in a self-supervised way that encodes gaze-based clip features, and then feed the features into a temporal activity detection model. Results: Experimental results on the 4D-OR and Team-OR datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on all downstream tasks. Quantitatively, our approach obtains F1 scores of 0.92 for clinical role prediction and 0.95 for surgical phase recognition. Furthermore, it significantly outperforms existing baselines in team communication detection, improving previous best performances by over 30%. Conclusion: We introduce gaze-following in the OR as a novel research direction in surgical data science, highlighting its great potential to advance surgical workflow analysis in computer-assisted interventions.

analysis.tldr: 首次将视线跟随引入手术室场景，利用注视热图预测临床角色和手术阶段，并自监督学习团队沟通检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 手术室是高风险的复杂环境，视觉注意力对手术流程分析至关重要，但此前视线跟随从未在该场景中探索，现有方法缺乏对团队协作中注意力动态的建模。
analysis.problem: 如何在手术室中利用视线跟随信息预测临床角色、识别手术阶段以及检测团队沟通活动。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 扩展4D-OR和Team-OR数据集添加视线跟随标注；提出基于注视热图的方法进行角色和阶段识别；采用自监督方式训练时空模型编码视线片段特征，再输入时序活动检测模型进行团队沟通检测。
contributions: 首次将视线跟随引入手术室领域，并构建带标注的数据集。
提出基于注视热图的角色和阶段识别方法，以及自监督的团队沟通检测方法，在多个下游任务上取得SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在4D-OR和Team-OR数据集上评估，临床角色预测F1=0.92，手术阶段识别F1=0.95，团队沟通检测相比基线提升超过30%。
limitations: 依赖人工标注的视线跟随数据，扩展性可能受限。
方法仅在两个数据集上验证，泛化性有待进一步检验。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次将视线跟随引入手术室场景，利用注视热图预测临床角色和手术阶段，并自监督学习团队沟通检测。

papers.title: Exploring Spatial Intelligence from a Generative Perspective
papers.abstract: Spatial intelligence is essential for multimodal large language models, yet current benchmarks largely assess it only from an understanding perspective. We ask whether modern generative or unified multimodal models also possess generative spatial intelligence (GSI), the ability to respect and manipulate 3D spatial constraints during image generation, and whether such capability can be measured or improved. We introduce GSI-Bench, the first benchmark designed to quantify GSI through spatially grounded image editing. It consists of two complementary components: GSI-Real, a high-quality real-world dataset built via a 3D-prior-guided generation and filtering pipeline, and GSI-Syn, a large-scale synthetic benchmark with controllable spatial operations and fully automated labeling. Together with a unified evaluation protocol, GSI-Bench enables scalable, model-agnostic assessment of spatial compliance and editing fidelity. Experiments show that fine-tuning unified multimodal models on GSI-Syn yields substantial gains on both synthetic and real tasks and, strikingly, also improves downstream spatial understanding. This provides the first clear evidence that generative training can tangibly strengthen spatial reasoning, establishing a new pathway for advancing spatial intelligence in multimodal models.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个量化生成式空间智能（GSI）的基准GSI-Bench，并发现生成训练能提升空间推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前多模态大模型的空间智能评测仅关注理解视角，缺乏对生成过程中空间约束能力的量化评估，阻碍了模型空间推理能力的全面提升。
analysis.problem: 如何定义、量化并提升多模态模型在图像生成中遵循3D空间约束的能力（生成式空间智能）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在GSI-Syn上微调统一多模态模型，不仅提升了合成和真实任务上的空间编辑性能，还意外地改善了空间理解能力，表明生成训练可增强空间推理。
analysis.method: 构建GSI-Bench基准，包含GSI-Real（真实世界数据集，通过3D先验引导生成和过滤）和GSI-Syn（大规模合成基准，支持可控空间操作和自动标注），并设计统一评估协议。
contributions: 首次提出生成式空间智能（GSI）概念并构建量化基准GSI-Bench。
通过实验证明生成训练能提升空间推理能力，为多模态模型空间智能发展提供新路径。
analysis.experiments: 在GSI-Syn上微调统一多模态模型，在合成和真实任务上均取得显著提升，并观察到空间理解能力的下游改进。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有空间操作类型。
生成训练对空间理解的提升机制尚需进一步分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个量化生成式空间智能（GSI）的基准GSI-Bench，并发现生成训练能提升空间推理能力。

papers.title: The Effect of Idea Elaboration on the Automatic Assessment of Idea Originality
papers.abstract: Automatic systems are increasingly used to assess the originality of responses in creative tasks. They offer a potential solution to key limitations of human assessment (cost, fatigue, and subjectivity), but there is preliminary evidence of a self-preference bias. Accordingly, automatic systems tend to prefer outcomes that are more closely related to their style, rather than to the human one. In this paper, we investigated how Large Language Models (LLMs) align with human raters in assessing the originality of responses in a divergent thinking task. We analysed 4,813 responses to the Alternate Uses Task produced by higher and lower creative humans and ChatGPT-4o. Human raters were two university students who underwent intensive training. Machine raters were two specialised systems fine-tuned on AUT responses and corresponding human ratings (OCSAI and CLAUS) and ChatGPT-4o, which was prompted with the same instructions as human raters. Results confirmed the presence of a self-preference bias in LLMs. Automatic systems tended to privilege artificial responses. However, this self-preference bias disappeared when the analyses controlled for the idea elaboration. We discuss theoretical and methodological implications of these findings by highlighting future directions for research on creativity assessment.

analysis.tldr: LLM在评估创意任务中的原创性时存在自我偏好偏差，但控制想法阐述后偏差消失。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动评估系统可解决人工评估成本高、疲劳和主观性等问题，但存在自我偏好偏差，需研究其与人类评分者的一致性。
analysis.problem: 探究大型语言模型在评估发散思维任务中回答的原创性时，是否与人类评分者一致，以及自我偏好偏差是否受想法阐述影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到LLM存在自我偏好偏差，倾向于偏好人工生成的回答，但控制想法阐述后偏差消失。
analysis.method: 分析4813个Alternate Uses Task回答（来自高/低创造力人类和ChatGPT-4o），使用人类评分者（两名受训学生）和机器评分者（两个微调系统OCSAI、CLAUS及ChatGPT-4o）进行原创性评估，并控制想法阐述变量。
contributions: 证实了LLM在创意评估中存在自我偏好偏差
发现控制想法阐述后自我偏好偏差消失，揭示了阐述在评估中的作用
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及结果确认了自我偏好偏差并分析了阐述的影响。
limitations: 仅使用Alternate Uses Task单一任务，可能限制泛化性
未详细说明控制想法阐述的具体方法
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在评估创意任务中的原创性时存在自我偏好偏差，但控制想法阐述后偏差消失。

papers.title: HARBOR: Automated Harness Optimization
papers.abstract: Long-horizon language-model agents are dominated, in lines of code and in operational complexity, not by their underlying model but by the harness that wraps it: context compaction, tool caching, semantic memory, trajectory reuse, speculative tool prediction, and the glue that binds the model to a sandboxed execution environment. We argue that harness design is a first-class machine-learning problem and that automated configuration search dominates manual stacking once the flag space exceeds a handful of bits. We defend this claim in two steps. First, we formalize automated harness optimization as constrained noisy Bayesian optimization over a mixed-variable, cost-heterogeneous configuration space with cold-start-corrected rewards and a posterior chance-constrained safety check, and give a reference solver, HARBOR (Harness Axis-aligned Regularized Bayesian Optimization Routine), built from a block-additive SAAS surrogate, multi-fidelity cost-aware acquisition, and TuRBO trust regions. Second, we instantiate the problem in a flag-gated harness over a production coding agent and report a controlled four-round manual-tuning case study against a fixed task suite and an end-to-end HARBOR run. The formulation itself is task-class agnostic: the configuration space, reward correction, acquisition, and safety check apply to any agent harness with a bounded flag space and a reproducible task suite.

analysis.tldr: 提出将语言模型智能体的harness设计视为机器学习问题，并用贝叶斯优化自动搜索配置。
analysis.research_motivation: 长程语言模型智能体的复杂性和代码量主要来自harness（上下文压缩、工具缓存等），而非底层模型，但手动调优效率低且难以扩展。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化优化语言模型智能体的harness配置（包括上下文压缩、工具缓存、语义记忆等组件），在约束下最大化任务性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当配置空间超过少量比特时，自动化配置搜索优于手动堆叠。
analysis.method: 将harness优化形式化为带约束的噪声贝叶斯优化问题，提出HARBOR求解器，使用块加性SAAS代理模型、多保真度成本感知采集函数和TuRBO信任区域。
contributions: 形式化了自动化harness优化问题，包括混合变量、成本异质配置空间、冷启动校正奖励和后验机会约束安全检查。
提出HARBOR求解器，结合SAAS代理、多保真度采集和TuRBO。
在真实编码智能体上通过手动调优案例研究和HARBOR运行验证了方法有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在固定任务套件上进行了四轮手动调优案例研究和端到端HARBOR运行，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅在一个生产编码智能体上验证，泛化性需更多测试。
未讨论配置空间规模对优化效率的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出将语言模型智能体的harness设计视为机器学习问题，并用贝叶斯优化自动搜索配置。

papers.title: LayerTracer: A Joint Task-Particle and Vulnerable-Layer Analysis framework for Arbitrary Large Language Model Architectures
papers.abstract: Currently, Large Language Models (LLMs) feature a diversified architectural landscape, including traditional Transformer, GateDeltaNet, and Mamba. However, the evolutionary laws of hierarchical representations, task knowledge formation positions, and network robustness bottleneck mechanisms in various LLM architectures remain unclear, posing core challenges for hybrid architecture design and model optimization. This paper proposes LayerTracer, an architecture-agnostic end-to-end analysis framework compatible with any LLM architecture. By extracting hidden states layer-by-layer and mapping them to vocabulary probability distributions, it achieves joint analysis of task particle localization and layer vulnerability quantification. We define the task particle as the key layer where the target token probability first rises significantly, representing the model's task execution starting point, and the vulnerable layer is defined as the layer with the maximum Jensen-Shannon (JS) divergence between output distributions before and after mask perturbation, reflecting its sensitivity to disturbances. Experiments on models of different parameter scales show that task particles mainly appear in the deep layers of the model regardless of parameter size, while larger-parameter models exhibit stronger hierarchical robustness. LayerTracer provides a scientific basis for layer division, module ratio, and gating switching of hybrid architectures, effectively optimizing model performance. It accurately locates task-effective layers and stability bottlenecks, offering universal support for LLM structure design and interpretability research.

analysis.tldr: 提出架构无关的LLM分析框架LayerTracer，联合分析任务粒子定位与脆弱层量化。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM架构多样（Transformer、GateDeltaNet、Mamba等），但层级表示演化规律、任务知识形成位置及网络鲁棒性瓶颈机制尚不明确，阻碍了混合架构设计与模型优化。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一种兼容任意LLM架构的端到端分析框架，无法同时定位任务关键层和量化层脆弱性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现任务粒子主要出现在模型深层，且大参数模型具有更强的层级鲁棒性。
analysis.method: 逐层提取隐藏状态并映射到词汇概率分布，定义任务粒子为目标token概率首次显著上升的关键层，定义脆弱层为掩码扰动前后输出分布JS散度最大的层。
contributions: 提出架构无关的联合分析框架LayerTracer，兼容任意LLM架构。
定义任务粒子和脆弱层两个新概念，实现任务执行起点定位与层敏感性量化。
为混合架构的层划分、模块比例和门控切换提供科学依据，有效优化模型性能。
analysis.experiments: 在不同参数规模的模型上进行实验，观察任务粒子和脆弱层分布规律。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于概率输出的语言模型，对非自回归模型需调整。
脆弱层定义依赖特定扰动方式，可能无法全面反映所有攻击模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出架构无关的LLM分析框架LayerTracer，联合分析任务粒子定位与脆弱层量化。

papers.title: Toward Cross-Lingual Quality Classifiers for Multilingual Pretraining Data Selection
papers.abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) scale, data curation has shifted from maximizing volume to optimizing the signal-to-noise ratio by performing quality filtering. However, for many languages, native high quality data is insufficient to train robust quality classifiers. This work investigates the idea that quality markers in embedding space may show cross-lingual consistency, which would allow high-resource languages to subsidize the filtering of low-resource ones. We evaluate various filtering strategies, including cross-lingual transfer, third quartile sampling (Q3), and retention rate tuning. Our results demonstrate that massive multilingual pooling frequently outperforms monolingual baselines in both rank stability and aggregate accuracy for a 1B model trained on 103B tokens, delivering gains for high resource languages (1.2% increase in aggregate normalized accuracy for French) and matching or exceeding monolingual baselines for low-resource languages. However, we find that scale alone does not guarantee stability. Furthermore, for high-resource languages like French, we show that refining the decision boundary through third quartile sampling (Q3) or tuning the retention rate is necessary to fully leverage the multilingual signal.

analysis.tldr: 跨语言质量分类器可利用多语言池化提升低资源语言数据筛选效果，但需精细调整决策边界。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM数据筛选从追求数量转向优化信噪比，但低资源语言缺乏高质量标注数据来训练质量分类器。
analysis.problem: 如何利用高资源语言的质量信号辅助低资源语言的数据筛选，并验证跨语言嵌入空间的一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多语言池化在排名稳定性和聚合准确率上优于单语基线，但规模本身不保证稳定性；高资源语言需通过Q3采样或保留率调优来充分利用多语言信号。
analysis.method: 评估跨语言迁移、第三四分位数采样(Q3)和保留率调优等筛选策略，使用多语言池化训练质量分类器。
contributions: 发现多语言池化在1B/103B token模型上优于单语基线，高资源语言法语聚合归一化准确率提升1.2%。
指出规模不保证稳定性，高资源语言需精细调整决策边界以充分利用多语言信号。
analysis.experiments: 在1B参数模型、103B token上评估多种筛选策略，对比多语言池化与单语基线，报告了法语的准确率提升。
limitations: 仅验证了1B规模模型，更大模型可能表现不同。
低资源语言的具体提升幅度未详细量化。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 跨语言质量分类器可利用多语言池化提升低资源语言数据筛选效果，但需精细调整决策边界。

papers.title: Enhancing Research Idea Generation through Combinatorial Innovation and Multi-Agent Iterative Search Strategies
papers.abstract: Scientific progress depends on the continual generation of innovative re-search ideas. However, the rapid growth of scientific literature has greatly increased the cost of knowledge filtering, making it harder for researchers to identify novel directions. Although existing large language model (LLM)-based methods show promise in research idea generation, the ideas they produce are often repetitive and lack depth. To address this issue, this study proposes a multi-agent iterative planning search strategy inspired by com-binatorial innovation theory. The framework combines iterative knowledge search with an LLM-based multi-agent system to generate, evaluate, and re-fine research ideas through repeated interaction, with the goal of improving idea diversity and novelty. Experiments in the natural language processing domain show that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art base-lines in both diversity and novelty. Further comparison with ideas derived from top-tier machine learning conference papers indicates that the quality of the generated ideas falls between that of accepted and rejected papers. These results suggest that the proposed framework is a promising approach for supporting high-quality research idea generation. The source code and dataset used in this paper are publicly available on Github repository: https://github.com/ChenShuai00/MAGenIdeas. The demo is available at https://huggingface.co/spaces/cshuai20/MAGenIdeas.

analysis.tldr: 提出多智能体迭代规划搜索策略，结合组合创新理论提升研究想法生成的多样性和新颖性。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学文献快速增长导致知识筛选成本高昂，现有LLM方法生成的研究想法重复且缺乏深度。
analysis.problem: 如何自动生成多样且新颖的研究想法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有LLM方法生成的想法重复且缺乏深度。
analysis.method: 基于组合创新理论的多智能体迭代规划搜索框架，结合迭代知识搜索与LLM多智能体系统，通过反复交互生成、评估和优化想法。
contributions: 提出一种多智能体迭代规划搜索策略用于研究想法生成
在NLP领域实验证明方法在多样性和新颖性上优于现有基线
analysis.experiments: 在自然语言处理领域进行实验，与顶级机器学习会议论文对比，生成想法质量介于接收和拒稿论文之间。
limitations: 仅在NLP领域验证，其他领域效果未知
生成想法质量仍低于顶级会议接收论文
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多智能体迭代规划搜索策略，结合组合创新理论提升研究想法生成的多样性和新颖性。

papers.title: Measuring the Machine: Evaluating Generative AI as Pluralist Sociotechical Systems
papers.abstract: In measurement theory, instruments do not simply record reality; they help constitute what is observed. The same holds for generative AI evaluation: benchmarks do not just measure, they shape what models appear to be. Functionalist benchmarks treat models as isolated predictors, while prescriptive approaches assess what systems ought to be. Both obscure the sociotechnical processes through which meaning and values are enacted, risking the reification of narrow cultural perspectives in pluralist contexts. This thesis advances a descriptive alternative. It argues that generative AI must be evaluated as a pluralist sociotechnical system and develops Machine-Society-Human (MaSH) Loops, a framework for tracing how models, users, and institutions recursively co-construct meaning and values. Evaluation shifts from judging outputs to examining how values are enacted in interaction. Three contributions follow. Conceptually, MaSH Loops reframes evaluation as recursive, enactive process. Methodologically, the World Values Benchmark introduces a distributional approach grounded in World Values Survey data, structured prompt sets, and anchor-aware scoring. Empirically, the thesis demonstrates these through two cases: value drift in early GPT-3 and sociotechnical evaluation in real estate. A final chapter draws on participatory realism to argue that prompting and evaluation are constitutive interventions, not neutral observations. The thesis argues that static benchmarks are insufficient for generative AI. Responsible evaluation requires pluralist, process-oriented frameworks that make visible whose values are enacted. Evaluation is therefore a site of governance, shaping how AI systems are understood, deployed, and trusted.

analysis.tldr: 提出将生成式AI评估视为多元社会技术系统的描述性框架MaSH Loops，并引入基于世界价值观调查的基准测试。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生成式AI评估方法（功能主义基准和规范性方法）忽视了评估过程中的社会技术建构性，可能导致狭隘文化视角的固化，在多元主义背景下存在风险。
analysis.problem: 如何将生成式AI评估从静态、孤立的功能性测量转变为能够揭示价值在交互中如何被共同建构的描述性过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出功能主义基准将模型视为孤立预测器，规范性方法规定系统应如何，两者都掩盖了意义和价值通过社会技术过程被实现的事实，存在固化狭隘文化视角的风险。
analysis.method: 提出Machine-Society-Human (MaSH) Loops框架，将评估重新定义为递归、生成的过程；并开发World Values Benchmark，基于世界价值观调查数据、结构化提示集和锚点感知评分进行分布性评估。
contributions: 概念上：MaSH Loops将评估重新定义为递归的、生成的过程。
方法上：World Values Benchmark引入基于世界价值观调查数据的分布性评估方法。
实证上：通过GPT-3早期价值漂移和房地产社会技术评估两个案例展示框架应用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架的实证验证仅通过两个案例，可能缺乏广泛性。
World Values Benchmark的分布性方法可能仍受限于调查数据的文化覆盖范围。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出将生成式AI评估视为多元社会技术系统的描述性框架MaSH Loops，并引入基于世界价值观调查的基准测试。

papers.title: Evian: Towards Explainable Visual Instruction-tuning Data Auditing
papers.abstract: The efficacy of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) is critically dependent on the quality of their training data, requiring a precise balance between visual fidelity and instruction-following capability. Existing datasets, however, are plagued by inconsistent quality, and current data filtering methods rely on coarse-grained scores that lack the granularity to identify nuanced semantic flaws like logical fallacies or factual errors. This creates a fundamental bottleneck in developing more reliable models. To address this, we make three core contributions. First, we construct a large-scale, 300K-sample benchmark by systematically injecting diverse, subtle defects to provide a challenging testbed for data auditing. Second, we introduce a novel "Decomposition-then-Evaluation" paradigm that breaks model responses into constituent cognitive components: visual description, subjective inference, and factual claim, enabling targeted analysis. Third, we instantiate this paradigm via EVIAN (Explainable Visual Instruction-tuning Data AuditiNg), an automated framework that evaluates these components along the orthogonal axes of Image-Text Consistency, Logical Coherence, and Factual Accuracy. Our empirical findings challenge the prevailing scale-centric paradigm: a model fine-tuned on a compact, high-quality subset curated by EVIAN consistently surpassed models trained on orders-of-magnitude larger datasets. We also reveal that dividing complex auditing into verifiable subtasks enables robust curation, and that Logical Coherence is the most critical factor in data quality evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 提出可解释的视觉指令微调数据审计框架EVIAN，通过分解评估视觉描述、主观推理和事实声明来筛选高质量数据，实验表明小规模高质量子集优于大规模数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉指令微调数据集质量参差不齐，粗粒度的数据过滤方法无法识别逻辑谬误、事实错误等细微语义缺陷，制约了LVLM的可靠性提升。
analysis.problem: 如何实现细粒度、可解释的视觉指令微调数据质量审计，以自动识别并筛选出高质量训练样本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出逻辑连贯性是数据质量评估中最关键的因素。
analysis.method: 提出"分解-评估"范式，将模型响应分解为视觉描述、主观推理和事实声明三个认知组件，并沿图像-文本一致性、逻辑连贯性和事实准确性三个正交维度进行自动化评估。
contributions: 构建了一个包含30万样本的大规模基准，通过系统注入多种细微缺陷来挑战数据审计方法。
提出了EVIAN框架，实现可解释的视觉指令微调数据审计，并验证了小规模高质量子集优于大规模数据的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在构建的基准上评估EVIAN，发现经EVIAN筛选的紧凑高质量子集微调的模型持续优于在数量级更大的数据集上训练的模型。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义的缺陷类型，对未知缺陷的泛化能力未知。
分解评估可能增加计算开销，实际部署效率待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可解释的视觉指令微调数据审计框架EVIAN，通过分解评估视觉描述、主观推理和事实声明来筛选高质量数据，实验表明小规模高质量子集优于大规模数据。

papers.title: RefAerial: A Benchmark and Approach for Referring Detection in Aerial Images
papers.abstract: Referring detection refers to locate the target referred by natural languages, which has recently attracted growing research interests. However, existing datasets are limited to ground images with large object centered in relative small scenes. This paper introduces a large-scale challenging dataset for referring detection in aerial images, termed as RefAerial. It distinguishes from conventional ground referring detection datasets by 4 characteristics: (1) low but diverse object-to-scene ratios, (2) numerous targets and distractors, (3)complex and fine-grained referring descriptions, (4) diverse and broad scenes in the aerial view. We also develop a human-in-the-loop referring expansion and annotation engine (REA-Engine) for efficient semi-automated referring pair annotation. Besides, we observe that existing ground referring detection approaches exhibiting serious performance degradation on our aerial dataset since the intrinsic scale variety issue within or across aerial images. Therefore, we further propose a novel scale-comprehensive and sensitive (SCS) framework for referring detection in aerial images. It consists of a mixture-of-granularity (MoG) attention and a two-stage comprehensive-to-sensitive (CtS) decoding strategy. Specifically, the mixture-of-granularity attention is developed for scale-comprehensive target understanding. In addition, the two-stage comprehensive-to-sensitive decoding strategy is designed for coarse-to-fine referring target decoding. Eventually, the proposed SCS framework achieves remarkable performance on our aerial referring detection dataset and even promising performance boost on conventional ground referring detection datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出面向航拍图像的指代检测基准RefAerial及尺度综合敏感框架SCS，解决地面方法在航拍场景中的性能退化问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有指代检测数据集局限于地面图像，目标居中且场景小，无法覆盖航拍图像中目标尺度多样、场景广阔、描述复杂的特点，导致地面方法在航拍场景中性能严重下降。
analysis.problem: 航拍图像中指代检测面临目标与场景比例低、目标与干扰物众多、描述细粒度且场景多样带来的尺度变化挑战，现有方法难以适应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有地面指代检测方法在航拍数据集上性能严重退化，主要原因是航拍图像内部或跨图像存在固有的尺度多样性问题。
analysis.method: 提出尺度综合敏感（SCS）框架，包含混合粒度注意力（MoG）用于尺度综合目标理解，以及两阶段综合到敏感（CtS）解码策略用于由粗到细的指代目标解码。
contributions: 构建了大规模航拍指代检测基准RefAerial，具有低目标场景比、多目标与干扰物、复杂细粒度描述和多样场景等特点。
开发了人机协同的指代扩展与标注引擎（REA-Engine），实现高效半自动标注。
提出了尺度综合敏感（SCS）框架，在航拍和地面指代检测数据集上均取得显著性能提升。
analysis.experiments: 在RefAerial基准和传统地面指代检测数据集上评估了SCS框架，取得了显著性能提升。
limitations: 未提及跨域泛化能力，可能对极端尺度或罕见场景适应性有限。
人机协同标注引擎的效率可能受限于人工参与成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出面向航拍图像的指代检测基准RefAerial及尺度综合敏感框架SCS，解决地面方法在航拍场景中的性能退化问题。

papers.title: AttentionBender: Manipulating Cross-Attention in Video Diffusion Transformers as a Creative Probe
papers.abstract: We present AttentionBender, a tool that manipulates cross-attention in Video Diffusion Transformers to help artists probe the internal mechanics of black-box video generation. While generative outputs are increasingly realistic, prompt-only control limits artists' ability to build intuition for the model's material process or to work beyond its default tendencies. Using an autobiographical research-through-design approach, we built on Network Bending to design AttentionBender, which applies 2D transforms (rotation, scaling, translation, etc.) to cross-attention maps to modulate generation. We assess AttentionBender by visualizing 4,500+ video generations across prompts, operations, and layer targets. Our results suggest that cross-attention is highly entangled: targeted manipulations often resist clean, localized control, producing distributed distortions and glitch aesthetics over linear edits. AttentionBender contributes a tool that functions both as an Explainable AI style probe of transformer attention mechanisms, and as a creative technique for producing novel aesthetics beyond the model's learned representational space.

analysis.tldr: 通过操纵视频扩散Transformer中的交叉注意力图，AttentionBender既作为可解释AI探针，又作为创意工具，揭示了注意力高度纠缠并产生故障美学。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前视频生成模型虽逼真，但仅靠提示词控制限制了艺术家对模型内部机制的理解和超越默认倾向的创作。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种工具，既能探针视频扩散Transformer的交叉注意力机制，又能作为创意手段生成超出模型学习表征空间的新美学。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 交叉注意力高度纠缠：针对特定层的操作难以实现干净、局部的控制，反而产生分布式失真和故障美学，而非线性编辑效果。
analysis.method: 基于网络弯曲（Network Bending）设计AttentionBender，对视频扩散Transformer的交叉注意力图施加2D变换（旋转、缩放、平移等），以调制生成过程。
contributions: 提出AttentionBender工具，可操纵视频扩散Transformer的交叉注意力图，兼具可解释AI探针和创意工具功能。
通过4500+视频生成实验，揭示交叉注意力高度纠缠的特性，并展示其产生故障美学等新颖视觉效果的能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个提示词、操作和层目标上可视化4500+视频生成结果，评估不同操作的效果。
limitations: 交叉注意力的高度纠缠使得精确、局部的控制难以实现，可能限制艺术家的预期编辑效果。
工具目前仅针对视频扩散Transformer，未验证在其他架构或模态上的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过操纵视频扩散Transformer中的交叉注意力图，AttentionBender既作为可解释AI探针，又作为创意工具，揭示了注意力高度纠缠并产生故障美学。

papers.title: Early-Stage Product Line Validation Using LLMs: A Study on Semi-Formal Blueprint Analysis
papers.abstract: We study whether Large Language Models (LLMs) can perform feature model analysis operations (AOs) directly on semi-formal textual blueprints, i.e., concise constrained-language descriptions of feature hierarchies and constraints, enabling early validation in Software Product Line scoping. Using 12 state-of-the-art LLMs and 16 standard AOs, we compare their outputs against the solver-based oracle FLAMA. Results show that reasoning-optimized models (e.g., Grok 4 Fast Reasoning, Gemini 2.5 Pro) achieve 88-89% average accuracy across all evaluated blueprints and operations, approaching solver correctness. We identify systematic errors in structural parsing and constraint reasoning, and highlight accuracy-cost trade-offs that inform model selection. These findings position LLMs as lightweight assistants for early variability validation.

analysis.tldr: LLM 可直接在半形式化蓝图上执行特征模型分析操作，接近求解器精度，适合早期产品线验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 软件产品线早期验证依赖形式化特征模型，但构建完整模型成本高，半形式化蓝图更易获取但缺乏自动分析工具。
analysis.problem: 能否让 LLM 直接对半形式化文本蓝图执行特征模型分析操作，实现早期验证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 推理优化模型（如 Grok 4 Fast Reasoning）在结构解析和约束推理上存在系统性错误，但整体准确率接近求解器。
analysis.method: 使用 12 个 SOTA LLM 对 16 种标准分析操作进行零样本推理，并与求解器 FLAMA 对比。
contributions: 首次系统评估 LLM 在半形式化蓝图上执行特征模型分析操作的能力
揭示推理优化模型在准确率与成本之间的权衡，指导模型选择
analysis.experiments: 在 12 个 LLM 和 16 个分析操作上测试，与 FLAMA 对比，推理优化模型平均准确率 88-89%。
limitations: 仅评估了特定蓝图的有限操作集
未涉及更复杂的特征模型约束或大规模产品线
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM 可直接在半形式化蓝图上执行特征模型分析操作，接近求解器精度，适合早期产品线验证。

papers.title: From Image to Music Language: A Two-Stage Structure Decoding Approach for Complex Polyphonic OMR
papers.abstract: We propose a new approach for a practical two-stage Optical Music Recognition (OMR) pipeline, with a particular focus on its second stage. Given symbol and event candidates from the visual pipeline, we decode them into an editable, verifiable, and exportable score structure. We focus on complex polyphonic staff notation, especially piano scores, where voice separation and intra-measure timing are the main bottlenecks. Our approach formulates second-stage decoding as a structure decoding problem and uses topology recognition with probability-guided search (BeadSolver) as its core method. We also describe a data strategy that combines procedural generation with recognition-feedback annotations. The result is a practical decoding component for real OMR systems and a path to accumulate structured score data for future end-to-end, multimodal, and RL-style methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种两阶段光学音乐识别（OMR）方法，通过拓扑识别和概率引导搜索（BeadSolver）解码复杂多声部乐谱结构。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有OMR系统在处理复杂多声部乐谱（如钢琴谱）时，声部分离和节拍内时序是主要瓶颈，且缺乏可编辑、可验证的结构化输出。
analysis.problem: 如何将视觉管道输出的符号和事件候选解码为可编辑、可验证、可导出的乐谱结构，特别是处理复杂多声部乐谱中的声部分离和节拍内时序问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将第二阶段解码形式化为结构解码问题，使用拓扑识别和概率引导搜索（BeadSolver）作为核心方法，并结合程序化生成与识别反馈标注的数据策略。
contributions: 提出一种实用的两阶段OMR流水线，重点解决第二阶段的结构解码问题。
引入BeadSolver方法，通过拓扑识别和概率引导搜索处理复杂多声部乐谱。
设计结合程序化生成与识别反馈标注的数据策略，为未来端到端、多模态和RL方法积累结构化乐谱数据。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖视觉管道的准确性，错误传播影响最终结果。
方法可能仅适用于特定类型的乐谱（如钢琴谱），泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种两阶段光学音乐识别（OMR）方法，通过拓扑识别和概率引导搜索（BeadSolver）解码复杂多声部乐谱结构。

papers.title: CHASM: Unveiling Covert Advertisements on Chinese Social Media
papers.abstract: Current benchmarks for evaluating large language models (LLMs) in social media moderation completely overlook a serious threat: covert advertisements, which disguise themselves as regular posts to deceive and mislead consumers into making purchases, leading to significant ethical and legal concerns. In this paper, we present the CHASM, a first-of-its-kind dataset designed to evaluate the capability of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) in detecting covert advertisements on social media. CHASM is a high-quality, anonymized, manually curated dataset consisting of 4,992 instances, based on real-world scenarios from the Chinese social media platform Rednote. The dataset was collected and annotated under strict privacy protection and quality control protocols. It includes many product experience sharing posts that closely resemble covert advertisements, making the dataset particularly challenging.The results show that under both zero-shot and in-context learning settings, none of the current MLLMs are sufficiently reliable for detecting covert advertisements.Our further experiments revealed that fine-tuning open-source MLLMs on our dataset yielded noticeable performance gains. However, significant challenges persist, such as detecting subtle cues in comments and differences in visual and textual structures.We provide in-depth error analysis and outline future research directions. We hope our study can serve as a call for the research community and platform moderators to develop more precise defenses against this emerging threat.

analysis.tldr: 首个针对中文社交媒体隐蔽广告检测的多模态数据集CHASM，揭示当前MLLM在此任务上的不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有社交媒体审核基准完全忽略隐蔽广告这一严重威胁，其伪装成普通帖子误导消费者，引发伦理和法律问题，亟需专门数据集和评估。
analysis.problem: 评估多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在检测中文社交媒体隐蔽广告上的能力，并揭示当前模型的局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 零样本和上下文学习设置下，所有当前MLLM均不可靠；微调开源模型虽有提升，但评论中细微线索及视觉文本结构差异仍是挑战。
analysis.method: 构建高质量、匿名化、人工标注的CHASM数据集（4992实例），基于小红书真实场景，包含与隐蔽广告高度相似的产品体验分享帖，并在零样本、上下文学习和微调设置下评估多种MLLM。
contributions: 首个针对隐蔽广告检测的多模态数据集CHASM，包含4992个真实世界实例。
系统评估揭示当前MLLM在隐蔽广告检测上的不可靠性，并提供错误分析和未来方向。
analysis.experiments: 在零样本、上下文学习和微调设置下评估多种MLLM，结果显示当前模型均不可靠，微调带来性能提升但挑战仍存。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 数据集仅来自单一平台（小红书），可能不泛化到其他平台。
未提供微调后模型的具体性能指标，难以量化改进程度。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个针对中文社交媒体隐蔽广告检测的多模态数据集CHASM，揭示当前MLLM在此任务上的不足。

papers.title: Mythos and the Unverified Cage: Z3-Based Pre-Deployment Verification for Frontier-Model Sandbox Infrastructure
papers.abstract: The April 2026 Claude Mythos sandbox escape exposed a critical weakness in frontier AI containment: the infrastructure surrounding advanced models remains susceptible to formally characterizable arithmetic vulnerabilities. Anthropic has not publicly characterized the escape vector; some secondary accounts hypothesize a CWE-190 arithmetic vulnerability in sandbox networking code. We treat this as unverified and analyze the vulnerability class rather than the specific escape. This paper presents COBALT, a Z3 SMT-based formal verification engine for identifying CWE-190/191/195 arithmetic vulnerability patterns in C/C++ infrastructure prior to deployment. We distinguish two classes of contribution. Validated: COBALT detects arithmetic vulnerability patterns in production codebases, producing SAT verdicts with concrete witnesses and UNSAT guarantees under explicit safety bounds. We demonstrate this on four production case studies: NASA cFE, wolfSSL, Eclipse Mosquitto, and NASA F Prime, with reproducible encodings, verified solver output, and acknowledged security outcomes. Proposed: a four-layer containment framework consisting of COBALT, VERDICT, DIRECTIVE-4, and SENTINEL, mapping pre-deployment verification, pre-execution constraints, output control, and runtime monitoring to the failure modes exposed by the Mythos incident. Under explicit assumptions, we further argue that the publicly reported Mythos escape class is consistent with a Z3-expressible CWE-190 arithmetic formulation and that pre-deployment formal analysis would have been capable of surfacing the relevant pattern. The broader claim is infrastructural: frontier-model safety cannot depend on behavioral safeguards alone; the containment stack itself must be subjected to formal verification.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于Z3的预部署形式化验证引擎COBALT，用于检测前沿模型沙箱基础设施中的算术漏洞，并设计四层安全框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 前沿AI模型的安全围栏（沙箱基础设施）存在可被形式化表征的算术漏洞，而现有行为安全措施不足以防范此类漏洞，需要从基础设施层面进行形式化验证。
analysis.problem: 如何在前沿模型部署前，通过形式化方法检测C/C++基础设施中的算术漏洞（CWE-190/191/195），并构建系统性的安全围栏框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出Claude Mythos沙箱逃逸事件暴露了算术漏洞（如CWE-190）的威胁，但具体逃逸向量未公开；作者假设该漏洞可被Z3表达，并认为预部署形式化分析能够发现此类模式。
analysis.method: 提出COBALT，基于Z3 SMT求解器的形式化验证引擎，对C/C++代码进行算术漏洞模式检测，输出SAT（含具体反例）或UNSAT（安全保证）结果；并设计四层安全框架（COBALT、VERDICT、DIRECTIVE-4、SENTINEL）覆盖预部署验证、预执行约束、输出控制和运行时监控。
contributions: 提出COBALT，一个基于Z3的预部署形式化验证引擎，可检测C/C++代码中的算术漏洞模式，并在四个生产级案例（NASA cFE、wolfSSL、Eclipse Mosquitto、NASA F Prime）中验证，获得可复现的编码、求解器输出和确认的安全结果。
设计四层安全框架，将预部署验证、预执行约束、输出控制和运行时监控映射到Mythos事件暴露的失败模式，并论证预部署形式化分析能够发现相关漏洞模式。
analysis.experiments: 在四个生产级代码库（NASA cFE、wolfSSL、Eclipse Mosquitto、NASA F Prime）上进行了案例研究，展示了COBALT检测算术漏洞模式的能力，并提供了可复现的编码和求解器输出。
limitations: 仅针对C/C++代码中的算术漏洞（CWE-190/191/195），未覆盖其他类型漏洞。
四层框架中的VERDICT、DIRECTIVE-4、SENTINEL部分仅为提议，未在实验中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于Z3的预部署形式化验证引擎COBALT，用于检测前沿模型沙箱基础设施中的算术漏洞，并设计四层安全框架。

papers.title: Evaluating Remote Sensing Image Captions Beyond Metric Biases
papers.abstract: The core objective of image captioning is to achieve lossless semantic compression from visual signals into textual modalities. However, the reliance on manually curated reference texts for evaluation essentially forces models to mimic specific human annotation styles, thereby masking the true descriptive capabilities of advanced foundation models. This systemic misalignment prompts a critical question: Is task-specific fine-tuning truly necessary for Remote Sensing Image Captioning, or is the perceived performance gap merely an artifact of flawed evaluation criteria? To investigate this discrepancy, we propose ReconScore, a novel reference-free evaluation metric. Rather than computing textual similarities, we assess caption quality by its capability to reconstruct the original visual elements solely from the generated text, effectively neutralizing human annotation biases. Applying this metric, we uncover a profound, counterintuitive truth: inherently powerful, unfine-tuned MLLMs surpass their fine-tuned counterparts in authentic zero-shot RSIC tasks. Driven by this structural discovery, we introduce RemoteDescriber, a completely training-free generation methodology. By employing ReconScore as a self-correction mechanism, we iteratively refine the semantic precision of MLLM outputs without any computational fine-tuning overhead. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that RemoteDescriber achieves state-of-the-art performance on three datasets. Furthermore, we validate ReconScore's reliability and analyze the flaws of traditional metrics. Our code is available at https://github.com/hhu-czy/RemoteDescriber.

analysis.tldr: 提出无参考评估指标ReconScore和免训练生成方法RemoteDescriber，揭示未微调MLLM在遥感图像描述中优于微调模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有评估依赖人工参考文本，掩盖了基础模型的真实描述能力，导致对遥感图像描述任务是否需要微调产生疑问。
analysis.problem: 解决遥感图像描述评估中参考文本偏差问题，并探究微调是否必要。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 未微调的MLLM在零样本遥感图像描述中表现优于微调版本，传统指标存在偏差。
analysis.method: 提出无参考评估指标ReconScore，通过从生成文本重建视觉元素来评估质量；提出免训练生成方法RemoteDescriber，利用ReconScore作为自校正机制迭代优化输出。
contributions: 提出ReconScore，一种无参考评估指标，消除人类标注偏差。
发现未微调MLLM在零样本遥感图像描述中优于微调模型。
提出RemoteDescriber，免训练生成方法，达到SOTA性能。
analysis.experiments: 在三个数据集上达到SOTA性能，验证了ReconScore的可靠性并分析了传统指标的缺陷。
limitations: 可能仅适用于遥感图像描述领域。
自校正机制可能增加推理时间。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无参考评估指标ReconScore和免训练生成方法RemoteDescriber，揭示未微调MLLM在遥感图像描述中优于微调模型。

papers.title: Data-Driven Open-Loop Simulation for Digital-Twin Operator Decision Support in Wastewater Treatment
papers.abstract: Wastewater treatment plants (WWTPs) need digital-twin-style decision support tools that can simulate plant response under prescribed control plans, tolerate irregular and missing sensing, and remain informative over 12-36 h planning horizons. Meeting these requirements with full-scale plant data remains an open engineering-AI challenge. We present CCSS-RS, a controlled continuous-time state-space model that separates historical state inference from future control and exogenous rollout. The model combines typed context encoding, gain-weighted forcing of prescribed and forecast drivers, semigroup-consistent rollouts, and Student-t plus hurdle outputs for heavy-tailed and zero-inflated WWTP sensor data. On the public Avedøre full-scale benchmark, with 906,815 timesteps, 43% missingness, and 1-20 min irregular sampling, CCSS-RS achieves RMSE 0.696 and CRPS 0.349 at H=1000 across 10,000 test windows. This reduces RMSE by 40-46% relative to Neural CDE baselines and by 31-35% relative to simplified internal variants. Four case studies using a frozen checkpoint on test data demonstrate operational value: oxygen-setpoint perturbations shift predicted ammonium by -2.3 to +1.4 over horizons 300-1000; a smoothed setpoint plan ranks first in multi-criterion screening; context-only sensor outages raise monitored-variable RMSE by at most 10%; and ammonium, nitrate, and oxygen remain more accurate than persistence throughout the rollout. These results establish CCSS-RS as a practical learned simulator for offline scenario screening in industrial wastewater treatment, complementary to mechanistic models.

analysis.tldr: 提出CCSS-RS模型，用于污水处理厂数字孪生决策支持，实现长时间跨度的开环仿真。
analysis.research_motivation: 污水处理厂需要数字孪生决策支持工具，但现有方法难以处理不规则缺失传感数据并保持12-36小时预测时效，这是一个工程AI挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何利用全规模工厂数据构建一个能容忍不规则缺失传感、并在长时间规划范围内保持信息量的开环仿真模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CCSS-RS，一种受控连续时间状态空间模型，分离历史状态推断与未来控制/外生变量展开，结合类型化上下文编码、增益加权驱动、半群一致性展开以及Student-t加障碍输出。
contributions: 提出CCSS-RS模型，有效处理高缺失率和不规则采样的WWTP数据。
在公开基准上实现RMSE 0.696和CRPS 0.349，相比Neural CDE基线降低40-46% RMSE。
通过四个案例研究展示了模型在操作决策支持中的实用价值。
analysis.experiments: 在Avedøre全规模基准上评估，包含906,815个时间步、43%缺失率、1-20分钟不规则采样，测试10,000个窗口，H=1000时RMSE 0.696、CRPS 0.349。
limitations: 可能依赖特定污水处理厂数据，泛化性需进一步验证。
模型复杂度较高，部署时可能需要计算资源。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CCSS-RS模型，用于污水处理厂数字孪生决策支持，实现长时间跨度的开环仿真。

papers.title: Knowledge Capsules: Structured Nonparametric Memory Units for LLMs
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) encode knowledge in parametric weights, making it costly to update or extend without retraining. Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) mitigates this limitation by appending retrieved text to the input, but operates purely through context expansion, where external knowledge competes as tokens within the attention mechanism. As a result, its influence is indirect and often unstable, particularly in long context and multi hop reasoning scenarios. We propose Knowledge Capsules, structured nonparametric memory units that represent normalized relational knowledge and can be constructed directly from document corpora using a frozen base model. Instead of injecting knowledge as text, we introduce an External Key Value Injection (KVI) framework that compiles capsules into attention-compatible key value representations, enabling external knowledge to directly participate in the model's attention computation. By shifting knowledge integration from context-level augmentation to memory level interaction, the proposed framework consistently outperforms RAG and GraphRAG across multiple QA benchmarks, with improved stability and accuracy in long context and multi hop reasoning, while requiring no parameter updates.

analysis.tldr: 提出知识胶囊，一种结构化非参数记忆单元，通过外部键值注入框架让外部知识直接参与注意力计算，超越RAG和GraphRAG。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM参数化知识更新成本高，RAG通过上下文扩展引入外部知识但影响间接且不稳定，尤其在长上下文和多跳推理中。
analysis.problem: 如何让外部知识直接参与LLM的注意力计算，实现稳定且准确的知识集成，无需参数更新。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: RAG中外部知识以文本形式附加到输入，在注意力机制中作为token竞争，导致影响间接且不稳定，长上下文和多跳推理场景下性能下降。
analysis.method: 提出知识胶囊（结构化非参数记忆单元）和外部键值注入（KVI）框架，将文档语料库编译为注意力兼容的键值表示，使外部知识直接参与注意力计算。
contributions: 提出知识胶囊作为结构化非参数记忆单元，表示归一化关系知识。
设计外部键值注入框架，将胶囊编译为注意力兼容的键值表示，实现记忆级知识交互。
analysis.experiments: 在多个QA基准上，所提框架一致优于RAG和GraphRAG，在长上下文和多跳推理中表现出更好的稳定性和准确性。
limitations: 可能依赖冻结基座模型的质量。
胶囊构建和注入的计算开销未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出知识胶囊，一种结构化非参数记忆单元，通过外部键值注入框架让外部知识直接参与注意力计算，超越RAG和GraphRAG。

papers.title: ProMMSearchAgent: A Generalizable Multimodal Search Agent Trained with Process-Oriented Rewards
papers.abstract: Training multimodal agents via reinforcement learning for knowledge-intensive visual reasoning is fundamentally hindered by the extreme sparsity of outcome-based supervision and the unpredictability of live web environments. To resolve these algorithmic and environmental bottlenecks, we introduce ProMMSearchAgent, establishing a novel Sim-to-Real training paradigm for multimodal search. We decouple policy learning into a deterministic, local static sandbox. Crucially, to learn effectively within this constrained environment, we propose an introspective process-oriented reward. By probing the agent's own parametric knowledge boundaries, we generate dense behavioral metadata that explicitly rewards the correct cognitive decision, initiating a multimodal or text search only when visually or factually uncertain. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our locally-trained policy transfers zero-shot to the live Google Search API. ProMMSearchAgent achieves new SOTA performance, outperforming MMSearch-R1 by +5.1% on FVQA-test, +6.3% on InfoSeek, and +11.3% on MMSearch.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于过程奖励的模拟-真实训练范式，训练出零样本迁移到真实搜索环境的通用多模态搜索智能体。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态智能体在知识密集型视觉推理中面临结果监督稀疏和真实网络环境不可预测的瓶颈，现有方法难以有效训练。
analysis.problem: 如何解决多模态搜索智能体在强化学习训练中因结果奖励稀疏和真实环境不可预测导致的训练困难。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Sim-to-Real训练范式，在确定性本地静态沙箱中解耦策略学习，并设计内省过程奖励，通过探测智能体自身参数知识边界生成密集行为元数据，奖励正确的认知决策（仅在视觉或事实不确定时发起多模态或文本搜索）。
contributions: 提出ProMMSearchAgent，建立模拟到真实的训练范式用于多模态搜索。
提出内省过程奖励，通过探测知识边界生成密集奖励信号。
在多个基准上取得新SOTA，零样本迁移到真实Google Search API。
analysis.experiments: 在FVQA-test、InfoSeek和MMSearch基准上评估，ProMMSearchAgent分别比MMSearch-R1提升+5.1%、+6.3%和+11.3%。
limitations: 可能依赖沙箱环境的保真度，真实环境差异可能影响迁移。
内省过程奖励的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于过程奖励的模拟-真实训练范式，训练出零样本迁移到真实搜索环境的通用多模态搜索智能体。

papers.title: Random Walk on Point Clouds for Feature Detection
papers.abstract: The points on the point clouds that can entirely outline the shape of the model are of critical importance, as they serve as the foundation for numerous point cloud processing tasks and are widely utilized in computer graphics and computer-aided design.
