This study introduces a novel method, RWoDSN, for extracting such feature points, incorporating considerations of sharp-to-smooth transitions, large-to-small scales, and textural-to-detailed features. We approach feature extraction as a two-stage context-dependent analysis problem. In the first stage, we propose a novel neighborhood descriptor, termed the Disk Sampling Neighborhood (DSN), which, unlike traditional spatially and geometrically invariant approaches, preserves a matrix structure while maintaining normal neighborhood relationships. In the second stage, a random walk is performed on the DSN (RWoDSN), yielding a graph-based DSN that simultaneously accounts for the spatial distribution, topological properties, and geometric characteristics of the local surface surrounding each point. This enables the effective extraction of feature points. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed RWoDSN method achieves a recall of 0.769-22% higher than the current state-of-the-art-alongside a precision of 0.784. Furthermore, it significantly outperforms several traditional and deep-learning techniques across eight evaluation metrics.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于随机游走和盘采样邻域描述子的点云特征检测方法，在召回率和精度上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 点云特征点对形状轮廓描述至关重要，但现有方法在尖锐-平滑过渡、多尺度及纹理细节特征提取上存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何从点云中有效提取能完整勾勒模型形状的特征点，同时兼顾空间分布、拓扑和几何特性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出两阶段方法：第一阶段设计盘采样邻域描述子（DSN），保留矩阵结构和法向邻域关系；第二阶段在DSN上执行随机游走（RWoDSN），构建图结构以融合空间、拓扑和几何信息，从而提取特征点。
contributions: 提出盘采样邻域描述子（DSN），克服传统方法空间和几何不变性限制。
将随机游走应用于DSN，实现多尺度、多类型特征点的有效提取。
analysis.experiments: 在多个点云数据集上评估，召回率0.769（比SOTA高22%），精度0.784，在8个指标上优于多种传统和深度学习方法。
limitations: 可能对噪声或异常点敏感，需进一步验证鲁棒性。
计算复杂度可能较高，未在摘要中讨论效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于随机游走和盘采样邻域描述子的点云特征检测方法，在召回率和精度上超越现有方法。

papers.title: Video-ToC: Video Tree-of-Cue Reasoning
papers.abstract: Existing Video Large Language Models (Video LLMs) struggle with complex video understanding, exhibiting limited reasoning capabilities and potential hallucinations. In particular, these methods tend to perform reasoning solely relying on the pretrained inherent reasoning rationales whilst lacking perception-aware adaptation to the input video content. To address this, we propose \textbf{Video-ToC}, a novel video reasoning framework that enhances video understanding through tree-of-cue reasoning. Specifically, our approach introduces three key innovations: (1) A tree-guided visual cue localization mechanism, which endows the model with enhanced fine-grained perceptual capabilities through structured reasoning patterns; (2) A reasoning-demand reward mechanism, which dynamically adjusts the reward value for reinforcement learning (RL) based on the estimation of reasoning demands, enabling on-demand incentives for more effective reasoning strategies; and (3) An automated annotation pipeline that constructs the Video-ToC-SFT-1k and Video-ToC-RL-2k datasets for supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and RL training, respectively. Extensive evaluations on six video understanding benchmarks and a video hallucination benchmark demonstrate the superiority of Video-ToC over baselines and recent methods. Code is available at https://github.com/qizhongtan/Video-ToC.

analysis.tldr: 提出树状线索推理框架Video-ToC，通过结构化视觉线索定位、推理需求奖励机制和自动化标注管道提升视频大模型的复杂理解与抗幻觉能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频大模型在复杂视频理解中推理能力有限且易产生幻觉，缺乏对输入视频内容的感知自适应推理。
analysis.problem: 如何增强视频大模型的细粒度感知和推理能力，减少幻觉，实现感知自适应的视频理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法仅依赖预训练固有的推理模式，缺乏对视频内容的感知自适应，导致推理能力受限和幻觉。
analysis.method: 提出Video-ToC框架，包含树引导的视觉线索定位机制、基于推理需求估计的动态奖励调整机制，以及自动化标注管道构建的SFT和RL数据集。
contributions: 提出树引导的视觉线索定位机制，通过结构化推理模式增强细粒度感知。
提出推理需求奖励机制，动态调整强化学习奖励值以实现按需激励。
构建Video-ToC-SFT-1k和Video-ToC-RL-2k数据集，并开源代码。
analysis.experiments: 在六个视频理解基准和一个视频幻觉基准上评估，结果显示Video-ToC优于基线和近期方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集质量，泛化性需进一步验证。
树状推理的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出树状线索推理框架Video-ToC，通过结构化视觉线索定位、推理需求奖励机制和自动化标注管道提升视频大模型的复杂理解与抗幻觉能力。

papers.title: DynamicRad: Content-Adaptive Sparse Attention for Long Video Diffusion
papers.abstract: Leveraging the natural spatiotemporal energy decay in video diffusion offers a path to efficiency, yet relying solely on rigid static masks risks losing critical long-range information in complex dynamics. To address this issue, we propose \textbf{DynamicRad}, a unified sparse-attention paradigm that grounds adaptive selection within a radial locality prior. DynamicRad introduces a \textbf{dual-mode} strategy: \textit{static-ratio} for speed-optimized execution and \textit{dynamic-threshold} for quality-first filtering. To ensure robustness without online search overhead, we integrate an offline Bayesian Optimization (BO) pipeline coupled with a \textbf{semantic motion router}. This lightweight projection module maps prompt embeddings to optimal sparsity regimes with \textbf{minimal runtime overhead}. Unlike online profiling methods, our offline BO optimizes attention reconstruction error (MSE) on a physics-based proxy task, ensuring rapid convergence. Experiments on HunyuanVideo and Wan2.1-14B demonstrate that DynamicRad pushes the efficiency--quality Pareto frontier, achieving \textbf{1.7$\times$--2.5$\times$ inference speedups} with \textbf{over 80\% effective sparsity}. In some long-sequence settings, the dynamic mode even matches or exceeds the dense baseline, while mask-aware LoRA further improves long-horizon coherence. Code is available at https://github.com/Adamlong3/DynamicRad.

analysis.tldr: 提出内容自适应稀疏注意力机制DynamicRad，通过径向局部先验和离线贝叶斯优化实现长视频扩散模型1.7-2.5倍加速且保持质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频扩散模型计算成本高，现有稀疏注意力方法使用刚性静态掩码，在复杂动态场景中会丢失关键长程信息，亟需自适应稀疏策略。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持视频生成质量的前提下，通过内容自适应的稀疏注意力显著降低长视频扩散模型的推理计算量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 视频扩散中自然存在时空能量衰减，但仅依赖刚性静态掩码无法适应复杂动态，导致长程信息丢失。
analysis.method: 提出DynamicRad，包含双模式策略（静态比率模式用于速度优化，动态阈值模式用于质量优先），结合离线贝叶斯优化（BO）管道和语义运动路由器，以最小运行时开销将提示嵌入映射到最优稀疏度。
contributions: 提出统一稀疏注意力范式DynamicRad，利用径向局部先验实现内容自适应选择。
设计双模式策略和离线贝叶斯优化管道，无需在线搜索即可保证鲁棒性。
在HunyuanVideo和Wan2.1-14B上实现1.7-2.5倍推理加速，有效稀疏度超过80%，动态模式在长序列设置中匹配或超越密集基线。
analysis.experiments: 在HunyuanVideo和Wan2.1-14B模型上评估，报告了推理加速比、有效稀疏度，并提及动态模式在长序列中匹配或超越密集基线，以及掩码感知LoRA改善长程连贯性。
limitations: 可能对极短视频或静态场景的加速效果有限。
离线BO优化依赖代理任务，可能与真实分布存在差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出内容自适应稀疏注意力机制DynamicRad，通过径向局部先验和离线贝叶斯优化实现长视频扩散模型1.7-2.5倍加速且保持质量。

papers.title: MOMO: A framework for seamless physical, verbal, and graphical robot skill learning and adaptation
papers.abstract: Industrial robot applications require increasingly flexible systems that non-expert users can easily adapt for varying tasks and environments. However, different adaptations benefit from different interaction modalities. We present an interactive framework that enables robot skill adaptation through three complementary modalities: kinesthetic touch for precise spatial corrections, natural language for high-level semantic modifications, and a graphical web interface for visualizing geometric relations and trajectories, inspecting and adjusting parameters, and editing via-points by drag-and-drop. The framework integrates five components: energy-based human-intention detection, a tool-based LLM architecture (where the LLM selects and parameterizes predefined functions rather than generating code) for safe natural language adaptation, Kernelized Movement Primitives (KMPs) for motion encoding, probabilistic Virtual Fixtures for guided demonstration recording, and ergodic control for surface finishing. We demonstrate that this tool-based LLM architecture generalizes skill adaptation from KMPs to ergodic control, enabling voice-commanded surface finishing. Validation on a 7-DoF torque-controlled robot at the Automatica 2025 trade fair demonstrates the practical applicability of our approach in industrial settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出MOMO框架，通过触觉、语言和图形三种模态实现非专家用户的机器人技能学习与适应。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业机器人需要灵活适应不同任务和环境，但非专家用户难以操作，现有方法缺乏多模态交互支持。
analysis.problem: 如何让非专家用户通过多种交互模态（触觉、语言、图形）无缝地学习和调整机器人技能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 集成能量感知意图检测、基于工具的LLM架构（LLM选择并参数化预定义函数）、核化运动基元（KMP）、概率虚拟夹具和遍历控制，支持三种模态的交互。
contributions: 提出一个多模态交互框架，整合触觉、语言和图形三种技能适应方式。
设计基于工具的LLM架构，确保安全且泛化到不同控制方法（如KMP和遍历控制）。
analysis.experiments: 在7自由度力矩控制机器人上于Automatica 2025贸易展进行验证，展示了工业场景的实用性。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义函数库，限制了LLM的灵活性。
未提及在复杂或非结构化环境中的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MOMO框架，通过触觉、语言和图形三种模态实现非专家用户的机器人技能学习与适应。

papers.title: IRIS: Interpolative Rényi Iterative Self-play for Large Language Model Fine-Tuning
papers.abstract: Self-play fine-tuning enables large language models to improve beyond supervised fine-tuning without additional human annotations by contrasting annotated responses with self-generated ones. Many existing methods rely on a fixed divergence regime. SPIN is closely related to a KL-based regime, SPACE to a Jensen-Shannon-style objective via noise contrastive estimation, and SPIF to $χ^2$-regularized self-play. Since these divergences exhibit different strengths depending on the distributional gap between model and target, no single choice appears to provide favorable learning dynamics across training stages. We propose IRIS (Interpolative Rényi Iterative Self-play), a Rényi-based self-play fine-tuning framework with a continuously adjustable objective. IRIS decomposes into two independent tilted risk terms over annotated and synthetic data, with exponential importance weights controlled by the order parameter $α$. We show that several self-play objectives can be interpreted as limiting or representative regimes at particular values of $α$, providing a unified theoretical perspective on these methods. An adaptive order schedule further adjusts $α$ to the distributional gap, shifting from sharper importance weighting early in training to smoother refinement near convergence. Theoretically, we establish the fixed-point property of IRIS and analyze how $α$ controls gradient concentration. Experiments on Zephyr-7B and Qwen2.5-3B across ten benchmarks show that IRIS improves upon baselines, reaching 44.57\% average score with gains across iterations. In our setting, IRIS with only 26$k$ annotated samples surpasses standard supervised fine-tuning trained on the full 200$k$ dataset.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于Rényi散度的可调节自对弈微调框架IRIS，通过自适应阶数调度超越固定散度方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自对弈微调方法（如SPIN、SPACE、SPIF）依赖固定散度（KL、JS、χ²），不同训练阶段模型与目标分布差距变化，单一散度无法提供最优学习动态。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个可动态调整的自对弈目标，以适应训练过程中不断变化的分布差距，提升微调效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同散度在不同分布差距下表现不同，固定散度方法在训练早期和后期可能分别面临梯度集中或平滑不足的问题。
analysis.method: 提出IRIS框架，基于Rényi散度构建可调节目标，分解为带指数重要性权重的两个倾斜风险项，并通过自适应阶数调度α随训练动态调整，从早期尖锐加权过渡到后期平滑精炼。
contributions: 提出IRIS，一种基于Rényi散度的可调节自对弈微调框架，统一了多种现有自对弈方法。
理论证明了IRIS的不动点性质，并分析了α对梯度集中的控制作用。
实验表明IRIS在Zephyr-7B和Qwen2.5-3B上超越基线，仅用26k标注样本即超过全200k数据集的SFT。
analysis.experiments: 在Zephyr-7B和Qwen2.5-3B上，使用十个基准测试，IRIS平均得分44.57%，且随迭代提升。
limitations: 仅验证了7B和3B规模模型，更大模型效果未知。
自适应α调度策略可能需额外调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于Rényi散度的可调节自对弈微调框架IRIS，通过自适应阶数调度超越固定散度方法。

papers.title: CCTVBench: Contrastive Consistency Traffic VideoQA Benchmark for Multimodal LLMs
papers.abstract: Safety-critical traffic reasoning requires contrastive consistency: models must detect true hazards when an accident occurs, and reliably reject plausible-but-false hypotheses under near-identical counterfactual scenes. We present CCTVBench, a Contrastive Consistency Traffic VideoQA Benchmark built on paired real accident videos and world-model-generated counterfactual counterparts, together with minimally different, mutually exclusive hypothesis questions. CCTVBench enforces a single structured decision pattern over each video question quadruple and provides actionable diagnostics that decompose failures into positive omission, positive swap, negative hallucination, and mutual-exclusivity violation, while separating video versus question consistency. Experiments across open-source and proprietary video LLMs reveal a large and persistent gap between standard per-instance QA metrics and quadruple-level contrastive consistency, with unreliable none-of-the-above rejection as a key bottleneck. Finally, we introduce C-TCD, a contrastive decoding approach leveraging a semantically exclusive counterpart video as the contrast input at inference time, improving both instance-level QA and contrastive consistency.

analysis.tldr: 提出CCTVBench基准，评估多模态大模型在交通视频中的对比一致性，并引入C-TCD解码方法提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频问答基准缺乏对模型在安全关键场景中对比一致性的评估，即模型需能区分真实事故与反事实场景，并可靠拒绝看似合理但错误的假设。
analysis.problem: 多模态大模型在交通视频问答中无法保持对比一致性，尤其是在拒绝错误假设方面存在瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现标准逐实例问答指标与四元组级对比一致性之间存在较大且持续的差距，其中不可靠的“以上皆非”拒绝是关键瓶颈。
analysis.method: 构建CCTVBench基准，包含配对真实事故视频和世界模型生成的反事实视频，以及互斥假设问题；提出C-TCD对比解码方法，利用语义互斥的反事实视频作为对比输入进行推理。
contributions: 提出CCTVBench，首个评估多模态大模型在交通视频中对比一致性的基准，包含细粒度诊断分解。
发现标准QA指标与对比一致性之间的显著差距，并识别出不可靠拒绝是关键瓶颈。
提出C-TCD对比解码方法，有效提升实例级QA和对比一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个开源和闭源视频LLM上进行实验，揭示了对比一致性差距，并验证了C-TCD的有效性。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准仅聚焦交通场景，泛化性待验证。
C-TCD依赖反事实视频生成，可能受限于世界模型质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CCTVBench基准，评估多模态大模型在交通视频中的对比一致性，并引入C-TCD解码方法提升性能。

papers.title: MAE-Based Self-Supervised Pretraining for Data-Efficient Medical Image Segmentation Using nnFormer
papers.abstract: Transformer architectures, including nnFormer,have demonstrated promising results in volumetric medical image segmentation by being able to capture long-range spatial interactions. Although they have high performance, these models need large quantities of labeled training data and are also likely to overfit and become training unstable. This is a serious practical problem because it is not only time-consuming but also expensive to obtain medical images that are annotated by experts. Moreover, fully supervised traditional training pipelines do not take advantage of the available large amounts of unlabeled medical imaging data that can be easily obtained in the clinics. We have solved these drawbacks by advancing the efficiency of the nnFormer with a self-supervised pretraining framework, which is based on the Masked Autoencoders (MAE). In this method, the model is pretrained on unlabeled volumetric medical images to reconstruct randomly masked parts of the input. This allows the encoder to learn meaningful anatomical and structural representations . The encoder is then further fine-tuned on a labeled dataset on the downstream segmentation task. Conducted Experiment shows that the offered method leads to a higher segmentation performance on the count of Dice score, a quicker convergence rate on the course of the fine-tuning procedure, and a superior generalization on the basis of limited labeled data . These findings validate that self-supervised learning combined with transformer-based segmentation models is an appropriate approach to the problem of data shortage in medical image analysis.

analysis.tldr: 基于MAE的自监督预训练提升nnFormer在医学图像分割中的数据效率和性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像分割中，Transformer模型如nnFormer需要大量标注数据，但获取专家标注耗时且昂贵，而大量未标注数据未被充分利用。
analysis.problem: 解决nnFormer在标注数据稀缺时容易过拟合、训练不稳定且性能下降的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用Masked Autoencoders (MAE)对nnFormer进行自监督预训练，在未标注的体素医学图像上重建随机掩码部分，学习解剖和结构表征，再在下游分割任务上微调。
contributions: 提出基于MAE的自监督预训练框架，提升nnFormer的数据效率。
实验证明该方法在Dice分数、收敛速度和泛化能力上优于传统全监督训练。
analysis.experiments: 在未公开的医学图像数据集上进行了实验，报告了Dice分数提升、更快的收敛速度和更好的泛化能力，但未提供具体数值或数据集细节。
limitations: 摘要未提及与其他自监督方法的对比。
未说明预训练和微调的具体计算成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于MAE的自监督预训练提升nnFormer在医学图像分割中的数据效率和性能。

papers.title: Adaptive Defense Orchestration for RAG: A Sentinel-Strategist Architecture against Multi-Vector Attacks
papers.abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems are increasingly deployed in sensitive domains such as healthcare and law, where they rely on private, domain-specific knowledge. This capability introduces significant security risks, including membership inference, data poisoning, and unintended content leakage. A straightforward mitigation is to enable all relevant defenses simultaneously, but doing so incurs a substantial utility cost. In our experiments, an always-on defense stack reduces contextual recall by more than 40%, indicating that retrieval degradation is the primary failure mode. To mitigate this trade-off in RAG systems, we propose the Sentinel-Strategist architecture, a context-aware framework for risk analysis and defense selection. A Sentinel detects anomalous retrieval behavior, after which a Strategist selectively deploys only the defenses warranted by the query context. Evaluated across three benchmark datasets and five orchestration models, ADO is shown to eliminate MBA-style membership inference leakage while substantially recovering retrieval utility relative to a fully static defense stack, approaching undefended baseline levels. Under data poisoning, the strongest ADO variants reduce attack success to near zero while restoring contextual recall to more than 75% of the undefended baseline, although robustness remains sensitive to model choice. Overall, these findings show that adaptive, query-aware defense can substantially reduce the security-utility trade-off in RAG systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出哨兵-策略师架构，通过上下文感知的防御编排在RAG系统中平衡安全性与检索效用。
analysis.research_motivation: RAG系统在敏感领域部署时面临成员推断、数据投毒等安全风险，但全量防御会严重降低检索效用（实验显示上下文召回率下降超40%），亟需自适应防御机制。
analysis.problem: 如何在RAG系统中动态选择防御策略，以最小化效用损失的同时有效抵御多向量攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 始终开启的防御栈导致上下文召回率下降超过40%，表明检索退化是主要失败模式；数据投毒下最强变体可将攻击成功率降至接近零，同时恢复75%以上的上下文召回率，但鲁棒性对模型选择敏感。
analysis.method: 哨兵-策略师架构：哨兵检测异常检索行为，策略师根据查询上下文选择性部署防御。
contributions: 提出自适应防御编排框架，在RAG系统中动态平衡安全性与检索效用。
通过实验证明该架构能消除成员推断泄漏，并在数据投毒下显著降低攻击成功率。
analysis.experiments: 在三个基准数据集和五个编排模型上评估，显示自适应防御相比静态防御栈大幅恢复检索效用，接近未防御基线水平。
limitations: 鲁棒性对模型选择敏感，可能需针对不同模型调优。
仅评估了成员推断和数据投毒两种攻击，未覆盖其他攻击类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出哨兵-策略师架构，通过上下文感知的防御编排在RAG系统中平衡安全性与检索效用。

papers.title: VTouch++: A Multimodal Dataset with Vision-Based Tactile Enhancement for Bimanual Manipulation
papers.abstract: Embodied intelligence has advanced rapidly in recent years; however, bimanual manipulation-especially in contact-rich tasks remains challenging. This is largely due to the lack of datasets with rich physical interaction signals, systematic task organization, and sufficient scale. To address these limitations, we introduce the VTOUCH dataset. It leverages vision based tactile sensing to provide high-fidelity physical interaction signals, adopts a matrix-style task design to enable systematic learning, and employs automated data collection pipelines covering real-world, demand-driven scenarios to ensure scalability. To further validate the effectiveness of the dataset, we conduct extensive quantitative experiments on cross-modal retrieval as well as real-robot evaluation. Finally, we demonstrate real-world performance through generalizable inference across multiple robots, policies, and tasks.

analysis.tldr: VTouch++ 是一个面向双臂操作的视觉触觉多模态数据集，通过矩阵式任务设计和自动化采集流水线解决接触密集任务中物理信号缺失和规模不足的问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 双臂操作尤其是接触密集任务因缺乏包含丰富物理交互信号、系统任务组织和足够规模的数据集而进展缓慢。
analysis.problem: 现有数据集在物理交互信号保真度、任务系统性和可扩展性方面不足，限制了双臂操作学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 VTOUCH 数据集，采用基于视觉的触觉传感提供高保真物理信号，矩阵式任务设计支持系统学习，自动化数据采集流水线覆盖真实需求驱动场景。
contributions: 构建了包含视觉触觉增强的多模态双臂操作数据集 VTOUCH。
设计了矩阵式任务组织和自动化采集流水线，提升数据系统性和可扩展性。
通过跨模态检索和真实机器人实验验证了数据集有效性。
analysis.experiments: 进行了跨模态检索定量实验和真实机器人评估，展示了多机器人、多策略、多任务的泛化推理性能。
limitations: 数据集可能局限于特定触觉传感器和任务设置。
自动化采集流水线在极端复杂场景下的覆盖能力未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VTouch++ 是一个面向双臂操作的视觉触觉多模态数据集，通过矩阵式任务设计和自动化采集流水线解决接触密集任务中物理信号缺失和规模不足的问题。

papers.title: DialToM: A Theory of Mind Benchmark for Forecasting State-Driven Dialogue Trajectories
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have been shown to possess Theory of Mind (ToM) abilities. However, it remains unclear whether this stems from robust reasoning or spurious correlations. We introduce DialToM, a human-verified benchmark built from natural human dialogue using a multiple-choice framework. We evaluate not only mental state prediction (Literal ToM) but also the functional utility of these states (Functional ToM) through Prospective Diagnostic Forecasting -- probing whether models can identify state-consistent dialogue trajectories solely from mental-state profiles. Our results reveal a significant reasoning asymmetry: while LLMs excel at identifying mental states, most (except for Gemini 3 Pro) fail to leverage this understanding to forecast social trajectories. Additionally, we find only weak semantic similarities between human and LLM-generated inferences. To facilitate reproducibility, the DialToM dataset and evaluation code are publicly available at https://github.com/Stealth-py/DialToM.

analysis.tldr: DialToM 基准测试发现 LLM 虽能识别心理状态，但除 Gemini 3 Pro 外均无法利用其预测对话轨迹。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究显示 LLM 具备心智理论能力，但不确定是源于稳健推理还是虚假相关，需要更严格的基准来区分。
analysis.problem: 评估 LLM 在对话中预测心理状态（字面 ToM）以及利用这些状态预测对话轨迹（功能 ToM）的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM 在识别心理状态上表现良好，但在利用这些状态预测社会轨迹时存在显著推理不对称，且人类与 LLM 的推理语义相似性弱。
analysis.method: 构建基于自然人类对话的多选基准 DialToM，通过前瞻性诊断预测任务评估字面 ToM 和功能 ToM。
contributions: 提出 DialToM 基准，用于评估 LLM 的心智理论能力，区分字面与功能 ToM。
发现 LLM 在功能 ToM 上的推理不对称，除 Gemini 3 Pro 外均无法有效利用心理状态预测对话轨迹。
analysis.experiments: 在 DialToM 基准上评估了多个 LLM，结果显示除 Gemini 3 Pro 外，模型在功能 ToM 任务上表现不佳。
limitations: 基准仅基于自然对话，可能未覆盖所有心智理论场景。
未深入分析推理不对称的具体原因。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DialToM 基准测试发现 LLM 虽能识别心理状态，但除 Gemini 3 Pro 外均无法利用其预测对话轨迹。

papers.title: MedSkillAudit: A Domain-Specific Audit Framework for Medical Research Agent Skills
papers.abstract: Background: Agent skills are increasingly deployed as modular, reusable capability units in AI agent systems. Medical research agent skills require safeguards beyond general-purpose evaluation, including scientific integrity, methodological validity, reproducibility, and boundary safety. This study developed and preliminarily evaluated a domain-specific audit framework for medical research agent skills, with a focus on reliability against expert review. Methods: We developed MedSkillAudit (skill-auditor@1.0), a layered framework assessing skill release readiness before deployment. We evaluated 75 skills across five medical research categories (15 per category). Two experts independently assigned a quality score (0-100), an ordinal release disposition (Production Ready / Limited Release / Beta Only / Reject), and a high-risk failure flag. System-expert agreement was quantified using ICC(2,1) and linearly weighted Cohen's kappa, benchmarked against the human inter-rater baseline. Results: The mean consensus quality score was 72.4 (SD = 13.0); 57.3% of skills fell below the Limited Release threshold. MedSkillAudit achieved ICC(2,1) = 0.449 (95% CI: 0.250-0.610), exceeding the human inter-rater ICC of 0.300. System-consensus score divergence (SD = 9.5) was smaller than inter-expert divergence (SD = 12.4), with no directional bias (Wilcoxon p = 0.613). Protocol Design showed the strongest category-level agreement (ICC = 0.551); Academic Writing showed a negative ICC (-0.567), reflecting a structural rubric-expert mismatch. Conclusions: Domain-specific pre-deployment audit may provide a practical foundation for governing medical research agent skills, complementing general-purpose quality checks with structured audit workflows tailored to scientific use cases.

analysis.tldr: 提出 MedSkillAudit，一个面向医学研究 Agent 技能的领域特定审计框架，通过专家评估验证其可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学研究 Agent 技能需要超越通用评估的保障，包括科学完整性、方法有效性、可复现性和边界安全，但缺乏领域特定的审计框架。
analysis.problem: 如何设计并验证一个针对医学研究 Agent 技能的领域特定审计框架，以评估其发布就绪性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要显示，57.3% 的技能低于有限发布阈值，系统-专家一致性（ICC=0.449）优于人类评分者间一致性（ICC=0.300），但学术写作类别出现负 ICC，表明结构化的评估标准与专家判断存在不匹配。
analysis.method: MedSkillAudit 是一个分层审计框架，包含质量评分（0-100）、发布处置（生产就绪/有限发布/仅 Beta/拒绝）和高风险失败标记，由两位专家独立评估，并使用 ICC 和 Cohen's kappa 量化系统-专家一致性。
contributions: 提出了 MedSkillAudit，首个针对医学研究 Agent 技能的领域特定审计框架。
通过 75 个技能的专家评估实验，验证了框架的可靠性，系统-专家一致性优于人类评分者间一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在 75 个技能（5 个类别各 15 个）上评估，两位专家独立评分，使用 ICC(2,1) 和加权 Cohen's kappa 分析一致性。
limitations: 仅基于 75 个技能和两位专家，样本量和专家数量有限。
学术写作类别出现负 ICC，表明框架在该类别上需要改进。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 MedSkillAudit，一个面向医学研究 Agent 技能的领域特定审计框架，通过专家评估验证其可靠性。

papers.title: Shift-Up: A Framework for Software Engineering Guardrails in AI-native Software Development -- Initial Findings
papers.abstract: Generative AI (GenAI) is reshaping software engineering by shifting development from manual coding toward agent-driven implementation. While vibe coding promises rapid prototyping, it often suffers from architectural drift, limited traceability, and reduced maintainability. Applying the design science research (DSR) methodology, this paper proposes Shift-Up, a framework that reinterprets established software engineering practices, like executable requirements (BDD), architectural modeling (C4), and architecture decision records (ADRs), as structural guardrails for GenAI-native development. Preliminary findings from our exploratory evaluation compare unstructured vibe coding, structured prompt engineering, and the Shift-Up approach in the development of a web application. These findings indicate that embedding machine-readable requirements and architectural artifacts stabilizes agent behavior, reduces implementation drift, and shifts human effort toward higher-level design and validation activities. The results suggest that traditional software engineering artifacts can serve as effective control mechanisms in AI-assisted development.

analysis.tldr: Shift-Up框架将传统软件工程实践（BDD、C4、ADR）作为结构护栏，用于AI原生开发，初步实验表明可减少实现漂移并稳定智能体行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI将软件开发转向智能体驱动，但vibe coding存在架构漂移、可追溯性差和维护性降低的问题，亟需结构化的护栏机制。
analysis.problem: 如何在AI原生软件开发中引入传统软件工程实践作为护栏，以减少实现漂移并提高可维护性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出无结构vibe coding会导致架构漂移和可维护性下降，而嵌入机器可读需求和架构工件可稳定智能体行为。
analysis.method: Shift-Up框架，重新诠释BDD（可执行需求）、C4（架构建模）和ADR（架构决策记录）作为GenAI原生开发的结构护栏。
contributions: 提出Shift-Up框架，将传统软件工程工件作为AI辅助开发的控制机制
通过探索性评估对比无结构vibe coding、结构化提示工程和Shift-Up方法，验证其减少实现漂移的效果
analysis.experiments: 在Web应用开发中对比三种方法（无结构vibe coding、结构化提示工程、Shift-Up），摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 探索性评估规模有限，可能缺乏统计显著性
未讨论框架在不同类型项目或团队中的泛化性
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Shift-Up框架将传统软件工程实践（BDD、C4、ADR）作为结构护栏，用于AI原生开发，初步实验表明可减少实现漂移并稳定智能体行为。

papers.title: Fast-then-Fine: A Two-Stage Framework with Multi-Granular Representation for Cross-Modal Retrieval in Remote Sensing
papers.abstract: Remote sensing (RS) image-text retrieval plays a critical role in understanding massive RS imagery. However, the dense multi-object distribution and complex backgrounds in RS imagery make it difficult to simultaneously achieve fine-grained cross-modal alignment and efficient retrieval. Existing methods either rely on complex cross-modal interactions that lead to low retrieval efficiency, or depend on large-scale vision-language model pre-training, which requires massive data and computational resources. To address these issues, we propose a fast-then-fine (FTF) two-stage retrieval framework that decomposes retrieval into a text-agnostic recall stage for efficient candidate selection and a text-guided rerank stage for fine-grained alignment. Specifically, in the recall stage, text-agnostic coarse-grained representations are employed for efficient candidate selection; in the rerank stage, a parameter-free balanced text-guided interaction block enhances fine-grained alignment without introducing additional learnable parameters. Furthermore, an inter- and intra-modal loss is designed to jointly optimize cross-modal alignment across multi-granular representations. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks demonstrate that the FTF achieves competitive retrieval accuracy while significantly improving retrieval efficiency compared with existing methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种两阶段遥感图像-文本检索框架，先粗后精，兼顾效率与精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感图像中多目标密集分布和复杂背景使得细粒度跨模态对齐与高效检索难以兼得，现有方法要么交互复杂导致效率低，要么依赖大规模预训练消耗巨大资源。
analysis.problem: 如何在遥感图像-文本检索中同时实现细粒度对齐和高效率检索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Fast-then-Fine (FTF)两阶段框架：第一阶段用文本无关的粗粒度表示快速召回候选，第二阶段用无参数平衡文本引导交互块进行细粒度重排；并设计跨粒度损失联合优化多粒度表示。
contributions: 提出两阶段检索框架，将检索分解为粗粒度召回和细粒度重排，平衡效率与精度。
设计无参数平衡文本引导交互块，在不增加可学习参数的情况下增强细粒度对齐。
提出跨模态和模态内损失联合优化多粒度表示。
analysis.experiments: 在公开基准上，FTF在保持竞争性检索精度的同时显著提升了检索效率。
limitations: 可能对极端复杂场景的鲁棒性有待验证。
两阶段流程可能引入额外延迟，但摘要表明效率提升。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种两阶段遥感图像-文本检索框架，先粗后精，兼顾效率与精度。

papers.title: Scalable AI Inference: Performance Analysis and Optimization of AI Model Serving
papers.abstract: AI research often emphasizes model design and algorithmic performance, while deployment and inference remain comparatively underexplored despite being critical for real-world use. This study addresses that gap by investigating the performance and optimization of a BentoML-based AI inference system for scalable model serving developed in collaboration with graphworks.ai. The evaluation first establishes baseline performance under three realistic workload scenarios. To ensure a fair and reproducible assessment, a pre-trained RoBERTa sentiment analysis model is used throughout the experiments. The system is subjected to traffic patterns following gamma and exponential distributions in order to emulate real-world usage conditions, including steady, bursty, and high-intensity workloads. Key performance metrics, such as latency percentiles and throughput, are collected and analyzed to identify bottlenecks in the inference pipeline. Based on the baseline results, optimization strategies are introduced at multiple levels of the serving stack to improve efficiency and scalability. The optimized system is then reevaluated under the same workload conditions, and the results are compared with the baseline using statistical analysis to quantify the impact of the applied improvements. The findings demonstrate practical strategies for achieving efficient and scalable AI inference with BentoML. The study examines how latency and throughput scale under varying workloads, how optimizations at the runtime, service, and deployment levels affect response time, and how deployment in a single-node K3s cluster influences resilience during disruptions.

analysis.tldr: 基于BentoML的AI推理系统性能分析与优化，通过统计方法验证多级优化策略的有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: AI研究常聚焦模型设计与算法性能，而部署与推理环节虽对实际应用至关重要却相对未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地分析并优化基于BentoML的AI推理系统在多种真实工作负载下的性能瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 建立基线性能，使用预训练RoBERTa模型在gamma和指数分布流量模式下测试，识别瓶颈后引入运行时、服务层和部署层多级优化，再通过统计分析对比优化前后效果。
contributions: 提出了基于BentoML的可扩展AI推理系统性能分析框架
通过统计方法量化了多级优化策略对延迟和吞吐量的影响
analysis.experiments: 在单节点K3s集群中，使用RoBERTa模型，模拟稳态、突发和高强度三种工作负载，测量延迟百分位和吞吐量。
limitations: 仅使用单一模型（RoBERTa）和单节点部署，泛化性有限
未涉及分布式或多GPU场景下的优化
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于BentoML的AI推理系统性能分析与优化，通过统计方法验证多级优化策略的有效性。

papers.title: Semantic Recall for Vector Search
papers.abstract: We introduce Semantic Recall, a novel metric to assess the quality of approximate nearest neighbor search algorithms by considering only semantically relevant objects that are theoretically retrievable via exact nearest neighbor search. Unlike traditional recall, semantic recall does not penalize algorithms for failing to retrieve objects that are semantically irrelevant to the query, even if those objects are among their nearest neighbors. We demonstrate that semantic recall is particularly useful for assessing retrieval quality on queries that have few relevant results among their nearest neighbors-a scenario we uncover to be common within embedding datasets. Additionally, we introduce Tolerant Recall, a proxy metric that approximates semantic recall when semantically relevant objects cannot be identified. We empirically show that our metrics are more effective indicators of retrieval quality, and that optimizing search algorithms for these metrics can lead to improved cost-quality tradeoffs.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义召回率（Semantic Recall）和容忍召回率（Tolerant Recall）两种新指标，用于更准确地评估近似最近邻搜索的检索质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统召回率指标在评估近似最近邻搜索时，会惩罚算法未能检索到与查询语义无关的最近邻对象，导致评估结果不能真实反映检索质量。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种评估指标，能够只关注语义相关的对象，从而更准确地衡量近似最近邻搜索算法的检索质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在嵌入数据集中，许多查询的最近邻中只有少量语义相关结果，传统召回率在此场景下会给出误导性评估。
analysis.method: 提出语义召回率（Semantic Recall），仅考虑通过精确最近邻搜索可检索到的语义相关对象；并引入容忍召回率（Tolerant Recall）作为语义召回率的近似代理指标。
contributions: 提出语义召回率指标，避免对语义无关对象的错误惩罚，更准确反映检索质量。
引入容忍召回率作为实用代理指标，适用于无法识别语义相关对象的场景。
实验证明新指标能更有效评估检索质量，并优化搜索算法以改善成本-质量权衡。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 语义召回率需要预先知道语义相关对象，实际应用中可能难以获取。
容忍召回率作为近似指标，其与语义召回率的偏差未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义召回率（Semantic Recall）和容忍召回率（Tolerant Recall）两种新指标，用于更准确地评估近似最近邻搜索的检索质量。

papers.title: Self-Awareness before Action: Mitigating Logical Inertia via Proactive Cognitive Awareness
papers.abstract: Large language models perform well on many reasoning tasks, yet they often lack awareness of whether their current knowledge or reasoning state is complete. In non-interactive puzzle settings, the narrative is fixed and the underlying structure is hidden; once a model forms an early hypothesis under incomplete premises, it can propagate that error throughout the reasoning process, leading to unstable conclusions. To address this issue, we propose SABA, a reasoning framework that explicitly introduces self-awareness of missing premises before making the final decision. SABA formulates reasoning as a recursive process that alternates between structured state construction and obstacle resolution: it first applies Information Fusion to consolidate the narrative into a verifiable base state, and then uses Query-driven Structured Reasoning to identify and resolve missing or underspecified premises by turning them into queries and progressively completing the reasoning state through hypothesis construction and state refinement. Across multiple evaluation metrics, SABA achieves the best performance on all three difficulty splits of the non-interactive Detective Puzzle benchmark, and it also maintains leading results on multiple public benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出SABA框架，通过在推理前主动识别缺失前提来缓解逻辑惯性，提升非交互式谜题推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在推理任务中常因缺乏对自身知识完整性的感知，在早期形成错误假设后难以纠正，导致推理不稳定。
analysis.problem: 非交互式谜题中，模型在信息不完整时过早形成假设并传播错误，缺乏对缺失前提的自我感知能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出模型在固定叙事、隐藏结构的非交互式谜题中，早期假设错误会传播导致不稳定结论，即逻辑惯性现象。
analysis.method: 提出SABA框架，将推理建模为结构化状态构建与障碍解决的递归过程：先通过信息融合构建可验证基态，再通过查询驱动结构化推理识别缺失前提并逐步完善状态。
contributions: 提出SABA推理框架，显式引入对缺失前提的自我感知机制。
在非交互式侦探谜题基准的三个难度划分上均取得最佳性能，并在多个公开基准上保持领先。
analysis.experiments: 在非交互式侦探谜题基准的三个难度划分上均取得最佳性能，并在多个公开基准上保持领先结果。
limitations: 方法可能依赖特定谜题结构，泛化性需进一步验证。
递归推理过程可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SABA框架，通过在推理前主动识别缺失前提来缓解逻辑惯性，提升非交互式谜题推理性能。

papers.title: Onyx: Cost-Efficient Disk-Oblivious ANN Search
papers.abstract: Approximate nearest neighbor (ANN) search in AI systems increasingly handles sensitive data on third-party infrastructure. Trusted execution environments (TEEs) offer protection, but cost-efficient deployments must rely on external SSDs, which leaks user queries through disk access patterns to the host. Oblivious RAM (ORAM) can hide these access patterns but at a high cost; when paired with existing disk-based ANN search techniques, it makes poor use of SSD resources, yielding high latency and poor cost-efficiency. The core challenge for efficient oblivious ANN search over SSDs is balancing both bandwidth and access count. The state-of-the-art ORAM-ANN design minimizes access count at the ANN level and bandwidth at the ORAM level, each trading-off the other, leaving the combined system with both resources overutilized. We propose inverting this design, minimizing bandwidth consumption in the ANN layer and access count in the ORAM layer, since each component is better suited for its new role: ANN's inherent approximation allows for more bandwidth efficiency, while ORAM has no fundamental lower bounds on access count (as opposed to bandwidth). To this end, we propose a cost-efficient approach, Onyx, with two new co-designed components: Onyx-ANNS introduces a compact intermediate representation that proactively prunes the majority of bandwidth-intensive accesses without hurting recall, and Onyx-ORAM proposes a locality-aware shallow tree design that reduces access count while remaining compatible with bandwidth-efficient ORAM techniques. Compared to the state-of-the-art oblivious ANN search system, Onyx achieves $1.7-9.9\times$ lower cost and $2.3-12.3\times$ lower latency.

analysis.tldr: Onyx通过反转ANN和ORAM的设计目标，实现低成本、低延迟的磁盘不可知近似最近邻搜索。
analysis.research_motivation: 在第三方基础设施上处理敏感数据的ANN搜索需要保护隐私，但现有TEE方案依赖外部SSD时，磁盘访问模式会泄露查询信息；ORAM虽能隐藏访问模式，但与现有磁盘ANN结合时资源利用效率低，导致高延迟和低性价比。
analysis.problem: 如何设计高效的磁盘不可知ANN搜索系统，在平衡带宽和访问次数的同时降低成本并提升性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有ORAM-ANN设计分别在ANN层最小化访问次数、在ORAM层最小化带宽，但两者相互制约，导致整体资源过度利用。
analysis.method: 提出Onyx，包含两个协同组件：Onyx-ANNS使用紧凑中间表示主动剪枝带宽密集型访问而不影响召回率；Onyx-ORAM提出局部感知浅树设计减少访问次数，同时兼容带宽高效的ORAM技术。
contributions: 提出反转ANN和ORAM设计目标的新思路，使各组件发挥各自优势。
设计Onyx-ANNS和Onyx-ORAM两个协同组件，实现成本与延迟的显著降低。
analysis.experiments: 与最先进的 oblivious ANN 搜索系统相比，Onyx 实现了 1.7-9.9 倍的成本降低和 2.3-12.3 倍的延迟降低。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于SSD的TEE场景，通用性有待验证。
紧凑中间表示的设计可能对特定数据分布敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Onyx通过反转ANN和ORAM的设计目标，实现低成本、低延迟的磁盘不可知近似最近邻搜索。

papers.title: SpaCeFormer: Fast Proposal-Free Open-Vocabulary 3D Instance Segmentation
papers.abstract: Open-vocabulary 3D instance segmentation is a core capability for robotics and AR/VR, but prior methods trade one bottleneck for another: multi-stage 2D+3D pipelines aggregate foundation-model outputs at hundreds of seconds per scene, while pseudo-labeled end-to-end approaches rely on fragmented masks and external region proposals. We present SpaCeFormer, a proposal-free space-curve transformer that runs at 0.14 seconds per scene, 2-3 orders of magnitude faster than multi-stage 2D+3D pipelines. We pair it with SpaCeFormer-3M, the largest open-vocabulary 3D instance segmentation dataset (3.0M multi-view-consistent captions over 604K instances from 7.4K scenes) built through multi-view mask clustering and multi-view VLM captioning; it reaches 21x higher mask recall than prior single-view pipelines (54.3% vs 2.5% at IoU > 0.5). SpaCeFormer combines spatial window attention with Morton-curve serialization for spatially coherent features, and uses a RoPE-enhanced decoder to predict instance masks directly from learned queries without external proposals. On ScanNet200 we achieve 11.1 zero-shot mAP, a 2.8x improvement over the prior best proposal-free method; on ScanNet++ and Replica, we reach 22.9 and 24.1 mAP, surpassing all prior methods including those using multi-view 2D inputs.

analysis.tldr: 提出无提议的空间曲线Transformer，实现极速开放词汇3D实例分割，并构建最大规模数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有开放词汇3D实例分割方法要么依赖多阶段2D+3D流水线导致速度极慢（每场景数百秒），要么使用伪标签端到端方法但依赖碎片化掩码和外部区域提议，存在性能瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何实现快速、无提议的开放词汇3D实例分割，同时解决训练数据不足和掩码召回率低的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多阶段流水线速度慢，单视图伪标签掩码召回率低（IoU>0.5时仅2.5%），而多视图聚类可显著提升召回率（54.3%）。
analysis.method: 提出SpaCeFormer，一种无提议的空间曲线Transformer：采用Morton曲线序列化与空间窗口注意力提取空间连贯特征，使用RoPE增强解码器从学习查询直接预测实例掩码；同时构建SpaCeFormer-3M数据集，通过多视图掩码聚类和多视图VLM标注生成大规模高质量标注。
contributions: 提出SpaCeFormer，首个无提议的开放词汇3D实例分割方法，速度比多阶段流水线快2-3个数量级（0.14秒/场景）。
构建SpaCeFormer-3M数据集，包含3.0M多视图一致标注、604K实例、7.4K场景，掩码召回率比单视图方法高21倍。
在ScanNet200上零样本mAP达11.1，比之前最佳无提议方法提升2.8倍；在ScanNet++和Replica上超越所有先前方法。
analysis.experiments: 在ScanNet200、ScanNet++和Replica数据集上评估，报告了零样本mAP和速度指标，并与多种基线方法比较。
limitations: 可能依赖多视图输入，单视图场景下性能未知。
数据集构建复杂，需要多视图掩码聚类和VLM标注，可能引入噪声。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无提议的空间曲线Transformer，实现极速开放词汇3D实例分割，并构建最大规模数据集。

papers.title: MLG-Stereo: ViT Based Stereo Matching with Multi-Stage Local-Global Enhancement
papers.abstract: With the development of deep learning, ViT-based stereo matching methods have made significant progress due to their remarkable robustness and zero-shot ability. However, due to the limitations of ViTs in handling resolution sensitivity and their relative neglect of local information, the ability of ViT-based methods to predict details and handle arbitrary-resolution images is still weaker than that of CNN-based methods. To address these shortcomings, we propose MLG-Stereo, a systematic pipeline-level design that extends global modeling beyond the encoder stage. First, we propose a Multi-Granularity Feature Network to effectively balance global context and local geometric information, enabling comprehensive feature extraction from images of arbitrary resolution and bridging the gap between training and inference scales. Then, a Local-Global Cost Volume is constructed to capture both locally-correlated and global-aware matching information. Finally, a Local-Global Guided Recurrent Unit is introduced to iteratively optimize the disparity locally under the guidance of global information. Extensive experiments are conducted on multiple benchmark datasets, demonstrating that our MLG-Stereo exhibits highly competitive performance on the Middlebury and KITTI-2015 benchmarks compared to contemporaneous leading methods, and achieves outstanding results in the KITTI-2012 dataset.

analysis.tldr: 提出MLG-Stereo，通过多粒度特征网络、局部-全局代价体和局部-全局引导循环单元，增强ViT立体匹配的局部细节和任意分辨率处理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: ViT立体匹配方法在鲁棒性和零样本能力上表现优异，但受限于分辨率敏感性和对局部信息的忽视，在细节预测和任意分辨率图像处理上弱于CNN方法。
analysis.problem: 如何提升ViT立体匹配方法在细节预测和任意分辨率图像上的性能，同时保持全局建模优势。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: ViT方法在立体匹配中全局能力强但局部细节不足，且对分辨率变化敏感，导致训练与推理尺度存在差距。
analysis.method: 提出MLG-Stereo，包含多粒度特征网络（平衡全局与局部特征）、局部-全局代价体（捕获局部相关和全局感知匹配信息）和局部-全局引导循环单元（在全局信息指导下迭代优化局部视差）。
contributions: 提出多粒度特征网络，实现任意分辨率图像的全面特征提取，弥合训练与推理尺度差距。
设计局部-全局代价体和局部-全局引导循环单元，增强局部细节和全局信息的协同优化。
analysis.experiments: 在Middlebury、KITTI-2015和KITTI-2012基准上评估，与同期领先方法相比，在Middlebury和KITTI-2015上具有高度竞争力，在KITTI-2012上取得突出结果。
limitations: 可能未在更多样化或极端分辨率场景下验证。
计算开销可能较高，未在摘要中提及效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MLG-Stereo，通过多粒度特征网络、局部-全局代价体和局部-全局引导循环单元，增强ViT立体匹配的局部细节和任意分辨率处理能力。

papers.title: Self-supervised pretraining for an iterative image size agnostic vision transformer
papers.abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) dominate self-supervised learning (SSL). While they have proven highly effective for large-scale pretraining, they are computationally inefficient and scale poorly with image size. Consequently, foundational models like DINO are constrained to low-resolution processing. A recent foveal-inspired transformer achieves resolution agnosticism by iteratively processing a fixed-size context of multi-zoom patches. This model demonstrated promising results via supervised learning, utilizing a sequential, recurrent-like process without backpropagation through time. To unlock its potential as a foundational backbone, we introduce a novel sequential-to-global SSL framework based on DINO's self-distillation objective. Supported by an efficient integral-image patch extraction method, our approach enables large-scale pretraining for image-size agnostic vision encoders. We achieve competitive performance on ImageNet-1K and downstream classification tasks, maintaining a constant computational budget regardless of input resolution.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于DINO自蒸馏的序列到全局自监督学习框架，实现图像尺寸无关的视觉Transformer预训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有ViT在自监督预训练中计算效率低且随图像尺寸扩展性差，导致基础模型（如DINO）只能处理低分辨率图像。
analysis.problem: 如何高效预训练一个图像尺寸无关的视觉Transformer，使其在任意输入分辨率下保持恒定计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于DINO的自蒸馏目标，提出序列到全局自监督学习框架，结合高效积分图像补丁提取方法，支持大规模预训练。
contributions: 提出一种序列到全局自监督学习框架，用于图像尺寸无关的视觉编码器预训练。
引入高效积分图像补丁提取方法，支持任意分辨率下的恒定计算预算。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet-1K和下游分类任务上取得有竞争力的性能，且计算预算不随输入分辨率变化。
limitations: 可能仅在分类任务上验证，未涉及更复杂的视觉任务（如检测、分割）。
与全分辨率ViT相比，性能可能仍有差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于DINO自蒸馏的序列到全局自监督学习框架，实现图像尺寸无关的视觉Transformer预训练。

papers.title: SafeRedirect: Defeating Internal Safety Collapse via Task-Completion Redirection in Frontier LLMs
papers.abstract: Internal Safety Collapse (ISC) is a failure mode in which frontier LLMs, when executing legitimate professional tasks whose correct completion structurally requires harmful content, spontaneously generate that content with safety failure rates exceeding 95%. Existing input-level defenses achieve a 100% failure rate against ISC, and standard system prompt defenses provide only partial mitigation. We propose SafeRedirect, a system-level override that defeats ISC by redirecting the model's task-completion drive rather than suppressing it. SafeRedirect grants explicit permission to fail the task, prescribes a deterministic hard-stop output, and instructs the model to preserve harmful placeholders unresolved. Evaluated on seven frontier LLMs across three AI/ML-related ISC task types in the single-turn setting, SafeRedirect reduces average unsafe generation rates from 71.2% to 8.0%, compared to 55.0% for the strongest viable baseline. Multi-model ablation reveals that failure permission and condition specificity are universally critical, while the importance of other components varies across models. Cross-attack evaluation confirms state-of-the-art defense against ISC with generalization performance at least on par with the baseline on other attack families. Code is available at https://github.com/fzjcdt/SafeRedirect.

analysis.tldr: SafeRedirect通过重定向任务完成驱动力而非压制它，有效防御前沿LLM的内部安全崩溃（ISC）问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 前沿LLM在执行合法专业任务时，若任务正确完成需要有害内容，会自发生成有害内容，导致内部安全崩溃（ISC）失败率超过95%，现有输入级防御完全失效，系统提示防御仅部分缓解，亟需更有效的防御方法。
analysis.problem: 解决前沿LLM在需要生成有害内容才能正确完成合法任务时的内部安全崩溃（ISC）问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到ISC是一种失败模式，其中LLM在合法专业任务中自发生成有害内容，安全失败率超过95%；现有输入级防御对此完全无效，系统提示防御仅部分缓解。
analysis.method: SafeRedirect是一种系统级覆盖方法，通过重定向模型的任务完成驱动力而非压制它来防御ISC：授予显式的任务失败许可，规定确定性的硬停止输出，并指示模型保留有害占位符未解决。
contributions: 提出SafeRedirect方法，有效防御前沿LLM的内部安全崩溃（ISC）问题。
在七个前沿LLM和三种AI/ML相关ISC任务类型上，将平均不安全生成率从71.2%降至8.0%，优于最强基线（55.0%）。
通过多模型消融实验揭示失败许可和条件特异性是普遍关键组件，其他组件重要性因模型而异。
跨攻击评估证实SafeRedirect对ISC具有最先进的防御性能，且在其他攻击家族上的泛化性能至少与基线持平。
analysis.experiments: 在七个前沿LLM上，针对三种AI/ML相关的ISC任务类型进行单轮设置评估，平均不安全生成率从71.2%降至8.0%（最强基线为55.0%）；进行了多模型消融实验和跨攻击评估。
limitations: 仅评估了单轮设置，多轮对话或更复杂场景下的效果未知。
方法依赖于显式任务失败许可和硬停止输出，可能不适用于所有任务类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SafeRedirect通过重定向任务完成驱动力而非压制它，有效防御前沿LLM的内部安全崩溃（ISC）问题。

papers.title: CyberCertBench: Evaluating LLMs in Cybersecurity Certification Knowledge
papers.abstract: The rapid evolution and use of Large Language Models (LLMs) in professional workflows require an evaluation of their domain-specific knowledge against industry standards. We introduceCyberCertBench, a new suite of Multiple Choice Question Answering (MCQA) benchmarks derived from industry recognized certifications. CyberCertBench evaluates LLM domain knowledgeagainst the professional standards of Information Technology cybersecurity and more specializedareas such as Operational Technology and related cybersecurity standards. Concurrently, we propose and validate a novel Proposer-Verifier framework, a methodology to generate interpretable,natural language explanations for model performance. Our evaluation shows that frontier modelsachieve human expert level in general networking and IT security knowledge. However, theiraccuracy declines in questions that require vendor-specific nuances or knowledge in formalstandards, like, e.g., IEC 62443. Analysis of model scaling trend and release date demonstratesremarkable gains in parameter efficiency, while recent larger models show diminishing returns.Code and evaluation scripts are available at: https://github.com/GKeppler/CyberCertBench.

analysis.tldr: 提出网络安全认证基准CyberCertBench，评估LLM在IT和OT安全领域的专业知识，并引入Proposer-Verifier框架生成可解释性说明。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在专业工作流中应用日益广泛，但缺乏针对行业标准认证知识的系统评估，现有基准无法覆盖OT等专业领域。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个覆盖IT和OT网络安全认证知识的评估基准，并解释模型在专业问题上的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 前沿模型在通用网络和IT安全知识上达到人类专家水平，但在供应商特定细节或正式标准（如IEC 62443）问题上准确率下降；模型缩放趋势显示参数效率显著提升，但近期大模型收益递减。
analysis.method: 提出CyberCertBench基准（基于行业认证的MCQA数据集）和Proposer-Verifier框架（生成可解释的自然语言解释）。
contributions: 构建了覆盖IT和OT网络安全认证知识的MCQA基准CyberCertBench
提出Proposer-Verifier框架用于生成模型性能的可解释性说明
analysis.experiments: 在多个前沿模型上评估，显示在通用知识上达到人类专家水平，但在专业标准知识上表现下降；分析了模型缩放趋势和参数效率。
limitations: 仅基于MCQA格式，可能无法全面评估实际应用能力
可解释性框架的验证可能有限
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出网络安全认证基准CyberCertBench，评估LLM在IT和OT安全领域的专业知识，并引入Proposer-Verifier框架生成可解释性说明。

papers.title: AI models of unstable flow exhibit hallucination
papers.abstract: We report the first systematic evidence of hallucination in AI models of fluid dynamics, demonstrated in the canonical problem of hydrodynamically unstable transport known as viscous fingering. AI-based modeling of flow with instabilities remains challenging because rapidly evolving, multiscale fingering patterns are difficult to resolve accurately. We identify solutions that appear visually realistic yet are physically implausible, analogous to hallucinations in large language models. These hallucinations manifest as spurious fluid interfaces and reverse diffusion that violate conservation laws. We show that their origin lies in the spectral bias of AI models, which becomes dominant at high flow rates and viscosity contrasts. Guided by this insight, we introduce DeepFingers, a new framework for AI-driven fluid dynamics that enforces balanced learning across the full spectrum of spatial modes by combining the Fourier Neural Operator with a Deep Operator Network to predict the spatiotemporal evolution of viscous fingers. By conditioning on both time and viscosity contrast, DeepFingers learns mappings between successive concentration fields across regimes. The framework accurately captures tip splitting, finger merging, and channel formation while preserving global metrics of mixing. The results open a new research direction to investigate fundamental limitations in AI models of physical systems.

analysis.tldr: 首次系统证明流体动力学AI模型存在幻觉现象，并提出DeepFingers框架通过平衡频谱学习来缓解。
analysis.research_motivation: 不稳定流动的AI建模因多尺度指进模式快速演化而难以精确解析，现有模型在高流速和高粘度对比下出现违反物理规律的幻觉。
analysis.problem: AI模型在模拟流体动力学不稳定流动时产生物理上不可信的幻觉（如虚假界面、反向扩散），需理解其根源并提出修正方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 幻觉源于AI模型的频谱偏差，在高流速和高粘度对比下变得主导，导致模型生成视觉真实但物理违法的结果。
analysis.method: DeepFingers框架：结合傅里叶神经算子与深度算子网络，对时间和粘度对比进行条件化，实现全空间模态的平衡学习，预测粘性指进的时空演化。
contributions: 首次系统报告流体动力学AI模型中的幻觉现象，并揭示其与频谱偏差的关联。
提出DeepFingers框架，通过平衡频谱学习准确捕捉指进动力学，同时保持混合全局指标。
analysis.experiments: 在粘性指进经典问题中验证，准确捕捉尖端分裂、指进合并和通道形成，并保持混合度量。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能仅针对粘性指进问题验证，泛化到其他不稳定流动需进一步研究。
频谱偏差的缓解策略可能增加计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次系统证明流体动力学AI模型存在幻觉现象，并提出DeepFingers框架通过平衡频谱学习来缓解。

papers.title: FastAT Benchmark: A Comprehensive Framework for Fair Evaluation of Fast Adversarial Training Methods
papers.abstract: Fast Adversarial Training (FastAT) seeks to achieve adversarial robustness at a fraction of the computational cost incurred by standard multi-step methods such as PGD-AT. Although numerous FastAT techniques have been proposed in recent years, fair comparison among them remains elusive. Existing benchmarks and public leaderboards typically permit diverse model architectures, varying training configurations, and external data sources, making it unclear whether reported improvements reflect genuine algorithmic advances or merely more favorable experimental conditions. To address this problem, we introduce the FastAT Benchmark, a controlled evaluation framework built on three core design principles: unified architecture requirements, standardized training settings, and strict prohibition of external or synthetic data. The benchmark implements over twenty representative FastAT methods within a single codebase, enabling direct and reproducible comparison. Each method is assessed through a dual-metric evaluation framework that measures both adversarial robustness (accuracy under PGD, AutoAttack, and CR Attack) and computational cost (GPU training time and peak memory footprint). Comprehensive experiments on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and Tiny-ImageNet provide reliable baseline measurements and reveal that well-designed single-step methods can match or surpass PGD-AT robustness at substantially lower cost, while no single method dominates across all evaluation dimensions. The complete benchmark, including source code, configuration files, and experimental results, is publicly available to support transparent and fair evaluation of future FastAT research.

analysis.tldr: 提出FastAT Benchmark，通过统一架构、标准化设置和禁止外部数据，实现快速对抗训练方法的公平比较。
analysis.research_motivation: 快速对抗训练方法众多，但现有基准允许不同架构和配置，导致公平比较困难，无法区分算法进步与实验条件优势。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个受控的、统一的评估框架来公平比较快速对抗训练方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建基于统一架构要求、标准化训练设置和禁止外部数据的基准，集成20多种方法，采用双指标评估（鲁棒性和计算成本）。
contributions: 提出FastAT Benchmark，一个受控的公平评估框架。
在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和Tiny-ImageNet上提供可靠基线，揭示单步方法可在低成本下匹配PGD-AT鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和Tiny-ImageNet上进行综合实验，评估鲁棒性和计算成本。
limitations: 可能仅覆盖部分FastAT方法，未包含最新技术。
基准的通用性可能受限于特定数据集和架构。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FastAT Benchmark，通过统一架构、标准化设置和禁止外部数据，实现快速对抗训练方法的公平比较。

papers.title: LaplacianFormer:Rethinking Linear Attention with Laplacian Kernel
papers.abstract: The quadratic complexity of softmax attention presents a major obstacle for scaling Transformers to high-resolution vision tasks. Existing linear attention variants often replace the softmax with Gaussian kernels to reduce complexity, but such approximations lack theoretical grounding and tend to oversuppress mid-range token interactions. We propose LaplacianFormer, a Transformer variant that employs a Laplacian kernel as a principled alternative to softmax, motivated by empirical observations and theoretical analysis. To address expressiveness degradation under low-rank approximations, we introduce a provably injective feature map that retains fine-grained token information. For efficient computation, we adopt a Nyström approximation of the kernel matrix and solve the resulting system using Newton--Schulz iteration, avoiding costly matrix inversion and SVD. We further develop custom CUDA implementations for both the kernel and solver, enabling high-throughput forward and backward passes suitable for edge deployment. Experiments on ImageNet show that LaplacianFormer achieves strong performance-efficiency trade-offs while improving attention expressiveness.

analysis.tldr: 提出用拉普拉斯核替代softmax的线性注意力机制，结合可证明单射的特征映射和Nyström近似，实现高效且表达力强的Transformer。
analysis.research_motivation: Softmax注意力的二次复杂度限制了Transformer在高分辨率视觉任务中的应用，现有线性注意力变体使用高斯核近似缺乏理论依据且过度抑制中程交互。
analysis.problem: 设计一种既有理论依据又保持表达力的线性注意力机制，以替代softmax注意力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高斯核近似会过度抑制中程token交互，导致表达力下降。
analysis.method: 使用拉普拉斯核作为softmax的替代，设计可证明单射的特征映射保留细粒度信息，采用Nyström近似核矩阵并用Newton-Schulz迭代求解，开发自定义CUDA实现。
contributions: 提出拉普拉斯核作为softmax的理论替代，并给出经验与理论动机。
设计可证明单射的特征映射，缓解低秩近似下的表达力退化。
实现高效的Nyström近似与Newton-Schulz求解器，并开发CUDA内核支持边缘部署。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet上实验，表明LaplacianFormer在性能-效率权衡上表现优异，同时提升了注意力表达力。
limitations: 摘要未提供与其他线性注意力方法的详细对比。
可能仅在视觉任务上验证，未涉及语言或跨模态场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出用拉普拉斯核替代softmax的线性注意力机制，结合可证明单射的特征映射和Nyström近似，实现高效且表达力强的Transformer。

papers.title: Mitigating Hallucinations in Large Vision-Language Models without Performance Degradation
papers.abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) exhibit powerful generative capabilities but frequently produce hallucinations that compromise output reliability. Fine-tuning on annotated data devoid of hallucinations offers the most direct solution, while its high computational cost motivates recent representation-based methods, which focus on mitigating hallucinatory components within hidden representations. Though efficient, we empirically observe that these methods degrade general generation capacity due to incomplete extraction of hallucination components and non-selective parameter updates. To address these limitations, we propose MPD, a dual-stage framework for mitigating hallucinations without performance degradation. Specifically, our MPD relies on two essential factors: (1) semantic-aware component disentanglement to extract pure hallucination components, and (2) interpretable parameter updates that selectively modify parameters most relevant to hallucination. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MPD achieves state-of-the-art performance, reducing hallucinations by 23.4\% while maintaining 97.4\% of general generative capability as evaluated on LLaVA-Bench and MME, with no additional computational cost.

analysis.tldr: 提出MPD框架，在不降低通用生成能力的前提下，通过语义感知解耦和可解释参数更新减少LVLM幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: LVLM常产生幻觉，影响输出可靠性；现有基于表征的方法虽高效但会因幻觉成分提取不完整和参数更新非选择性而损害通用生成能力。
analysis.problem: 如何在减少LVLM幻觉的同时不降低其通用生成性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有表征方法因幻觉成分提取不完整和参数更新非选择性，导致通用生成能力下降。
analysis.method: 双阶段框架MPD：1）语义感知组件解耦提取纯幻觉成分；2）可解释参数更新，仅修改与幻觉最相关的参数。
contributions: 提出MPD框架，实现幻觉减少与通用能力保持的平衡
在LLaVA-Bench和MME上降低幻觉23.4%，同时保持97.4%的通用生成能力，且无额外计算成本
analysis.experiments: 在LLaVA-Bench和MME上评估，MPD降低幻觉23.4%，保持97.4%通用生成能力。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构或数据集
未探讨在更复杂场景下的泛化性
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MPD框架，在不降低通用生成能力的前提下，通过语义感知解耦和可解释参数更新减少LVLM幻觉。

papers.title: Benefits of Low-Cost Bio-Inspiration in the Age of Overparametrization
papers.abstract: While Central Pattern Generators (CPGs) and Multi-Layer Perceptrons (MLP) are widely used paradigms in robot control, few systematic studies have been performed on the relative merits of large parameter spaces. In contexts where input and output spaces are small and performance is bounded, having more parameters to optimize may actively hinder the learning process instead of empowering it. To empirically measure this, we submit a given robot morphology, with limited proprioceptive capabilities, to controller optimization under two bio-inspired paradigms (CPGs and MLPs) with evolutionary- and reinforcement- trainer protocols. By varying parameter spaces across multiple reward functions, we observe that shallow MLPs and densely connected CPGs result in better performance when compared to deeper MLPs or Actor-Critic architectures. To account for the relationship between said performance and the number of parameters, we introduce a Parameter Impact metric which demonstrates that the additional parameters required by the reinforcement technique do not translate into better performance, thus favouring evolutionary strategies.

analysis.tldr: 在参数空间较小的机器人控制任务中，浅层MLP和密集CPG优于深层网络，进化策略比强化学习更有效。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器人控制中广泛使用CPG和MLP，但缺乏对参数规模与性能关系的系统研究，尤其是在输入输出空间小且性能有上限的场景下。
analysis.problem: 研究在参数空间较小的机器人控制任务中，过度参数化是否反而会阻碍学习，并比较不同生物启发范式（CPG与MLP）和训练协议（进化与强化）的优劣。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到浅层MLP和密集连接的CPG在性能上优于深层MLP或Actor-Critic架构，且强化学习所需的额外参数并未带来性能提升。
analysis.method: 对固定机器人形态（有限本体感觉）进行控制器优化，比较CPG和MLP两种生物启发范式，使用进化策略和强化学习两种训练协议，并通过参数影响指标量化参数与性能的关系。
contributions: 系统比较了CPG和MLP在参数空间较小时的性能差异
提出了参数影响指标，证明强化学习中的额外参数未转化为性能提升
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对特定机器人形态和有限本体感觉，泛化性未知
未涉及更复杂的输入输出空间或更高维任务
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在参数空间较小的机器人控制任务中，浅层MLP和密集CPG优于深层网络，进化策略比强化学习更有效。

papers.title: Building a Precise Video Language with Human-AI Oversight
papers.abstract: Video-language models (VLMs) learn to reason about the dynamic visual world through natural language. We introduce a suite of open datasets, benchmarks, and recipes for scalable oversight that enable precise video captioning. First, we define a structured specification for describing subjects, scenes, motion, spatial, and camera dynamics, grounded by hundreds of carefully defined visual primitives developed with professional video creators such as filmmakers. Next, to curate high-quality captions, we introduce CHAI (Critique-based Human-AI Oversight), a framework where trained experts critique and revise model-generated pre-captions into improved post-captions. This division of labor improves annotation accuracy and efficiency by offloading text generation to models, allowing humans to better focus on verification. Additionally, these critiques and preferences between pre- and post-captions provide rich supervision for improving open-source models (Qwen3-VL) on caption generation, reward modeling, and critique generation through SFT, DPO, and inference-time scaling. Our ablations show that critique quality in precision, recall, and constructiveness, ensured by our oversight framework, directly governs downstream performance. With modest expert supervision, the resulting model outperforms closed-source models such as Gemini-3.1-Pro. Finally, we apply our approach to re-caption large-scale professional videos (e.g., films, commercials, games) and fine-tune video generation models such as Wan to better follow detailed prompts of up to 400 words, achieving finer control over cinematography including camera motion, angle, lens, focus, point of view, and framing. Our results show that precise specification and human-AI oversight are key to professional-level video understanding and generation. Data and code are available on our project page: https://linzhiqiu.github.io/papers/chai/

analysis.tldr: 提出CHAI框架，通过人类-AI协作的批评与修订机制，实现精确视频字幕生成，并提升视频生成模型的细粒度控制能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频语言模型（VLM）在精确描述视频动态世界方面存在不足，缺乏结构化规范和高质量标注数据，导致生成的字幕不够精确，难以满足专业视频创作需求。
analysis.problem: 如何通过人类-AI协作的监督机制，构建精确的视频语言描述，并提升视频生成模型对细粒度摄影元素的控制能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CHAI（Critique-based Human-AI Oversight）框架：先定义结构化规范（包括主体、场景、运动、空间和相机动态的视觉基元），然后由训练有素的专家批评和修订模型生成的预字幕，形成改进的后字幕；利用预/后字幕之间的批评和偏好，通过SFT、DPO和推理时缩放来改进开源模型（Qwen3-VL）的字幕生成、奖励建模和批评生成能力。
contributions: 定义了一套基于数百个视觉基元的结构化视频描述规范，涵盖主体、场景、运动、空间和相机动态。
提出CHAI框架，通过人类-AI协作的批评与修订机制，提高标注准确性和效率。
利用批评和偏好数据，通过SFT、DPO和推理时缩放改进开源模型，使其在字幕生成上超越闭源模型（如Gemini-3.1-Pro）。
将方法应用于大规模专业视频重字幕，并微调视频生成模型（如Wan），实现对长达400词提示的细粒度摄影控制。
analysis.experiments: 在专业视频数据集上进行了消融实验，表明批评质量（精确性、召回率、建设性）直接决定下游性能；最终模型在字幕生成上优于Gemini-3.1-Pro；视频生成模型Wan经微调后能更好地遵循详细提示，实现对相机运动、角度、镜头、焦距、视角和构图等摄影元素的精细控制。
limitations: 依赖训练有素的专家进行批评和修订，可能难以大规模扩展。
结构化规范可能无法覆盖所有视频场景的多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CHAI框架，通过人类-AI协作的批评与修订机制，实现精确视频字幕生成，并提升视频生成模型的细粒度控制能力。

papers.title: Object Referring-Guided Scanpath Prediction with Perception-Enhanced Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Object Referring-guided Scanpath Prediction (ORSP) aims to predict the human attention scanpath when they search for a specific target object in a visual scene according to a linguistic description describing the object. Multimodal information fusion is a key point of ORSP. Therefore, we propose a novel model, ScanVLA, to first exploit a Vision-Language Model (VLM) to extract and fuse inherently aligned visual and linguistic feature representations from the input image and referring expression. Next, to enhance the ScanVLA's perception of fine-grained positional information, we not only propose a novel History Enhanced Scanpath Decoder (HESD) that directly takes historical fixations' position information as input to help predict a more reasonable position for the current fixation, but also adopt a frozen Segmentation LoRA as an auxiliary component to help localize the referred object more precisely, which improves the scanpath prediction task without incurring additional large computational and time costs. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that ScanVLA can significantly outperform existing scanpath prediction methods under object referring.

analysis.tldr: 提出 ScanVLA，利用 VLM 和分割 LoRA 增强目标指代引导的扫描路径预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扫描路径预测方法在多模态信息融合和细粒度位置感知方面不足，难以准确预测根据语言描述搜索特定目标时的注意力轨迹。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合视觉和语言特征，并增强模型对目标物体位置的精细感知，以提升目标指代引导的扫描路径预测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 ScanVLA 模型，首先利用 VLM 提取对齐的视觉-语言特征；然后设计历史增强扫描路径解码器（HESD）直接利用历史注视位置信息；并采用冻结的分割 LoRA 辅助精确定位指代目标。
contributions: 首次将 VLM 用于目标指代引导的扫描路径预测，实现固有对齐的多模态特征提取。
提出历史增强扫描路径解码器（HESD）和分割 LoRA 辅助组件，在不增加大量计算成本下提升位置感知能力。
analysis.experiments: 在目标指代扫描路径预测任务上，ScanVLA 显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖 VLM 的预训练质量，泛化性需进一步验证。
分割 LoRA 冻结可能限制对特定场景的适应性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 ScanVLA，利用 VLM 和分割 LoRA 增强目标指代引导的扫描路径预测。

papers.title: ConeSep: Cone-based Robust Noise-Unlearning Compositional Network for Composed Image Retrieval
papers.abstract: The Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) task provides a flexible retrieval paradigm via a reference image and modification text, but it heavily relies on expensive and error-prone triplet annotations. This paper systematically investigates the Noisy Triplet Correspondence (NTC) problem introduced by annotations. We find that NTC noise, particularly ``hard noise'' (i.e., the reference and target images are highly similar but the modification text is incorrect), poses a unique challenge to existing Noise Correspondence Learning (NCL) methods because it breaks the traditional ``small loss hypothesis''. We identify and elucidate three key, yet overlooked, challenges in the NTC task, namely (C1) Modality Suppression, (C2) Negative Anchor Deficiency, and (C3) Unlearning Backlash. To address these challenges, we propose a Cone-based robuSt noisE-unlearning comPositional network (ConeSep). Specifically, we first propose Geometric Fidelity Quantization, theoretically establishing and practically estimating a noise boundary to precisely locate noisy correspondence. Next, we introduce Negative Boundary Learning, which learns a ``diagonal negative combination'' for each query as its explicit semantic opposite-anchor in the embedding space. Finally, we design Boundary-based Targeted Unlearning, which models the noisy correction process as an optimal transport problem, elegantly avoiding Unlearning Backlash. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets (FashionIQ and CIRR) demonstrate that ConeSep significantly outperforms current state-of-the-art methods, which fully demonstrates the effectiveness and robustness of our method.

analysis.tldr: 提出ConeSep方法，通过几何保真度量化、负边界学习和基于边界的定向遗忘，解决组合图像检索中的噪声三元组对应问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 组合图像检索依赖昂贵且易出错的三元组标注，现有噪声对应学习方法难以处理参考图像与目标图像高度相似但修改文本错误的“硬噪声”，且存在模态抑制、负锚点缺失和遗忘反冲等挑战。
analysis.problem: 解决组合图像检索中由标注错误引入的噪声三元组对应问题，特别是硬噪声场景下的鲁棒学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现NTC噪声中硬噪声破坏了传统“小损失假设”，并识别出三个关键挑战：模态抑制、负锚点缺失和遗忘反冲。
analysis.method: 提出ConeSep方法，包括几何保真度量化（估计噪声边界）、负边界学习（学习对角负组合作为显式语义反锚点）和基于边界的定向遗忘（将噪声纠正建模为最优传输问题）。
contributions: 系统研究了组合图像检索中的噪声三元组对应问题，并识别出三个关键挑战。
提出ConeSep方法，通过几何保真度量化、负边界学习和定向遗忘有效处理噪声。
在FashionIQ和CIRR基准上显著超越现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在FashionIQ和CIRR数据集上进行实验，结果表明ConeSep显著优于当前最先进方法。
limitations: 可能对噪声边界估计的精度敏感。
方法复杂度较高，可能影响训练效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ConeSep方法，通过几何保真度量化、负边界学习和基于边界的定向遗忘，解决组合图像检索中的噪声三元组对应问题。

papers.title: SignDATA: Data Pipeline for Sign Language Translation
papers.abstract: Sign-language datasets are difficult to preprocess consistently because they vary in annotation schema, clip timing, signer framing, and privacy constraints. Existing work usually reports downstream models, while the preprocessing pipeline that converts raw video into training-ready pose or video artifacts remains fragmented, backend-specific, and weakly documented. We present SignDATA, a config-driven preprocessing toolkit that standardizes heterogeneous sign-language corpora into comparable outputs for learning. The system supports two end-to-end recipes: a pose recipe that performs acquisition, manifesting, person localization, clipping, cropping, landmark extraction, normalization, and WebDataset export, and a video recipe that replaces pose extraction with signer-cropped video packaging. SignDATA exposes interchangeable MediaPipe and MMPose backends behind a common interface, typed job schemas, experiment-level overrides, and per-stage checkpointing with config- and manifest-aware hashes. We validate the toolkit through a research-oriented evaluation design centered on backend comparison, preprocessing ablations, and privacy-aware video generation on datasets. Our contribution is a reproducible preprocessing layer for sign-language research that makes extractor choice, normalization policy, and privacy tradeoffs explicit, configurable, and empirically comparable.Code is available at https://github.com/balaboom123/signdata-slt.

analysis.tldr: SignDATA 是一个可配置的手语翻译数据预处理工具包，标准化异构手语语料库的处理流程。
analysis.research_motivation: 手语数据集在标注模式、剪辑时间、手语者框选和隐私约束方面差异大，现有预处理流程碎片化、后端特定且文档不足，导致下游模型难以公平比较。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个标准化、可配置且可复现的手语数据预处理工具，以统一异构手语语料库的处理输出。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 SignDATA，一个基于配置驱动的预处理工具包，支持姿态和视频两种处理流程，集成可互换的后端（MediaPipe、MMPose），提供类型化作业模式、实验级覆盖、阶段级检查点等功能。
contributions: 提出一个可配置、可复现的手语数据预处理工具包 SignDATA，标准化异构语料库的处理。
通过后端比较、预处理消融和隐私感知视频生成实验验证工具包的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅支持特定姿态提取后端，扩展性有限。
隐私感知视频生成的效果未在摘要中量化评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SignDATA 是一个可配置的手语翻译数据预处理工具包，标准化异构手语语料库的处理流程。

papers.title: Hallucination Early Detection in Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Text-to-Image generation has seen significant advancements in output realism with the advent of diffusion models. However, diffusion models encounter difficulties when tasked with generating multiple objects, frequently resulting in hallucinations where certain entities are omitted. While existing solutions typically focus on optimizing latent representations within diffusion models, the relevance of the initial generation seed is typically underestimated. While using various seeds in multiple iterations can improve results, this method also significantly increases time and energy costs. To address this challenge, we introduce HEaD+ (Hallucination Early Detection +), a novel approach designed to identify incorrect generations early in the diffusion process. The HEaD+ framework integrates cross-attention maps and textual information with a novel input, the Predicted Final Image. The objective is to assess whether to proceed with the current generation or restart it with a different seed, thereby exploring multiple-generation seeds while conserving time. HEaD+ is trained on the newly created InsideGen dataset of 45,000 generated images, each containing prompts with up to seven objects. Our findings demonstrate a 6-8% increase in the likelihood of achieving a complete generation (i.e., an image accurately representing all specified subjects) with four objects when applying HEaD+ alongside existing models. Additionally, HEaD+ reduces generation times by up to 32% when aiming for a complete image, enhancing the efficiency of generating complete and accurate object representations relative to leading models. Moreover, we propose an integrated localization module that predicts object centroid positions and verifies pairwise spatial relations (if requested by the users) at an intermediate timestep, gating generation together with object presence to further improve relation-consistent outcomes.

analysis.tldr: 提出HEaD+框架，通过早期检测扩散模型中的幻觉（对象遗漏），结合交叉注意力图和预测最终图像，在生成过程中决定是否重启，从而提升完整生成概率并降低时间成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型在生成多对象图像时容易出现对象遗漏的幻觉，现有方法通常优化潜在表示但忽略初始种子影响，而多次尝试不同种子虽能改善结果但显著增加时间和能耗。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著增加计算成本的前提下，早期检测并纠正扩散模型生成过程中的对象遗漏（幻觉）问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散模型在生成多对象时频繁出现对象遗漏，初始种子的选择对生成质量有重要影响，但现有方法未充分利用种子信息。
analysis.method: HEaD+框架：在扩散过程早期，利用交叉注意力图、文本信息和预测最终图像作为输入，训练一个分类器判断当前生成是否完整，若不完整则用不同种子重启；同时集成定位模块预测对象质心并验证空间关系。
contributions: 提出HEaD+，一种早期检测扩散模型幻觉的方法，通过预测最终图像和交叉注意力图实现高效决策。
构建InsideGen数据集，包含45,000张生成图像，每个提示最多7个对象。
实验表明HEaD+在四对象场景下将完整生成概率提升6-8%，同时生成时间减少高达32%。
analysis.experiments: 在InsideGen数据集上评估，与现有模型对比，报告了完整生成概率提升和时间减少的量化结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于多对象生成场景，单对象或复杂场景效果未知。
依赖预测最终图像的质量，早期预测可能不准确。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HEaD+框架，通过早期检测扩散模型中的幻觉（对象遗漏），结合交叉注意力图和预测最终图像，在生成过程中决定是否重启，从而提升完整生成概率并降低时间成本。

papers.title: X-PCR: A Benchmark for Cross-modality Progressive Clinical Reasoning in Ophthalmic Diagnosis
papers.abstract: Despite significant progress in Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs), their clinical reasoning capacity for multi-modal diagnosis remains largely unexamined. Current benchmarks, mostly single-modality data, can't evaluate progressive reasoning and cross-modal integration essential for clinical practice. We introduce the Cross-Modality Progressive Clinical Reasoning (X-PCR) benchmark, the first comprehensive evaluation of MLLMs through a complete ophthalmology diagnostic workflow, with two reasoning tasks: 1) a six-stage progressive reasoning chain spanning image quality assessment to clinical decision-making, and 2) a cross-modality reasoning task integrating six imaging modalities. The benchmark comprises 26,415 images and 177,868 expert-verified VQA pairs curated from 51 public datasets, covering 52 ophthalmic diseases. Evaluation of 21 MLLMs reveals critical gaps in progressive reasoning and cross-modal integration. Dataset and code: https://github.com/CVI-SZU/X-PCR.

analysis.tldr: 首个眼科诊断跨模态渐进临床推理基准X-PCR，揭示MLLM在渐进推理和跨模态整合上的关键缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MLLM临床推理评测多基于单模态数据，无法评估临床实践中必需的渐进推理和跨模态整合能力，亟需全面基准。
analysis.problem: 缺乏能评估MLLM在眼科诊断中渐进推理和跨模态整合能力的综合基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 评估21个MLLM发现其在渐进推理和跨模态整合上存在关键缺陷。
analysis.method: 构建X-PCR基准，包含六阶段渐进推理链和六种成像模态的跨模态推理任务，共26,415张图像和177,868个专家验证的VQA对，覆盖52种眼科疾病。
contributions: 首个针对眼科诊断的跨模态渐进临床推理基准X-PCR。
系统评估21个MLLM，揭示其在渐进推理和跨模态整合上的不足。
analysis.experiments: 评估了21个MLLM，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对眼科领域，泛化性未知。
未提供模型性能的具体数值。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个眼科诊断跨模态渐进临床推理基准X-PCR，揭示MLLM在渐进推理和跨模态整合上的关键缺陷。

papers.title: Bimanual Robot Manipulation via Multi-Agent In-Context Learning
papers.abstract: Language Models (LLMs) have emerged as powerful reasoning engines for embodied control. In particular, In-Context Learning (ICL) enables off-the-shelf, text-only LLMs to predict robot actions without any task-specific training while preserving their generalization capabilities. Applying ICL to bimanual manipulation remains challenging, as the high-dimensional joint action space and tight inter-arm coordination constraints rapidly overwhelm standard context windows. To address this, we introduce BiCICLe (Bimanual Coordinated In-Context Learning), the first framework that enables standard LLMs to perform few-shot bimanual manipulation without fine-tuning. BiCICLe frames bimanual control as a multi-agent leader-follower problem, decoupling the action space into sequential, conditioned single-arm predictions. This naturally extends to Arms' Debate, an iterative refinement process, and to the introduction of a third LLM-as-Judge to evaluate and select the most plausible coordinated trajectories. Evaluated on 13 tasks from the TWIN benchmark, BiCICLe achieves up to 71.1% average success rate, outperforming the best training-free baseline by 6.7 percentage points and surpassing most supervised methods. We further demonstrate strong few-shot generalization on novel tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出BiCICLe框架，通过多智能体上下文学习实现双臂机器人操作，无需微调即超越多数监督方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 双臂机器人操作面临高维联合动作空间和紧耦合协调约束，现有上下文学习方法难以处理标准上下文窗口。
analysis.problem: 如何让标准LLM在不微调的情况下实现有效的双臂机器人操作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将双臂控制建模为多智能体领导者-跟随者问题，解耦动作空间为顺序的条件单臂预测，并引入Arms' Debate迭代优化和LLM-as-Judge评估选择。
contributions: 首个无需微调即可实现标准LLM进行少样本双臂操作的方法BiCICLe。
提出多智能体领导者-跟随者框架、Arms' Debate和LLM-as-Judge机制。
analysis.experiments: 在TWIN基准的13个任务上评估，平均成功率71.1%，超过最佳无训练基线6.7个百分点，并超越多数监督方法。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的上下文窗口长度限制。
多智能体交互可能增加推理延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BiCICLe框架，通过多智能体上下文学习实现双臂机器人操作，无需微调即超越多数监督方法。

papers.title: A Vision-Language-Action Model for Adaptive Ultrasound-Guided Needle Insertion and Needle Tracking
papers.abstract: Ultrasound (US)-guided needle insertion is a critical yet challenging procedure due to dynamic imaging conditions and difficulties in needle visualization. Many methods have been proposed for automated needle insertion, but they often rely on hand-crafted pipelines with modular controllers, whose performance degrades in challenging cases. In this paper, a Vision-Language-Action (VLA) model is proposed for adaptive and automated US-guided needle insertion and tracking on a robotic ultrasound (RUS) system. This framework provides a unified approach to needle tracking and needle insertion control, enabling real-time, dynamically adaptive adjustment of insertion based on the obtained needle position and environment awareness. To achieve real-time and end-to-end tracking, a Cross-Depth Fusion (CDF) tracking head is proposed, integrating shallow positional and deep semantic features from the large-scale vision backbone. To adapt the pretrained vision backbone for tracking tasks, a Tracking-Conditioning (TraCon) register is introduced for parameter-efficient feature conditioning. After needle tracking, an uncertainty-aware control policy and an asynchronous VLA pipeline are presented for adaptive needle insertion control, ensuring timely decision-making for improved safety and outcomes. Extensive experiments on both needle tracking and insertion show that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art trackers and manual operation, achieving higher tracking accuracy, improved insertion success rates, and reduced procedure time, highlighting promising directions for RUS-based intelligent intervention.

analysis.tldr: 提出视觉-语言-动作模型实现超声引导下自适应针插入与跟踪，在跟踪精度和插入成功率上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 超声引导针插入因动态成像条件和针可视化困难而极具挑战，现有自动化方法依赖手工流水线和模块化控制器，在困难场景下性能下降。
