analysis.problem: 如何实现超声引导下针插入的实时自适应控制与高精度跟踪。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出VLA模型，包含Cross-Depth Fusion跟踪头融合深浅层特征、Tracking-Conditioning寄存器进行参数高效特征调节，以及不确定性感知控制策略和异步VLA流水线实现自适应插入控制。
contributions: 提出统一的VLA框架实现超声引导针插入与跟踪的端到端自适应控制。
设计Cross-Depth Fusion跟踪头和Tracking-Conditioning寄存器提升跟踪性能。
引入不确定性感知控制策略和异步VLA流水线提高插入安全性和效率。
analysis.experiments: 在针跟踪和插入任务上进行了大量实验，方法在跟踪精度、插入成功率和操作时间上均优于现有跟踪器和手动操作。
limitations: 可能依赖特定超声设备和机器人平台，泛化性需进一步验证。
异步VLA流水线的实时性在计算资源受限场景下可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出视觉-语言-动作模型实现超声引导下自适应针插入与跟踪，在跟踪精度和插入成功率上超越现有方法。

papers.title: Domain-Aware Hierarchical Contrastive Learning for Semi-Supervised Generalization Fault Diagnosis
papers.abstract: Fault diagnosis under unseen operating conditions remains highly challenging when labeled data are scarce. Semi-supervised domain generalization fault diagnosis (SSDGFD) provides a practical solution by jointly exploiting labeled and unlabeled source domains. However, existing methods still suffer from two coupled limitations. First, pseudo-labels for unlabeled domains are typically generated primarily from knowledge learned on the labeled source domain, which neglects domain-specific geometric discrepancies and thus induces systematic cross-domain pseudo-label bias. Second, unlabeled samples are commonly handled with a hard accept-or-discard strategy, where rigid thresholding causes imbalanced sample utilization across domains, while hard-label assignment for uncertain samples can easily introduce additional noise. To address these issues, we propose a unified framework termed domain-aware hierarchical contrastive learning (DAHCL) for SSDGFD. Specifically, DAHCL introduces a domain-aware learning (DAL) module to explicitly capture source-domain geometric characteristics and calibrate pseudo-label predictions across heterogeneous source domains, thereby mitigating cross-domain bias in pseudo-label generation. In addition, DAHCL develops a hierarchical contrastive learning (HCL) module that combines dynamic confidence stratification with fuzzy contrastive supervision, enabling uncertain samples to contribute to representation learning without relying on unreliable hard labels. In this way, DAHCL jointly improves the quality of supervision and the utilization of unlabeled samples. Furthermore, to better reflect practical industrial scenarios, we incorporate engineering noise into the SSDGFD evaluation protocol. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that...

analysis.tldr: 提出域感知分层对比学习框架，通过校准伪标签偏差和利用模糊对比监督提升半监督故障诊断的泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 实际工业场景中，故障诊断常面临标签稀缺和工况变化，现有半监督域泛化方法因忽略域间几何差异导致伪标签偏差，且硬阈值策略造成样本利用不均。
analysis.problem: 解决半监督域泛化故障诊断中伪标签跨域偏差和不确定样本利用不足的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：1）伪标签主要从标记源域学习，忽略域特定几何差异，导致系统性跨域偏差；2）硬接受或丢弃策略导致样本利用不均，硬标签分配引入噪声。
analysis.method: 提出域感知分层对比学习（DAHCL），包含域感知学习（DAL）模块捕获源域几何特征并校准伪标签，以及分层对比学习（HCL）模块通过动态置信度分层和模糊对比监督利用不确定样本。
contributions: 提出域感知学习模块，显式捕获源域几何特征并校准伪标签，缓解跨域偏差。
提出分层对比学习模块，结合动态置信度分层与模糊对比监督，提升不确定样本的利用效率。
在评估协议中引入工程噪声，更贴近实际工业场景。
analysis.experiments: 在三个基准数据集上进行实验，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖源域几何特征的显式建模，对高度非平稳工况的适应性待验证。
模糊对比监督的置信度阈值设定可能需人工调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出域感知分层对比学习框架，通过校准伪标签偏差和利用模糊对比监督提升半监督故障诊断的泛化能力。

papers.title: Stability-Driven Motion Generation for Object-Guided Human-Human Co-Manipulation
papers.abstract: Co-manipulation requires multiple humans to synchronize their motions with a shared object while ensuring reasonable interactions, maintaining natural poses, and preserving stable states. However, most existing motion generation approaches are designed for single-character scenarios or fail to account for payload-induced dynamics. In this work, we propose a flow-matching framework that ensures the generated co-manipulation motions align with the intended goals while maintaining naturalness and effectiveness. Specifically, we first introduce a generative model that derives explicit manipulation strategies from the object's affordance and spatial configuration, which guide the motion flow toward successful manipulation. To improve motion quality, we then design an adversarial interaction prior that promotes natural individual poses and realistic inter-person interactions during co-manipulation. In addition, we also incorporate a stability-driven simulation into the flow matching process, which refines unstable interaction states through sampling-based optimization and directly adjusts the vector field regression to promote more effective manipulation. The experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves higher contact accuracy, lower penetration, and better distributional fidelity compared to state-of-the-art human-object interaction baselines. The code is available at https://github.com/boycehbz/StaCOM.

analysis.tldr: 提出流匹配框架生成多人协同操作运动，兼顾自然性、交互合理性与稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有运动生成方法多针对单人场景，无法处理多人共操中物体负载引起的动力学变化，导致生成的运动不自然、交互不合理或状态不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何生成多人协同操作运动，使其在遵循物体引导的同时保持自然姿态、合理交互和稳定状态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于流匹配的框架，包含三个组件：1) 从物体可供性和空间配置推导显式操作策略的生成模型；2) 对抗交互先验促进自然个体姿态和真实人际交互；3) 稳定性驱动仿真通过采样优化修正不稳定交互状态并调整向量场回归。
contributions: 提出首个面向物体引导的多人协同操作运动生成的流匹配框架。
设计对抗交互先验和稳定性驱动仿真模块，提升运动自然性与有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在多人协同操作数据集上评估，与SOTA人-物交互基线相比，方法在接触精度、穿透率和分布保真度上更优。
limitations: 可能依赖特定物体可供性定义，泛化性需验证。
未提及对复杂物体形状或动态环境的适应性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出流匹配框架生成多人协同操作运动，兼顾自然性、交互合理性与稳定性。

papers.title: Surrogate modeling for interpreting black-box LLMs in medical predictions
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs), trained on vast datasets, encode extensive real-world knowledge within their parameters, yet their black-box nature obscures the mechanisms and extent of this encoding. Surrogate modeling, which uses simplified models to approximate complex systems, can offer a path toward better interpretability of black-box models. We propose a surrogate modeling framework that quantitatively explains LLM-encoded knowledge. For a specific hypothesis derived from domain knowledge, this framework approximates the latent LLM knowledge space using observable elements (input-output pairs) through extensive prompting across a comprehensive range of simulated scenarios. Through proof-of-concept experiments in medical predictions, we demonstrate our framework's effectiveness in revealing the extent to which LLMs "perceive" each input variable in relation to the output. Particularly, given concerns that LLMs may perpetuate inaccuracies and societal biases embedded in their training data, our experiments using this framework quantitatively revealed both associations that contradict established medical knowledge and the persistence of scientifically refuted racial assumptions within LLM-encoded knowledge. By disclosing these issues, our framework can act as a red-flag indicator to support the safe and reliable application of these models.

analysis.tldr: 提出代理建模框架，通过输入-输出对揭示LLM在医学预测中编码的知识，发现与医学知识矛盾及种族偏见。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM的黑箱性质掩盖了其编码知识的机制和范围，需要可解释性方法来确保安全应用。
analysis.problem: 如何定量解释LLM在医学预测中编码的知识，特别是揭示其可能存在的错误和偏见。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM可能延续训练数据中的不准确性和社会偏见，实验发现其编码的知识中存在与医学知识矛盾及科学上已驳斥的种族假设。
analysis.method: 提出代理建模框架，通过大量提示模拟场景，用可观测的输入-输出对近似LLM的潜在知识空间，定量解释每个输入变量对输出的感知程度。
contributions: 提出一种代理建模框架，用于定量解释LLM编码的知识。
在医学预测中验证框架有效性，揭示LLM中的错误关联和种族偏见。
analysis.experiments: 在医学预测中进行概念验证实验，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 代理模型可能无法完全捕捉LLM的复杂性。
框架依赖领域知识假设，可能遗漏未知关联。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出代理建模框架，通过输入-输出对揭示LLM在医学预测中编码的知识，发现与医学知识矛盾及种族偏见。

papers.title: Image Generators are Generalist Vision Learners
papers.abstract: Recent works show that image and video generators exhibit zero-shot visual understanding behaviors, in a way reminiscent of how LLMs develop emergent capabilities of language understanding and reasoning from generative pretraining. While it has long been conjectured that the ability to create visual content implies an ability to understand it, there has been limited evidence that generative vision models have developed strong understanding capabilities. In this work, we demonstrate that image generation training serves a role similar to LLM pretraining, and lets models learn powerful and general visual representations that enable SOTA performance on various vision tasks. We introduce Vision Banana, a generalist model built by instruction-tuning Nano Banana Pro (NBP) on a mixture of its original training data alongside a small amount of vision task data. By parameterizing the output space of vision tasks as RGB images, we seamlessly reframe perception as image generation. Our generalist model, Vision Banana, achieves SOTA results on a variety of vision tasks involving both 2D and 3D understanding, beating or rivaling zero-shot domain-specialists, including Segment Anything Model 3 on segmentation tasks, and the Depth Anything series on metric depth estimation. We show that these results can be achieved with lightweight instruction-tuning without sacrificing the base model's image generation capabilities. The superior results suggest that image generation pretraining is a generalist vision learner. It also shows that image generation serves as a unified and universal interface for vision tasks, similar to text generation's role in language understanding and reasoning. We could be witnessing a major paradigm shift for computer vision, where generative vision pretraining takes a central role in building Foundational Vision Models for both generation and understanding.

analysis.tldr: 图像生成预训练可作为通用视觉学习器，通过轻量指令微调实现多种视觉任务SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究显示图像/视频生成器具有零样本视觉理解能力，但缺乏证据表明生成模型能发展出强大的理解能力；类比LLM通过生成预训练获得语言能力，探索图像生成预训练能否成为视觉基础模型的核心范式。
analysis.problem: 验证图像生成训练能否像LLM预训练一样学习通用视觉表征，并构建一个统一接口处理多种视觉任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Vision Banana模型，基于Nano Banana Pro (NBP)进行指令微调，将视觉任务输出空间参数化为RGB图像，从而将感知任务重新框架为图像生成问题。
contributions: 证明图像生成预训练可作为通用视觉学习器，学习强大且通用的视觉表征。
提出Vision Banana，通过轻量指令微调实现多种2D/3D视觉任务的SOTA性能，且不牺牲生成能力。
展示图像生成可作为视觉任务的统一接口，类似文本生成在语言中的作用。
analysis.experiments: 在多种2D和3D理解任务上达到SOTA，包括分割（超越SAM 3）和度量深度估计（超越Depth Anything系列）。
limitations: 可能依赖特定基础模型NBP，泛化性需进一步验证。
仅测试了部分视觉任务，更多任务（如视频理解）未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 图像生成预训练可作为通用视觉学习器，通过轻量指令微调实现多种视觉任务SOTA。

papers.title: Hybrid Latent Reasoning with Decoupled Policy Optimization
papers.abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning significantly elevates the complex problem-solving capabilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs). However, adapting CoT to vision typically discretizes signals to fit LLM inputs, causing early semantic collapse and discarding fine-grained details. While external tools can mitigate this, they introduce a rigid bottleneck, confining reasoning to predefined operations. Although recent latent reasoning paradigms internalize visual states to overcome these limitations, optimizing the resulting hybrid discrete-continuous action space remains challenging. In this work, we propose HyLaR (Hybrid Latent Reasoning), a framework that seamlessly interleaves discrete text generation with continuous visual latent representations. Specifically, following an initial cold-start supervised fine-tuning (SFT), we introduce DePO (Decoupled Policy Optimization) to enable effective reinforcement learning within this hybrid space. DePO decomposes the policy gradient objective, applying independent trust-region constraints to the textual and latent components, alongside an exact closed-form von Mises-Fisher (vMF) KL regularizer. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HyLaR outperforms standard MLLMs and state-of-the-art latent reasoning approaches across fine-grained perception and general multimodal understanding benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/EthenCheng/HyLaR.

analysis.tldr: 提出HyLaR框架，通过解耦策略优化实现多模态大语言模型中离散文本与连续视觉潜变量的混合推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有CoT推理在视觉任务中离散化信号导致语义坍塌和细节丢失，外部工具引入刚性瓶颈，而潜变量推理的混合动作空间难以优化。
analysis.problem: 如何有效优化多模态大语言模型中离散文本生成与连续视觉潜变量表示的混合推理策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HyLaR框架，包括冷启动SFT和DePO优化算法。DePO将策略梯度目标解耦，对文本和潜变量组件分别施加独立信任域约束，并使用精确闭式vMF KL正则化。
contributions: 提出HyLaR框架，实现离散文本与连续视觉潜变量的无缝交错推理。
提出DePO算法，通过解耦策略优化和vMF KL正则化有效优化混合动作空间。
analysis.experiments: 在细粒度感知和通用多模态理解基准上，HyLaR优于标准MLLMs和现有潜变量推理方法。
limitations: 可能依赖冷启动SFT的质量。
vMF KL正则化的计算开销在极大规模下可能成为瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HyLaR框架，通过解耦策略优化实现多模态大语言模型中离散文本与连续视觉潜变量的混合推理。

papers.title: SurgCoT: Advancing Spatiotemporal Reasoning in Surgical Videos through a Chain-of-Thought Benchmark
papers.abstract: Fine-grained spatiotemporal reasoning on surgical videos is critical, yet the capabilities of Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) in this domain remain largely unexplored. To bridge this gap, we introduce SurgCoT, a unified benchmark for evaluating chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning in MLLMs across 7 surgical specialties and 35 diverse procedures. SurgCoT assesses five core reasoning dimensions: Causal Action Ordering, Cue-Action Alignment, Affordance Mapping, Micro-Transition Localization, and Anomaly Onset Tracking, through a structured CoT framework with an intensive annotation protocol (Question-Option-Knowledge-Clue-Answer), where the Knowledge field provides essential background context and Clue provides definitive spatiotemporal evidence. Evaluation of 10 leading MLLMs shows: 1) commercial models outperform open-source and medical-specialized variants; 2) significant gaps exist in surgical CoT reasoning; 3) SurgCoT enables effective evaluation and enhances progressive spatiotemporal reasoning. SurgCoT provides a reproducible testbed to narrow the gap between MLLM capabilities and clinical reasoning demands. Code: https://github.com/CVI-SZU/SurgCoT.

analysis.tldr: SurgCoT 是一个用于评估多模态大模型在手术视频中链式推理能力的基准，覆盖7个外科专科和35种手术。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型在手术视频中的细粒度时空推理能力尚未被充分探索，缺乏统一的评估基准。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估多模态大模型在外科手术视频中的链式推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 商业模型优于开源和医学专用模型；手术视频的链式推理存在显著差距；SurgCoT 能有效评估并增强渐进式时空推理。
analysis.method: 构建 SurgCoT 基准，包含结构化 CoT 框架（问题-选项-知识-线索-答案）和五个核心推理维度。
contributions: 提出 SurgCoT，首个统一评估手术视频中 MLLM 链式推理的基准。
系统评估10个主流 MLLM，揭示商业模型优势及推理差距。
analysis.experiments: 在10个主流 MLLM 上评估，包括商业、开源和医学专用模型。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有手术类型或复杂场景。
评估仅基于现有 MLLM，未来模型可能表现不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SurgCoT 是一个用于评估多模态大模型在手术视频中链式推理能力的基准，覆盖7个外科专科和35种手术。

papers.title: UniCVR: From Alignment to Reranking for Unified Zero-Shot Composed Visual Retrieval
papers.abstract: Composed image retrieval, multi-turn composed image retrieval, and composed video retrieval all share a common paradigm: composing the reference visual with modification text to retrieve the desired target. Despite this shared structure, the three tasks have been studied in isolation, with no prior work proposing a unified framework, let alone a zero-shot solution. In this paper, we propose UniCVR, the first unified zero-shot composed visual retrieval framework that jointly addresses all three tasks without any task-specific human-annotated data. UniCVR strategically combines two complementary strengths: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) for compositional query understanding and Vision-Language Pre-trained (VLP) models for structured visual retrieval. Concretely, UniCVR operates in two stages. In Stage I, we train the MLLM as a compositional query embedder via contrastive learning on a curated multi-source dataset of approximately 3.5M samples, bridging the heterogeneous embedding spaces between the MLLM and the frozen VLP gallery encoder. A cluster-based hard negative sampling strategy is proposed to strengthen contrastive supervision. In Stage II, we introduce an MLLM-guided dual-level reranking mechanism that applies adaptive budgeted subset scoring to a small number of top-ranked candidates, and then exploits the resulting relevance signals through a dual-level re-scoring scheme, producing more accurate final rankings with minimal computational overhead. Extensive experiments across five benchmarks covering all three tasks demonstrate that UniCVR achieves cutting-edge performance, validating its effectiveness and generalizability. Our data and code will be released upon acceptance.

analysis.tldr: 首个统一零样本组合视觉检索框架，通过两阶段对齐与重排序联合解决图像/视频检索任务。
analysis.research_motivation: 组合图像检索、多轮组合图像检索和组合视频检索共享相同范式，但现有研究孤立处理，缺乏统一框架，且依赖人工标注数据。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用任务特定标注数据的情况下，统一解决三种组合视觉检索任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：阶段I通过对比学习在约350万样本的多源数据集上训练MLLM作为组合查询嵌入器，并引入基于聚类的难负样本采样策略；阶段II提出MLLM引导的双层重排序机制，对少量候选进行自适应预算子集评分，再通过双层重打分生成最终排序。
contributions: 首次提出统一零样本组合视觉检索框架UniCVR，联合解决三种任务。
设计两阶段方法结合MLLM和VLP模型，并引入聚类难负样本采样和双层重排序机制。
analysis.experiments: 在涵盖三种任务的五个基准上实验，达到领先性能，验证了有效性和泛化性。
limitations: 依赖MLLM和VLP模型的预训练质量，可能受限于模型容量。
重排序阶段的计算开销虽小，但可能在大规模候选集上仍有挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个统一零样本组合视觉检索框架，通过两阶段对齐与重排序联合解决图像/视频检索任务。

papers.title: MD-Face: MoE-Enhanced Label-Free Disentangled Representation for Interactive Facial Attribute Editing
papers.abstract: GAN-based facial attribute editing is widely used in virtual avatars and social media but often suffers from attribute entanglement, where modifying one face attribute unintentionally alters others. While supervised disentangled representation learning can address this, it relies heavily on labeled data, incurring high annotation costs. To address these challenges, we propose MD-Face, a label-free disentangled representation learning framework based on Mixture of Experts (MoE). MD-Face utilizes a MoE backbone with a gating mechanism that dynamically allocates experts, enabling the model to learn semantic vectors with greater independence. To further enhance attribute entanglement, we introduce a geometry-aware loss, which aligns each semantic vector with its corresponding Semantic Boundary Vector (SBV) through a Jacobian-based pushforward method. Experiments with ProGAN and StyleGAN show that MD-Face outperforms unsupervised baselines and competes with supervised ones. Compared to diffusion-based methods, it offers better image quality and lower inference latency, making it ideal for interactive editing.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于MoE的无监督解耦框架MD-Face，实现高质量交互式人脸属性编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于GAN的人脸属性编辑存在属性纠缠问题，监督解耦方法依赖昂贵标注数据，而无监督方法效果有限。
analysis.problem: 如何在无标签条件下实现人脸属性的解耦表示，避免编辑时属性相互干扰。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用混合专家（MoE）主干网络，通过门控机制动态分配专家学习独立语义向量，并引入几何感知损失，利用雅可比推前方法将语义向量对齐到语义边界向量。
contributions: 提出MD-Face，首个基于MoE的无标签解耦人脸属性编辑框架。
设计几何感知损失，通过语义边界向量增强属性解耦。
analysis.experiments: 在ProGAN和StyleGAN上实验，MD-Face优于无监督基线，与监督方法相当；相比扩散方法，图像质量更高且推理延迟更低。
limitations: 可能依赖特定GAN架构（ProGAN/StyleGAN），泛化性待验证。
几何感知损失的计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于MoE的无监督解耦框架MD-Face，实现高质量交互式人脸属性编辑。

papers.title: Formalising the Logit Shift Induced by LoRA: A Technical Note
papers.abstract: This technical note provides a first-order formalisation of the logit shift and fact-margin change induced by Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA). Using a first-order Fréchet approximation around the base model trajectory, we show that the multi-layer LoRA effect can be decomposed into a linear summation of layerwise contributions and a higher-order remainder term representing inter-layer coupling.

analysis.tldr: 本文用一阶Fréchet近似形式化分析了LoRA引起的logit偏移，将其分解为逐层贡献的线性求和与高阶耦合残差。
analysis.research_motivation: LoRA是一种广泛使用的参数高效微调方法，但其对模型输出logit的具体影响机制尚未被严格形式化，缺乏理论理解可能限制其应用和优化。
analysis.problem: 形式化描述LoRA微调引起的logit偏移和事实边界变化，并量化多层LoRA贡献的叠加效应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象或失败模式，仅从理论角度指出多层LoRA效应可分解为逐层线性贡献与高阶耦合项。
analysis.method: 利用一阶Fréchet近似对基模型轨迹展开，将多层LoRA的logit偏移分解为逐层贡献的线性求和与高阶残差项。
contributions: 首次对LoRA引起的logit偏移进行一阶形式化分析
揭示了多层LoRA效应可分解为逐层线性贡献与高阶耦合项
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。

analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文用一阶Fréchet近似形式化分析了LoRA引起的logit偏移，将其分解为逐层贡献的线性求和与高阶耦合残差。

papers.title: Seeing Further and Wider: Joint Spatio-Temporal Enlargement for Micro-Video Popularity Prediction
papers.abstract: Micro-video popularity prediction (MVPP) aims to forecast the future popularity of videos on online media, which is essential for applications such as content recommendation and traffic allocation. In real-world scenarios, it is critical for MVPP approaches to understand both the temporal dynamics of a given video (temporal) and its historical relevance to other videos (spatial). However, existing approaches sufer from limitations in both dimensions: temporally, they rely on sparse short-range sampling that restricts content perception; spatially, they depend on flat retrieval memory with limited capacity and low efficiency, hindering scalable knowledge utilization. To overcome these limitations, we propose a unified framework that achieves joint spatio-temporal enlargement, enabling precise perception of extremely long video sequences while supporting a scalable memory bank that can infinitely expand to incorporate all relevant historical videos. Technically, we employ a Temporal Enlargement driven by a frame scoring module that extracts highlight cues from video frames through two complementary pathways: sparse sampling and dense perception. Their outputs are adaptively fused to enable robust long-sequence content understanding. For Spatial Enlargement, we construct a Topology-Aware Memory Bank that hierarchically clusters historically relevant content based on topological relationships. Instead of directly expanding memory capacity, we update the encoder features of the corresponding clusters when incorporating new videos, enabling unbounded historical association without unbounded storage growth. Extensive experiments on three widely used MVPP benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms 11 strong baselines across mainstream metrics, achieving robust improvements in both prediction accuracy and ranking consistency.

analysis.tldr: 提出联合时空扩展框架，通过帧评分模块和拓扑感知记忆库提升微视频流行度预测的准确性和一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 微视频流行度预测对推荐和流量分配至关重要，但现有方法在时间维度上依赖稀疏短程采样限制内容感知，在空间维度上依赖扁平检索记忆导致容量和效率不足。
analysis.problem: 如何同时扩展时间感知（长序列理解）和空间关联（历史视频知识利用）以提升微视频流行度预测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出联合时空扩展框架：时间扩展通过帧评分模块结合稀疏采样和密集感知两条路径提取高光线索并自适应融合；空间扩展构建拓扑感知记忆库，基于拓扑关系分层聚类历史内容，通过更新聚类编码器特征实现无限历史关联而不增加存储。
contributions: 提出联合时空扩展框架，同时解决时间感知和空间关联的局限性。
设计帧评分模块实现长序列鲁棒理解，拓扑感知记忆库支持可扩展历史关联。
在三个基准上超越11个强基线，提升预测准确性和排序一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在三个广泛使用的微视频流行度预测基准上，与11个强基线对比，在主流指标上取得一致提升。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量帧评分模块设计。

papers.title: Improving Facial Emotion Recognition through Dataset Merging and Balanced Training Strategies
papers.abstract: In this paper, a deep learning framework is proposed for automatic facial emotion based on deep convolutional networks. In order to increase the generalization ability and the robustness of the method, the dataset size is increased by merging three publicly available facial emotion datasets: CK+, FER+ and KDEF. Despite the increase in dataset size, the minority classes still suffer from insufficient number of training samples, leading to data imbalance. The data imbalance problem is minimized by online and offline augmentation techniques and random weighted sampling. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method can recognize the seven basic emotions with 82% accuracy. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach in tackling the challenges of data imbalance and improving classification performance in facial emotion recognition.

analysis.tldr: 通过合并数据集和平衡训练策略，将面部表情识别准确率提升至82%。
analysis.research_motivation: 面部表情识别中，单一数据集规模有限且存在类别不平衡，导致模型泛化能力不足。
analysis.problem: 如何通过数据集合并和平衡训练策略提高面部表情识别的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 合并数据集后，少数类仍因样本不足导致数据不平衡问题。
analysis.method: 合并CK+、FER+和KDEF三个公开数据集，结合在线/离线数据增强和随机加权采样来缓解类别不平衡。
contributions: 提出通过合并多个数据集来增加训练样本量，提升泛化能力。
采用在线/离线增强和随机加权采样有效缓解数据不平衡问题。

limitations: 准确率82%仍有提升空间，可能受限于数据集质量或模型架构。
未在真实场景或跨数据集上验证泛化性。

papers.title: Dual Causal Inference: Integrating Backdoor Adjustment and Instrumental Variable Learning for Medical VQA
papers.abstract: Medical Visual Question Answering (MedVQA) aims to generate clinically reliable answers conditioned on complex medical images and questions. However, existing methods often overfit to superficial cross-modal correlations, neglecting the intrinsic biases embedded in multimodal medical data. Consequently, models become vulnerable to cross-modal confounding effects, severely hindering their ability to provide trustworthy diagnostic reasoning. To address this limitation, we propose a novel Dual Causal Inference (DCI) framework for MedVQA. To the best of our knowledge, DCI is the first unified architecture that integrates Backdoor Adjustment (BDA) and Instrumental Variable (IV) learning to jointly tackle both observable and unobserved confounders. Specifically, we formulate a Structural Causal Model (SCM) where observable cross-modal biases (e.g., frequent visual and textual co-occurrences) are mitigated via BDA, while unobserved confounders are compensated using an IV learned from a shared latent space. To guarantee the validity of the IV, we design mutual information constraints that maximize its dependence on the fused multimodal representations while minimizing its associations with the unobserved confounders and target answers. Through this dual mechanism, DCI extracts deconfounded representations that capture genuine causal relationships. Extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets, SLAKE, SLAKE-CP, VQA-RAD, and PathVQA, demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms existing approaches, particularly in out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization. Furthermore, qualitative analyses confirm that DCI significantly enhances the interpretability and robustness of cross-modal reasoning by explicitly disentangling true causal effects from spurious cross-modal shortcuts.

analysis.tldr: 提出双因果推断框架，结合后门调整和工具变量学习消除医学VQA中的混杂偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MedVQA方法过拟合表面跨模态相关性，忽略多模态医学数据中的固有偏差，导致模型易受混杂效应影响，无法提供可靠的诊断推理。
analysis.problem: 如何同时消除可观测和不可观测的混杂因素，使MedVQA模型学习真正的因果关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建结构因果模型，通过后门调整缓解可观测交叉模态偏差，利用从共享隐空间学习的工具变量补偿不可观测混杂，并采用互信息约束保证工具变量有效性。
contributions: 首次统一后门调整和工具变量学习，联合处理可观测和不可观测混杂因素。
提出互信息约束确保工具变量与融合表示相关、与混杂和答案无关。
在四个基准数据集上取得一致最优结果，尤其在分布外泛化上表现突出。

papers.title: LLM-guided phase diagram construction through high-throughput experimentation
papers.abstract: Constructing phase diagrams for multicomponent alloys requires extensive experimental measurements and is a time-consuming task. Here we investigate whether large language models (LLMs) can guide experimental planning for phase diagram construction. In our framework, a general-purpose LLM serves as the experimental planner, suggesting compositions for measurement at each cycle in a closed loop with high-throughput synthesis and X-ray diffraction phase identification. Using this framework, we experimentally constructed the ternary phase diagram of the Co-Al-Ge system at 900 degree C through iterative synthesis and characterization. We compared two strategies that differ in how the initial compositions are selected: one uses predictions from a domain-specific LLM trained on phase diagram data (aLLoyM), while the other relies solely on the general-purpose LLM. The two strategies exhibited complementary strengths. aLLoyM directed the initial measurements toward compositionally complex regions in the interior of the ternary diagram, enabling the earliest discovery of all three novel phases that form only in the ternary system. In contrast, the general-purpose LLM adopted a textbook-like approach which efficiently identified a larger number of phases in fewer cycles. In addition, a simulated benchmark comparing the LLM against conventional machine learning confirmed that the LLM achieves more efficient exploration. The results demonstrate that LLMs have high potential as experimental planners for phase diagram construction.

analysis.tldr: LLM引导高通量实验构建三元相图，两种策略互补，效率优于传统机器学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 构建多组分合金相图需要大量实验测量，耗时费力，亟需智能实验规划方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM高效规划实验，加速相图构建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 领域专用LLM（aLLoyM）擅长发现三元系新相，通用LLM则高效识别更多相，两者互补。
analysis.method: 闭环框架：通用LLM作为实验规划器，每轮建议成分，结合高通量合成与XRD相鉴定，迭代构建相图。
contributions: 提出LLM引导的高通量实验框架用于相图构建。
实验构建Co-Al-Ge三元相图，比较两种策略并发现互补优势。
模拟基准显示LLM探索效率优于传统机器学习。
analysis.experiments: 实验构建Co-Al-Ge三元系900°C相图，通过迭代合成与表征；模拟基准对比LLM与传统机器学习。

papers.title: SwarmDrive: Semantic V2V Coordination for Latency-Constrained Cooperative Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Cloud-hosted LLM inference for autonomous driving adds round-trip delay and depends on stable connectivity, while purely local edge models struggle under occlusion. We present SwarmDrive, a semantic Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) coordination framework in which nearby vehicles run local Small Language Models (SLMs), share compact intent distributions only when uncertainty is high, and fuse them through event-triggered consensus. We evaluate SwarmDrive in a 5-seed executable study built around one occluded intersection case, combining matched operating-point comparisons with robustness sweeps. In that setting, SwarmDrive under its 6G communication setting ("Swarm 6G") raises success from 68.9% to 94.1% over a single local SLM while reducing latency from a 510 ms cloud reference to 151.4 ms. However, an increased number of participating vehicles leads to higher communication overhead and packet loss. SwarmDrive also evaluates the impact of swarm-size, packet-loss, and entropy-threshold sweeps and shows that the cooperative gain holds across ablations and is best balanced near an active swarm size of 4 vehicles and an entropy trigger threshold of 0.65 in the current prototype. These results show that semantic edge cooperation can work under tight latency constraints in the targeted intersection case, but they are not a deployment-grade validation of a real 6G stack.

analysis.tldr: SwarmDrive通过语义V2V协调和事件触发共识，在延迟约束下将遮挡路口成功率从68.9%提升至94.1%。
analysis.research_motivation: 云端LLM推理存在往返延迟和连接依赖，而纯本地边缘模型在遮挡场景下性能不足，亟需一种低延迟、高可靠的协同方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在延迟约束下，通过车辆间语义协调提升遮挡路口的自动驾驶成功率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 参与车辆增多会导致通信开销和丢包增加；协作增益在主动群规模为4、熵触发阈值为0.65时达到最佳平衡。
analysis.method: 提出SwarmDrive框架：附近车辆运行本地小语言模型（SLM），仅在不确定性高时共享紧凑意图分布，并通过事件触发共识进行融合。
contributions: 提出一种语义V2V协调框架，结合本地SLM和事件触发共识，实现低延迟协同自动驾驶。
在遮挡路口场景下，通过5种子可执行研究验证了该方法在延迟和成功率上的显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在5种子可执行研究中，基于一个遮挡路口案例，结合匹配工作点比较和鲁棒性扫描进行评估。
limitations: 实验仅基于单一遮挡路口案例，未覆盖更复杂场景。
当前原型并非部署级6G堆栈验证，实际部署效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SwarmDrive通过语义V2V协调和事件触发共识，在延迟约束下将遮挡路口成功率从68.9%提升至94.1%。

papers.title: FSFM: A Biologically-Inspired Framework for Selective Forgetting of Agent Memory
papers.abstract: For LLM agents, memory management critically impacts efficiency, quality, and security. While much research focuses on retention, selective forgetting--inspired by human cognitive processes (hippocampal indexing/consolidation theory and Ebbinghaus forgetting curve)--remains underexplored. We argue that in resource-constrained environments, a well-designed forgetting mechanism is as crucial as remembering, delivering benefits across three dimensions: (1) efficiency via intelligent memory pruning, (2) quality by dynamically updating outdated preferences and context, and (3) security through active forgetting of malicious inputs, sensitive data, and privacy-compromising content. Our framework establishes a taxonomy of forgetting mechanisms: passive decay-based, active deletion-based, safety-triggered, and adaptive reinforcement-based. Building on advances in LLM agent architectures and vector databases, we present detailed specifications, implementation strategies, and empirical validation from controlled experiments. Results show significant improvements: access efficiency (+8.49%), content quality (+29.2% signal-to-noise ratio), and security performance (100% elimination of security risks). Our work bridges cognitive neuroscience and AI systems, offering practical solutions for real-world deployment while addressing ethical and regulatory compliance. The paper concludes with challenges and future directions, establishing selective forgetting as a fundamental capability for next-generation LLM agents operating in real-world, resource-constrained scenarios. Our contributions align with AI-native memory systems and responsible AI development.

analysis.tldr: 受人类认知过程启发的选择性遗忘框架，提升LLM Agent记忆系统的效率、质量和安全性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究主要关注记忆保留，但在资源受限环境中，选择性遗忘机制对效率、质量和安全同样关键，却未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个受生物学启发的选择性遗忘框架，以优化LLM Agent的记忆管理，同时提升效率、质量和安全性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 提出受认知科学启发的选择性遗忘框架，涵盖四种遗忘机制。
实证验证显示效率提升8.49%、信噪比提升29.2%、安全风险100%消除。

papers.title: EgoDyn-Bench: Evaluating Ego-Motion Understanding in Vision-Centric Foundation Models for Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have advanced highlevel reasoning in autonomous driving, their ability to ground this reasoning in the underlying physics of ego-motion remains poorly understood. We introduce EgoDyn-Bench, a diagnostic benchmark for evaluating the semantic ego-motion understanding of vision-centric foundation models. By mapping continuous vehicle kinematics to discrete motion concepts via a deterministic oracle, we decouple a model's internal physical logic from its visual perception. Our large-scale empirical audit spanning 20 + models, including closed-source MLLMs, open-source VLMs across multiple scales, and specialized VLAs, identifies a significant Perception Bottleneck: while models exhibit logical physical concepts, they consistently fail to accurately align them with visual observations, frequently underperforming classical non-learned geometric baselines. This failure persists across model scales and domain-specific training, indicating a structural deficit in how current architectures couple visual perception with physical reasoning. We demonstrate that providing explicit trajectory encodings substantially restores physical consistency across all evaluated models, revealing a functional disentanglement between vision and language: egomotion logic is derived almost exclusively from the language modality, while visual observations contribute negligible additional signal. This structural finding provides a standardized diagnostic framework and a practical pathway toward physically aligned embodied AI. Keywords: Ego-motion - Physical Reasoning - Foundation Models

analysis.tldr: EgoDyn-Bench 基准揭示视觉中心基础模型在自动驾驶中理解自车运动时存在感知瓶颈，视觉与物理推理功能分离。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 VLM 在自动驾驶中擅长高层推理，但缺乏对自车运动物理基础的评估，阻碍了物理对齐的具身 AI 发展。
analysis.problem: 评估并诊断视觉中心基础模型在语义自车运动理解上的能力缺陷，特别是视觉感知与物理推理的耦合问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型表现出逻辑物理概念，但无法准确将其与视觉观察对齐，性能常低于经典非学习几何基线；该失败跨模型规模和领域特定训练持续存在，表明当前架构在耦合视觉感知与物理推理上存在结构性缺陷。
analysis.method: 构建 EgoDyn-Bench 诊断基准，通过确定性 oracle 将连续车辆运动学映射到离散运动概念，解耦模型内部物理逻辑与视觉感知；对 20+ 模型进行大规模实证审计，包括闭源 MLLM、开源 VLM 和专用 VLA。
contributions: 提出 EgoDyn-Bench 基准，用于评估视觉中心基础模型的语义自车运动理解能力。
发现感知瓶颈：模型视觉与物理推理功能分离，自车运动逻辑几乎完全来自语言模态，视觉贡献可忽略。
证明提供显式轨迹编码可显著恢复所有评估模型的物理一致性。
analysis.experiments: 对 20+ 模型进行大规模实证审计，包括闭源 MLLM、开源 VLM 和专用 VLA，并与经典非学习几何基线比较。
limitations: 基准仅关注自车运动理解，未涵盖其他物理推理方面。
实验限于视觉中心模型，未涉及多模态融合架构。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EgoDyn-Bench 基准揭示视觉中心基础模型在自动驾驶中理解自车运动时存在感知瓶颈，视觉与物理推理功能分离。

papers.title: Efficient INT8 Single-Image Super-Resolution via Deployment-Aware Quantization and Teacher-Guided Training
papers.abstract: Efficient single-image super-resolution (SISR) requires balancing reconstruction fidelity, model compactness, and robustness under low-bit deployment, which is especially challenging for x3 SR. We present a deployment-oriented quantized SISR framework based on an extract-refine-upsample design. The student performs most computation in the low-resolution space and uses a lightweight re-parameterizable backbone with PixelShuffle reconstruction, yielding a compact inference graph. To improve quality without significantly increasing complexity, we adopt a three-stage training pipeline: Stage 1 learns a basic reconstruction mapping with spatial supervision; Stage 2 refines fidelity using Charbonnier loss, DCT-domain supervision, and confidence-weighted output-level distillation from a Mamba-based teacher; and Stage 3 applies quantization-aware training directly on the fused deploy graph. We further use weight clipping and BatchNorm recalibration to improve quantization stability. On the MAI 2026 Quantized 4K Image Super-Resolution Challenge test set, our final AIO MAI submission achieves 29.79 dB PSNR and 0.8634 SSIM, obtaining a final score of 1.8 under the target mobile INT8 deployment setting. Ablation on Stage 3 optimization shows that teacher-guided supervision improves the dynamic INT8 TFLite reconstruction from 29.91 dB/0.853 to 30.0003 dB/0.856, while the fixed-shape deployable INT8 TFLite artifact attains 30.006 dB/0.857.

analysis.tldr: 提出面向部署的INT8量化单图超分框架，通过三阶段训练和教师蒸馏在移动端实现高效高质x3 SR。
analysis.research_motivation: 单图超分在低比特部署下需平衡重建质量、模型紧凑性和鲁棒性，现有方法难以兼顾，尤其x3 SR挑战更大。
analysis.problem: 如何在移动INT8部署条件下实现高效且高保真的单图超分辨率重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于提取-精炼-上采样设计，学生网络在低分辨率空间计算，采用轻量可重参数化骨干和PixelShuffle；三阶段训练：阶段1空间监督学习基本映射，阶段2用Charbonnier损失、DCT域监督和置信加权输出级蒸馏（Mamba教师），阶段3在融合部署图上进行量化感知训练，辅以权重裁剪和BatchNorm重校准。
contributions: 提出面向部署的INT8量化SISR框架，兼顾效率与质量。
设计三阶段训练流程，结合教师蒸馏和量化感知训练提升低比特性能。
analysis.experiments: 在MAI 2026量化4K图像超分挑战测试集上，最终提交达到29.79 dB PSNR和0.8634 SSIM，移动INT8部署下得分1.8；消融实验显示教师引导监督将动态INT8 TFLite重建从29.91 dB/0.853提升至30.0003 dB/0.856。
limitations: 可能仅针对x3 SR，其他缩放因子未验证。
依赖Mamba教师模型，训练复杂度较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出面向部署的INT8量化单图超分框架，通过三阶段训练和教师蒸馏在移动端实现高效高质x3 SR。

papers.title: X-Cache: Cross-Chunk Block Caching for Few-Step Autoregressive World Models Inference
papers.abstract: Real-time world simulation is becoming a key infrastructure for scalable evaluation and online reinforcement learning of autonomous driving systems. Recent driving world models built on autoregressive video diffusion achieve high-fidelity, controllable multi-camera generation, but their inference cost remains a bottleneck for interactive deployment. However, existing diffusion caching methods are designed for offline video generation with multiple denoising steps, and do not transfer to this scenario. Few-step distilled models have no inter-step redundancy left for these methods to reuse, and sequence-level parallelization techniques require future conditioning that closed-loop interactive generation does not provide. We present X-Cache, a training-free acceleration method that caches along a different axis: across consecutive generation chunks rather than across denoising steps. X-Cache maintains per-block residual caches that persist across chunks, and applies a dual-metric gating mechanism over a structure- and action-aware block-input fingerprint to independently decide whether each block should recompute or reuse its cached residual. To prevent approximation errors from permanently contaminating the autoregressive KV cache, X-Cache identifies KV update chunks (the forward passes that write clean keys and values into the persistent cache) and unconditionally forces full computation on these chunks, cutting off error propagation. We implement X-Cache on X-world, a production multi-camera action-conditioned driving world model built on multi-block causal DiT with few-step denoising and rolling KV cache. X-Cache achieves 71% block skip rate with 2.6x wall-clock speedup while maintaining minimum degradation.

analysis.tldr: X-Cache通过跨块缓存残差实现自回归世界模型的无训练加速，在少步扩散模型中达到2.6倍加速且性能几乎无损。
analysis.research_motivation: 实时世界模拟是自动驾驶系统可扩展评估和在线强化学习的关键基础设施，但现有自回归视频扩散模型推理成本过高，成为交互式部署的瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 现有扩散缓存方法针对多步去噪的离线视频生成设计，无法适用于少步蒸馏模型（无跨步冗余）和闭环交互生成（无法使用序列级并行化）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 少步蒸馏模型在去噪步骤间几乎没有冗余，导致传统跨步缓存失效；闭环生成无法利用未来条件进行序列级并行。
analysis.method: 提出X-Cache，一种无训练加速方法，沿生成块（chunk）维度缓存残差，而非去噪步骤。维护跨块的逐块残差缓存，通过结构和动作感知的块输入指纹的双度量门控机制决定是否重用缓存；识别KV更新块强制全计算以防止误差污染。
contributions: 提出跨块残差缓存策略，适用于少步自回归世界模型推理加速
设计双度量门控机制和KV更新块强制计算策略，平衡加速与质量
analysis.experiments: 在基于多块因果DiT的少步去噪驾驶世界模型X-world上实现71%块跳过率、2.6倍墙钟加速，同时保持最小性能退化。
limitations: 仅针对特定架构（多块因果DiT）验证，泛化性未知
加速比受块跳过率上限限制，可能无法进一步扩展
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: X-Cache通过跨块缓存残差实现自回归世界模型的无训练加速，在少步扩散模型中达到2.6倍加速且性能几乎无损。

papers.title: MambaLiteUNet: Cross-Gated Adaptive Feature Fusion for Robust Skin Lesion Segmentation
papers.abstract: Recent segmentation models have demonstrated promising efficiency by aggressively reducing parameter counts and computational complexity. However, these models often struggle to accurately delineate fine lesion boundaries and texture patterns essential for early skin cancer diagnosis and treatment planning. In this paper, we propose MambaLiteUNet, a compact yet robust segmentation framework that integrates Mamba state space modeling into a U-Net architecture, along with three key modules: Adaptive Multi-Branch Mamba Feature Fusion (AMF), Local-Global Feature Mixing (LGFM), and Cross-Gated Attention (CGA). These modules are designed to enhance local-global feature interaction, preserve spatial details, and improve the quality of skip connections. MambaLiteUNet achieves an average IoU of 87.12% and average Dice score of 93.09% across ISIC2017, ISIC2018, HAM10000, and PH2 benchmarks, outperforming state-of-the-art models. Compared to U-Net, our model improves average IoU and Dice by 7.72 and 4.61 points, respectively, while reducing parameters by 93.6% and GFLOPs by 97.6%. Additionally, in domain generalization with six unseen lesion categories, MambaLiteUNet achieves 77.61% IoU and 87.23% Dice, performing best among all evaluated models. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that MambaLiteUNet achieves a strong balance between accuracy and efficiency, making it a competitive and practical solution for dermatological image segmentation. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/maklachur/MambaLiteUNet.

analysis.tldr: 提出MambaLiteUNet，将Mamba状态空间模型集成到U-Net中，通过跨门控自适应特征融合实现轻量级且鲁棒的皮肤病变分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有轻量级分割模型在减少参数和计算量的同时，难以准确分割精细的病变边界和纹理模式，影响早期皮肤癌诊断。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持模型紧凑高效的同时，提升皮肤病变分割中边界和纹理细节的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MambaLiteUNet，包含自适应多分支Mamba特征融合（AMF）、局部-全局特征混合（LGFM）和跨门控注意力（CGA）三个模块，增强局部-全局特征交互并改善跳跃连接质量。
contributions: 提出MambaLiteUNet，将Mamba状态空间模型与U-Net结合，实现轻量级皮肤病变分割。
设计AMF、LGFM和CGA模块，提升特征融合和细节保留能力。
在多个基准上取得SOTA性能，同时大幅降低参数量和计算量。
analysis.experiments: 在ISIC2017、ISIC2018、HAM10000和PH2四个基准上评估，平均IoU 87.12%，平均Dice 93.09%，参数量减少93.6%，GFLOPs减少97.6%；在六个未见病变类别的域泛化中IoU 77.61%，Dice 87.23%。
limitations: 可能仅在皮肤病变分割任务上验证，泛化到其他医学图像分割任务需进一步实验。
Mamba模块的引入可能增加训练复杂度或对超参数敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MambaLiteUNet，将Mamba状态空间模型集成到U-Net中，通过跨门控自适应特征融合实现轻量级且鲁棒的皮肤病变分割。

papers.title: Fourier Series Coder: A Novel Perspective on Angle Boundary Discontinuity Problem for Oriented Object Detection
papers.abstract: With the rapid advancement of intelligent driving and remote sensing, oriented object detection has gained widespread attention. However, achieving high-precision performance is fundamentally constrained by the Angle Boundary Discontinuity (ABD) and Cyclic Ambiguity (CA) problems, which typically cause significant angle fluctuations near periodic boundaries. Although recent studies propose continuous angle coders to alleviate these issues, our theoretical and empirical analyses reveal that state-of-the-art methods still suffer from substantial cyclic errors. We attribute this instability to the structural noise amplification within their non-orthogonal decoding mechanisms. This mathematical vulnerability significantly exacerbates angular deviations, particularly for square-like objects. To resolve this fundamentally, we propose the Fourier Series Coder (FSC), a lightweight plug-and-play component that establishes a continuous, reversible, and mathematically robust angle encoding-decoding paradigm. By rigorously mapping angles onto a minimal orthogonal Fourier basis and explicitly enforcing a geometric manifold constraint, FSC effectively prevents feature modulus collapse. This structurally stabilized representation ensures highly robust phase unwrapping, intrinsically eliminating the need for heuristic truncations while achieving strict boundary continuity and superior noise immunity. Extensive experiments across three large-scale datasets demonstrate that FSC achieves highly competitive overall performance, yielding substantial improvements in high-precision detection. The code will be available at https://github.com/weiminghong/FSC.

analysis.tldr: 提出傅里叶级数编码器（FSC）解决旋转目标检测中的角度边界不连续问题，通过正交傅里叶基和几何流形约束实现连续、可逆的编解码。
analysis.research_motivation: 旋转目标检测中角度边界不连续（ABD）和循环模糊（CA）问题导致角度预测在周期边界附近剧烈波动，现有连续角度编码器仍存在非正交解码机制带来的结构噪声放大，尤其对正方形物体影响严重。
analysis.problem: 解决旋转目标检测中角度边界不连续和循环模糊问题，消除非正交解码机制导致的结构噪声放大和角度偏差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 理论分析和实验表明，现有连续角度编码器因非正交解码机制存在结构噪声放大，导致角度偏差，尤其对正方形物体更严重。
analysis.method: 提出傅里叶级数编码器（FSC），将角度映射到最小正交傅里叶基上，并施加几何流形约束防止特征模量崩溃，实现连续、可逆、鲁棒的编解码。
contributions: 揭示了现有连续角度编码器中非正交解码机制的结构噪声放大问题。
提出FSC，基于正交傅里叶基和几何流形约束，实现无启发式截断的边界连续编解码。
在三个大规模数据集上取得有竞争力的性能，显著提升高精度检测。
analysis.experiments: 在三个大规模数据集上进行实验，FSC取得了有竞争力的整体性能，并在高精度检测上有显著提升。
limitations: 可能增加少量计算开销。
对非正方形物体的改进幅度可能不如正方形物体明显。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出傅里叶级数编码器（FSC）解决旋转目标检测中的角度边界不连续问题，通过正交傅里叶基和几何流形约束实现连续、可逆的编解码。

papers.title: AgentLens: Adaptive Visual Modalities for Human-Agent Interaction in Mobile GUI Agents
papers.abstract: Mobile GUI agents can automate smartphone tasks by interacting directly with app interfaces, but how they should communicate with users during execution remains underexplored. Existing systems rely on two extremes: foreground execution, which maximizes transparency but prevents multitasking, and background execution, which supports multitasking but provides little visual awareness. Through iterative formative studies, we found that users prefer a hybrid model with just-in-time visual interaction, but the most effective visualization modality depends on the task. Motivated by this, we present AgentLens, a mobile GUI agent that adaptively uses three visual modalities during human-agent interaction: Full UI, Partial UI, and GenUI. AgentLens extends a standard mobile agent with adaptive communication actions and uses Virtual Display to enable background execution with selective visual overlays. In a controlled study with 21 participants, AgentLens was preferred by 85.7% of participants and achieved the highest usability (1.94 Overall PSSUQ) and adoption-intent (6.43/7).

analysis.tldr: AgentLens通过自适应视觉模态（全UI、部分UI、生成UI）提升移动GUI代理与用户交互的透明度和多任务能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有移动GUI代理在执行任务时与用户的交互方式存在两难：前台执行透明但阻碍多任务，后台执行支持多任务但缺乏视觉感知。用户需要一种混合模型，既能提供及时的视觉交互，又不影响多任务操作。
analysis.problem: 如何设计移动GUI代理的视觉交互模态，使其能够根据任务自适应地提供合适的视觉信息，平衡透明度和多任务支持。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过迭代形成性研究发现，用户偏好即时视觉交互的混合模型，但最有效的可视化模态取决于具体任务。
analysis.method: AgentLens扩展了标准移动代理，引入自适应通信动作，利用虚拟显示实现后台执行并选择性叠加视觉覆盖层，支持三种视觉模态：全UI、部分UI和生成UI。
contributions: 提出自适应视觉模态框架，根据任务动态选择全UI、部分UI或生成UI进行交互。
通过虚拟显示技术实现后台执行与选择性视觉覆盖，兼顾多任务和透明度。
用户研究显示85.7%参与者偏好AgentLens，且获得最高可用性和采用意向评分。
analysis.experiments: 在21名参与者中进行受控研究，AgentLens被85.7%参与者偏好，总体PSSUQ得分为1.94（越低越好），采用意向评分为6.43/7。
limitations: 用户研究规模较小（21人），可能无法代表广泛用户群体。
未提及不同任务类型下模态选择的准确率或效率量化分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AgentLens通过自适应视觉模态（全UI、部分UI、生成UI）提升移动GUI代理与用户交互的透明度和多任务能力。

papers.title: Accelerating New Product Introduction for Visual Quality Inspection via Few-Shot Diffusion-Based Defect Synthesis
papers.abstract: Industrial visual inspection systems often suffer from a severe scarcity of labeled defect data, particularly during the early stages of New Product Introduction (NPI). This limitation hinders the deployment of robust supervised detectors precisely when automated quality control is most needed. We present an end-to-end generative framework for high-fidelity, few-shot defect synthesis that enables both in-domain augmentation and cross-domain transfer. Our approach disentangles defect morphology from background appearance by combining masked textual inversion for defect representation learning, noise-blended conditioned generation for surface-aware synthesis, and gradient-aware post-processing for seamless visual integration. We evaluate the framework in two practically relevant settings: few-shot data augmentation, where synthetic samples enrich a small set of real defects, and zero-shot adaptation, where defects learned from a source domain are transferred to a novel target surface without any real target-domain defect examples. Using RF-DETR as the downstream detector, we show that the proposed pipeline substantially narrows the domain gap on a private industrial dataset. In the few-shot setting, synthetic augmentation improves mAP from 78.8% to 83.3%. In the zero-shot setting, synthetic domain adaptation improves mAP from 65.0% to 85.1%. These results demonstrate that high-fidelity defect synthesis can meaningfully accelerate NPI by enabling effective inspection models before sufficient real defect data has been collected.

analysis.tldr: 提出少样本扩散缺陷合成框架，通过解耦缺陷形态与背景，在工业质检新产线引入中显著提升检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 新产线引入初期缺乏标注缺陷数据，导致监督检测器难以部署，亟需高效数据增强方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在新产品引入阶段，利用极少甚至零真实缺陷样本生成高保真缺陷图像以训练视觉质检模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合掩码文本反转学习缺陷表征、噪声混合条件生成实现表面感知合成、梯度感知后处理实现无缝融合，解耦缺陷形态与背景。
contributions: 提出端到端少样本缺陷合成框架，支持域内增强和跨域迁移。
在少样本和零样本设定下，使用RF-DETR检测器在私有数据集上分别提升mAP 4.5%和20.1%。
analysis.experiments: 在私有工业数据集上评估少样本增强和零样本迁移两种场景，使用RF-DETR检测器，少样本mAP从78.8%提升至83.3%，零样本从65.0%提升至85.1%。
limitations: 仅在私有数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
依赖扩散模型，计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出少样本扩散缺陷合成框架，通过解耦缺陷形态与背景，在工业质检新产线引入中显著提升检测性能。

papers.title: ActuBench: A Multi-Agent LLM Pipeline for Generation and Evaluation of Actuarial Reasoning Tasks
papers.abstract: We present ActuBench, a multi-agent LLM pipeline for the automated generation and evaluation of advanced actuarial assessment items aligned with the International Actuarial Association (IAA) Education Syllabus. The pipeline separates four LLM roles by adapter: one agent drafts items, one constructs distractors, a third independently verifies both stages and drives bounded one-shot repair loops, and a cost-optimized auxiliary agent handles Wikipedia-note summarization and topic labelling. The items, per-model responses and complete leaderboard are published as a browsable web interface at https://actubench.de/en/, allowing readers and practitioners to inspect individual items without a repository checkout. We evaluate 50 language models from eight providers on two complementary benchmarks -- 100 empirically hardest multiple-choice items and 100 open-ended items scored by an LLM judge -- and report three headline findings. First, multi-agent verification is load-bearing: the independent verifier flags a majority of drafted items on first pass, most of which the one-shot repair loop resolves. Second, locally-hosted open-weights inference sits on the cost-performance Pareto front: a Gemma~4 model running on consumer hardware and a Cerebras-hosted 120B open-weights model dominate the near-zero-cost region, with the latter within one item of the top of the leaderboard. Third, MCQ and LLM-as-Judge rankings differ meaningfully: the MCQ scaffold inflates the performance ceiling, and Judge-mode evaluation is needed to discriminate at the frontier.

analysis.tldr: 提出ActuBench多智能体LLM流水线，自动生成和评估精算推理题目，发现多智能体验证、本地开源模型性价比和MCQ与LLM评判排名差异。
analysis.research_motivation: 精算领域需要高质量评估题目，但人工编写成本高、覆盖不全，现有LLM评估缺乏针对精算推理的自动化生成和验证方法。
analysis.problem: 如何自动生成和评估符合国际精算协会教育大纲的高级精算推理题目，并确保题目质量和评估可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多智能体验证是关键：独立验证器首次检查发现大部分草稿题目有问题，单次修复循环能解决多数问题；本地开源模型在成本-性能帕累托前沿占优；MCQ和LLM评判排名存在显著差异，MCQ会抬高性能上限，需要评判模式来区分前沿模型。
analysis.method: 多智能体LLM流水线，包含四个角色：起草者、干扰项构造者、独立验证者（驱动单次修复循环）、辅助智能体（Wikipedia摘要和主题标注）。
contributions: 提出ActuBench，首个自动生成和评估精算推理题目的多智能体LLM流水线
发布包含100道多选题和100道开放题的基准测试及完整排行榜
揭示多智能体验证的必要性、本地开源模型的性价比优势以及MCQ与LLM评判排名的差异
analysis.experiments: 评估了来自8个提供商的50个语言模型，使用100道多选题和100道开放题，开放题由LLM评判打分。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅针对精算领域，泛化性未知
开放题评估依赖LLM评判，可能存在偏差
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ActuBench多智能体LLM流水线，自动生成和评估精算推理题目，发现多智能体验证、本地开源模型性价比和MCQ与LLM评判排名差异。

papers.title: Text Steganography with Dynamic Codebook and Multimodal Large Language Model
papers.abstract: With the popularity of the large language models (LLMs), text steganography has achieved remarkable performance. However, existing methods still have some issues: (1) For the white-box paradigm, this steganography behavior is prone to exposure due to sharing the off-the-shelf language model between Alice and Bob.(2) For the black-box paradigm, these methods lack flexibility and practicality since Alice and Bob should share the fixed codebook while sharing a specific extracting prompt for each steganographic sentence. In order to improve the security and practicality, we introduce a black-box text steganography with a dynamic codebook and multimodal large language model. Specifically, we first construct a dynamic codebook via some shared session configuration and a multimodal large language model. Then an encrypted steganographic mapping is designed to embed secret messages during the steganographic caption generation. Furthermore, we introduce a feedback optimization mechanism based on reject sampling to ensure accurate extraction of secret messages. Experimental results show that the proposed method outperforms existing white-box text steganography methods in terms of embedding capacity and text quality. Meanwhile, the proposed method has achieved better practicality and flexibility than the existing black-box paradigm in some popular online social networks.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于动态码本和多模态大语言模型的黑盒文本隐写方法，提升安全性和实用性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本隐写方法在白盒范式下因共享语言模型易暴露，黑盒范式因固定码本和特定提取提示缺乏灵活性和实用性，需要更安全实用的方案。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种黑盒文本隐写方法，在无需共享固定码本和特定提取提示的前提下，实现高嵌入容量、高文本质量和准确提取。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用共享会话配置和多模态大语言模型构建动态码本，设计加密隐写映射嵌入秘密消息，并引入基于拒绝采样的反馈优化机制确保准确提取。

papers.title: Opportunistic Bone-Loss Screening from Routine Knee Radiographs Using a Multi-Task Deep Learning Framework with Sensitivity-Constrained Threshold Optimization
papers.abstract: Background: Osteoporosis and osteopenia are often undiagnosed until fragility fractures occur. Dual-energy X-ray absorptiometry (DXA) is the reference standard for bone mineral density (BMD) assessment, but access remains limited. Knee radiographs are obtained at high volume for osteoarthritis evaluation and may offer an opportunity for opportunistic bone-loss screening. Objective: To develop and evaluate a multi-task deep learning system for opportunistic bone-loss screening from routine knee radiographs without additional imaging or patient visits. Methods: We developed STR-Net, a multi-task framework for single-channel grayscale knee radiographs. The model includes a shared backbone, global average pooling feature aggregation, a shared neck, and a task-aware representation routing module connected to three task-specific heads: binary screening (Normal vs. Bone Loss), severity sub-classification (Osteopenia vs. Osteoporosis), and weakly coupled T-score regression with optional clinical variables. A sensitivity-constrained threshold optimization strategy (minimum sensitivity >= 0.86) was applied. The dataset included 1,570 knee radiographs, split at the patient level into training (n=1,120), validation (n=226), and test (n=224) sets. Results: On the held-out test set, STR-Net achieved an AUROC of 0.933, sensitivity of 0.904, specificity of 0.773, and AUPRC of 0.956 for binary screening. Severity sub-classification achieved an AUROC of 0.898. The T-score regression branch showed a Pearson correlation of 0.801 with DXA-measured T-scores in a pilot subset (n=31), with MAE of 0.279 and RMSE of 0.347. Conclusions: STR-Net enables single-pass bone-loss screening, severity stratification, and quantitative T-score estimation from routine knee radiographs. Prospective clinical validation is needed before deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出多任务深度学习框架STR-Net，从常规膝关节X光片中实现骨丢失机会性筛查，在二分类筛查中AUROC达0.933。
analysis.research_motivation: 骨质疏松和骨量减少常因未诊断而导致脆性骨折，DXA是金标准但可及性有限；膝关节X光片获取量大，可用于机会性骨丢失筛查。
analysis.problem: 如何从常规膝关节X光片中高效、准确地实现骨丢失筛查、严重程度分类和T值回归。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出STR-Net多任务框架，包括共享骨干网络、全局平均池化特征聚合、共享颈部、任务感知表示路由模块和三个任务头（二分类、严重程度子分类、T值回归），并采用灵敏度约束阈值优化策略（最小灵敏度≥0.86）。
contributions: 提出STR-Net多任务深度学习框架，实现从常规膝关节X光片中进行骨丢失筛查、严重程度分层和T值估计。
引入灵敏度约束阈值优化策略，确保高灵敏度。
analysis.experiments: 在1570张膝关节X光片数据集上评估，测试集二分类AUROC 0.933，灵敏度0.904，特异性0.773，AUPRC 0.956；严重程度子分类AUROC 0.898；T值回归在31例子集中Pearson相关系数0.801，MAE 0.279，RMSE 0.347。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（1570张），且T值回归仅基于31例子集。

papers.title: ATIR: Towards Audio-Text Interleaved Contextual Retrieval
papers.abstract: Audio carries richer information than text, including emotion, speaker traits, and environmental context, while also enabling lower-latency processing compared to speech-to-text pipelines. However, recent multimodal information retrieval research has predominantly focused on images, largely overlooking audio, especially in the setting of interleaved audio-text contextual retrieval. In this work, we introduce the Audio-Text Interleaved contextual Retrieval (ATIR) task, where queries can alternate between audio and text modalities. We construct an ATIR benchmark by integrating several Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR), QA, and retrieval datasets, ultimately unifying four types of contextual retrieval tasks. This benchmark substantially addresses the limitations of existing audio retrieval datasets in semantic retrieval. To study this task, we evaluate several off-the-shelf retrievers and train our ATIR model based on a Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM). We further introduce a novel token compression mechanism that is orthogonal to existing compression methods, thereby alleviating the issue of excessive audio tokens in MLLM-based ATIR models. Experimental results demonstrate that our ATIR model achieves substantial improvements over strong baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出音频-文本交错上下文检索任务（ATIR），构建基准并基于MLLM训练模型，引入正交的token压缩机制缓解音频token过多问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多模态检索研究主要关注图像，忽略了音频在情感、说话人特征和环境上下文等方面的丰富信息，且缺乏音频-文本交错上下文检索的设置。
analysis.problem: 音频-文本交错上下文检索（ATIR）任务，即查询可以在音频和文本模态之间交替，现有数据集和模型无法有效处理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建ATIR基准（整合ASR、QA和检索数据集），基于MLLM训练ATIR模型，并引入与现有方法正交的token压缩机制。
contributions: 提出ATIR任务并构建基准，统一四种上下文检索任务。
基于MLLM训练ATIR模型，并引入正交的token压缩机制缓解音频token过多问题。

limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集构建的基准，泛化性需进一步验证。

papers.title: AROMA: Augmented Reasoning Over a Multimodal Architecture for Virtual Cell Genetic Perturbation Modeling
papers.abstract: Virtual cell modeling predicts molecular state changes under genetic perturbations in silico, which is essential for biological mechanism studies. However, existing approaches suffer from unconstrained reasoning, uninterpretable predictions, and retrieval signals that are weakly aligned with regulatory topology. To address these limitations, we propose AROMA, an Augmented Reasoning Over a Multimodal Architecture for virtual cell genetic perturbation modeling. AROMA integrates textual evidence, graph-topology information, and protein sequence features to model perturbation-target dependencies, and is trained with a two-stage optimization strategy to yield predictions that are both accurate and interpretable. We also construct two knowledge graphs and a perturbation reasoning dataset, PerturbReason, containing more than 498k samples, as reusable resources for the virtual cell domain. Experiments show that AROMA outperforms existing methods across multiple cell lines, and remains robust under zero-shot evaluation on an unseen cell line, as well as in knowledge-sparse, long-tail scenarios. Overall, AROMA demonstrates that combining knowledge-driven multimodal modeling with evidence retrieval provides a promising pathway toward more reliable and interpretable virtual cell perturbation prediction. Model weights are available at https://huggingface.co/blazerye/AROMA. Code is available at https://github.com/blazerye/AROMA.

analysis.tldr: AROMA 通过多模态推理和知识图谱增强，实现更准确、可解释的虚拟细胞遗传扰动预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 虚拟细胞建模对生物机制研究至关重要，但现有方法存在推理不受约束、预测不可解释、检索信号与调控拓扑对齐弱等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何实现准确且可解释的虚拟细胞遗传扰动预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法在推理约束、可解释性和检索信号对齐方面存在不足。
analysis.method: AROMA 集成文本证据、图拓扑信息和蛋白质序列特征，通过两阶段优化策略训练，并构建知识图谱和扰动推理数据集 PerturbReason。
contributions: 提出 AROMA 多模态架构，融合文本、图拓扑和序列特征进行扰动预测。
构建两个知识图谱和包含 498k+ 样本的 PerturbReason 数据集。
实验表明 AROMA 在多个细胞系上优于现有方法，并在零样本和长尾场景下保持鲁棒。
analysis.experiments: 在多个细胞系上评估，包括零样本评估和长尾场景，AROMA 优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖知识图谱的完整性和质量。

analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AROMA 通过多模态推理和知识图谱增强，实现更准确、可解释的虚拟细胞遗传扰动预测。

papers.title: Memory-Augmented LLM-based Multi-Agent System for Automated Feature Generation on Tabular Data
papers.abstract: Automated feature generation extracts informative features from raw tabular data without manual intervention and is crucial for accurate, generalizable machine learning. Traditional methods rely on predefined operator libraries and cannot leverage task semantics, limiting their ability to produce diverse, high-value features for complex tasks. Recent Large Language Model (LLM)-based approaches introduce richer semantic signals, but still suffer from a restricted feature space due to fixed generation patterns and from the absence of feedback from the learning objective. To address these challenges, we propose a Memory-Augmented LLM-based Multi-Agent System (\textbf{MALMAS}) for automated feature generation. MALMAS decomposes the generation process into agents with distinct responsibilities, and a Router Agent activates an appropriate subset of agents per iteration, further broadening exploration of the feature space. We further integrate a memory module comprising procedural memory, feedback memory, and conceptual memory, enabling iterative refinement that adaptively guides subsequent feature generation and improves feature quality and diversity. Extensive experiments on multiple public datasets against state-of-the-art baselines demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. The code is available at https://github.com/fxdong24/MALMAS

analysis.tldr: 提出记忆增强的LLM多智能体系统MALMAS，通过分解角色、路由激活和记忆模块提升表格数据自动特征生成的质量与多样性。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统自动特征生成方法依赖预定义算子库，无法利用任务语义，导致特征多样性和价值有限；现有LLM方法虽引入语义信号，但受限于固定生成模式且缺乏学习目标反馈。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM在表格数据上生成更高质量、更多样化的特征，同时引入任务语义和迭代优化反馈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MALMAS，将特征生成分解为多个具有不同职责的智能体，通过路由智能体每轮激活合适的子集以扩展特征空间探索；集成程序记忆、反馈记忆和概念记忆模块，实现迭代优化。
contributions: 提出MALMAS，一种记忆增强的LLM多智能体系统，用于自动特征生成。
设计路由机制和三种记忆模块，提升特征质量和多样性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个公开数据集上进行了实验，与最先进基线相比验证了有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的推理能力，对复杂任务的计算开销较大。

analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出记忆增强的LLM多智能体系统MALMAS，通过分解角色、路由激活和记忆模块提升表格数据自动特征生成的质量与多样性。

papers.title: Rethinking Where to Edit: Task-Aware Localization for Instruction-Based Image Editing
papers.abstract: Instruction-based image editing (IIE) aims to modify images according to textual instructions while preserving irrelevant content. Despite recent advances in diffusion transformers, existing methods often suffer from over-editing, introducing unintended changes to regions unrelated to the desired edit. We identify that this limitation arises from the lack of an explicit mechanism for edit localization. In particular, different editing operations (e.g., addition, removal and replacement) induce distinct spatial patterns, yet current IIE models typically treat localization in a task-agnostic manner. To address this limitation, we propose a training-free, task-aware edit localization framework that exploits the intrinsic source and target image streams within IIE models. For each image stream, We first obtain attention-based edit cues, and then construct feature centroids based on these attentive cues to partition tokens into edit and non-edit regions. Based on the observation that optimal localization is inherently task-dependent, we further introduce a unified mask construction strategy that selectively leverages source and target image streams for different editing tasks. We provide a systematic analysis for our proposed insights and approaches. Extensive experiments on EdiVal-Bench demonstrate our framework consistently improves non-edit region consistency while maintaining strong instruction-following performance on top of powerful recent image editing backbones, including Step1X-Edit and Qwen-Image-Edit.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练、任务感知的编辑定位框架，通过利用源和目标图像流中的注意力线索改进指令式图像编辑中的过度编辑问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 指令式图像编辑中现有方法常因缺乏显式编辑定位机制而导致过度编辑，即对无关区域产生意外修改，且不同编辑操作（如添加、移除、替换）的空间模式各异，但当前模型通常以任务无关方式处理定位。
analysis.problem: 解决指令式图像编辑中因缺乏任务感知的显式定位机制而导致的过度编辑问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同编辑操作（添加、移除、替换）会诱导不同的空间模式，但现有IIE模型以任务无关方式处理定位，导致过度编辑。
analysis.method: 提出一种无需训练的任务感知编辑定位框架，利用IIE模型内在的源和目标图像流，首先获取基于注意力的编辑线索，然后根据这些注意力线索构建特征质心以将令牌划分为编辑和非编辑区域，并基于最优定位任务依赖的观察，引入统一掩码构建策略，针对不同编辑任务选择性利用源和目标图像流。
contributions: 识别出指令式图像编辑中过度编辑问题源于缺乏显式编辑定位机制，并揭示不同编辑操作具有不同空间模式。
提出一种无需训练、任务感知的编辑定位框架，通过注意力线索和特征质心划分令牌，并引入统一掩码构建策略。
在EdiVal-Bench上实验表明，该方法在保持强指令遵循性能的同时，一致提升了非编辑区域的一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在EdiVal-Bench上基于Step1X-Edit和Qwen-Image-Edit等骨干网络进行实验，结果表明方法一致提升了非编辑区域的一致性并保持了指令遵循性能。
limitations: 方法依赖注意力线索的质量，可能在某些复杂场景下定位不准确。
未在更多样化的数据集或真实用户场景中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练、任务感知的编辑定位框架，通过利用源和目标图像流中的注意力线索改进指令式图像编辑中的过度编辑问题。

papers.title: uLEAD-TabPFN: Uncertainty-aware Dependency-based Anomaly Detection with TabPFN
papers.abstract: Anomaly detection in tabular data is challenging due to high dimensionality, complex feature dependencies, and heterogeneous noise. Many existing methods rely on proximity-based cues and may miss anomalies caused by violations of complex feature dependencies. Dependency-based anomaly detection provides a principled alternative by identifying anomalies as violations of dependencies among features. However, existing methods often struggle to model such dependencies robustly and to scale to high-dimensional data with complex dependency structures. To address these challenges, we propose uLEAD-TabPFN, a dependency-based anomaly detection framework built on Prior-Data Fitted Networks (PFNs). uLEAD-TabPFN identifies anomalies as violations of conditional dependencies in a learned latent space, leveraging frozen PFNs for dependency estimation. Combined with uncertainty-aware scoring, the proposed framework enables robust and scalable anomaly detection. Experiments on 57 tabular datasets from ADBench show that uLEAD-TabPFN achieves particularly strong performance in medium- and high-dimensional settings, where it attains the top average rank. On high-dimensional datasets, uLEAD-TabPFN improves the average ROC-AUC by nearly 20\% over the average baseline and by approximately 2.8\% over the best-performing baseline, while maintaining overall superior performance compared to state-of-the-art methods. Further analysis shows that uLEAD-TabPFN provides complementary anomaly detection capability, achieving strong performance on datasets where many existing methods struggle.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于TabPFN的依赖感知异常检测框架，在高维表格数据上显著提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 表格数据异常检测面临高维、复杂特征依赖和异质噪声挑战，现有方法多依赖近邻线索，难以捕捉违反复杂依赖的异常，且难以扩展到高维数据。
analysis.problem: 如何利用先验数据拟合网络（PFN）实现鲁棒且可扩展的依赖型异常检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建基于PFN的依赖型异常检测框架uLEAD-TabPFN，在学习的潜在空间中识别违反条件依赖的异常，结合不确定性感知评分实现鲁棒检测。
contributions: 提出uLEAD-TabPFN，首个将PFN用于依赖型异常检测的框架。
在57个表格数据集上验证，高维场景下平均ROC-AUC提升近20%，比最佳基线高2.8%。
analysis.experiments: 在ADBench的57个表格数据集上评估，重点报告了中高维场景下的平均排名和ROC-AUC改进。
limitations: 可能依赖PFN的预训练质量。
对低维或简单依赖结构的数据集优势可能不明显。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于TabPFN的依赖感知异常检测框架，在高维表格数据上显著提升性能。

papers.title: Mol-Debate: Multi-Agent Debate Improves Structural Reasoning in Molecular Design
papers.abstract: Text-guided molecular design is a key capability for AI-driven drug discovery, yet it remains challenging to map sequential natural-language instructions with non-linear molecular structures under strict chemical constraints. Most existing approaches, including RAG, CoT prompting, and fine-tuning or RL, emphasize a small set of ad-hoc reasoning perspectives implemented in a largely one-shot generation pipeline. In contrast, real-world drug discovery relies on dynamic, multi-perspective critique and iterative refinement to reconcile semantic intent with structural feasibility. Motivated by this, we propose Mol-Debate, a generation paradigm that enables such dynamic reasoning through an iterative generate-debate-refine loop. We further characterize key challenges in this paradigm and address them through perspective-oriented orchestration, including developer-debater conflict, global-local structural reasoning, and static-dynamic integration. Experiments demonstrate that Mol-Debate achieves state-of-the-art performance against strong general and chemical baselines, reaching 59.82% exact match on ChEBI-20 and 50.52% weighted success rate on S$^2$-Bench. Our code is available at https://github.com/wyuzh/Mol-Debate.

analysis.tldr: Mol-Debate 通过多智能体辩论循环提升分子设计的结构推理能力，在 ChEBI-20 和 S²-Bench 上达到 SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本引导的分子设计是 AI 药物发现的关键能力，但现有方法（如 RAG、CoT、微调/RL）多采用一次性生成管线，缺乏多视角批判和迭代优化，难以满足真实药物发现中动态、多视角的推理需求。
analysis.problem: 如何实现多视角、迭代式的分子结构推理，以弥合自然语言指令与非线性分子结构之间的语义-结构鸿沟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法依赖少量特定推理视角且为一次性生成，而真实药物发现需要动态的多视角批判和迭代优化。
analysis.method: 提出 Mol-Debate 生成范式，通过迭代的生成-辩论-精炼循环实现动态推理，并采用视角导向编排解决开发者-辩论者冲突、全局-局部结构推理和静态-动态集成等关键挑战。
contributions: 提出 Mol-Debate，一种基于多智能体辩论的迭代式分子设计范式。
识别并解决了该范式中的关键挑战，包括冲突、多尺度推理和集成问题。
在 ChEBI-20 和 S²-Bench 上取得 SOTA 性能。
analysis.experiments: 在 ChEBI-20 上达到 59.82% 精确匹配，在 S²-Bench 上达到 50.52% 加权成功率，优于强基线和化学基线。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量辩论智能体的设计，泛化性需进一步验证。
迭代循环可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Mol-Debate 通过多智能体辩论循环提升分子设计的结构推理能力，在 ChEBI-20 和 S²-Bench 上达到 SOTA。

papers.title: Cortex 2.0: Grounding World Models in Real-World Industrial Deployment
papers.abstract: Industrial robotic manipulation demands reliable long-horizon execution across embodiments, tasks, and changing object distributions. While Vision-Language-Action models have demonstrated strong generalization, they remain fundamentally reactive. By optimizing the next action given the current observation without evaluating potential futures, they are brittle to the compounding failure modes of long-horizon tasks. Cortex 2.0 shifts from reactive control to plan-and-act by generating candidate future trajectories in visual latent space, scoring them for expected success and efficiency, then committing only to the highest-scoring candidate. We evaluate Cortex 2.0 on a single-arm and dual-arm manipulation platform across four tasks of increasing complexity: pick and place, item and trash sorting, screw sorting, and shoebox unpacking. Cortex 2.0 consistently outperforms state-of-the-art Vision-Language-Action baselines, achieving the best results across all tasks. The system remains reliable in unstructured environments characterized by heavy clutter, frequent occlusions, and contact-rich manipulation, where reactive policies fail. These results demonstrate that world-model-based planning can operate reliably in complex industrial environments.

analysis.tldr: Cortex 2.0 通过视觉潜在空间中的未来轨迹生成与评分，将机器人控制从反应式转向规划-执行，在工业操作任务中显著优于VLA基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业机器人操作需要跨实体、任务和物体分布的可靠长程执行，现有VLA模型虽泛化强但本质上是反应式的，仅优化当前动作而不评估未来，导致长程任务中错误累积。
analysis.problem: 解决反应式控制策略在长程工业操作任务中因缺乏未来评估而脆弱的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出反应式策略在杂乱、遮挡和接触丰富的非结构化环境中失败，而基于世界模型的规划能够可靠运行。
analysis.method: Cortex 2.0 采用规划-执行范式：在视觉潜在空间中生成候选未来轨迹，根据预期成功率和效率评分，仅执行最高分候选。
contributions: 提出从反应式控制转向规划-执行的Cortex 2.0框架，通过视觉潜在空间轨迹生成与评分实现可靠长程操作。
在单臂和双臂平台上四个复杂度递增的任务中，Cortex 2.0一致优于最先进的VLA基线，尤其在杂乱、遮挡和接触丰富的环境中表现鲁棒。
analysis.experiments: 在单臂和双臂操作平台上评估了四个任务：拾放、物品与垃圾分拣、螺丝分拣、鞋盒拆包，Cortex 2.0在所有任务上取得最佳结果。
limitations: 摘要未提及在更复杂或未见任务上的泛化能力。
可能依赖精确的视觉潜在空间建模，对感知噪声敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Cortex 2.0 通过视觉潜在空间中的未来轨迹生成与评分，将机器人控制从反应式转向规划-执行，在工业操作任务中显著优于VLA基线。

papers.title: Secure Rate-Distortion-Perception: A Randomized Distributed Function Computation Approach for Realism
papers.abstract: Fundamental rate-distortion-perception (RDP) trade-offs arise in applications requiring maintained perceptual quality of reconstructed data, such as neural image compression. When compressed data is transmitted over public communication channels, security risks emerge. We therefore study secure RDP under negligible information leakage over both noiseless channels and broadcast channels, BCs, with correlated noise components. For noiseless channels, the exact secure RDP region is characterized. For BCs, an inner bound is derived and shown to be tight for a class of more-capable BCs. Separate source-channel coding is further shown to be optimal for this exact secure RDP region with unlimited common randomness available. Moreover, when both encoder and decoder have access to side information correlated with the source and the channel is noiseless, the exact RDP region is established. If only the decoder has correlated side information in the noiseless setting, an inner bound is derived along with a special case where the region is exact. Binary and Gaussian examples demonstrate that common randomness can significantly reduce the communication rate in secure RDP settings, unlike in standard rate-distortion settings. Thus, our results illustrate that random binning-based coding achieves strong secrecy, low distortion, and high perceptual quality simultaneously.

analysis.tldr: 本文研究了在安全约束下的率-失真-感知（RDP）权衡，通过随机分布式函数计算方法实现了强保密、低失真和高感知质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 在神经图像压缩等应用中，需要在保持重建数据感知质量的同时传输压缩数据，但公共通信信道存在安全风险，现有RDP理论未考虑安全性。
analysis.problem: 如何在无噪声信道和广播信道下，在信息泄露可忽略的条件下，实现率-失真-感知（RDP）的最优权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用基于随机装箱（random binning）的编码方法，结合分布式函数计算框架，在无噪声信道和广播信道下推导安全RDP区域。
contributions: 刻画了无噪声信道下精确的安全RDP区域。
推导了广播信道下安全RDP的内界，并证明对一类更优广播信道是紧的。
证明了在无限公共随机性下，分离信源信道编码对精确安全RDP区域最优。
建立了编码器和解码器均有边信息时的精确RDP区域，以及仅解码器有边信息时的内界。
通过二元和高斯示例表明公共随机性可显著降低安全RDP设置中的通信速率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 广播信道下的内界仅对一类更优广播信道是紧的，一般情况尚未完全解决。
仅考虑了无噪声信道和广播信道，未涉及其他信道模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文研究了在安全约束下的率-失真-感知（RDP）权衡，通过随机分布式函数计算方法实现了强保密、低失真和高感知质量。

papers.title: Hybrid Policy Distillation for LLMs
papers.abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) is a powerful paradigm for compressing large language models (LLMs), whose effectiveness depends on intertwined choices of divergence direction, optimization strategy, and data regime. We break down the design of existing KD methods and present a unified view that establishes connections between them, reformulating KD as a reweighted log-likelihood objective at the token level. We further propose Hybrid Policy Distillation (HPD), which integrates the complementary advantages of forward and reverse KL to balance mode coverage and mode-seeking, and combines off-policy data with lightweight, approximate on-policy sampling. We validate HPD on long-generation math reasoning as well as short-generation dialogue and code tasks, demonstrating improved optimization stability, computational efficiency, and final performance across diverse model families and scales. The code related to this work is available at https://github.com/zwhong714/Hybrid-Policy-Distillation.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合策略蒸馏HPD，融合前向与反向KL优势，提升LLM知识蒸馏的稳定性与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 知识蒸馏是压缩大语言模型的有效方法，但其性能高度依赖于散度方向、优化策略和数据选择等交织因素，现有方法缺乏统一视角，难以平衡模式覆盖与模式寻找。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种统一的蒸馏框架，融合不同KL散度的互补优势，并高效结合离策略与近似在策略数据，以提升LLM蒸馏的稳定性和性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出混合策略蒸馏（HPD），将蒸馏重新表述为token级别的重加权对数似然目标，集成前向KL（模式覆盖）和反向KL（模式寻找）的互补优势，并组合离策略数据与轻量近似在策略采样。
contributions: 提出统一视角，将现有KD方法分解并重新表述为token级重加权对数似然目标，揭示方法间联系。
提出HPD方法，融合前向与反向KL，结合离策略与近似在策略数据，在长生成数学推理、短生成对话和代码任务上验证了优化稳定性、计算效率和最终性能的提升。
analysis.experiments: 在长生成数学推理、短生成对话和代码任务上，跨多种模型族和规模验证了HPD的优化稳定性、计算效率和最终性能提升。
limitations: 摘要未提及在超大规模模型或更多样化任务上的验证。
近似在策略采样的质量可能影响蒸馏效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合策略蒸馏HPD，融合前向与反向KL优势，提升LLM知识蒸馏的稳定性与效率。

papers.title: Bio-inspired Color Constancy: From Gray Anchoring Theory to Gray Pixel Methods
papers.abstract: Color constancy is a fundamental ability of many biological visual systems and a crucial step in computer imaging systems. Bio-inspired modeling offers a promising way to elucidate the computational principles underlying color constancy and to develop efficient computational methods. However, bio-inspired methods for color constancy remain underexplored and lack a comprehensive analysis. This paper presents a comprehensive technical framework that integrates biological mechanisms, computational theory, and algorithmic implementation for bio-inspired color constancy. Specifically, we systematically revisit the computational theory of biological color constancy, which shows that illuminant estimation can be reduced to the task of gray-anchor (pixel or surface) detection in early vision. Subsequently, typical gray-pixel detection methods, including Gray-Pixel and Grayness-Index, are reinterpreted within a unified theoretical framework with the Lambertian reflection model and biological color-opponent mechanisms. Finally, we propose a simple learning-based method that couples reflection-model constraints with feature learning to explore the potential of bio-inspired color constancy based on gray-pixel detection. Extensive experiments confirm the effectiveness of gray-pixel detection for color constancy and demonstrate the potential of bio-inspired methods.

analysis.tldr: 从生物颜色恒常性理论出发，将灰锚定理论统一为灰像素检测框架，并提出一种结合反射模型约束与特征学习的简单方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 颜色恒常性是生物视觉系统的基本能力，也是计算机成像系统的关键步骤，但生物启发方法缺乏系统分析和统一框架。
