analysis.problem: 如何从生物颜色恒常性理论出发，建立统一的灰像素检测框架并提升其性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个综合技术框架，整合生物机制、计算理论和算法实现；将灰锚定理论统一为灰像素检测；提出基于学习的简单方法，耦合反射模型约束与特征学习。
contributions: 系统回顾了生物颜色恒常性的计算理论，将光照估计简化为灰锚点检测。
在统一理论框架下重新解释了典型灰像素检测方法，并提出了结合反射模型约束与特征学习的简单学习方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法基于Lambertian反射模型，可能不适用于非朗伯表面。
学习方法的性能可能依赖于训练数据，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从生物颜色恒常性理论出发，将灰锚定理论统一为灰像素检测框架，并提出一种结合反射模型约束与特征学习的简单方法。

papers.title: Enhancing Speaker Verification with Whispered Speech via Post-Processing
papers.abstract: Speaker verification is a task of confirming an individual's identity through the analysis of their voice. Whispered speech differs from phonated speech in acoustic characteristics, which degrades the performance of speaker verification systems in real-life scenarios, including avoiding fully phonated speech to protect privacy, disrupt others, or when the lack of full vocalization is dictated by a disease. In this paper we propose a model with a training recipe to obtain more robust representations against whispered speech hindrances. The proposed system employs an encoder--decoder structure built atop a fine-tuned speaker verification backbone, optimized jointly using cosine similarity--based classification and triplet loss. We gain relative improvement of 22.26\% compared to the baseline (baseline 6.77\% vs ours 5.27\%) in normal vs whispered speech trials, achieving AUC of 98.16\%. In tests comparing whispered to whispered, our model attains an EER of 1.88\% with AUC equal to 99.73\%, which represents a 15\% relative enhancement over the prior leading ReDimNet-B2. We also offer a summary of the most popular and state-of-the-art speaker verification models in terms of their performance with whispered speech. Additionally, we evaluate how these models perform under noisy audios, obtaining that generally the same relative level of noise degrades the performance of speaker verification more significantly on whispered speech than on normal speech.

analysis.tldr: 提出后处理编码器-解码器结构提升耳语语音说话人验证性能，相对改进22.26%。
analysis.research_motivation: 耳语语音与正常语音声学特性差异大，导致说话人验证系统在隐私保护、避免打扰或疾病等真实场景中性能下降。
analysis.problem: 如何获得对耳语语音干扰更鲁棒的说话人表征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 相同相对噪声水平下，耳语语音比正常语音对说话人验证性能的退化更显著。
analysis.method: 在微调后的说话人验证骨干网络上构建编码器-解码器结构，联合使用基于余弦相似度的分类损失和三元组损失进行优化。
contributions: 提出一种后处理模型及训练方案，提升耳语语音说话人验证的鲁棒性。
在正常vs耳语和耳语vs耳语测试中分别取得22.26%和15%的相对改进。
总结了主流说话人验证模型在耳语语音上的性能，并评估了噪声影响。
analysis.experiments: 在正常vs耳语测试中，基线EER 6.77%降至5.27%，AUC达98.16%；耳语vs耳语测试中，EER 1.88%，AUC 99.73%，相对改进15%。
limitations: 仅针对耳语语音的后处理，可能无法推广到其他非正常语音。
未在真实场景中验证隐私保护等应用效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出后处理编码器-解码器结构提升耳语语音说话人验证性能，相对改进22.26%。

papers.title: Learning Spatial-Temporal Coherent Correlations for Speech-Preserving Facial Expression Manipulation
papers.abstract: Speech-preserving facial expression manipulation (SPFEM) aims to modify facial emotions while meticulously maintaining the mouth animation associated with spoken content. Current works depend on inaccessible paired training samples for the person, where two aligned frames exhibit the same speech content yet differ in emotional expression, limiting the SPFEM applications in real-world scenarios. In this work, we discover that speakers who convey the same content with different emotions exhibit highly correlated local facial animations in both spatial and temporal spaces, providing valuable supervision for SPFEM. To capitalize on this insight, we propose a novel spatial-temporal coherent correlation learning (STCCL) algorithm, which models the aforementioned correlations as explicit metrics and integrates the metrics to supervise manipulating facial expression and meanwhile better preserving the facial animation of spoken content. To this end, it first learns a spatial coherent correlation metric, ensuring that the visual correlations of adjacent local regions within an image linked to a specific emotion closely resemble those of corresponding regions in an image linked to a different emotion. Simultaneously, it develops a temporal coherent correlation metric, ensuring that the visual correlations of specific regions across adjacent image frames associated with one emotion are similar to those in the corresponding regions of frames associated with another emotion. Recognizing that visual correlations are not uniform across all regions, we have also crafted a correlation-aware adaptive strategy that prioritizes regions that present greater challenges. During SPFEM model training, we construct the spatial-temporal coherent correlation metric between corresponding local regions of the input and output image frames as an additional loss to supervise the generation process.

analysis.tldr: 提出时空一致相关性学习算法，利用不同情绪下相同语音内容的面部动画相关性，实现语音保留的面部表情编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法依赖难以获取的成对训练样本（同一人、相同语音、不同表情），限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在无成对训练数据条件下，实现保留语音内容的面部表情编辑。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现表达相同内容但情绪不同的说话者，其局部面部动画在时空上高度相关，可作为监督信号。
analysis.method: 提出时空一致相关性学习（STCCL）算法，包括空间一致相关性度量、时间一致相关性度量和相关性感知自适应策略，作为额外损失监督生成过程。
contributions: 发现不同情绪下相同语音内容的面部动画存在时空相关性，为SPFEM提供监督。
提出STCCL算法，显式建模时空相关性并集成到损失函数中。
设计相关性感知自适应策略，优先处理挑战性区域。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的面部关键点或区域划分。
对极端表情或快速语音动画的鲁棒性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出时空一致相关性学习算法，利用不同情绪下相同语音内容的面部动画相关性，实现语音保留的面部表情编辑。

papers.title: LunarDepthNet: Generation of Digital Elevation Models using Deep Learning and Monocular Satellite Images
papers.abstract: Recent times have seen an increase in demand of high quality Digital Elevation Models (DEMs) for the lunar surface, because they are highly important for studying the moon and planning future missions. However, there is an evident lack of detailed elevation data on the Moon. To overcome this limitation, this study proposes a novel deep learning method that estimates and generates a surface elevation map directly from monocular images of the surface. The dataset used comprises of the Chandrayaan-2 Terrain Mapping Camera (TMC) images with their corresponding Digital Terrain Models (DTMs). The study proposes LunarDepthNet, which comprises of a UNet architecture to generate DEMS. It incorporates an EfficientNet encoder and custom layers to correctly learn how the light shadows on the surface relate to the actual elevation values. A combined loss function was also utilized to keep the terrain details accurate and smooth. During validation, the model showed a stable loss convergence of 12%. It achieved a mean nRMSE of 0.437 and an MAE of 4.5m in the testing stage. These results prove the model can generate dependable elevation maps from single orbital images, which are quite useful in regions of the moon where stereo-images are not available.

analysis.tldr: 提出LunarDepthNet，利用单目卫星图像和深度学习生成月球数字高程模型，在测试中达到nRMSE 0.437和MAE 4.5m。
analysis.research_motivation: 月球表面高质量数字高程模型（DEM）需求增加，但缺乏详细高程数据，现有方法依赖立体图像，在无立体图像区域受限。
analysis.problem: 如何从单目卫星图像直接生成可靠的月球表面高程图。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于UNet架构，采用EfficientNet编码器，结合自定义层学习光照阴影与高程的关系，并使用组合损失函数保持地形细节和平滑性。
contributions: 提出LunarDepthNet，从单目图像生成月球DEM的深度学习方法。
在Chandrayaan-2 TMC数据集上验证，实现nRMSE 0.437和MAE 4.5m的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在Chandrayaan-2 TMC图像与对应DTM数据集上验证，训练损失收敛至12%，测试nRMSE 0.437，MAE 4.5m。
limitations: 可能依赖特定卫星数据，泛化性需进一步验证。
未提及与其他方法的对比实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LunarDepthNet，利用单目卫星图像和深度学习生成月球数字高程模型，在测试中达到nRMSE 0.437和MAE 4.5m。

papers.title: Weighted Knowledge Distillation for Semi-Supervised Segmentation of Maxillary Sinus in Panoramic X-ray Images
papers.abstract: Accurate segmentation of maxillary sinus in panoramic X-ray images is essential for dental diagnosis and surgical planning; however, this task remains relatively underexplored in dental imaging research. Structural overlap, ambiguous anatomical boundaries inherent to two-dimensional panoramic projections, and the limited availability of large scale clinical datasets with reliable pixel-level annotations make the development and evaluation of segmentation models challenging. To address these challenges, we propose a semi-supervised segmentation framework that effectively leverages both labeled and unlabeled panoramic radiographs, where knowledge distillation is utilized to train a student model with reliable structural information distilled from a teacher model. Specifically, we introduce a weighted knowledge distillation loss to suppress unreliable distillation signals caused by structural discrepancies between teacher and student predictions. To further enhance the quality of pseudo labels generated by the teacher network, we introduce SinusCycle-GAN which is a refinement network based on unpaired image-to-image translation. This refinement process improves the precision of boundaries and reduces noise propagation when learning from unlabeled data during semi-supervised training. To evaluate the proposed method, we collected clinical panoramic X-ray images from 2,511 patients, and experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art segmentation models, achieving the Dice score of 96.35\% while reducing boundary error. The results indicate that the proposed semi-supervised framework provides robust and anatomically consistent segmentation performance under limited labeled data conditions, highlighting its potential for broader dental image analysis applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出加权知识蒸馏与SinCycle-GAN的半监督框架，在颌窦X光分割中达到96.35% Dice。
analysis.research_motivation: 全景X光片中上颌窦分割对牙科诊断和手术规划至关重要，但存在结构重叠、边界模糊和大规模标注数据稀缺等挑战，现有方法研究不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限标注数据下实现全景X光片中上颌窦的准确分割，并抑制教师-学生预测间的结构差异导致的不可靠蒸馏信号。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 教师和学生预测之间存在结构差异，导致蒸馏信号不可靠；伪标签质量受边界模糊和噪声影响。
analysis.method: 半监督分割框架：使用加权知识蒸馏损失抑制不可靠蒸馏信号，并引入SinCycle-GAN（基于非配对图像翻译的细化网络）提升教师网络生成的伪标签质量。
contributions: 提出加权知识蒸馏损失，有效处理教师-学生预测间的结构差异。
引入SinCycle-GAN细化伪标签，提升边界精度并减少噪声传播。
在2511例临床数据集上验证，达到96.35% Dice，优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在2511例临床全景X光图像上评估，与SOTA分割模型对比，Dice达96.35%，边界误差降低。
limitations: 可能依赖SinCycle-GAN的翻译质量，若域差异大可能影响效果。
未讨论对其他解剖结构或影像模态的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出加权知识蒸馏与SinCycle-GAN的半监督框架，在颌窦X光分割中达到96.35% Dice。

papers.title: Towards Secure Logging: Characterizing and Benchmarking Logging Code Security Issues with LLMs
papers.abstract: Logging code plays an important role in software systems by recording key events and behaviors, which are essential for debugging and monitoring. However, insecure logging practices can inadvertently expose sensitive information or enable attacks such as log injection, posing serious threats to system security and privacy. Prior research has examined general defects in logging code, but systematic analysis of logging code security issues remains limited, particularly in leveraging LLMs for detection and repair. In this paper, we derive a comprehensive taxonomy of logging code security issues, encompassing four common issue categories and 10 corresponding patterns. We further construct a benchmark dataset with 101 real-world logging security issue reports that have been manually reviewed and annotated. We then propose an automated framework that incorporates various contextual knowledge to evaluate LLMs' capabilities in detecting and repairing logging security issues. Our experimental results reveal a notable disparity in performance: while LLMs are moderately effective at detecting security issues (e.g., the accuracy ranges from 12.9% to 52.5% on average), they face noticeable challenges in reliably generating correct code repairs. We also find that the issue description alone improves the LLMs' detection accuracy more than the security pattern explanation or a combination of both. Overall, our findings provide actionable insights for practitioners and highlight the potential and limitations of current LLMs for secure logging.

analysis.tldr: 构建日志安全分类体系与基准，评估LLM在检测和修复日志安全缺陷上的能力与局限。
analysis.research_motivation: 日志代码安全缺陷（如敏感信息泄露、日志注入）威胁系统安全，但现有研究缺乏系统性分类和基于LLM的自动化检测修复评估。
analysis.problem: 缺乏日志代码安全问题的系统分类、基准数据集以及LLM在检测和修复此类问题上的能力评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM在检测日志安全问题上表现中等（准确率12.9%-52.5%），但在生成正确代码修复方面面临显著挑战；问题描述比安全模式解释或两者结合更能提升检测准确率。
analysis.method: 提出日志安全缺陷分类体系（4类10种模式），构建包含101个真实世界日志安全问题的基准数据集，并设计自动化框架集成多种上下文知识评估LLM的检测与修复能力。
contributions: 提出日志代码安全问题的系统分类体系（4类10种模式）
构建包含101个真实日志安全问题的基准数据集（经人工审查标注）
设计自动化框架评估LLM在检测和修复日志安全问题上的能力，并揭示其性能差距与影响因素
analysis.experiments: 在基准数据集上评估多个LLM的检测和修复性能，检测准确率12.9%-52.5%，修复效果有限；发现问题描述对检测提升最有效。
limitations: 基准数据集规模有限（101个报告），可能不覆盖所有日志安全模式
LLM修复能力评估仅基于自动生成，未进行人工验证修复正确性
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 构建日志安全分类体系与基准，评估LLM在检测和修复日志安全缺陷上的能力与局限。

papers.title: Vibrotactile Preference Learning: Uncertainty-Aware Preference Learning for Personalized Vibration Feedback
papers.abstract: Individual differences in vibrotactile perception underscore the growing importance of personalization as haptic feedback becomes more prevalent in interactive systems. We propose Vibrotactile Preference Learning (VPL), a system that captures user-specific preference spaces over vibrotactile parameters via Gaussian-process-based uncertainty-aware preference learning. VPL uses an expected information gain-based acquisition strategy to guide query selection over 40 rounds of pairwise comparisons of overall user preference, augmented with user-reported uncertainty, enabling efficient exploration of the parameter space. We evaluate VPL in a user study (N = 13) using the vibrotactile feedback from a Microsoft Xbox controller, showing that it efficiently learns individualized preferences while maintaining comfortable, low-workload user interactions. These results highlight the potential of VPL for scalable personalization of vibrotactile experiences.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于高斯过程的不确定性感知偏好学习方法，用于个性化振动触觉反馈。
analysis.research_motivation: 个体在振动触觉感知上存在显著差异，而触觉反馈在交互系统中日益普及，因此个性化需求日益增长。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地学习用户对振动触觉参数的个性化偏好，同时保持低用户负担。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: VPL系统：使用高斯过程进行不确定性感知偏好学习，通过基于期望信息增益的采集策略指导40轮成对比较查询，并融合用户报告的不确定性。
contributions: 提出VPL系统，实现个性化振动触觉反馈的高效学习
通过用户研究（N=13）验证了方法的有效性，表明能学习个性化偏好且保持低工作量
analysis.experiments: 在Microsoft Xbox控制器振动触觉反馈上进行用户研究（N=13），摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 样本量较小（N=13），可能影响泛化性
仅针对单一设备（Xbox控制器）的振动参数，未验证其他触觉设备
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于高斯过程的不确定性感知偏好学习方法，用于个性化振动触觉反馈。

papers.title: How Well Can We Decode Vowels from Auditory EEG -- A Rigorous Cross-Subject Benchmark with Honest Assessment
papers.abstract: EEG based phoneme decoding is promising for brain computer interfaces, but many prior studies rely on within subject evaluation, small cohorts, or weak leakage control. We present a reproducible cross subject benchmark for five class vowel decoding (a, e, i, o, u) from auditory EEG using OpenNeuro ds006104 (16 subjects, 61 channels, 256 Hz). Under strict leave one subject out evaluation with training only normalization and explicit anti leakage checks, we compare 14 pipelines from classical machine learning, deep learning, and Riemannian methods. The best full feature model (XGBoost) reaches 24.5 percent accuracy (chance 20 percent), while differential entropy features with LightGBM reach 25.5 percent in feature specific analysis. After multiple comparison correction, strong pairwise model advantages are limited. Classical methods are competitive with deep models in this low signal regime. Additional analyses (ablation, pairwise vowels, within subject CV, ERP, temporal generalization, and electrode importance) indicate that vowel information is real but weak and mainly carried by early transient auditory responses. We release code and evaluation scripts for full reproducibility.

analysis.tldr: 严格跨被试基准下，听觉EEG元音解码准确率仅略高于随机水平，信息主要来自早期听觉瞬态响应。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于EEG的音素解码对脑机接口有重要价值，但以往研究多依赖被试内评估、小样本或弱泄漏控制，缺乏可重复的跨被试基准。
analysis.problem: 在严格跨被试留一法评估下，量化听觉EEG中五类元音解码的真实性能，并比较多种方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 元音信息真实但微弱，主要携带于早期瞬态听觉响应；经典方法与深度模型在低信噪比下竞争力相当；多重比较校正后，模型间优势有限。
analysis.method: 构建可重复的跨被试基准，采用严格留一被试评估、训练集仅归一化、显式抗泄漏检查，比较14种经典机器学习、深度学习和黎曼几何方法。
contributions: 提出了首个严格跨被试的听觉EEG元音解码基准，包含16名被试、5类元音。
系统比较14种方法，发现最佳准确率仅25.5%（随机20%），揭示当前解码上限。
通过多项分析表明元音信息微弱且主要来自早期听觉响应，并公开代码和评估脚本。
analysis.experiments: 在OpenNeuro ds006104数据集上，采用留一被试评估，比较14种方法，最佳准确率24.5%-25.5%；还进行了消融、成对元音、被试内交叉验证、ERP、时间泛化和电极重要性分析。
limitations: 仅使用单一数据集，可能限制泛化性。
准确率仅略高于随机，实际应用价值有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 严格跨被试基准下，听觉EEG元音解码准确率仅略高于随机水平，信息主要来自早期听觉瞬态响应。

papers.title: From Scene to Object: Text-Guided Dual-Gaze Prediction
papers.abstract: Interpretable driver attention prediction is crucial for human-like autonomous driving. However, existing datasets provide only scene-level global gaze rather than fine-grained object-level annotations, inherently failing to support text-grounded cognitive modeling. Consequently, while Vision-Language Models (VLMs) hold great potential for semantic reasoning, this critical data limitations leads to severe text-vision decoupling and visual-bias hallucinations. To break this bottleneck and achieve precise object-level attention prediction, this paper proposes a novel dual-branch gaze prediction framework, establishing a complete paradigm from data construction to model architecture. First, we construct G-W3DA, a object-level driver attention dataset. By integrating a multimodal large language model with the Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM3), we decouple macroscopic heatmaps into object-level masks under rigorous cross-validation, fundamentally eliminating annotation hallucinations. Building upon this high-quality data foundation, we propose the DualGaze-VLM architecture. This architecture extracts the hidden states of semantic queries and dynamically modulates visual features via a Condition-Aware SE-Gate, achieving intent-driven precise spatial anchoring. Extensive experiments on the W3DA benchmark demonstrate that DualGaze-VLM consistently surpasses existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) models in spatial alignment metrics, notably achieving up to a 17.8% improvement in Similarity (SIM) under safety-critical scenarios. Furthermore, a visual Turing test reveals that the attention heatmaps generated by DualGaze-VLM are perceived as authentic by 88.22% of human evaluators, proving its capability to generate rational cognitive priors.

analysis.tldr: 提出 DualGaze-VLM 框架，通过构建对象级注意力数据集和双分支架构，实现文本引导的细粒度驾驶员注意力预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有驾驶员注意力数据集仅提供场景级全局注视，缺乏细粒度对象级标注，导致视觉-语言模型出现文本-视觉解耦和视觉偏差幻觉，无法支持文本引导的认知建模。
analysis.problem: 如何实现精确的对象级驾驶员注意力预测，克服现有数据限制和模型中的文本-视觉解耦问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有数据集仅提供场景级全局注视，导致 VLM 出现文本-视觉解耦和视觉偏差幻觉。
analysis.method: 提出 DualGaze-VLM 双分支架构，包含数据构建（利用多模态大模型和 SAM3 将宏观热图解耦为对象级掩码）和模型设计（提取语义查询隐藏状态，通过条件感知 SE-Gate 动态调制视觉特征）。
contributions: 构建了对象级驾驶员注意力数据集 G-W3DA，通过多模态大模型和 SAM3 消除标注幻觉。
提出 DualGaze-VLM 架构，实现意图驱动的精确空间锚定，在 W3DA 基准上超越 SOTA，SIM 提升 17.8%。
analysis.experiments: 在 W3DA 基准上评估，DualGaze-VLM 在空间对齐指标上超越现有 SOTA，安全关键场景下 SIM 提升 17.8%；视觉图灵测试中 88.22% 的人类评估者认为生成的热图真实。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集和场景，泛化性需进一步验证。
双分支架构可能增加计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 DualGaze-VLM 框架，通过构建对象级注意力数据集和双分支架构，实现文本引导的细粒度驾驶员注意力预测。

papers.title: WildFireVQA: A Large-Scale Radiometric Thermal VQA Benchmark for Aerial Wildfire Monitoring
papers.abstract: Wildfire monitoring requires timely, actionable situational awareness from airborne platforms, yet existing aerial visual question answering (VQA) benchmarks do not evaluate wildfire-specific multimodal reasoning grounded in thermal measurements. We introduce WildFireVQA, a large-scale VQA benchmark for aerial wildfire monitoring that integrates RGB imagery with radiometric thermal data. WildFireVQA contains 6,097 RGB-thermal samples, where each sample includes an RGB image, a color-mapped thermal visualization, and a radiometric thermal TIFF, and is paired with 34 questions, yielding a total of 207,298 multiple-choice questions spanning presence and detection, classification, distribution and segmentation, localization and direction, cross-modal reasoning, and flight planning for operational wildfire intelligence. To improve annotation reliability, we combine multimodal large language model (MLLM)-based answer generation with sensor-driven deterministic labeling, manual verification, and intra-frame and inter-frame consistency checks. We further establish a comprehensive evaluation protocol for representative MLLMs under RGB, Thermal, and retrieval-augmented settings using radiometric thermal statistics. Experiments show that across task categories, RGB remains the strongest modality for current models, while retrieved thermal context yields gains for stronger MLLMs, highlighting both the value of temperature-grounded reasoning and the limitations of existing MLLMs in safety-critical wildfire scenarios. The dataset and benchmark code are open-source at https://github.com/mobiiin/WildFire_VQA.

analysis.tldr: 首个集成辐射热成像的野火监测VQA基准，含20万+问题，揭示RGB仍是当前模型最强模态，热成像检索可提升强模型性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有航拍VQA基准缺乏基于热测量的野火多模态推理评估，而野火监测需要从空中平台获取及时、可操作的情境感知。
analysis.problem: 缺乏大规模、集成辐射热成像的野火专用VQA基准，以评估多模态大模型在野火场景中的推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验表明，在野火VQA任务中，RGB仍是当前模型的最强模态；对于更强的MLLM，检索热成像上下文可带来性能提升，但现有MLLM在安全关键的野火场景中存在局限性。
analysis.method: 构建包含6,097个RGB-热成像样本、207,298个多项选择题的基准，结合MLLM生成、传感器驱动确定性标注、人工验证及帧内/帧间一致性检查进行标注，并设计RGB、热成像和检索增强三种评估设置。
contributions: 提出WildFireVQA，首个大规模集成辐射热成像的野火监测VQA基准。
建立多模态大模型在野火场景下的综合评估协议，揭示RGB与热成像模态的互补性及现有模型局限。
analysis.experiments: 在多个代表性MLLM上评估RGB、热成像和检索增强设置下的性能，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖野火场景，可能不适用于其他灾害监测。
热成像检索增强仅对强MLLM有效，弱模型可能无法受益。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个集成辐射热成像的野火监测VQA基准，含20万+问题，揭示RGB仍是当前模型最强模态，热成像检索可提升强模型性能。

papers.title: Taint-Style Vulnerability Detection and Confirmation for Node.js Packages Using LLM Agent Reasoning
papers.abstract: The rapidly evolving Node$.$js ecosystem currently includes millions of packages and is a critical part of modern software supply chains, making vulnerability detection of Node$.$js packages increasingly important. However, traditional program analysis struggles in this setting because of dynamic JavaScript features and the large number of package dependencies. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) and the emerging paradigm of LLM-based agents offer an alternative to handcrafted program models. This raises the question of whether an LLM-centric, tool-augmented approach can effectively detect and confirm taint-style vulnerabilities (e.g., arbitrary command injection) in Node$.$js packages. We implement LLMVD$.$js, a multi-stage agent pipeline to scan code, propose vulnerabilities, generate proof-of-concept exploits, and validate them through lightweight execution oracles; and systematically evaluate its effectiveness in taint-style vulnerability detection and confirmation in Node$.$js packages without dedicated static/dynamic analysis engines for path derivation. For packages from public benchmarks, LLMVD$.$js confirms 84% of the vulnerabilities, compared to less than 22% for prior program analysis tools. It also outperforms a prior LLM-program-analysis hybrid approach while requiring neither vulnerability annotations nor prior vulnerability reports. When evaluated on a set of 260 recently released packages (without vulnerability groundtruth information), traditional tools produce validated exploits for few ($\leq 2$) packages, while LLMVD$.$js generates validated exploits for 36 packages.

analysis.tldr: 提出LLMVD.js，一种基于LLM Agent的多阶段流水线，用于检测和确认Node.js包中的污点风格漏洞，在基准测试中确认了84%的漏洞，远超传统工具。
analysis.research_motivation: Node.js生态系统庞大且动态特性强，传统程序分析难以有效检测漏洞，亟需新方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM Agent自动检测并确认Node.js包中的污点风格漏洞（如任意命令注入）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统工具在动态JavaScript和大量依赖下表现不佳，而LLM Agent结合工具可以生成并验证漏洞利用。
analysis.method: 多阶段Agent流水线：扫描代码、提出漏洞、生成概念验证利用、通过轻量执行预言机验证。
contributions: 提出LLMVD.js，首个基于LLM Agent的污点漏洞检测与确认框架
在基准测试中确认84%的漏洞，优于传统工具（<22%）和混合方法
在260个新包中发现36个有验证利用的漏洞，传统工具仅发现≤2个
analysis.experiments: 在公开基准和260个新发布包上评估，与传统程序分析工具和LLM-程序分析混合方法对比。
limitations: 依赖LLM的推理能力，可能受限于模型知识
仅针对污点风格漏洞，未覆盖其他类型
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LLMVD.js，一种基于LLM Agent的多阶段流水线，用于检测和确认Node.js包中的污点风格漏洞，在基准测试中确认了84%的漏洞，远超传统工具。

papers.title: Physics-Enhanced Deep Learning for Proactive Thermal Runaway Forecasting in Li-Ion Batteries
papers.abstract: Accurate prediction of thermal runaway in lithium-ion batteries is essential for ensuring the safety, efficiency, and reliability of modern energy storage systems. Conventional data-driven approaches, such as Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks, can capture complex temporal dependencies but often violate thermodynamic principles, resulting in physically inconsistent predictions. Conversely, physics-based thermal models provide interpretability but are computationally expensive and difficult to parameterize for real-time applications. To bridge this gap, this study proposes a Physics-Informed Long Short-Term Memory (PI-LSTM) framework that integrates governing heat transfer equations directly into the deep learning architecture through a physics-based regularization term in the loss function. The model leverages multi-feature input sequences, including state of charge, voltage, current, mechanical stress, and surface temperature, to forecast battery temperature evolution while enforcing thermal diffusion constraints. Extensive experiments conducted on thirteen lithium-ion battery datasets demonstrate that the proposed PI-LSTM achieves an 81.9% reduction in root mean square error (RMSE) and an 81.3% reduction in mean absolute error (MAE) compared to the standard LSTM baseline, while also outperforming CNN-LSTM and multilayer perceptron (MLP) models by wide margins. The inclusion of physical constraints enhances the model's generalization across diverse operating conditions and eliminates non-physical temperature oscillations. These results confirm that physics-informed deep learning offers a viable pathway toward interpretable, accurate, and real-time thermal management in next-generation battery systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出物理信息LSTM（PI-LSTM）框架，通过将热传导方程作为正则项融入损失函数，显著提升锂离子电池热失控预测的准确性和物理一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 锂离子电池热失控预测对储能系统安全至关重要，但纯数据驱动方法（如LSTM）常违反热力学原理，而纯物理模型计算成本高且难以实时应用。
analysis.problem: 如何融合物理约束与深度学习，实现准确、物理一致且实时的电池温度演化预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准LSTM预测可能产生非物理的温度振荡，违反热扩散约束。
analysis.method: 提出PI-LSTM框架，在LSTM损失函数中加入基于热传导方程的物理正则项，利用多特征输入（荷电状态、电压、电流、机械应力、表面温度）预测温度。
contributions: 首次将热传导方程作为正则项集成到LSTM中，实现物理约束的深度学习热失控预测。
在13个锂离子电池数据集上，PI-LSTM相比标准LSTM将RMSE降低81.9%，MAE降低81.3%，并优于CNN-LSTM和MLP。
analysis.experiments: 在13个锂离子电池数据集上进行实验，对比标准LSTM、CNN-LSTM和MLP，PI-LSTM在RMSE和MAE上分别降低81.9%和81.3%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定电池类型或工况，泛化性需进一步验证。
物理正则项的设计依赖热传导方程，对更复杂的热行为可能不够精确。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出物理信息LSTM（PI-LSTM）框架，通过将热传导方程作为正则项融入损失函数，显著提升锂离子电池热失控预测的准确性和物理一致性。

papers.title: Semantic-Fast-SAM: Efficient Semantic Segmenter
papers.abstract: We propose Semantic-Fast-SAM (SFS), a semantic segmentation framework that combines the Fast Segment Anything model with a semantic labeling pipeline to achieve real-time performance without sacrificing accuracy. FastSAM is an efficient CNN-based re-implementation of the Segment Anything Model (SAM) that runs much faster than the original transformer-based SAM. Building upon FastSAM's rapid mask generation, we integrate a Semantic-Segment-Anything (SSA) labeling strategy to assign meaningful categories to each mask. The resulting SFS model produces high-quality semantic segmentation maps at a fraction of the computational cost and memory footprint of the original SAM-based approach. Experiments on Cityscapes and ADE20K benchmarks demonstrate that SFS matches the accuracy of prior SAM-based methods (mIoU ~ 70.33 on Cityscapes and 48.01 on ADE20K) while achieving approximately 20x faster inference than SSA in the closed-set setting. We also show that SFS effectively handles open-vocabulary segmentation by leveraging CLIP-based semantic heads, outperforming recent open-vocabulary models on broad class labeling. This work enables practical real-time semantic segmentation with the "segment-anything" capability, broadening the applicability of foundation segmentation models in robotics scenarios. The implementation is available at https://github.com/KBH00/Semantic-Fast-SAM.

analysis.tldr: 基于FastSAM的实时语义分割框架，在保持精度的同时实现20倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 原始SAM模型计算成本高、推理速度慢，难以满足实时应用需求，而现有加速方案在语义分割精度上有所妥协。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持SAM语义分割精度的同时实现实时推理速度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: FastSAM作为CNN实现比原始Transformer版SAM快得多，但缺乏语义标签；直接结合语义头可恢复精度。
analysis.method: 以FastSAM生成候选掩码，再通过Semantic-Segment-Anything (SSA)策略为每个掩码分配语义类别，支持闭集和开集分割。
contributions: 提出SFS框架，结合FastSAM与语义标签流水线，实现实时语义分割。
在Cityscapes和ADE20K上匹配先前SAM方法精度，推理速度提升约20倍。
支持开集分割，利用CLIP语义头在宽类标注上优于近期开集模型。
analysis.experiments: 在Cityscapes和ADE20K上评估，闭集mIoU分别为70.33和48.01，推理速度比SSA快约20倍；开集分割也优于对比模型。
limitations: 可能依赖FastSAM的掩码质量，在复杂场景下掩码边界可能不精确。
开集分割性能受限于CLIP的语义理解能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于FastSAM的实时语义分割框架，在保持精度的同时实现20倍加速。

papers.title: Stateless Decision Memory for Enterprise AI Agents
papers.abstract: Enterprise deployment of long-horizon decision agents in regulated domains (underwriting, claims adjudication, tax examination) is dominated by retrieval-augmented pipelines despite a decade of increasingly sophisticated stateful memory architectures. We argue this reflects a hidden requirement: regulated deployment is load-bearing on four systems properties (deterministic replay, auditable rationale, multi-tenant isolation, statelessness for horizontal scale), and stateful architectures violate them by construction. We propose Deterministic Projection Memory (DPM): an append-only event log plus one task-conditioned projection at decision time. On ten regulated decisioning cases at three memory budgets, DPM matches summarization-based memory at generous budgets and substantially outperforms it when the budget binds: at a 20x compression ratio, DPM improves factual precision by +0.52 (Cohen's h=1.17, p=0.0014) and reasoning coherence by +0.53 (h=1.13, p=0.0034), paired permutation, n=10. DPM is additionally 7-15x faster at binding budgets, making one LLM call at decision time instead of N. A determinism study of 10 replays per case at temperature zero shows both architectures inherit residual API-level nondeterminism, but the asymmetry is structural: DPM exposes one nondeterministic call; summarization exposes N compounding calls. The audit surface follows the same one-versus-N pattern: DPM logs two LLM calls per decision while summarization logs 83-97 on LongHorizon-Bench. We conclude with TAMS, a practitioner heuristic for architecture selection, and a failure analysis of stateful memory under enterprise operating conditions. The contribution is the argument that statelessness is the load-bearing property explaining enterprise's preference for weaker but replayable retrieval pipelines, and that DPM demonstrates this property is attainable without the decisioning penalty retrieval pays.

analysis.tldr: 提出无状态决策记忆DPM，在受监管企业场景中优于有状态记忆架构。
analysis.research_motivation: 企业部署长周期决策智能体时，尽管有状态记忆架构日益复杂，实际仍偏好检索增强管道，原因在于有状态架构违反受监管部署所需的确定性重放、可审计推理、多租户隔离和无状态水平扩展等系统属性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种满足受监管企业系统属性（确定性、可审计、可扩展）的决策记忆架构，同时避免检索增强管道的性能损失。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出有状态记忆架构在受监管部署中因违反四个关键系统属性而被回避，而检索增强管道虽弱但可重放；无状态性是解释这一偏好的关键负载承载属性。
analysis.method: 提出确定性投影记忆（DPM）：仅追加事件日志加决策时一次任务条件投影，实现无状态决策。
contributions: 论证无状态性是受监管企业偏好检索增强管道的负载承载属性，并提出DPM实现无状态决策而不牺牲性能。
在十个受监管决策案例上，DPM在压缩预算下显著优于基于摘要的记忆，事实精度提升+0.52，推理连贯性提升+0.53，速度提升7-15倍。
提供确定性研究和审计面分析，显示DPM将非确定性和审计调用从N次减少到1次。
提出TAMS实践者启发式架构选择指南和有状态记忆在企业运行条件下的失败分析。
analysis.experiments: 在十个受监管决策案例上，使用三个记忆预算进行实验，包括事实精度、推理连贯性、速度、确定性和审计面分析。摘要提供了具体统计结果（Cohen's h, p值）和基准LongHorizon-Bench上的调用次数对比。
limitations: 实验仅在十个案例上进行，可能不足以泛化到所有企业场景。
DPM依赖任务条件投影的设计，可能对投影函数的选择敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无状态决策记忆DPM，在受监管企业场景中优于有状态记忆架构。

papers.title: HumanScore: Benchmarking Human Motions in Generated Videos
papers.abstract: Recent advances in model architectures, compute, and data scale have driven rapid progress in video generation, producing increasingly realistic content. Yet, no prior method systematically measures how faithfully these systems render human bodies and motion dynamics. In this paper, we present HumanScore, a systematic framework to evaluate the quality of human motions in AI-generated videos. HumanScore defines six interpretable metrics spanning kinematic plausibility, temporal stability, and biomechanical consistency, enabling fine-grained diagnosis beyond visual realism alone. Through carefully designed prompts, we elicit a diverse set of movements at varying intensities and evaluate videos generated by thirteen state-of-the-art models. Our analysis reveals consistent gaps between perceptual plausibility and motion biomechanical fidelity, identifies recurrent failure modes (e.g., temporal jitter, anatomically implausible poses, and motion drift), and produces robust model rankings from quantitative and physically meaningful criteria.

analysis.tldr: 提出HumanScore基准，系统评估生成视频中人体运动的运动学、时间稳定性和生物力学一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频生成模型虽能生成逼真内容，但缺乏系统评估人体运动质量的方法，无法诊断运动学、时间稳定性和生物力学方面的缺陷。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估AI生成视频中人体运动的忠实度，包括运动学合理性、时间稳定性和生物力学一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分析发现感知合理性与运动生物力学保真度之间存在持续差距，识别出时间抖动、解剖学不合理姿态和运动漂移等常见失败模式。
analysis.method: 定义六个可解释指标（运动学合理性、时间稳定性、生物力学一致性等），通过精心设计的提示生成多样化运动，评估13个SOTA模型。
contributions: 提出HumanScore，首个系统评估生成视频中人体运动质量的框架。
定义六个可解释指标，实现细粒度诊断。
揭示感知与生物力学保真度之间的差距，识别常见失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 评估了13个SOTA视频生成模型，通过多样化提示生成不同强度的运动，并基于定量和物理意义标准生成稳健模型排名。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有运动类型或复杂交互场景。
指标设计可能依赖特定运动学或生物力学假设。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HumanScore基准，系统评估生成视频中人体运动的运动学、时间稳定性和生物力学一致性。

papers.title: GSCompleter: A Distillation-Free Plugin for Metric-Aware 3D Gaussian Splatting Completion in Seconds
papers.abstract: While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has revolutionized real-time rendering, its performance degrades significantly under sparse-view extrapolation, manifesting as severe geometric voids and artifacts. Existing solutions primarily rely on an iterative "Repair-then-Distill" paradigm, which is inherently unstable and prone to overfitting. In this work, we propose GSCompleter, a distillation-free plugin that shifts scene completion to a stable "Generate-then-Register" workflow. Our approach first synthesizes plausible 2D reference images and explicitly lifts them into metric-scale 3D primitives via a robust Stereo-Anchor mechanism. These primitives are then seamlessly integrated into the global context through a novel Ray-Constrained Registration strategy. This shift to a rapid registration paradigm delivers superior 3DGS completion performance across three distinct benchmarks, enhancing the quality and efficiency of various baselines and achieving new SOTA results.

analysis.tldr: 提出无蒸馏插件GSCompleter，通过生成-注册范式快速完成3DGS稀疏视图补全。
analysis.research_motivation: 3DGS在稀疏视图外推时性能严重下降，出现几何空洞和伪影，现有修复-蒸馏方法不稳定且易过拟合。
analysis.problem: 解决3DGS在稀疏视图下的场景补全问题，避免蒸馏过程的不稳定性和过拟合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出无蒸馏插件GSCompleter，采用生成-注册工作流：先合成2D参考图像，通过立体锚点机制提升为度量尺度3D基元，再通过射线约束注册策略无缝集成到全局场景中。
contributions: 提出无蒸馏的生成-注册范式，替代不稳定的修复-蒸馏流程。
设计立体锚点机制和射线约束注册策略，实现快速且高质量的3DGS补全。
analysis.experiments: 在三个不同基准上评估，提升多种基线方法的质量和效率，达到新SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖2D参考图像合成的质量。
立体锚点机制在极端稀疏视图下可能失效。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无蒸馏插件GSCompleter，通过生成-注册范式快速完成3DGS稀疏视图补全。

papers.title: Maximum Likelihood Reconstruction for Multi-Look Digital Holography with Markov-Modeled Speckle Correlation
papers.abstract: Multi-look acquisition is a widely used strategy for reducing speckle noise in coherent imaging systems such as digital holography. By acquiring multiple measurements, speckle can be suppressed through averaging or joint reconstruction, typically under the assumption that speckle realizations across looks are statistically independent. In practice, however, hardware constraints limit measurement diversity, leading to inter-look correlation that degrades the performance of conventional methods. In this work, we study the reconstruction of speckle-free reflectivity from complex-valued multi-look measurements in the presence of correlated speckle. We model the inter-look dependence using a first-order Markov process and derive the corresponding likelihood under a first-order Markov approximation, resulting in a constrained maximum likelihood estimation problem. To solve this problem, we develop an efficient projected gradient descent framework that combines gradient-based updates with implicit regularization via deep image priors, and leverages Monte Carlo approximation and matrix-free operators for scalable computation. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed approach remains robust under strong inter-look correlation, achieving performance close to the ideal independent-look scenario and consistently outperforming methods that ignore such dependencies. These results highlight the importance of explicitly modeling inter-look correlation and provide a practical framework for multi-look holographic reconstruction under realistic acquisition conditions. Our code is available at: https://github.com/Computational-Imaging-RU/MLE-Holography-Markov.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于马尔可夫建模的极大似然重建方法，用于多视角数字全息中相关散斑噪声的抑制。
analysis.research_motivation: 多视角采集是抑制相干成像系统散斑噪声的常用策略，但硬件限制导致视角间散斑相关，传统独立假设方法性能下降。
analysis.problem: 在存在相关散斑的情况下，从复值多视角测量中重建无散斑反射率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出硬件限制导致视角间散斑相关，传统独立假设方法性能下降，而所提方法在强相关下仍能接近理想独立场景性能。
analysis.method: 将视角间依赖建模为一阶马尔可夫过程，推导一阶马尔可夫近似下的似然函数，形成约束极大似然估计问题；采用投影梯度下降框架，结合深度图像先验隐式正则化，并利用蒙特卡洛近似和无矩阵算子实现可扩展计算。
contributions: 首次将一阶马尔可夫过程用于建模多视角全息中的散斑相关性，并推导相应的似然函数。
提出一种结合深度先验和投影梯度下降的高效求解框架，适用于相关散斑下的多视角重建。
analysis.experiments: 仿真结果表明，所提方法在强视角间相关下保持鲁棒，性能接近理想独立场景，并持续优于忽略相关性的方法。
limitations: 一阶马尔可夫假设可能无法完全捕捉复杂相关性。
深度先验的隐式正则化缺乏理论保证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于马尔可夫建模的极大似然重建方法，用于多视角数字全息中相关散斑噪声的抑制。

papers.title: Meta-Tool: Efficient Few-Shot Tool Adaptation for Small Language Models
papers.abstract: Can small language models achieve strong tool-use performance without complex adaptation mechanisms? This paper investigates this question through Meta-Tool, a controlled empirical study comparing hypernetwork-based LoRA adaptation against carefully designed few-shot prompting. Using a Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct backbone, we evaluate four adaptation mechanisms--few-shot prompting, documentation encoding, hypernetwork-generated LoRA weights, and value-guided beam search--across four diverse benchmarks: Gorilla APIBench, Spider 2.0, WebArena, and InterCode. Our central finding is a well-supported negative result: despite generating non-trivial weight matrices, the 227.8M-parameter hypernetwork provides no measurable improvement over few-shot prompting alone. Comprehensive ablation studies reveal that few-shot examples contribute +21.5% to performance and documentation contributes +5.0%, while the hypernetwork adds 0%. A 3B model with well-designed prompts achieves 79.7% of GPT-5's average performance at $10 \times$ lower latency. Error analysis across 722 failure cases spanning all shot counts (0--5) shows that at the 5-shot configuration (106 failures), failure modes are task-dependent: schema-heavy tasks (Spider 2.0, WebArena) show near-zero format errors with remaining failures semantic, while format errors dominate on Gorilla (100%) and InterCode (70%). These findings redirect practitioners toward prompt engineering and example curation rather than complex adaptation architectures.

analysis.tldr: Meta-Tool 通过系统实验发现，对于小语言模型，精心设计的少样本提示比复杂的超网络 LoRA 适应更有效，超网络未带来可衡量的性能提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 小语言模型在工具使用任务中通常需要复杂的适应机制，但能否通过更简单的少样本提示实现强性能尚不清楚，这有助于降低部署成本。
analysis.problem: 评估超网络生成的 LoRA 权重与少样本提示在小语言模型工具适应中的效果差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出超网络（227.8M 参数）未带来可衡量的改进，少样本示例贡献 +21.5%，文档贡献 +5.0%，超网络贡献 0%。
analysis.method: Meta-Tool 是一个受控实证研究，比较四种适应机制：少样本提示、文档编码、超网络生成的 LoRA 权重和值引导束搜索，使用 Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct 骨干网络。
contributions: 发现超网络 LoRA 适应在工具使用任务中未优于精心设计的少样本提示。
提供跨四个基准的全面消融研究和错误分析，指导实践者关注提示工程和示例筛选。
analysis.experiments: 在 Gorilla APIBench、Spider 2.0、WebArena 和 InterCode 四个基准上评估，使用 722 个失败案例进行错误分析，涵盖 0-5 个样本。
limitations: 仅使用 3B 模型，结论可能不适用于更大模型。
超网络设计可能不是最优，其他架构可能不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Meta-Tool 通过系统实验发现，对于小语言模型，精心设计的少样本提示比复杂的超网络 LoRA 适应更有效，超网络未带来可衡量的性能提升。

papers.title: The Path Not Taken: Duality in Reasoning about Program Execution
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown remarkable capabilities across diverse coding tasks. However, their adoption requires a true understanding of program execution rather than relying on surface-level patterns. Existing benchmarks primarily focus on predicting program properties tied to specific inputs (e.g., code coverage, program outputs). As a result, they provide a narrow view of dynamic code reasoning and are prone to data contamination. We argue that understanding program execution requires evaluating its inherent duality through two complementary reasoning tasks: (i) predicting a program's observed behavior for a given input, and (ii) inferring how the input must be mutated toward a specific behavioral objective. Both tasks jointly probe a model's causal understanding of execution flow. We instantiate this duality in DexBench, a benchmark comprising 445 paired instances, and evaluate 13 LLMs. Our results demonstrate that dual-path reasoning provides a robust and discriminative proxy for dynamic code understanding.

analysis.tldr: 提出程序执行推理的双重性概念，并构建DexBench基准来评估LLM对代码动态执行的理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准主要关注预测程序在特定输入下的属性（如输出），视角狭窄且易受数据污染，无法全面评估LLM对程序执行因果关系的真正理解。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能更全面、鲁棒地评估LLM对程序执行动态理解的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出程序执行推理的双重性：正向推理（预测给定输入的程序行为）和逆向推理（推断如何修改输入以达到特定行为目标），并构建包含445对实例的DexBench基准。
contributions: 提出程序执行推理的双重性概念，将正向和逆向推理结合作为评估动态代码理解的代理。
构建DexBench基准，包含445对实例，并评估13个LLM，证明双路径推理是鲁棒且有区分度的动态代码理解代理。
analysis.experiments: 在DexBench上评估了13个LLM，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准规模较小（445对实例），可能不足以覆盖所有程序执行场景。
仅评估了LLM，未涉及其他类型的模型或方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出程序执行推理的双重性概念，并构建DexBench基准来评估LLM对代码动态执行的理解。

papers.title: HiPO: Hierarchical Preference Optimization for Adaptive Reasoning in LLMs
papers.abstract: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) is an effective framework for aligning large language models with human preferences, but it struggles with complex reasoning tasks. DPO optimizes for the likelihood of generating preferred over dispreferred responses in their entirety and lacks the granularity to provide feedback on subsections of many-step solutions typical of reasoning tasks. Existing methods excel at either stable preference learning (e.g., DPO variants like KTO and RSO) or structured reasoning (e.g., ReMA's multi-agent RL framework, Tree of Thoughts), but fail to merge these complementary strengths. We propose HiPO (Hierarchical Preference Optimization), an extension of DPO that separates responses into reasoning segments (query clarification and context, reasoning steps, and answer) and computes loss as a weighted sum of the DPO loss for each segment. Our approach enables segment-specific training while maintaining DPO's computational efficiency and training stability. We demonstrate that for multiple 7B LLMs fine-tuned using HiPO and DPO on the Math Stack Exchange preference dataset, the models trained with HiPO outperform the others on a variety of common math benchmarks and achieve greater organization, logical flow, and consistency as measured by GPT-4.1.

analysis.tldr: HiPO 将 DPO 扩展为分层偏好优化，按推理片段计算损失，提升 LLM 在数学推理任务上的表现。
analysis.research_motivation: DPO 在复杂推理任务中缺乏对多步推理子部分的细粒度反馈，现有方法无法同时兼顾稳定的偏好学习和结构化推理。
analysis.problem: 如何让偏好优化方法在复杂推理任务中提供细粒度反馈，同时保持训练稳定性和效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: DPO 对整个响应进行整体优化，无法区分推理过程中的不同阶段（如澄清、步骤、答案），导致在需要多步推理的任务中效果不佳。
analysis.method: 将响应分解为查询澄清与上下文、推理步骤、答案三个片段，对每个片段分别计算 DPO 损失，并加权求和作为总损失。
contributions: 提出 HiPO，一种分层偏好优化方法，支持片段级训练。
在多个 7B LLM 上验证 HiPO 在数学基准上的优势，并展示更好的组织性和逻辑一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在 Math Stack Exchange 偏好数据集上对多个 7B LLM 进行微调，在多个常见数学基准上评估，并使用 GPT-4.1 评估组织性、逻辑流和一致性。
limitations: 仅针对数学推理任务验证，未涉及其他领域。
片段划分方式可能不适用于所有推理任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HiPO 将 DPO 扩展为分层偏好优化，按推理片段计算损失，提升 LLM 在数学推理任务上的表现。

papers.title: IMPACT-CYCLE: A Contract-Based Multi-Agent System for Claim-Level Supervisory Correction of Long-Video Semantic Memory
papers.abstract: Correcting errors in long-video understanding is disproportionately costly: existing multimodal pipelines produce opaque, end-to-end outputs that expose no intermediate state for inspection, forcing annotators to revisit raw video and reconstruct temporal logic from scratch. The core bottleneck is not generation quality alone, but the absence of a supervisory interface through which human effort can be proportional to the scope of each error. We present IMPACT-CYCLE, a supervisory multi-agent system that reformulates long-video understanding as iterative claim-level maintenance of a shared semantic memory -- a structured, versioned state encoding typed claims, a claim dependency graph, and a provenance log. Role-specialized agents operating under explicit authority contracts decompose verification into local object-relation correctness, cross-temporal consistency, and global semantic coherence, with corrections confined to structurally dependent claims. When automated evidence is insufficient, the system escalates to human arbitration as the supervisory authority with final override rights; dependency-closure re-verification then ensures correction cost remains proportional to error scope. Experiments on VidOR show substantially improved downstream reasoning (VQA: 0.71 to 0.79) and a 4.8x reduction in human arbitration cost, with workload significantly lower than manual annotation. Code will be released at https://github.com/MKong17/IMPACT_CYCLE.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于合约的多智能体系统，将长视频理解转化为迭代式声明级语义记忆维护，实现高效纠错。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有长视频理解管线输出不透明，无法定位中间状态，导致纠错成本高昂，人工需从头回顾原始视频。
analysis.problem: 长视频理解中缺乏可监督的接口，使得纠错人力与错误范围不成比例。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建合约式多智能体系统，通过角色专业化智能体在明确权限合约下分解验证任务，维护结构化语义记忆（含声明、依赖图、溯源日志），并在证据不足时升级至人工仲裁。
contributions: 提出IMPACT-CYCLE系统，将长视频理解重构为声明级语义记忆的迭代维护。
通过合约机制和依赖闭包重验证，实现纠错成本与错误范围成比例。
analysis.experiments: 在VidOR数据集上，下游推理VQA从0.71提升至0.79，人工仲裁成本降低4.8倍，工作量显著低于手动标注。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量初始语义记忆构建。
合约设计可能需针对不同视频领域调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于合约的多智能体系统，将长视频理解转化为迭代式声明级语义记忆维护，实现高效纠错。

papers.title: AgentSOC: A Multi-Layer Agentic AI Framework for Security Operations Automation
papers.abstract: Security Operations Centers (SOCs) increasingly encounter difficulties in correlating heterogeneous alerts, interpreting multi-stage attack progressions, and selecting safe and effective response actions. This study introduces AgentSOC, a multi-layered agentic AI framework that enhances SOC automation by integrating perception, anticipatory reasoning, and risk-based action planning. The proposed architecture consolidates several layers of abstraction to provide a single operational loop to support normalizing alerts, enriching context, generating hypotheses, validating structural feasibility, and executing policy-compliant responses. Conceptually evaluated within a large enterprise environment, AgentSOC improves triage consistency, anticipates attackers' intentions, and provides recommended containment options that are both operationally feasible and well-balanced between security efficacy and operational impact. The results suggest that hybrid agentic reasoning has the potential to serve as a foundation for developing adaptive, safer SOC automation in large enterprises. Additionally, a minimal Proof-Of-Concept (POC) demonstration using LANL authentication data demonstrated the feasibility of the proposed architecture.

analysis.tldr: 提出多层智能体框架AgentSOC，通过感知、推理和风险规划自动化安全运营中心（SOC）流程。
analysis.research_motivation: 安全运营中心（SOC）面临异构告警关联困难、多阶段攻击进程解读复杂以及安全有效响应动作选择困难等挑战，亟需自动化解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能够自动关联告警、预测攻击意图并选择安全有效响应动作的SOC自动化框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出多层智能体AI框架AgentSOC，包含感知层、预期推理层和基于风险的动作规划层，实现告警标准化、上下文丰富、假设生成、结构可行性验证及策略合规响应。
contributions: 提出集成感知、推理和风险规划的多层智能体SOC自动化框架。
通过概念评估和基于LANL认证数据的最小概念验证（POC）展示了框架的可行性和潜在优势。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅进行了概念评估和最小POC，缺乏大规模实证验证。
未讨论框架在真实复杂环境中的部署挑战和性能瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多层智能体框架AgentSOC，通过感知、推理和风险规划自动化安全运营中心（SOC）流程。

papers.title: EvoAgent: An Evolvable Agent Framework with Skill Learning and Multi-Agent Delegation
papers.abstract: This paper proposes EvoAgent - an evolvable large language model (LLM) agent framework that integrates structured skill learning with a hierarchical sub-agent delegation mechanism. EvoAgent models skills as multi-file structured capability units equipped with triggering mechanisms and evolutionary metadata, and enables continuous skill generation and optimization through a user-feedback-driven closed-loop process. In addition, by incorporating a three-stage skill matching strategy and a three-layer memory architecture, the framework supports dynamic task decomposition for complex problems and long-term capability accumulation. Experimental results based on real-world foreign trade scenarios demonstrate that, after integrating EvoAgent, GPT5.2 achieves significant improvements in professionalism, accuracy, and practical utility. Under a five-dimensional LLM-as-Judge evaluation protocol, the overall average score increases by approximately 28%. Further model transfer experiments indicate that the performance of an agent system depends not only on the intrinsic capabilities of the underlying model, but also on the degree of synergy between the model and the agent architecture.

analysis.tldr: 提出EvoAgent框架，通过结构化技能学习和分层子代理委派机制，使LLM代理在真实外贸场景中性能提升约28%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM代理框架缺乏持续技能进化和复杂任务分解能力，难以适应动态真实场景。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个可进化的代理框架，使其能够持续学习技能、动态分解复杂任务并实现长期能力积累。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 代理系统性能不仅取决于底层模型能力，还取决于模型与代理架构的协同程度。
analysis.method: EvoAgent框架：将技能建模为多文件结构化能力单元（含触发机制和进化元数据），通过用户反馈闭环实现技能持续生成与优化；采用三阶段技能匹配策略和三层次记忆架构支持动态任务分解与长期能力积累。
contributions: 提出结构化技能单元建模方法，支持技能触发与进化。
设计用户反馈驱动的闭环技能优化机制。
引入三阶段技能匹配与三层次记忆架构，实现复杂任务分解与长期能力积累。
analysis.experiments: 基于真实外贸场景，GPT5.2集成EvoAgent后在五维LLM-as-Judge评估中平均分提升约28%；模型迁移实验表明代理性能取决于模型与架构的协同。
limitations: 实验仅基于外贸场景，泛化性未验证。
技能进化依赖用户反馈质量，可能引入噪声。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EvoAgent框架，通过结构化技能学习和分层子代理委派机制，使LLM代理在真实外贸场景中性能提升约28%。

papers.title: EvoJail: Evolutionary Diverse Jailbreak Prompt Generation for Large Language Models
papers.abstract: As LLMs continue to shape real-world applications, automated jailbreak generation becomes essential to reveal safety weaknesses and guide model improvement. Existing automatic jailbreak generation methods have not yet fully considered two important aspects: adaptability to evolving safety-finetuned models, which affects their effectiveness on newer model versions, and diversity in generated prompts, which can cause narrow or repetitive attack patterns. To address these issues, we propose EvoJail, an instruction-fusion-driven evolutionary jailbreak generation framework that formalizes jailbreak prompt generation as a multi-objective black-box optimization problem and leverages the principles of evolutionary algorithms to search for jailbreak prompts that can adapt across different model versions and exhibit diverse attack patterns. Specifically, EvoJail integrates jailbreak prompt generation into an iterative evolutionary loop, where at each iteration candidate prompts are evaluated directly against the target model and then selected and varied based on the target model's responses, enabling the generation process to continuously adapt to model updates. To enhance diversity, EvoJail introduces field-aware instruction fusion to construct diverse starting points and incorporates diversity-aware objectives into the evolutionary fitness function, guiding the search toward prompts with richer semantic variation, while further designing multi-level LLM-based mutation operators that modify prompt structures at different granularities to promote structural diversity throughout the evolutionary process. Results demonstrate that EvoJail has stronger adaptability and can achieve over $93\%$ attack success rate and more than $5.6\%$ improvement in diversity metrics over state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: EvoJail 利用进化算法生成多样且适应不同版本 LLM 的越狱提示，攻击成功率超 93%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自动越狱生成方法未能充分适应不断安全微调的模型版本，且生成的提示多样性不足，导致攻击模式重复或失效。
analysis.problem: 如何生成能适应不同版本 LLM 且具有高多样性的越狱提示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 EvoJail 框架，将越狱提示生成形式化为多目标黑盒优化问题，利用进化算法迭代评估、选择和变异提示；通过领域感知指令融合构建多样起点，在适应度函数中加入多样性目标，并设计多级 LLM 变异算子促进结构多样性。
contributions: 提出指令融合驱动的进化越狱生成框架 EvoJail，可适应不同版本的安全微调模型。
引入多样性感知目标与多级变异算子，显著提升生成提示的语义和结构多样性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个 LLM 版本上测试，EvoJail 攻击成功率超 93%，多样性指标比现有方法提升超 5.6%。
limitations: 可能依赖目标模型的黑盒访问，对完全封闭模型效果未知。
进化过程计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EvoJail 利用进化算法生成多样且适应不同版本 LLM 的越狱提示，攻击成功率超 93%。

papers.title: Absorber LLM: Harnessing Causal Synchronization for Test-Time Training
papers.abstract: Transformers suffer from a high computational cost that grows with sequence length for self-attention, making inference in long streams prohibited by memory consumption. Constant-memory alternatives such as RNNs and SSMs compress history into states with fixed size and thus lose long-tail dependencies, while methods that memorize contexts into parameters, such as Test-Time Training (TTT), are prone to overfitting token-level projection and fail to preserve the causal effect of context in pretrained LLMs. We propose Absorber LLM, which formulates long-context retention as a self-supervised causal synchronization: after absorbing historical contexts into parameters, a contextless model should match the original model with full context on future generations. We optimize this objective by synchronizing internal behaviors of the updated model with the original one, ensuring context absorption and generalization. Experiments on long-context and streaming benchmarks show that Absorber LLM reduces inference memory and improves accuracy over prior parameter-as-memory baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出Absorber LLM，通过因果同步实现测试时训练，在长上下文推理中降低内存并提升准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer自注意力计算成本随序列长度增长，长序列推理受内存限制；RNN/SSM等固定状态方法丢失长尾依赖；TTT方法过拟合token级投影且破坏因果效应。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持因果一致性的前提下，将长上下文高效压缩到模型参数中，实现低内存推理且不丢失长尾依赖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将长上下文保留建模为自监督因果同步：将历史上下文吸收到参数后，无上下文模型应与原始全上下文模型在后续生成上匹配，通过同步更新模型与原始模型的内部行为来优化该目标。
contributions: 提出Absorber LLM框架，将长上下文保留形式化为因果同步目标
在长上下文和流式基准上降低推理内存并提升准确率
analysis.experiments: 在长上下文和流式基准上评估，与先前参数即内存基线相比，Absorber LLM降低了推理内存并提高了准确率。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构，泛化性未验证
同步过程可能增加训练开销
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Absorber LLM，通过因果同步实现测试时训练，在长上下文推理中降低内存并提升准确率。

papers.title: Pairing Regularization for Mitigating Many-to-One Collapse in GANs
papers.abstract: Mode collapse remains a fundamental challenge in training generative adversarial networks (GANs). While existing works have primarily focused on inter-mode collapse, such as mode dropping, intra-mode collapse-where many latent variables map to the same or highly similar outputs-has received significantly less attention. In this work, we propose a pairing regularizer jointly optimized with the generator to mitigate the many-to-one collapse by enforcing local consistency between latent variables and generated samples. We show that the effect of pairing regularization depends on the dominant failure mode of training. In collapse-prone regimes with limited exploration, pairing encourages structured local exploration, leading to improved coverage and higher recall. In contrast, under stabilized training with sufficient exploration, pairing refines the generator's induced data density by discouraging redundant mappings, thereby improving precision without sacrificing recall. Extensive experiments on both toy distributions and real-image benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed regularizer effectively complements existing stabilization techniques by directly addressing intra-mode collapse.

analysis.tldr: 提出配对正则化方法，通过强制隐变量与生成样本的局部一致性来缓解GAN中的多对一坍缩问题。
analysis.research_motivation: GAN训练中模式坍缩是根本挑战，现有工作主要关注模式间坍缩（如模式丢失），而模式内坍缩（多个隐变量映射到相同或高度相似的输出）受到的关注较少，需要有效方法解决。
analysis.problem: 解决GAN训练中的多对一坍缩（intra-mode collapse）问题，即多个隐变量生成相似输出。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出配对正则化的效果取决于训练的主导失败模式：在探索受限的坍缩倾向阶段，配对鼓励结构化局部探索，改善覆盖率和召回率；在稳定训练且充分探索阶段，配对通过抑制冗余映射提高精度而不牺牲召回率。
analysis.method: 提出一种与生成器联合优化的配对正则化项，通过强制隐变量与生成样本之间的局部一致性来缓解多对一坍缩。
contributions: 首次系统研究GAN中的模式内坍缩（多对一映射）问题
提出配对正则化方法，能根据训练阶段动态调整效果，同时改善覆盖率和精度
analysis.experiments: 在玩具分布和真实图像基准上进行了广泛实验，验证了正则化器能有效补充现有稳定化技术，直接解决模式内坍缩。
limitations: 可能对超参数敏感，需要调整配对强度
在极端坍缩场景下效果可能有限
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出配对正则化方法，通过强制隐变量与生成样本的局部一致性来缓解GAN中的多对一坍缩问题。

papers.title: Semi-Supervised Flow Matching for Mosaiced and Panchromatic Fusion Imaging
papers.abstract: Fusing a low resolution (LR) mosaiced hyperspectral image (HSI) with a high resolution (HR) panchromatic (PAN) image offers a promising avenue for video-rate HR-HSI imaging via single-shot acquisition, yet its severely ill-posed nature remains a significant challenge. In this work, we propose a novel semi-supervised flow matching framework for mosaiced and PAN image fusion. Unlike previous diffusion-based approaches constrained by specific protocols or handcrafted assumptions, our method seamlessly integrates an unsupervised scheme with flow matching, resulting in a generalizable and efficient generative framework. Specifically, our method follows a two-stage training pipeline. First, we pretrain an unsupervised prior network to produce an initial pseudo HR-HSI. Building on this, we then train a conditional flow matching model to generate the target HR-HSI, introducing a random voting mechanism that iteratively refines the initial HR-HSI estimate, enabling robust and effective fusion. During inference, we employ a conflict-free gradient guidance strategy that ensures spectrally and spatially consistent HR-HSI reconstruction. Experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that our method achieves superior quantitative and qualitative performance by a significant margin compared to representative baselines. Beyond mosaiced and PAN fusion, our approach provides a flexible generative framework that can be readily extended to other image fusion tasks and integrated with unsupervised or blind image restoration algorithms.

analysis.tldr: 提出半监督流匹配框架用于马赛克高光谱与全色图像融合，实现高效鲁棒的高分辨率高光谱成像。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频速率高分辨率高光谱成像需求迫切，但单次采集的LR马赛克HSI与HR全色图像融合是严重病态问题，现有扩散方法受限于特定协议或手工假设。
analysis.problem: 解决LR马赛克HSI与HR PAN图像融合的病态问题，实现通用、高效的高分辨率HSI重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段训练：1) 无监督先验网络生成初始伪HR-HSI；2) 条件流匹配模型结合随机投票机制迭代细化初始估计；推理时采用无冲突梯度引导策略保证光谱和空间一致性。
contributions: 提出半监督流匹配框架，融合无监督方案与流匹配，实现通用高效的生成式融合。
引入随机投票机制迭代细化初始估计，提升融合鲁棒性。
提出无冲突梯度引导策略，确保重建的光谱和空间一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准数据集上，与代表性基线相比，定量和定性性能均显著优越。
limitations: 可能依赖无监督先验网络的质量。
随机投票机制可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出半监督流匹配框架用于马赛克高光谱与全色图像融合，实现高效鲁棒的高分辨率高光谱成像。

papers.title: Topology-Aware Skeleton Detection via Lighthouse-Guided Structured Inference
papers.abstract: In natural images, object skeletons are used to represent geometric shapes. However, even slight variations in pose or movement can cause noticeable changes in skeleton structure, increasing the difficulty of detecting the skeleton and often resulting in discontinuous skeletons. Existing methods primarily focus on point-level skeleton point detection and overlook the importance of structural continuity in recovering complete skeletons. To address this issue, we propose Lighthouse-Skel, a topology-aware skeleton detection method via lighthouse-guided structured inference. Specifically, we introduce a dual-branch collaborative detection framework that jointly learns skeleton confidence field and structural anchors, including endpoints and junction points. The spatial distributions learned by the point branch guide the network to focus on topologically vulnerable regions, which improves the accuracy of skeleton detection. Based on the learned skeleton confidence field, we further propose a lighthouse-guided topology completion strategy, which uses detected junction points and breakpoints as lighthouses to reconnect discontinuous skeleton segments along low-cost paths, thereby improving skeleton continuity and structural integrity. Experimental results on four public datasets demonstrate that the proposed method achieves competitive detection accuracy while substantially improving skeleton connectivity and structural integrity.

analysis.tldr: 提出Lighthouse-Skel，通过灯塔引导的结构化推理实现拓扑感知的骨架检测，显著提升骨架连续性和结构完整性。
analysis.research_motivation: 自然图像中物体骨架的检测易受姿态变化影响导致结构不连续，现有方法忽略结构连续性，难以恢复完整骨架。
analysis.problem: 现有骨架检测方法仅关注点级检测，缺乏对骨架结构连续性的建模，导致检测结果不连续。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 姿态或运动的微小变化会引起骨架结构明显改变，增加检测难度，常导致骨架不连续。
analysis.method: 提出双分支协作检测框架，联合学习骨架置信场和结构锚点（端点、连接点）；基于置信场提出灯塔引导的拓扑补全策略，利用检测到的连接点和断点作为灯塔，沿低成本路径重连不连续骨架段。
contributions: 提出拓扑感知的骨架检测方法Lighthouse-Skel，通过双分支框架联合学习置信场和结构锚点。
提出灯塔引导的拓扑补全策略，利用检测到的关键点重连不连续骨架，提升连续性和结构完整性。
analysis.experiments: 在四个公开数据集上实验，表明方法在保持检测精度的同时显著改善骨架连接性和结构完整性。
limitations: 可能对复杂拓扑结构（如密集交叉）的补全效果有限。
灯塔引导策略依赖关键点检测的准确性，误差可能累积。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Lighthouse-Skel，通过灯塔引导的结构化推理实现拓扑感知的骨架检测，显著提升骨架连续性和结构完整性。

papers.title: Adaptive Conformal Anomaly Detection with Time Series Foundation Models for Signal Monitoring
papers.abstract: We propose a post-hoc adaptive conformal anomaly detection method for monitoring time series that leverages predictions from pre-trained foundation models without requiring additional fine-tuning. Our method yields an interpretable anomaly score directly interpretable as a false alarm rate (p-value), facilitating transparent and actionable decision-making. It employs weighted quantile conformal prediction bounds and adaptively learns optimal weighting parameters from past predictions, enabling calibration under distribution shifts and stable false alarm control, while preserving out-of-sample guarantees. As a model-agnostic solution, it integrates seamlessly with foundation models and supports rapid deployment in resource-constrained environments. This approach addresses key industrial challenges such as limited data availability, lack of training expertise, and the need for immediate inference, while taking advantage of the growing accessibility of time series foundation models. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets show that the proposed approach delivers strong performance, combining simplicity, interpretability, robustness, and adaptivity.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种后验自适应共形异常检测方法，利用预训练时间序列基础模型实现无需微调的信号监控。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业信号监控面临数据稀缺、缺乏训练专家、需快速部署等挑战，而现有方法难以在分布偏移下稳定控制误报率。
analysis.problem: 如何利用预训练时间序列基础模型实现无需微调、可解释且自适应分布偏移的异常检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用加权分位数共形预测界，从历史预测中自适应学习最优权重参数，实现分布偏移下的校准和稳定误报控制，同时保持样本外保证。
contributions: 提出一种后验自适应共形异常检测方法，无需微调即可与时间序列基础模型集成。
提供可解释的异常分数（p值），直接对应误报率，支持透明决策。
通过自适应权重学习实现分布偏移下的稳定误报控制，并保持样本外保证。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实数据集上实验，表明方法在简单性、可解释性、鲁棒性和自适应性方面表现良好。
limitations: 可能依赖基础模型的预测质量。
自适应权重学习可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种后验自适应共形异常检测方法，利用预训练时间序列基础模型实现无需微调的信号监控。

papers.title: Not All Memories Age the Same: Autodiscovery of Adaptive Decay in Knowledge Graphs
papers.abstract: Knowledge graphs used for retrieval treat all facts as equally current. Existing temporal approaches apply uniform decay, using a single forgetting curve regardless of knowledge type. We show this is fundamentally misspecified: different knowledge types exhibit different temporal dynamics, and the core retrieval problem is not latency or throughput but identifying what is important at query time. We propose a hierarchical framework that replaces uniform decay with a continuous decay surface parameterized by two orthogonal signals: velocity (how frequently a concept is observed) and volatility (how much the value changes between observations, measured via embedding distance). The decay surface is decomposed into three learnable levels: domain-level parameters capture universal patterns (some predicates are inherently permanent, others inherently transient), context-level parameters capture setting-dependent variation, and entity-level adaptation personalizes decay to specific subjects. All parameters emerge from data through survival analysis on observed value lifetimes, requiring no predefined taxonomies or domain expertise. We formulate edge lifetime as a survival problem where the event is value supersession (a meaningfully different value replacing the current one), distinct from mere re-observation. Experiments on synthetic temporal knowledge graphs demonstrate recovery of planted hierarchical parameters (HDBSCAN ARI = 1.0). Validation on 107 Wikipedia articles and 1,163 patient records from the Synthea clinical EHR simulator shows that velocity-volatility clusters emerge naturally, align with observable persistence patterns, and near-universally exhibit the Lindy effect (Weibull shape k < 1). Uniform decay performs 18x worse than no temporal weighting. Heterogeneous decay recovers from this, with each hierarchy level contributing measurable improvement.

analysis.tldr: 提出层次化自适应衰减框架，替代知识图谱检索中的统一遗忘曲线，通过速度和波动性两个信号参数化连续衰减曲面。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有知识图谱检索将所有事实视为同等时效，使用统一遗忘曲线，但不同知识类型具有不同的时间动态，导致检索结果不准确。
analysis.problem: 知识图谱检索中如何根据知识类型自适应地确定事实的时效性权重，以提升查询时重要事实的识别能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同知识类型表现出不同的时间动态，统一衰减效果比无时间加权差18倍；速度和波动性聚类自然出现，且普遍存在林迪效应（Weibull形状参数k<1）。
analysis.method: 提出层次化框架，用连续衰减曲面替代统一衰减，曲面由速度（概念观测频率）和波动性（观测间值的变化，通过嵌入距离度量）两个正交信号参数化，并分解为领域级、上下文级和实体级三个可学习层次，通过生存分析从数据中学习参数。
contributions: 首次揭示知识图谱中不同知识类型具有不同时间动态，统一衰减存在根本性错误设定。
提出层次化自适应衰减框架，通过速度和波动性参数化连续衰减曲面，无需预定义分类或领域知识。
在合成数据和真实数据（Wikipedia、Synthea临床数据）上验证了方法的有效性，各层次贡献可测量。
analysis.experiments: 在合成时间知识图谱上恢复层次参数（HDBSCAN ARI=1.0）；在107篇Wikipedia文章和1,163条Synthea临床记录上验证，速度-波动性聚类自然出现，统一衰减比无时间加权差18倍，层次化衰减显著改善。
limitations: 实验仅在合成数据和两个真实数据集上验证，泛化性需更多领域测试。
方法依赖嵌入距离度量波动性，可能受嵌入质量影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出层次化自适应衰减框架，替代知识图谱检索中的统一遗忘曲线，通过速度和波动性两个信号参数化连续衰减曲面。

papers.title: On the Stability and Generalization of First-order Bilevel Minimax Optimization
papers.abstract: Bilevel optimization and bilevel minimax optimization have recently emerged as unifying frameworks for a range of machine-learning tasks, including hyperparameter optimization and reinforcement learning. The existing literature focuses on empirical efficiency and convergence guarantees, leaving a critical theoretical gap in understanding how well these algorithms generalize. To bridge this gap, we provide the first systematic generalization analysis for first-order gradient-based bilevel minimax solvers with lower-level minimax problems. Specifically, by leveraging algorithmic stability arguments, we derive fine-grained generalization bounds for three representative algorithms, including single-timescale stochastic gradient descent-ascent, and two variants of two-timescale stochastic gradient descent-ascent. Our results reveal a precise trade-off among algorithmic stability, generalization gaps, and practical settings. Furthermore, extensive empirical evaluations corroborate our theoretical insights on realistic optimization tasks with bilevel minimax structures.

analysis.tldr: 首次系统分析一阶双层极小极大优化算法的泛化性能，推导出三种代表性算法的泛化界并揭示稳定性-泛化权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 双层优化和双层极小极大优化在超参数优化、强化学习等任务中广泛应用，但现有研究主要关注收敛性和经验效率，缺乏对算法泛化能力的理论理解。
analysis.problem: 如何从理论上分析一阶梯度双层极小极大求解器的泛化误差，并揭示算法稳定性与泛化性能之间的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用算法稳定性理论，对单时间尺度SGD-ascent和两种双时间尺度SGD-ascent变体推导精细的泛化界。
contributions: 首次对一阶双层极小极大优化算法进行系统泛化分析。
推导出三种代表性算法的泛化界，揭示稳定性、泛化差距与实际设置之间的精确权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在具有双层极小极大结构的实际优化任务上进行实证评估，验证理论见解。
limitations: 分析限于一阶梯度方法，未涵盖高阶或启发式方法。
泛化界可能依赖于特定假设（如损失函数光滑性），实际应用中的松弛程度未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次系统分析一阶双层极小极大优化算法的泛化性能，推导出三种代表性算法的泛化界并揭示稳定性-泛化权衡。

papers.title: Meta Additive Model: Interpretable Sparse Learning With Auto Weighting
papers.abstract: Sparse additive models have attracted much attention in high-dimensional data analysis due to their flexible representation and strong interpretability. However, most existing models are limited to single-level learning under the mean-squared error criterion, whose empirical performance can degrade significantly in the presence of complex noise, such as non-Gaussian perturbations, outliers, noisy labels, and imbalanced categories. The sample reweighting strategy is widely used to reduce the model's sensitivity to atypical data; however, it typically requires prespecifying the weighting functions and manually selecting additional hyperparameters. To address this issue, we propose a new meta additive model (MAM) based on the bilevel optimization framework, which learns data-driven weighting of individual losses by parameterizing the weighting function via an MLP trained on meta data. MAM is capable of a variety of learning tasks, including variable selection, robust regression estimation, and imbalanced classification. Theoretically, MAM provides guarantees on convergence in computation, algorithmic generalization, and variable selection consistency under mild conditions. Empirically, MAM outperforms several state-of-the-art additive models on both synthetic and real-world data under various data corruptions.

analysis.tldr: 提出元加性模型，通过双层优化自动学习样本权重，提升稀疏加性模型在复杂噪声下的鲁棒性和可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有稀疏加性模型在复杂噪声（如非高斯扰动、异常值、噪声标签、类别不平衡）下性能显著下降，而样本重加权策略通常需要预设权重函数和手动选择超参数，缺乏自动化和灵活性。
analysis.problem: 如何自动学习数据驱动的样本权重，使稀疏加性模型在复杂噪声下仍能保持鲁棒性和可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出元加性模型（MAM），基于双层优化框架，通过MLP在元数据上参数化权重函数，自动学习每个样本的损失权重，实现变量选择、鲁棒回归和不平衡分类。
contributions: 提出MAM，将样本重加权融入稀疏加性模型，通过双层优化自动学习权重，无需预设权重函数或手动调参。
理论保证：在温和条件下提供计算收敛性、算法泛化性和变量选择一致性的保证。
实验验证：在合成和真实数据上，MAM在多种数据损坏下优于多个最先进加性模型。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实数据上，针对多种数据损坏（如非高斯噪声、异常值、噪声标签、类别不平衡）进行实验，MAM优于多个最先进加性模型。
limitations: 可能对元数据的质量和数量敏感。
双层优化可能增加计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出元加性模型，通过双层优化自动学习样本权重，提升稀疏加性模型在复杂噪声下的鲁棒性和可解释性。

papers.title: Learning to Solve the Quadratic Assignment Problem with Warm-Started MCMC Finetuning
papers.abstract: The quadratic assignment problem (QAP) is a fundamental NP-hard task that poses significant challenges for both traditional heuristics and modern learning-based solvers. Existing QAP solvers still struggle to achieve consistently competitive performance across structurally diverse real-world instances. To bridge this performance gap, we propose PLMA, an innovative permutation learning framework. PLMA features an efficient warm-started MCMC finetuning procedure to enhance deployment-time performance, leveraging short Markov chains to anchor the adaptation to the promising regions previously explored. For rapid exploration via MCMC over the permutation space, we design an additive energy-based model (EBM) that enables an $O(1)$-time 2-swap Metropolis-Hastings sampling step. Moreover, the neural network used to parameterize the EBM incorporates a scalable and flexible cross-graph attention mechanism to model interactions between facilities and locations in the QAP. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PLMA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across various benchmarks. In particular, PLMA achieves a near-zero average optimality gap on QAPLIB, exhibits remarkably superior robustness on the notoriously difficult Taixxeyy instances, and also serves as an effective QAP solver in bandwidth minimization.

analysis.tldr: 提出PLMA框架，用预热MCMC微调与加性EBM高效求解二次分配问题，在多个基准上超越SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 二次分配问题（QAP）是NP难问题，传统启发式和现代学习求解器在结构多样的真实实例上难以持续取得竞争性能。
analysis.problem: 提升QAP求解器在多样实例上的性能一致性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PLMA框架，包含预热MCMC微调过程（利用短马尔可夫链锚定到先前探索的有希望区域）和加性EBM（实现O(1)时间2-swap Metropolis-Hastings采样），并用跨图注意力机制参数化EBM。
contributions: 提出PLMA框架，结合预热MCMC微调与加性EBM高效求解QAP。
设计O(1)时间2-swap Metropolis-Hastings采样步骤，加速MCMC探索。
引入可扩展的跨图注意力机制建模设施与位置交互。
analysis.experiments: 在QAPLIB上达到近零平均最优间隙，在困难的Taixxeyy实例上表现出显著鲁棒性，并在带宽最小化中作为有效求解器。
limitations: 可能对超参数敏感，如MCMC链长和温度。
跨图注意力机制在大规模实例上的计算开销可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PLMA框架，用预热MCMC微调与加性EBM高效求解二次分配问题，在多个基准上超越SOTA。

papers.title: FurnSet: Exploiting Repeats for 3D Scene Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Single-view 3D scene reconstruction involves inferring both object geometry and spatial layout. Existing methods typically reconstruct objects independently or rely on implicit scene context, failing to exploit the repeated instances commonly present in realworld scenes. We propose FurnSet, a framework that explicitly identifies and leverages repeated object instances to improve reconstruction. Our method introduces per-object CLS tokens and a set-aware self-attention mechanism that groups identical instances and aggregates complementary observations across them, enabling joint reconstruction. We further combine scene-level and object-level conditioning to guide object reconstruction, followed by layout optimization using object point clouds with 3D and 2D projection losses for scene alignment. Experiments on 3D-Future and 3D-Front demonstrate improved scene reconstruction quality, highlighting the effectiveness of exploiting repetition for robust 3D scene reconstruction.

analysis.tldr: 利用重复物体实例提升单视图3D场景重建质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有单视图3D场景重建方法通常独立重建物体或依赖隐式场景上下文，未能充分利用真实场景中常见的重复实例，导致重建质量受限。
analysis.problem: 如何显式识别并利用重复物体实例来改进单视图3D场景重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 真实场景中常出现重复物体实例，但现有方法未有效利用这一结构信息。
analysis.method: 提出FurnSet框架，引入每个物体的CLS标记和集合感知自注意力机制，将相同实例分组并聚合互补观测，结合场景级和物体级条件引导重建，并通过3D和2D投影损失优化布局。
contributions: 提出显式利用重复物体实例的3D场景重建框架FurnSet。
设计集合感知自注意力机制和联合重建策略。
analysis.experiments: 在3D-Future和3D-Front数据集上实验，表明方法提升了场景重建质量。
limitations: 可能依赖重复实例的准确检测。
对非重复场景的泛化能力未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用重复物体实例提升单视图3D场景重建质量。

papers.title: Omission Constraints Decay While Commission Constraints Persist in Long-Context LLM Agents
papers.abstract: LLM agents deployed in production operate under operator-defined behavioral policies (system-prompt instructions such as prohibitions on credential disclosure, data exfiltration, and unauthorized output) that safety evaluations assume hold throughout a conversation. Prohibition-type constraints decay under context pressure while requirement-type constraints persist; we term this asymmetry Security-Recall Divergence (SRD). In a 4,416-trial three-arm causal study across 12 models and 8 providers at six conversation depths, omission compliance falls from 73% at turn 5 to 33% at turn 16 while commission compliance holds at 100% (Mistral Large 3, $p < 10^{-33}$). In the two models with token-matched padding controls, schema semantic content accounts for 62-100% of the dilution effect. Re-injecting constraints before the per-model Safe Turn Depth (STD) restores compliance without retraining. Production security policies consist of prohibitions such as never revealing credentials, never executing untrusted code, and never forwarding user data. Commission-type audit signals remain healthy while omission constraints have already failed, leaving the failure invisible to standard monitoring.

analysis.tldr: 长上下文LLM代理中，禁止型约束随对话深度衰减，而要求型约束保持稳定，导致安全监控盲区。
analysis.research_motivation: 生产环境中LLM代理的行为安全依赖于系统提示中的约束指令，但现有安全评估假设这些约束在整个对话中始终有效，忽略了上下文压力对约束的差异化影响。
analysis.problem: 长上下文对话中，禁止型约束（如不泄露凭证）的遵守率显著下降，而要求型约束（如执行特定操作）保持稳定，这种不对称性导致安全监控失效。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过4416次试验的三臂因果研究发现，禁止型约束的遵守率从第5轮的73%降至第16轮的33%，而要求型约束保持100%遵守；模式语义内容解释了62-100%的稀释效应。
analysis.method: 设计三臂因果实验，在12个模型和8个提供商上测试6种对话深度，并引入令牌匹配的填充控制以隔离语义内容的影响。
contributions: 首次发现并命名安全-召回分歧（SRD）现象，即禁止型约束在长上下文中衰减而要求型约束保持。
通过大规模因果实验量化了SRD的统计显著性和语义内容贡献比例。
提出安全轮次深度（STD）概念，并验证了在STD前重新注入约束可恢复遵守率。
analysis.experiments: 在12个模型和8个提供商上进行了4416次试验的三臂因果研究，包含6种对话深度；在2个模型上使用令牌匹配的填充控制。
limitations: 仅测试了特定类型的约束，可能无法推广到所有安全策略。
重新注入约束的方法可能增加系统复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 长上下文LLM代理中，禁止型约束随对话深度衰减，而要求型约束保持稳定，导致安全监控盲区。

papers.title: Where to Bind Matters: Hebbian Fast Weights in Vision Transformers for Few-Shot Character Recognition
papers.abstract: Standard transformer architectures learn fixed slow-weight representations during training and lack mechanisms for rapid adaptation within an episode. In contrast, biological neural systems address this through fast synaptic updates that form transient associative memories during inference, a property known as Hebbian plasticity. In this paper, we conduct an empirical study of Hebbian Fast-Weight (HFW) modules integrated into multiple transformer backbones, including ViT-Small, DeiT-Small, and Swin-Tiny. We evaluate six model variants: ViT, DeiT, Swin, ViT-Hebbian, DeiT-Hebbian, and Swin-Hebbian on 5-way 1-shot and 5-way 5-shot classification tasks using the Omniglot benchmark under a Prototypical Network meta-learning framework.
